local: Nɩ vaa tɩ waasɩ Ŋmɩŋ, dama wʋnɩŋ ʋ yɩna tɩ ʋ Bʋadembiŋ vuodieke dɩ tɩanna piini mana.

eng: I, Paul, make a personal request to you with the gentleness and kindness of Christ. Im shy when Im with you, but Im bossy when Im away from you!.
local: Nɩ bataŋ baarɩ dɩ dɩɩ yi maŋ bie nɩ jigiŋ, n wo sikimiŋ, ama maŋ keŋ a ga jigaasɩ n yaa wa sikimiŋ. Manɩŋ Pɔɔli gbaŋ gbaŋ n jʋʋsa nɩ Yisa Masia vuodieke die dɩ benne sɔmm ta yaa suguru wo saaŋ ma.

eng: I beg you that when Im with you in person, I wont have to boss you around. Im afraid that I may have to use that kind of behavior with those people who think we live by human standards.
local: Nɩ da vaa n tʋama a yɩ nɩ dɩɩ yi maŋ keŋ keŋ nɩ jigiŋ; dama n sɩba a baarɩ maŋ keŋ keŋ n nan datɩ vuodiekemba dɩ balala dɩ tɩ dɩwa wudieke tɩŋgbaŋka gie vuosisi dɩ dɩnana wa tɩba.

eng: Although we live in the world, we dont fight our battles with human methods.
local: Dɩ yiwo wusie dɩ tɩ yiwo vuota, ama tɩ ka waga waagɩ dieke dɩ sɩna sɩba vuota waagɩŋ.

eng: Our weapons that we fight with arent human, but instead they are powered by God for the destruction of fortresses. They destroy arguments.
local: die wɩa tɩ ka naga vuota hagɩrɩŋ a waga die waagɩŋ, ama tɩ naga Ŋmɩŋ hagɩrɩ dieke dɩ nan chʋʋsɩ Sitaani hagɩrɩŋ mana wa a waga. Tɩ bala a nyaŋŋa vuodiekemba dɩ kana ka tuose Ŋmɩŋ wɩaha.

eng: and every defense that is raised up to oppose the knowledge of God. They capture every thought to make it obedient to Christ.
local: ta nyaŋŋa yɩaŋ dieke vuosi bataŋ dɩ yilinene dɩ ba yallɩ ta yaa kalinbaani aŋaŋ nɩnhagɩrɩŋ ka ma, amʋ vuosi kaaŋ dɩ sɩba Ŋmɩŋ, dɩ tɩ vaa vuoŋ mana sʋŋanyile saagɩ a yɩ Masia.

eng: Once your obedience is complete, we are ready to punish any disobedience.
local: Tɩ tɩŋ sɩba dɩ nɩ saagɩ a tuo Masia nʋaŋ a kpatɩ, tɩ tɩŋ nan yi siri dɩ tɩ datɩ vuodieke nɩŋ mana dɩ zetine ʋ nʋarɩ tɩbɩŋ.

eng: Look at what is right in front of you! If anyone is sure about belonging to Christ, that person should think again. We belong to Christ just like that person.
local: Nɩnɩŋ nɩ daansa vuota nine me nyɩɩna ma. Dɩɩ yi vuoŋ dɩ bie giena a baarɩ dɩ ʋ yiwo Masia sɩɩtɩ, dɩ tieŋ sɩmma dɩ tɩ gbaŋ tɩ yiwo Masia sɩɩtɩ sɩba ʋ yine die wo.

eng: Even if I went on to brag about our authority, I wouldnt be ashamed of it. The Lord gave us that authority to build you up and not to destroy you.
local: N ka chɩga viivi dɩɩ yi maŋ kuule pam yaa gamma tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ dɩ yɩna tɩ yiko dieke wo. Ʋ yɩ tɩ mɩŋ dɩ tɩ nagɩ a suŋŋi nɩ daa tɩ nagɩ a chʋʋsɩ nɩ.

eng: I dont want it to seem like Im trying to intimidate you with my letters.
local: N ka yaala nɩ yilime dɩ n yaala ŋmaamɩŋ yigi nɩ aŋaŋ n gbaŋtɩtɩ n maagɩnana a yɩa nɩ wa.

eng: I know what some people are saying: His letters are severe and powerful, but in person he is weak and his speech is worth nothing.
local: Vuoŋ nan baarɩ dɩ, Pɔɔli gbaŋtɩtɩ paalɩ tʋa mɩŋ, ama ʋ keŋ bie tɩ jigiŋ nɩŋ ʋ ŋaŋ wo hagɩrɩŋ ta ʋ wʋbalɩka dɩaŋ dɩ yi yɔrɩ.

eng: These people need to think about this—that when we are with you, our actions will show that we are the same as the words we wrote when we were away from you.
local: N yaala banɩŋ vuosi mi sɩmma dɩ jaaŋ ka puo wudieke tɩ maagɩnana tɩ gbaŋtɩ ma wa dɩɩ yi tɩ wo nɩ jigiŋ aŋaŋ wudieke tɩ bala tɩ yi dɩɩ yi tɩ bie nɩ jigiŋ.

eng: We wont dare to place ourselves in the same league or to compare ourselves with some of those who are promoting themselves. When they measure themselves by themselves, and compare themselves with themselves, they have no understanding.
local: Wusie, tɩ ka wɔŋ yaala tɩ nagɩ tɩ gbaŋ a magɩsɩ aŋaŋ vuodiekemba dɩ kɔtɩna ba gbaŋ ŋmɩŋsikpeku. Ba wo yɩaŋ, dama ba naga ba gbaŋ a magɩsa aŋaŋ ba chanchaalɩŋ beriŋ dɩ sɩna die.

eng: We wont take pride in anything more than what is appropriate. Lets look at the boundaries of our work area that God has assigned to us. Its an area that includes you.
local: Tɩnɩŋ tɩ kaaŋ kuule yaa gamma jadieke tɩ kana ka mʋ dɩ tɩ kuulime, ama tɩ nan kuuli yaa gamma tʋŋ dieke Ŋmɩŋ dɩ nagɩna a yɩ tɩ dɩ tɩ tʋŋ wa ma. Tɩ bala nɩ Ŋmɩŋ wɩaha yiwo tʋʋmaha a taŋ.

eng: We arent going out of bounds, as if our work area doesnt extend as far as you. We were the first ones to travel as far as Corinth with the gospel of Christ.
local: Nɩ benne buuŋbu mi wo wɩa, die tɩ ka garɩsɩ buuŋbu die tɩ kenne aŋaŋ Masia wʋvɩɩnaha a balɩ a yɩ.

eng: We dont take pride in what other people do outside of our boundaries. We hope that our work will be extended even more by you as your faith grows, until it expands fully .
local: Tɩ ka kuule aŋaŋ wudiekemba vuogaasɩ dɩ yine a tɩaŋ tɩ buuŋbu a daga sɩba tɩ gbaŋ gbaŋ tɩ yine he. Ama tɩ yaa tama dɩ nɩ yada nan gʋtɩ pam, aŋ nɩ suŋŋi tɩ aŋ tɩ faasɩ tʋŋ Ŋmɩŋ tʋʋmaha nɩ jigiŋ sɩba ʋ nagɩna a yɩ tɩ dɩ tɩ tʋmma dene wo.

eng: We hope that our work grows even to the point of the gospel being preached in places beyond Corinth, without bragging about what has already been done in another persons work area.
local: amʋ tɩ nan bɩagɩ ga tɩŋgbaŋɩsɩ diekemba dɩ benne nɩ nɩŋŋa wa a ga mʋʋlɩ Masia wʋvɩɩnaha mi. Tɩ kaaŋ ga jigidieke vuogaaŋ dɩ wone a tʋŋ, tɩ ka yaala tɩ kuuli vuogaaŋ tʋʋma wɩa.

eng: But, the one who brags should brag in the Lord. .
local: Sɩba dɩ maagɩna Ŋmɩŋ gbaŋkʋ ma dɩ, Vuodieke nɩŋ mana dɩ yaalɩnana dɩ ʋ kuuli, kuuli yaa gamma wudieke Ŋmɩŋ dɩ yine.

eng: It isnt the person who promotes himself or herself who is approved but the person whom the Lord commends.
local: Dama vuodieke dɩ bɩrɩnana ʋ gbaŋ ka dagɩ dɩ Ŋmɩŋ nine suuli wo mɩŋ, ama tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ dɩ bɩrɩna vuodieke, die dagɩna dɩ Ŋmɩŋ nine suuli wo mɩŋ.

eng: I hope that you will put up with me while I act like a fool. Well, in fact, you are putting up with me!.
local: Maŋ bala gaatɩŋ wʋbalɩka, nɩ dii suguru aŋaŋ mɩŋ.

eng: Im deeply concerned about you with the same concern that God has. As your father, I promised you in marriage to one husband. I promised to present you as an innocent virgin to Christ himself.
local: N sʋŋ bie nɩ ma pam sɩba Ŋmɩŋ sʋŋ dɩ bene nɩ ma dene wo. Nɩ sɩɩ sɩba hɔgʋlɩa dieke dɩ kana ka sɩba dembiŋ maŋ yaala n nagɩ a yɩ Masia aŋ nɩ dɩa wʋnɩŋ ʋ nyɩɩna.

eng: But Im afraid that your minds might be seduced in the same way as the snake deceived Eve with his devious tricks. You might be unable to focus completely on a genuine and innocent commitment to Christ.
local: Ŋmaamɩŋ yallɩ mɩŋ mɩŋ nɩ wɩa dɩ vuoŋ nan keŋ a gaaŋ nɩ sɩba Sitaani die dɩ gaana Evi dene wo aŋaŋ ʋ yɩaŋ, aŋ nɩ kaaŋ bɩ dɩ Masia aŋaŋ sʋgɩyɩalɩŋ aŋaŋ wusie.

eng: If a person comes and preaches some other Jesus than the one we preached, or if you receive a different Spirit than the one you had received, or a different gospel than the one you embraced, you put up with it so easily!.
local: Dama dɩɩ yi vuogaaŋ dɩ keŋ a mʋʋla Yisa gaaŋ wɩa a yɩa nɩ, ta ka mʋʋla Yisa dieke wɩa die tɩ wone a mʋʋlɩ a yɩ nɩ wa, ta nɩ tuose haalɩgaaŋ dagɩŋ aŋaŋ wʋvɩɩŋ gaaŋ dagɩŋ ta a ka yi Ŋmɩŋ Haalɩ dieke aŋaŋ wʋvɩɩŋ dieke die nɩ tuone a nyɩŋ tɩ jigiri, die nɩŋ nɩ saagɩ a yɩ wa mɩŋ aŋaŋ sʋgɩfɩalɩŋ dene.

eng: I dont consider myself as second-rate in any way compared to the super-apostles.
local: N ka yile dɩ vuodiekemba dɩ gaana nɩ dɩ ba yiwo Yisa tʋntʋntɩba naa, yiwo Yisa tʋntʋntɩba a tɩaŋ mɩŋ.

eng: But even if Im uneducated in public speaking, Im not uneducated in knowledge. We have shown this to you in every way and in everything we have done.
local: Dɩ nan bɩagɩ yi dɩ n ka bɩagɩ bala vɩɩnɩŋ, ama n sɩba Ŋmɩŋ wɩaha vɩɩnɩŋ ta saŋŋa mana tɩ ŋaaŋ yuori daga nɩ mɩŋ.

eng: Did I commit a sin by humbling myself to give you an advantage because I preached the gospel of God to you free of charge?.
local: Die n ka tuo jaaŋ a nyɩŋ nɩ jigiŋ saŋŋa dieke die n mʋʋlɩna Ŋmɩŋ wʋvɩɩnaha a yɩ nɩ wa. Ta bɩ sʋʋŋ n gbaŋ tɩŋgbaŋ dɩ n kɔtɩ nɩ, die n yiwo bɩaŋ n yine naa wa?.

eng: I robbed other churches by taking a salary from them in order to serve you!.
local: Die n bala nɩ Ŋmɩŋ wʋbalɩkaha, die n tuose suŋŋiŋ a nyɩna Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrɩ gaasɩ jigiŋ aŋ ka sɩɩ sɩba n gaara ba nyinti mɩŋ, amʋ n nan bɩagɩ a suŋŋi nɩ aŋaŋ Ŋmɩŋ wɩaha.

eng: While I was with you, I didnt burden any of you even though I needed things. The believers who came from Macedonia gave me everything I needed. I kept myself from being a financial drain on you in any way, and I will continue to keep myself from being a burden.
local: Ta die n benne nɩ jigiri die n ka mugisi nɩ dɩ nɩ yɩ mɩŋ jaaŋ, tɩ nɩmballɩ diekemba die dɩ nyɩnna Masedonia tɩŋgbaŋ a keŋ wo, die yalla jadieke nɩŋ mana n yaalala a keŋ a yɩ mɩŋ. Die n kana ka mugisi nɩ wo, die gbaŋ gbaŋ n kaaŋ mugisi nɩ yaa gamma.

eng: Since Christs truth is in me, I wont stop telling the entire area of Greece that Im proud of what I did.
local: Wusie maŋ bala naa Masia saaŋ ma, dɩ vuoŋ wori Akaya tɩŋgbaŋ lʋga mana a baaŋ bɩagɩ balɩ dɩ n vaa n kuuliku gie dɩ n tuone jaaŋ a nyɩŋ ba jigiŋ wɩa.

eng: Why? Is it because I dont love you? God knows that I do!.
local: Dɩ ka sɩɩ sɩba dɩ n ka cho nɩ. Ŋmɩŋ gbaŋ gbaŋ sɩba n chone nɩ dene.

eng: But Im going to continue to do what Im doing. I want to contradict the claims of the people who want to be treated like they are the same as us because of what they brag about.
local: N nan dɩ yie naa, amʋ banɩŋ tʋntʋntɩba mi kaaŋ ye sieŋ a kuule dɩ ba gbaŋ ba yiwo Yisa tʋntʋntɩba sɩba tɩ gbaŋ tɩ tʋmma die wo.

eng: Such people are false apostles and dishonest workers who disguise themselves as apostles of Christ.
local: Banɩŋ tʋntʋntɩba mi yiwo gɩgaantɩba, ta chɩba ŋmɩnchɩbɩsɩ ba tʋʋmaha ma ta nagɩ ba gbaŋ a bɩrɩŋ sɩba Masia tʋntʋntɩŋ.

eng: And no wonder! Even Satan disguises himself as an angel of light.
local: Ba tʋma die wo, nɩ da vaa ka yi nɩ mamachi, dama die gbaŋ Sitaani dɩ mɩa ta naga ʋ gbaŋ a bɩrɩma sɩba chaanɩŋ malaka.

eng: It is no great surprise then that his servants also disguise themselves as servants of righteousness. Their end will be what their actions deserve.
local: Die wɩa dɩɩ yi wʋnɩŋ Sitaani tʋntʋntɩŋ dɩ gaama vuosi dɩ ba yiwo Ŋmɩŋ tʋntʋntɩŋ diekemba dɩ dagɩnana vuosi dɩ ba dɩa Ŋmɩŋ sieŋ, nɩ da vaa a yi nɩ mamachi. Ŋmɩŋ nan keŋ datɩ ba tɩba sɩba ba tʋʋma dɩ mʋna dene.

eng: I repeat, no one should take me for a fool. But if you do, then allow me to be a fool so that I can brag like a fool for a bit.
local: N bɩ balɩ nɩ mɩŋ: Vuoŋ daa yilime dɩ n yiwo gaamʋ, ama dɩɩ yi nɩ yile dɩ n yiwo gaamʋ, nɩ tuo mɩŋ sɩba nɩ baaŋ tuo gaamʋ dene wo amʋ n nan bɩagɩ a kuuli bɩta.

eng: Im not saying what Im saying because the Lord tells me to. Im saying it like Im a fool. Im putting my confidence in this business of bragging.
local: Wudieke n yaalala dɩ n balɩ nɩ naa ka yi tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ wʋbalɩka. Manɩŋ n balɩnana n gbaŋ gbaŋ wʋbalɩka, n seŋ bala sɩba gaamʋ.

eng: Since so many people are bragging based on human standards, that is how Im going to brag too.
local: Ama vuosi pam dɩ kuulinene yaa gamma wudieke ba bɩagɩna yi ba yine vuota wɩa, n gbaŋ n nan bɩagɩ kuuli.

eng: Because you, who are so wise, are happy to put up with fools.
local: Nɩ yile dɩ nɩ yaa wa yɩaŋ, ta die wɩa nɩ yaa wa suguru ta wʋmma yɩa gaantɩŋ aŋaŋ sʋgɩfɩalɩŋ.

eng: You put up with it if someone enslaves you, if someone exploits you, if someone takes advantage of you, if someone places themselves over you, or if someone hits you in the face.
local: Nɩ vasa vuosi dɩ pɔgɩlɩna nɩ sɩba yɔŋɩsɩ, ta nyɩra nɩ ta bɩ gbata nɩ. Ta daansa nɩ yɔrɩ ta bɩ fala nɩ.

eng: Im ashamed to say that we have been weak in comparison! But in whatever they challenge me, I challenge them .
local: Die tɩ kana ka yi nɩ naa wɩa nɩ yile dɩ die tɩ wo hagɩrɩŋ yaa? Ama dɩɩ yi vuoŋ dɩ yaa sikimiŋ ta nan bɩagɩ a kuuli, n gbaŋ n nan bɩagɩ a kuuli. N seŋ bala sɩba gaamʋ.

eng: Are they Hebrews? So am I. Are they Israelites? So am I. Are they descendants of Abraham? So am I.
local: Dɩɩ yi gɩgaantɩba dɩ wasa ba gbaŋ Hiiburu vuosi, n gbaŋ n yiwo Hiiburu vuoŋ. Ta dɩɩ yi ba wasa ba gbaŋ Izara vuosi, n gbaŋ n yiwo Izara vuoŋ. Ta dɩ bɩ yi ba yi Abarahami haagɩsɩ, n gbaŋ n yiwo ba wʋnyɩ.

eng: Are they ministers of Christ? Im speaking like a crazy person. What Ive done goes well beyond what theyve done. Ive worked much harder. Ive been imprisoned much more often. Ive been beaten more times than I can count. Ive faced death many times.
local: Dɩɩ yi ba wasa ba gbaŋ Masia tʋntʋntɩŋ, manɩŋ n tɩaŋ ba mɩŋ, dama n tʋŋ a yɩ Masia pam a tɩaŋ ba. N faasɩ a tʋŋ mɩŋ pam, ta die ba naga mɩŋ a yie dansarɩka ma bʋ wo nʋaŋ. Ta die ba tɩba mɩŋ aŋaŋ kpaasɩŋ pam ta die saŋŋa pam die maŋ ye daŋŋa ta gbigi kuŋ. Lele n wa bala sɩba gaamʋ.

eng: I received the forty lashes minus one from the Jews five times.
local: Bʋnʋ die n gbaŋ gbaŋ n vuosi die dɩ tɩbɩ mɩŋ aŋaŋ kpaasɩŋ nʋaŋ baŋɩsɩ-taa aŋaŋ awayɩ.

eng: I was beaten with rods three times. I was stoned once. I was shipwrecked three times. I spent a day and a night on the open sea.
local: Romi vuosisi dɩaŋ die dɩ nɩgɩ mɩŋ aŋaŋ daaŋ die jigiŋ bʋtaa, ta saŋŋa kaanɩ die n dataasɩ die dɩ taa mɩŋ aŋaŋ tana. Ta die haarɩsɩ die dɩ ŋmabɩ a chʋʋsɩ ta bubi aŋaŋ mɩŋ nyaaŋ ma bʋtaa, ta saŋŋa kaanɩ ŋmɩntʋasɩ aŋaŋ yuŋ die maŋ bie dakʋʋlɩŋ sikpeŋ mʋgɩkpɩɩrɩ ma.

eng: Ive been on many journeys. I faced dangers from rivers, robbers, my people, and Gentiles. I faced dangers in the city, in the desert, on the sea, and from false brothers and sisters.
local: Die n ŋaana dɩa wa, die n bie wo mʋga daanpɔyɩ ma aŋaŋ gbɩgbatɩrɩŋ daanpɔyɩ ma aŋaŋ n gbaŋ gbaŋ n vuosi jigiŋ. Ta die bɩ bie daanpɔyɩ ma tɩŋgbaŋ gaasɩ vuosi jigiŋ, aŋaŋ tɩgɩkpɩɩma ma aŋaŋ haagɩŋ ma aŋaŋ mʋgɩkpɩɩma ma, aŋaŋ vuodiekemba dɩ gaanana vuosi dɩ ba yiwo Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrɩŋ jigiŋ.

eng: I faced these dangers with hard work and heavy labor, many sleepless nights, hunger and thirst, often without food, and in the cold without enough clothes.
local: N seŋ tʋŋ mɩŋ aŋaŋ nɩŋŋmɩna ta dii wahala, ta ka gʋʋra saŋŋa a taŋ, ta die beri saŋŋa a taŋ aŋaŋ kɔŋ aŋaŋ nyanyuule ta beri saŋŋa a taŋ ta ka die nyindiike, ta watɩ dɩ yige mɩŋ saŋŋa ataŋ ta maŋ wo garɩŋ.

eng: Besides all the other things I could mention, theres my daily stress because Im concerned about all the churches.
local: A bɩ gʋtɩ, saŋŋa mana dɩ ŋaaŋ mugise mɩŋ mɩŋ yaa gamma Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrɩba mana ma.

eng: Who is weak without me being weak? Who is led astray without me being furious about it?.
local: Dɩɩ yi vuoŋ yada dɩ ka dala, n sʋŋ ŋaaŋ chʋʋsɩ mɩŋ, ta dɩɩ yi ba gaaŋ vuoŋ ʋ yi bɩaŋ, n ŋaaŋ yaa wa sʋgɩchʋʋsɩŋ.

eng: If its necessary to brag, Ill brag about my weaknesses.
local: Dɩɩ yi maŋ baa n kuuli, n nan kuuli yaa gamma n wabɩna dene.

eng: The God and Father of the Lord Jesus, the one who is blessed forever, knows that Im not lying.
local: Tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Yisa Chɔɔŋ Ŋmɩŋ, vuodieke dɩ mʋna aŋaŋ bɩrɩŋ yaa gamma haahuu wo, wʋnɩŋ ʋ sɩba dɩ n bala wusie.

eng: At Damascus the governor under King Aretas was guarding the city of Damascus in order to capture me.
local: Die n yene bie Damasikusi ma wa, naaŋ Aritasi saŋka mi wo, die tɩka jakʋʋŋ die yaala ʋ yigi mɩŋ mɩŋ, ta die vaa gbɩgbarɩtɩŋ dɩ gbarɩ tɩka gaamɩŋ sanʋaha.

eng: but I got away from him by being lowered in a basket through a window in the city wall.
local: Ama die n zʋalɩŋ die dɩ nagɩ mɩŋ a yi kparɩŋ ma a nagɩ mɩŋ a daagɩ toli dieke dɩ benne tɩŋgbaŋka gaamɩŋ ma a sʋʋŋ zieŋ tɩŋgbaŋ, maŋ chɩgɩ nyɩŋ daa wa nuusi me.

eng: It is necessary to brag, not that it does any good. Ill move on to visions and revelations from the Lord.
local: N mʋ dɩ n kuulime mɩŋ, ama ka wo nyʋarɩ nɩŋ. Ama lele n wa yaala n balɩ mɩŋ yaa gamma wudiekemba tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ dɩ yuorine a dagɩ mɩŋ saŋŋa dieke n kana ka gʋʋra ta daansa wa.

eng: I know a man in Christ who was caught up into the third heaven fourteen years ago. I dont know whether it was in the body or out of the body. God knows.
local: N sɩba Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrʋ wʋnyɩ Ŋmɩŋ die dɩ nagɩna wa a jʋalɩ arɩzanna ma gbaŋ gbaŋ bɩna baŋ aŋaŋ anɩɩsa dɩ tɩanna wa. N ka sɩba dɩ die ka seŋ yi yaa die ka yiwo daansa, Ŋmɩŋ nyɩɩna ma sɩbɩna.

eng: I know that this man was caught up into paradise and that he heard unspeakable words that were things no one is allowed to repeat. I dont know whether it was in the body or apart from the body. God knows.
local: Sɩba n wone a bala wa, Ŋmɩŋ nyɩɩna ma sɩbɩna dɩ daa wa gie die bie wo ʋ nyɩŋgbanɩŋ ma saŋka mi yaa die ʋ ka jʋalɩ aŋaŋ ʋ nyɩŋgbanɩŋ.

eng: I know that this man was caught up into paradise and that he heard unspeakable words that were things no one is allowed to repeat. I dont know whether it was in the body or apart from the body. God knows.
local: Die ʋ jʋalɩ a ga paradasi, ta die ʋ wʋŋ wudiekemba ʋ kaaŋ bɩagɩ a balɩ vuoŋ, dama Ŋmɩŋ kaaŋ saagɩ aŋ ʋ balɩ.

eng: Ill brag about this man, but I wont brag about myself, except to brag about my weaknesses.
local: Die wɩa n nan kuuli yaa gamma daa wa gie ma, ama n kaaŋ kuuli yaa gamma n gbaŋ gbaŋ n ma, ntaala n wabɩŋ wɩa.

eng: If I did want to brag, I wouldnt make a fool of myself because Id tell the truth. Im holding back from bragging so that no one will give me any more credit than what anyone sees or hears about me.
local: Dɩɩ yi maŋ yaala n kuuli ama n kaaŋ dɩ sɩ sɩba gaamʋ, dama n nan dɩ bala wusie; ama n kaaŋ wɔŋ kuuli. Manɩŋ n ka yaala vuoŋ bɩrɩ mɩŋ a tɩaŋ n bɩrɩŋ dɩ mʋna die. N yaala ba daansɩma n beriŋ dɩ sɩna die, ta wʋmma n balala dene, ta ka kʋaŋ chaaŋ ba sɩmma n yine vuodieke.

eng: I was given a thorn in my body because of the outstanding revelations Ive received so that I wouldnt be conceited. Its a messenger from Satan sent to torment me so that I wouldnt be conceited.
local: Ama die Ŋmɩŋ die dɩ kana ka yaala dɩ n kuuli yaa gamma mamachi wʋkpɩɩŋ dieke n yene wo wɩa, die Ŋmɩŋ dɩ vaa maŋ ye mugisiŋ a nyɩŋ Sitaani jigiŋ. Kanɩŋ mugisiku mi dɩ yʋagɩ mɩŋ sɩba haŋgɔɔŋ dɩ ŋaana tɔbɩ vuoke.

eng: I pleaded with the Lord three times for it to leave me alone.
local: Die maŋ jʋʋsɩ tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ bʋtaa dɩ ʋ vʋarɩ kanɩŋ mugisiku a nyɩŋ n jigiŋ.

eng: He said to me, My grace is enough for you, because power is made perfect in weakness. So Ill gladly spend my time bragging about my weaknesses so that Christs power can rest on me.
local: Ama die ʋ yiŋŋi balɩ mɩŋ dɩ, N suŋŋiŋ nyɩɩna ma nan mɔgɩsɩ fʋ kanɩŋ mugisiku mi, dama vuodieke dɩ wone ʋ gbaŋ gbaŋ ʋ hagɩrɩŋ, nan seŋ ye n hagɩrɩŋ. Die wɩa n nan faasɩ kuuli yaa gamma n wabɩtɩ ma aŋaŋ sʋgɩfɩalɩŋ, amʋ Masia hagɩrɩŋ nan keŋ n ma.

eng: Therefore, Im all right with weaknesses, insults, disasters, harassments, and stressful situations for the sake of Christ, because when Im weak, then Im strong.
local: Die wɩa n yaa wa sʋgɩfɩalɩŋ dɩɩ yi maŋ keŋ wabɩgɩ, yaa ta vuosi dɩ bɩ zɩa mɩŋ, yaa maŋ keŋ die wahala, yaa maŋ keŋ bie mugisiŋ me, yaa ta yese wɩa Masia wɩa, dama maŋ keŋ wo n gbaŋ gbaŋ n hagɩrɩŋ, saŋka mi maŋ yese Masia hagɩrɩŋ.

eng: Ive become a fool! You made me do it. Actually, I should have been commended by you. Im not inferior to the super-apostles in any way, even though Im a nonentity.
local: Nɩ vana maŋ bala sɩba gaamʋ, dama nɩnɩŋ nɩ tɩnna mʋ nɩ bɩrɩma mɩŋ. Dɩɩ yi maŋ ka yi vuoŋ, ama vuodiekemba dɩ gaanana vuosi dɩ ba yiwo Masia tʋntʋntɩba ka tɩaŋ mɩŋ jaaŋ mana ma.

eng: The signs of an apostle were performed among you with continuous endurance through signs, wonders, and miracles.
local: Die n benne nɩ jigiri ta tʋma mamachi tʋnkpɩɩma aŋaŋ dagɩtɩ, ta dii suguru saŋŋa mana wa, die dagɩya mɩŋ dɩ n yiwo Masia tʋntʋntʋ.

eng: How were you treated worse than the other churches, except that I myself wasnt a financial burden on you? Forgive me for this wrong!.
local: Lalɩa Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrɩŋ banɩŋ ba dɩ tɩaŋ nɩ? Manɩŋ n kana ka pɩasɩ nɩ dɩ nɩ suŋŋi mɩŋ wo, kanɩŋ ka vana ba tɩaŋ nɩ? Dɩɩ yi die dɩ vaa maŋ yi chʋʋsɩ, nɩ nagɩ n taalɩ a chaa mɩŋ.

eng: Look, Im ready to visit you a third time, and I wont be a burden on you. I dont want your things; I want you. It isnt the childrens responsibility to save up for their parents but parents for children.
local: Bʋtaa ma wʋnna maŋ kieŋ dɩ n kaagɩ nɩ, ama n ka kieŋ ta yaala jaaŋ nɩ jigiŋ, dɩ yiwo nɩnɩŋ maŋ yaala ama daa nɩ ligire. Daa ballɩ yallɩnana nyinti a yɩa ba tieliŋ, ama dɩ yiwo ba tielibe yallɩnana nyinti a yɩa ba. Nɩnɩŋ nɩ yine n ballɩ.

eng: I will very gladly spend and be spent for your sake. If I love you more, will you love me less?.
local: Die wɩa n yaa sʋgɩfɩalɩŋ dɩ n nagɩ jadieke mana n yalla a yɩ nɩ halɩ n gbaŋ gbaŋ. N faasɩna cho nɩ wɩa, die wɩa nɩ cho mɩŋ bɩta?.

eng: We all know that I didnt place a burden on you, but in spite of that you think Im a con artist who fooled you with a trick.
local: Dɩ yiwo wusie dɩ die n ka mugisi nɩ dɩ nɩ yɩ mɩŋ jaaŋ, ama nɩ bataŋ nan dɩ bala dɩ die n gaaŋ nɩ mɩŋ ta gbatɩ nɩ. Lalɩa die maŋ gbatɩ nɩ?.

eng: I havent taken advantage of you through any of the people I sent to you, have I?.
local: Die vuodiekemba n tʋnna nɩ jigiri, wʋnyɩ die nyɩrɩ nɩ mɩŋ?.

eng: I strongly encouraged Titus to go to you and sent the brother with him. Titus didnt take advantage of you, did he? Didnt we live by the same Spirit? Didnt we walk in the same footsteps?.
local: Die n jʋʋsɩ wa Tatusi dɩ ʋ keŋ nɩ jigiŋ, ta die vaa tɩ nɩmballɩ wʋnyɩ dɩ dɩ wa a keŋ nɩ jigiŋ. Tatusi ye a nyɩrɩ nɩ mɩŋ? Tɩnɩŋ tɩ wo die sʋŋanyile. N tʋnnana aŋaŋ sʋŋanyile dieke wo, die gbaŋ gbaŋ sʋŋanyile ʋ yallɩ. Sie dieke n dɩna wa, ka gbaŋ gbaŋ ʋ gbaŋ ʋ dɩ.

eng: Have you been thinking up to now that we are defending ourselves to you? Actually, we are speaking in the sight of God and in Christ. Dear friends, everything is meant to build you up.
local: Nɩ yile dɩ saŋŋa mana dɩ tɩ bala a gbata tɩ gbaŋ wɩa ma nɩ jigiŋ mɩŋ? Aayɩ. Tɩ bie wo Ŋmɩŋ nɩŋŋa ta bala wudieke Masia dɩ yaalala. Tɩ nɩmballɩ choti, tɩ yaala tɩ suŋŋi nɩ mɩŋ aŋ nɩ mɩŋŋɩ dɩa Ŋmɩŋ sieku, die wɩa tɩ bala naa.

eng: Im afraid that maybe when I come you will be different from the way I want you to be, and that Ill be different from the way you want me to be. Im afraid that there might be fighting, obsession, losing your temper, competitive opposition, backstabbing, gossip, conceit, and disorderly conduct.
local: N sɩkpaaŋ nɩga nɩ wɩa dɩ maŋ keŋ keŋ n nan keŋ haarɩ nɩ ta nɩ tarɩgɩya mɩŋ ta sɩɩ sɩba n tɩnna a yaala nɩ bemme dene wo, ta nɩ dɩaŋ nɩ nan ye ta n gbaŋ n tarɩgɩya mɩŋ ta ka sɩɩ sɩba nɩnɩŋ nɩ tɩnna yaala n bemme dene wo. N sɩkpaaŋ nɩga mɩŋ dɩ n nan keŋ ye nɩ ta waagɩŋ, aŋaŋ sʋgɩbɩaŋ, aŋaŋ sɩnyɩɩrɩŋ yɔrɩ yɔrɩ aŋaŋ halɩ aŋaŋ taŋ chʋʋsɩŋ aŋaŋ kʋagaarɩŋ aŋaŋ kalinbaani aŋaŋ watɩ yɔrɩ yɔrɩ bie nɩ sʋnsʋŋ.

eng: Im afraid that when I come again, my God may embarrass me in front of you. I might have to go into mourning over all the people who have sinned before and havent changed their hearts and lives from what they used to practice: moral corruption, sexual immorality, and doing whatever feels good.
local: N sɩkpaaŋ nɩga mɩŋ dɩ Ŋmɩŋ nan vaa n dii viivi maŋ keŋ kaagɩ nɩ bɩbra. Dɩ nan dɩ sɩɩ sɩba n kʋmma dama dɩɩ yi nɩ jusu dɩ ye ka vaa nɩ tʋmbɩatɩtɩ die nɩ wone a yie wo. Nɩ ye yiye dɩgɩntɩ tʋʋma sɩba daakpana aŋaŋ hɔgʋkpana ta ka chɩga viivi.

eng: This is the third time that Im coming to visit you. Every matter is settled on the evidence of two or three witnesses.
local: N nan keŋ a kaagɩ nɩ n bʋtaa ma. Dɩɩ yi nɩ balɩ dɩ vuoŋ yiwo taalɩ sɩba dɩ maagɩna Ŋmɩŋ gbaŋkʋ sʋŋ dene wo dɩ, Sie daansɩa vuosi bale yaa bataa balɩ a chʋʋsɩ wa.

eng: When I was with you on my second visit, I already warned those who continued to sin. Now Im repeating that warning to all the rest of you while Im at a safe distance: if I come again, I wont spare anyone.
local: Die n kenne nɩ jigiri bule wo ma die n wɔŋ kpaaŋ nɩnɩŋ vuodiekemba dɩ wone a yi bɩabʋ aŋaŋ nɩ chanchaalɩŋ mana mɩŋ. N yaala n bɩ kpaaŋ nɩ n wone nɩ jigiri dɩ, maŋ keŋ yiŋŋi keŋ n nan datɩ vuodiekemba die dɩ yine bɩabʋ tɩba.

eng: Since you are demanding proof that Christ speaks through me, Christ isnt weak in dealing with you but shows his power among you.
local: Die nan dagɩ dɩ Masia vana maŋ bala. Ʋ ka yi wabʋ nɩ sʋnsʋŋ, ʋ yaa hagɩrɩŋ nɩ jigiŋ mɩŋ.

eng: Certainly he was crucified because of weakness, but he lives by the power of God. Certainly we also are weak in him, but we will live together with him, because of Gods power that is directed toward you.
local: Die ʋ nagɩ wa ʋ hagɩrɩbʋ a dʋaŋ lʋgɩŋ ta vaa ba kpaasɩ wa dagarɩkʋ ma. Lele nɩŋ, Ŋmɩŋ hagɩrɩŋ wɩa ʋ bie ʋ mɩsɩ ma. Tɩnɩŋ vuodiekemba dɩ lagɩŋna a bie ʋ ma wa wo hagɩrɩŋ sɩba Masia die dɩ wone hagɩrɩŋ dene, ama tɩ nan dɩ beri Ŋmɩŋ hagɩrɩŋ wɩa sɩba Masia dɩ benne dene wo aŋ nɩ ye.

eng: Examine yourselves to see if you are in the faith. Test yourselves. Dont you understand that Jesus Christ is in you? Unless, of course, you fail the test.
local: Nɩ daansɩ nɩ gbaŋ gbaŋ beriŋ ta ye dɩ nɩ seŋ yi Yisa Masia yada yaa nɩ ka yi wo; dɩ yiwo talasɩ dɩ nɩ daansɩma nɩ gbaŋ beriŋ dɩ sɩna dene. Nɩ ka sɩba a baarɩ dɩ Yisa Masia bie nɩ ma? Ʋ seŋ bie nɩ ma, dama dɩɩ yi ta ʋ ka bie nɩ ma, die nɩŋ nɩ ka yi ʋ vuosi wusie.

eng: But I hope that you will realize that we dont fail the test.
local: N yaa tama dɩ nɩ nan dɩ sɩba a baarɩ dɩ manɩŋ nɩŋ n yiwo ʋ vuoŋ aŋaŋ wusie.

eng: We pray to God that you dont do anything wrong, not because we want to appear to pass the test but so that you might do the right thing, even if we appear to fail.
local: Tɩ jʋʋsa Ŋmɩŋ dɩ nɩ daa keŋ yi bɩaŋ. Tɩ ka jʋʋsa naa dɩ vuosi ye dɩ tɩ yiwo wusie vuosi mɩŋ; aŋaŋ vuosi bataŋ dɩ yilinene dɩ tɩ ka mɩŋŋɩ a tʋŋ Masia tʋʋmaha mana yɔrɩ, ama tɩ jʋʋsa Ŋmɩŋ mɩŋ dɩ nɩ tʋma tʋnvɩɩna.

eng: We cant do anything against the truth but only to help the truth.
local: Dama tɩ kaaŋ bɩagɩ yi wɩɩŋ a chʋʋsɩ wusieke, ama tɩ zie wusieke kʋaŋ mɩŋ.

eng: We are happy when we are weak but you are strong. We pray for this: that you will be made complete.
local: Dɩɩ yi tɩ sɩɩ sɩba wabɩtɩ ta nɩ hagɩrɩŋ tɩ ŋaaŋ yaa sʋgɩfɩalɩŋ mɩŋ. Die wɩa tɩ Ŋmɩŋ jʋʋsɩŋ yiwo dɩ nɩ yi vuovɩɩna a kpatɩ.

eng: This is why Im writing these things while Im away. Im writing so that I wont need to act harshly when Im with you by using the authority that the Lord gave me. He gave it to me so that I could build you up, not tear you down.
local: Die wɩa, maŋ maaga nɩ gbaŋkʋ gie n wone nɩ jigiri amʋ maŋ keŋ keŋ a tʋgɩ nɩ jigiŋ, dɩ kaaŋ bɩ yi nɩŋŋmɩna dɩ n datɩ nɩ tɩbɩŋ ta dagɩ nɩ n yiko. Tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ yɩ mɩŋ yikoke mɩŋ dɩ n suŋŋi nɩ aŋ nɩ mɩŋŋɩ ʋ sieŋ daa n chʋʋsɩ nɩ.

eng: Finally, brothers and sisters, good-bye. Put things in order, respond to my encouragement, be in harmony with each other, and live in peace—and the God of love and peace will be with you.
local: N nɩmballɩ wudieke dɩ tɩalɩna yiwo n taaŋ nɩ mɩŋ. Nɩ kpaŋŋɩ nɩ gbaŋ ta yi vuovɩɩna a kpatɩ, ta tuo n kpaaŋkʋ, ta yallɩma nʋabalɩmɩŋ, ta bemme aŋaŋ sʋgɩfɩalɩŋ aŋaŋ taŋ. Ta Ŋmɩŋ vuodieke dɩ chone tɩ ta yɩa tɩ sʋgɩdʋagɩkʋ nan dɩ beri aŋaŋ nɩ.

eng: Say hello to each other with a holy kiss. All of Gods people say hello to you.
local: Nɩ waasɩ taŋ vɩɩnɩŋ vɩɩnɩŋ.

eng: The grace of the Lord Jesus Christ, the love of God, and the fellowship of the Holy Spirit be with you all.
local: Ŋmɩŋ vuosi mana dɩ benne giena wa waasa nɩ.

eng: From Paul, an apostle who is not sent from human authority or commissioned through human agency, but sent through Jesus Christ and God the Father who raised him from the dead.
local: Gbaŋkʋ gie nyɩŋ wa manɩŋ Pɔɔli, vuodieke dɩ yine Yisa Masia tʋntʋntʋ jigiŋ. Daa vuota die yine mɩŋ Masia tʋntʋntʋ, daa vuota tʋnna mɩŋ, ama tɩ Chɔɔŋ Ŋmɩŋ aŋaŋ Yisa Masia vuodieke die ʋ sʋgɩrɩna a nyɩŋ kumbu me wo die tʋnna mɩŋ.

eng: and from all the brothers and sisters with me. To the churches in Galatia.
local: Manɩŋ Pɔɔli aŋaŋ tɩ nɩmballɩ diekemba dɩ benne giena mana waasa Masia dɩdɩsɩɩrɩba dɩ benne Galasia ma.

eng: Grace and peace to you from God the Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Tɩ Chɔɔŋ Ŋmɩŋ aŋaŋ tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Yisa Masia suŋŋi nɩ ta yɩ nɩ sʋgɩfɩalɩŋ.

eng: He gave himself for our sins, so he could deliver us from this present evil age, according to the will of our God and Father.
local: Yisa Masia yine vuodieke die dɩ saagɩna tɩ Chɔɔŋ Ŋmɩŋ nʋaŋ ta kpi tɩ tʋntʋmbɩatɩ wɩa, dɩ ʋ gbatɩ tɩ a nyɩŋ tɩŋgbaŋka gie bɩaŋ yɔŋɩsɩ ma.

eng: To God be the glory forever and always! Amen.
local: Wʋnɩŋ Ŋmɩŋ nyɩɩna ma mʋna bɩrɩŋ yaa gamma haahuu. Wusie.

eng: Im amazed that you are so quickly deserting the one who called you by the grace of Christ to follow another gospel.
local: Nɩ wɩa yi mɩŋ mɩŋ mamachi pam aŋaŋ nɩ kana ka yʋasɩya ta vaa Ŋmɩŋ vuodieke dɩ wana nɩ Masia zɔɔlɩnchɩgɩla wɩa wa ta ga dɩɩ wʋbalɩgaakʋ.

eng: Its not really another gospel, but certain people are confusing you and they want to change the gospel of Christ.
local: Vuosi bataŋ bene a mɩa dɩ ba tarɩgɩ Masia wʋvɩɩnaha ta chɔrɩma nɩ, ama wusie wʋbalɩkɩgaaŋ bɩ wori.

eng: However, even if we ourselves or a heavenly angel should ever preach anything different from what we preached to you, they should be under a curse.
local: Ama dɩɩ yi n gbaŋ gbaŋ yaa Ŋmɩŋ malaka dɩ keŋ mʋʋlɩ wʋbalɩvɩɩŋ gaasɩ a yɩ nɩ ta a ka yi die tɩ mʋʋlɩna wudiekemba a yɩ nɩ wa, Ŋmɩŋ nan seŋ chʋʋsɩ dɩ tieŋ.

eng: Im repeating what weve said before: if anyone preaches something different from what you received, they should be under a curse!.
local: Tɩ wɔŋ balɩ nɩ mɩŋ, ta maŋ bɩ baaŋ n balɩ nɩ bɩbra; dɩɩ yi vuoŋ dɩ mʋʋlɩ wʋbalɩkɩ gaasɩ a yɩ nɩ ta a bie a tʋaŋ a nyɩŋ die nɩ wolinne a tuo wudiekemba ba, Ŋmɩŋ nan seŋ chʋʋsɩ wa.

eng: Am I trying to win over human beings or God? Or am I trying to please people? If I were still trying to please people, I wouldnt be Christs slave.
local: N ka mɩa dɩ n tuo bɩrɩŋ a nyɩŋ vuota jigiŋ, ama Ŋmɩŋ bɩrɩŋ maŋ yaala, dama maŋ tɩŋ bɩ yaala vuota bɩrɩŋ, n tɩŋ kaaŋ yi Masia yɔmʋ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, I want you to know that the gospel I preached isnt human in origin.
local: N nɩmballɩ, n yaala nɩ sɩmma dɩ wʋvɩɩna diekemba n mʋʋlɩnana a yɩa nɩ naa ka nyɩŋ wa vuota jigiŋ.

eng: I didnt receive it or learn it from a human. It came through a revelation from Jesus Christ.
local: N ka tuohe a nyɩŋ wa vuota jigiŋ, yaa dɩ yiwo vuoŋ dagɩna mɩŋ ama dɩ yiwo Yisa Masia gbaŋ gbaŋ yuorinehe a dagɩ mɩŋ.

eng: You heard about my previous life in Judaism, how severely I harassed Gods church and tried to destroy it.
local: Nɩ wɔŋ wʋŋ mɩŋ die n tʋʋma dɩ sɩna die saŋŋa dieke die n dɩna Juu vuosi jɩaŋkʋ, die n mugise Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrɩŋ pam, ta die mɩa dɩ n chʋʋsɩ ba ta ka chɩgɩ ba zɔɔlɩŋ.

eng: I advanced in Judaism beyond many of my peers, because I was much more militant about the traditions of my ancestors.
local: Tɩnɩŋ Juu vuosi jɩamɩŋ sieŋ me, die n tɩaŋ n chanchaalɩba pam, ta die nagɩ n sʋŋ mana a yi wo tɩ chɔɔŋkʋʋlɩba chʋaraha ma.

eng: But God had set me apart from birth and called me through his grace. He was pleased.
local: Ama Ŋmɩŋ die dɩ chɩgɩna mɩŋ zɔɔlɩŋ ta vʋarɩ mɩŋ ta ba ye mɩɩrɩ mɩŋ wa, dɩ wa mɩŋ dɩ keŋ tʋmma a yɩma wa. Ta die saŋ.

eng: to reveal his Son to me, so that I might preach about him to the Gentiles. I didnt immediately consult with any human being.
local: ta nagɩ ʋ Bʋa wa a dagɩ mɩŋ, amʋ n nan mʋʋlɩ wʋvɩɩnaha a yɩ buurigaasɩsɩ. Saŋka mi die n ka ga vuoŋ jigiŋ dɩ ʋ kpaaŋ mɩŋ.

eng: I didnt go up to Jerusalem to see the men who were apostles before me either, but I went away into Arabia and I returned again to Damascus.
local: Die n ka bɩ ga Jerusalemi dɩ n ye vuodiekemba dɩ wolinne a yi Masia tʋntʋntɩba n ma wa, ama die n woliŋ ga wa Arabia tɩŋgbaŋ ma ta wa viiri keŋ Damasikusi tɩŋ ma.

eng: Then after three years I went up to Jerusalem to visit Cephas and stayed with him fifteen days.
local: Die ka bɩna ataa kʋaŋ chaaŋ die maŋ yiŋŋi ga Jerusalemi a ga waasɩ Piita, ta die bie ʋ jigiŋ daraa baŋ aŋaŋ anʋ nyɩɩna ma.

eng: But I didnt see any other of the apostles except James the brother of the Lord.
local: Die n ka ye Masia tʋntʋntɩba wʋnyɩ mana a gʋtɩ Piita ma ntaala Jemisi tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ nɩmbʋa wa.

eng: Before God, Im not lying about the things that Im writing to you!.
local: Ŋmɩŋ gbaŋ sɩba dɩ wudieke n maagɩna yiwo wusie ta ŋmɩnchɩbɩsɩ dɩ wo ka ma.

eng: Then I went into the regions of Syria and Cilicia.
local: Ka kʋaŋ chaaŋ die maŋ ga Siria aŋaŋ Silisia tɩŋgbaŋɩsɩ ma.

eng: but I wasnt known personally by the Christian churches in Judea.
local: Saŋka mi Yisa dɩdɩɩsɩrɩba die dɩ benne Judia ma wa die ka sɩba mɩŋ.

eng: They only heard a report about me: The man who used to harass us now preaches the faith that he once tried to destroy.
local: Wudieke die ba sɩbɩna yine wudieke ba chanchaalɩba dɩ balala dɩ, Daa dieke die dɩ mugisinene tɩ gbaŋ yaa wa wʋvɩɩŋ dieke die ʋ yaala ʋ chʋʋsɩ wa ta mʋʋla yɩa vuosi.

eng: So they were glorifying God because of me.
local: Die wɩa ba bɩra Ŋmɩŋ n wɩa.

eng: Then after fourteen years I went up to Jerusalem again with Barnabas, and I took Titus along also.
local: Ka bɩna baŋ aŋaŋ anɩɩsa kʋaŋ chaaŋ die manɩŋ aŋaŋ Banabasi die dɩ yiŋŋi ga Jerusalemi, ta die nagɩ Tatusi a gʋtɩ.

eng: I went there because of a revelation, and I laid out the gospel that I preach to the Gentiles for them. But I did it privately with the influential leaders to make sure that I wouldnt be working or that I hadnt worked for nothing.
local: Die n gaya mɩŋ dama Ŋmɩŋ die yuorine a dagɩ mɩŋ dɩ n gamma. Mi die maŋ lagɩsɩ ba nɩŋŋandɩɩsɩrɩba nyɩɩna ma, a balɩ ba n mʋʋlɩna wʋvɩɩnaha dene a yɩa vuodiekemba dɩ kana ka yi Juu vuosi. Die n ka yaala tʋŋ dieke n tʋnna aŋaŋ tʋŋ dieke dɩ tɩalɩna keŋ yi yɔrɩ.

eng: However, not even Titus, who was with me and who was a Greek, was required to be circumcised.
local: N chanchaaŋ Tatusi die yiwo Giriiki vuoŋ ama vuoŋ die ka mugisi wo dɩ ʋ gobi ʋ kɔlɩ.

eng: But false brothers and sisters, who were brought in secretly, slipped in to spy on our freedom, which we have in Christ Jesus, and to make us slaves.
local: Ama vuodiekemba dɩ chɩbɩnana ŋmɩnchɩbɩsɩ dɩ ba gbaŋ ba yiwo Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrɩba nɩŋ, tɩŋ yaala Tatusi yime die. Banɩŋ vuosi mi die lɔbɩrɩ a bie wo tɩ sʋŋ, dɩ ba ye tɩ sɩna tɩ gbaŋ dene tɩ taasɩna aŋaŋ Yisa Masia wa. Ba yaala tɩ yiwo Mosisi mɩraha yɔŋɩsɩ.

eng: We didnt give in and submit to them for a single moment, so that the truth of the gospel would continue to be with you.
local: Ama die tɩ yaala tɩ pɔgɩlɩ wʋvɩɩnaha aŋaŋ ka wusie sieŋ a yɩ nɩ wɩa, die tɩ ka saagɩ a yɩ ba bɩta gbaŋ.

eng: The influential leaders didnt add anything to what I was preaching—and whatever they were makes no difference to me, because God doesnt show favoritism.
local: Ama vuodiekemba nɩŋ ba wasɩna ba nyɩŋkʋraha nɩŋ ; banɩŋ vuodiekemba ba wasɩnana vuokpɩɩmaha die ka yɩ mɩŋ dagɩhaalɩŋ.

eng: But on the contrary, they saw that I had been given the responsibility to preach the gospel to the people who arent circumcised, just as Peter had been to the circumcised.
local: Ama die ba yeye mɩŋ dɩ Ŋmɩŋ vʋarɩna mɩŋ dɩ n mʋʋlɩma wʋvɩɩnaha a yɩma vuodiekemba dɩ kana ka yi Juu vuosisi, sɩba ʋ vʋarɩna Piita dɩ ʋ mʋʋlɩma wʋvɩɩnaha a yɩma Juu vuosisi.

eng: The one who empowered Peter to become an apostle to the circumcised empowered me also to be one to the Gentiles.
local: Dama Ŋmɩŋ hagɩrɩŋ wɩa, Piita die dɩ yi tʋntʋntʋ a yɩ Juu vuosisi dene, die gbaŋ gbaŋ maŋ yi tʋntʋntʋ a yɩ vuodiekemba dɩ kana ka yi Juu vuosisi.

eng: James, Cephas, and John, who are considered to be key leaders, shook hands with me and Barnabas as equals when they recognized the grace that was given to me. So it was agreed that we would go to the Gentiles, while they continue to go to the people who were circumcised.
local: Jemisi aŋaŋ Piita aŋaŋ Jɔɔn, vuodiekemba ba wasɩnana nɩŋŋandɩɩsɩrɩba wa, ama ba gbaŋ die sɩba a baarɩ Ŋmɩŋ yɩna mɩŋ tʋʋmaha gie dɩ n tʋŋ, die wɩa manɩŋ aŋaŋ Banabasi aŋaŋ banɩŋ die dɩ waasɩ taŋ ta yigi taŋ nuusi me, naa die bala ka dagɩ dɩ tɩ yaa nʋabalɩmɩŋ aŋaŋ taŋ. Die tɩ mana dɩ saagɩ dɩ manɩŋ aŋaŋ Banabasi mʋʋlɩma wʋvɩɩnaha a yɩma vuodiekemba dɩ kana ka yi Juu vuosi, ta banɩŋ ba mʋʋlɩma a yɩma Juu vuosisi.

eng: They asked only that we would remember the poor, which was certainly something I was willing to do.
local: Wudieke nyɩɩna ma ba bala tɩ yime yiwo naa, dɩ tɩ tɩɩnsɩma zɔɔlɩntielibe dɩ benne ba chaakʋ wɩa. Kanɩŋ wɩɩrɩ mi seŋ yiwo wudieke die n yaala n yi.

eng: But when Cephas came to Antioch, I opposed him to his face, because he was wrong.
local: Die Piita dɩ kenne Antiyoku ma wa, die n balɩ yuori wo ʋ nine me, dama die ʋ ka yi wudieke dɩ mʋna.

eng: He had been eating with the Gentiles before certain people came from James. But when they came, he began to back out and separate himself, because he was afraid of the people who promoted circumcision.
local: Dama Jemisi die tʋŋ wa Juu vuosi bataŋ Antiyoku tɩŋ ma, die ba yene ka keŋ wo, Piita aŋaŋ vuodiekemba dɩ kana ka yi Juu vuosisi die lagɩsa die mɩŋ, ama die ba kenne wo, ʋ ka bɩ saagɩ dɩ ʋ dii aŋaŋ ba, dama die ʋ chɩga vuodiekemba dɩ yine kɔla gobiŋ yada wa mɩŋ.

eng: And the rest of the Jews also joined him in this hypocrisy so that even Barnabas got carried away with them in their hypocrisy.
local: Die wɩa, Juu vuosisi diekemba die dɩ benne aŋaŋ ba wa dɩaŋ dɩ piili a chɩga ŋmaamɩŋ, ta dɩ Piita dɩ yine wudieke, ta Banabasi gbaŋ die dɩ taarɩ a dɩ ba.

eng: But when I saw that they werent acting consistently with the truth of the gospel, I said to Cephas in front of everyone, If you, though youre a Jew, live like a Gentile and not like a Jew, how can you require the Gentiles to live like Jews.
local: Die n yene dɩ ba ka mɩŋŋɩ dɩ wʋvɩɩnaha sieku wo, die maŋ balɩ a yɩ Piita ba mana nine me dɩ, Fʋnɩŋ yiwo Juu vuoŋ, ama fʋ beriŋ dɩ sɩɩ sɩba vuodieke dɩ kana ka yi Juu vuoŋ, ta bɩa fʋ mugise vuodiekemba dɩ kana ka yi Juu vuosisi dɩ ba bemme sɩba Juu vuosisi.

eng: We are born Jews—were not Gentile sinners.
local: Tɩnɩŋ ba mɩɩrɩ tɩ mɩŋ ta tɩ yi Juu vuosi ta ka sɩɩ sɩba vuodiekemba dɩ kana ka yi Juu vuosisi ta Juu vuosi dɩ wasa tʋntʋmbɩatɩ tielibe wo.

eng: However, we know that a person isnt made righteous by the works of the Law but rather through the faithfulness of Jesus Christ. We ourselves believed in Christ Jesus so that we could be made righteous by the faithfulness of Christ and not by the works of the Law—because no one will be made righteous by the works of the Law.
local: Ama tɩ sɩba a baarɩ sie vuoŋ yi Yisa Masia yada, die nan yi aŋ Ŋmɩŋ vaa ʋ yi vuovɩɩnʋ ʋ jigiŋ, daa tɩ yinene wudieke Mosisi mɩraha dɩ dagɩna tɩ dɩ tɩ yime wo; die wɩa, tɩ gbaŋ yiwo Yisa Masia yada dɩ Ŋmɩŋ vaa aŋ tɩ yiwo vuovɩɩna ʋ jigiŋ, yadaka wɩa, ama daa tɩ yinene mɩraha dɩ dagɩna wudieke. Dama Ŋmɩŋ kaaŋ vaa aŋ vuoŋ yi vuovɩɩnʋ ʋ jigiŋ ʋ yinene wudieke mɩraha dɩ dagɩna wa wɩa.

eng: But if it is discovered that we ourselves are sinners while we are trying to be made righteous in Christ, then is Christ a servant of sin? Absolutely not!.
local: Dɩɩ yi tɩ mɩa aŋaŋ nɩŋŋmɩna dene dɩ Ŋmɩŋ vaa aŋ tɩ yi vuovɩɩna ʋ jigiŋ Masia wɩa, ama ta Juu vuosi dɩ bala dɩ tɩ yiwo vuobɩatɩ sɩba vuodiekemba dɩ kana ka yi Juu vuosisi naa, naa dagɩya mɩŋ dɩ Masia vana tɩ yi tʋntʋmbɩatɩ tieliŋ? Aayɩ dɩ ka daga dene.

eng: If I rebuild the very things that I tore down, I show that I myself am breaking the Law.
local: N nan dɩ yie bɩaŋ dɩɩ yi maŋ bɩ saagɩ dɩ vuoŋ nan yi vuovɩɩnʋ Ŋmɩŋ jigiŋ dɩɩ yi ʋ dɩ Mosisi mɩraha, ta chʋʋsa wudieke die n wolinne a dagɩ wa.

eng: I died to the Law through the Law, so that I could live for God.
local: Ama yaa gamma mɩraha wɩa nɩŋ, ka sɩɩ sɩba n kpiye ka jigiŋ mɩŋ, dɩ n yallɩma miivoli Ŋmɩŋ jigiŋ.

eng: I have been crucified with Christ and I no longer live, but Christ lives in me. And the life that I now live in my body, I live by faith, indeed, by the faithfulness of Gods Son, who loved me and gave himself for me.
local: Ka sɩɩ sɩba die ba lagɩŋ a kpaasɩ mɩŋ mɩŋ aŋaŋ Masia dagarɩkʋ ma maŋ kpi, ama Masia bie n ma maŋ yaa miivoli. Ta lele, miivoli dieke n yallɩna ta bie n nyɩŋgbanɩŋ ma naa, n yiwo Ŋmɩŋ Bʋa yada mɩŋ, die wɩa maŋ beri; wʋnɩŋ ʋ chone mɩŋ ta die zie n naŋ ma a kpi.

eng: I dont ignore the grace of God, because if we become righteous through the Law, then Christ died for no purpose.
local: N kaaŋ zeti Ŋmɩŋ zɔɔlɩnchɩgɩlaha. Dɩɩ yi Ŋmɩŋ dɩ nan vaa vuoŋ yi vuovɩɩnʋ ʋ jigiŋ ʋ dɩna mɩraha wɩa, die nɩŋ Masia kumbu wo chɩaŋ.

eng: You irrational Galatians! Who put a spell on you? Jesus Christ was put on display as crucified before your eyes!.
local: Nɩnɩŋ Galasia vuosi, nɩ yiwo gaatɩŋ. Nɩnɩŋ vuodiekemba die mɩŋŋɩna sɩba Yisa Masia dagarɩkʋ ma kuŋ wɩa vɩɩnɩŋ vɩɩnɩŋ, mɩnɩa kenne a chɔɔrɩŋ nɩ?.

eng: I just want to know this from you: Did you receive the Spirit by doing the works of the Law or by believing what you heard?.
local: Nɩ balɩ mɩŋ wɩɩrɩ gie: die nɩ dɩna mɩraha wɩa die nɩ tuo Ŋmɩŋ Halɩkasɩka yaa die nɩ wʋnna wʋvɩɩnaha ta yi yada wa wɩa?.

eng: Are you so irrational? After you started with the Spirit, are you now finishing up with your own human effort?.
local: Lalɩa nɩ yi gaantɩŋ dene! Die nɩ piili a dɩa Masia aŋaŋ Ŋmɩŋ Halɩkasɩka hagɩrɩŋ; bɩa wɩa nɩ wa yaala nɩ kpatɩ aŋaŋ nɩ gbaŋ gbaŋ nɩ hagɩrɩŋ?.

eng: Did you experience so much for nothing? I wonder if it really was for nothing.
local: Wahala diekemba nɩ dinene yaa gamma wʋvɩɩnaha gie yiwo yɔrɩ? Nɩ yaala nɩ vigi taaŋ mɩŋ?.

eng: So does the one providing you with the Spirit and working miracles among you do this by you doing the works of the Law or by you believing what you heard?.
local: N yaala n bɩ pɩasɩ nɩ mɩŋ, Ŋmɩŋ yɩ nɩ wa ʋ Halɩkasɩka ta tʋma mamachi wɩa nɩ jigiŋ nɩ mɩraha dɩɩsɩŋ wɩa yaa nɩ wʋnna wʋvɩɩnaha ta yi he yada wa wɩa?.

eng: Understand that in the same way that Abraham believed God and it was credited to him as righteousness, .
local: Nɩ tɩɩnsɩma Abarahami wɩa, dɩ maagɩya Ŋmɩŋ gbaŋkʋ ma dɩ, Abarahami die yiwo Ŋmɩŋ yada, ʋ yadaka wɩa wʋnɩŋ Ŋmɩŋ dɩ vaa ʋ yi vuovɩɩnʋ ʋ jigiŋ.

eng: those who believe are the children of Abraham.
local: Die wɩa nɩ mʋ nɩ sɩmma dɩ vuodiekemba dɩ yine Ŋmɩŋ yada senne yi Abarahami haagɩsɩ.

eng: But when it saw ahead of time that God would make the Gentiles righteous on the basis of faith, scripture preached the gospel in advance to Abraham: All the Gentiles will be blessed in you .
local: Ŋmɩŋ gbaŋkʋ die dɩ bala wudieke wo dagɩya dɩ wʋnɩŋ Ŋmɩŋ nan daansɩ baarɩ dɩ vuodiekemba dɩ kana ka yi Juu vuosi gbaŋ yiwo vuovɩɩna ʋ jigiŋ ba yine wa yada wɩa. Die wɩa die ʋ wolinne a balɩ a yɩ Abarahami wʋvɩɩnaha dɩ: N nan daagɩ fʋ ma a yi alibarika a yɩ buuriŋ mana ma.

eng: Therefore, those who believe are blessed together with Abraham who believed.
local: Naa dagɩya dɩ vuodieke nɩŋ mana dɩ yalla yada nan gʋtɩ ye alibarika dieke Ŋmɩŋ dɩ nagɩna a yɩ Abarahami wa ʋ yine wo yada wa.

eng: All those who rely on the works of the Law are under a curse, because it is written, Everyone is cursed who does not keep on doing all the things that have been written in the Law scroll .
local: Vuodiekemba dɩ nagɩna ba sʋŋanyile mana a yi mɩraha ma ta yile dɩ ka nan gbatɩ ba a taaŋ wa, Ŋmɩŋ kaatɩ bie ba ma. Dama dɩ maagɩya Ŋmɩŋ gbaŋkʋ ma dɩ, Vuodieke nɩŋ mana dɩ kana ka dɩa wudiekemba mana dɩ maagɩna Mosisi mɩraha gbaŋkʋ ma wa, Ŋmɩŋ kaatɩ bie ba ma.

eng: But since no one is made righteous by the Law as far as God is concerned, it is clear that the righteous one will live on the basis of faith .
local: Naa mɩŋŋɩna a dagɩ dɩ daa mɩraha dɩɩsɩŋ vasɩnana vuoŋ dɩ yie vuovɩɩnʋ Ŋmɩŋ jigiŋ, dama dɩ maagɩya Ŋmɩŋ gbaŋkʋ sʋŋ dɩ, Vuodieke nɩŋ mana dɩ yine Ŋmɩŋ yada ta Ŋmɩŋ dɩ vaa vuoke mi dɩ yi vuovɩɩnʋ ʋ jigiŋ ʋ yada wɩa, ʋ nan dɩ yallɩ miivoli wusie.

eng: The Law isnt based on faith; rather, the one doing these things will live by them .
local: Mɩraha dɩɩsɩŋ aŋaŋ yada yiile ka mʋ taŋ, dama dɩ maagɩya Ŋmɩŋ gbaŋkʋ ma dɩ, Dɩɩ yi fʋ yaala miivoli yaa gamma fʋ mɩraha dɩɩsɩŋ wɩa, die nɩŋ dɩ mʋ fʋ dɩa mɩraha mana mana.

eng: Christ redeemed us from the curse of the Law by becoming a curse for us—because it is written, Everyone who is hung on a tree is cursed .
local: Die tɩ bie wo Ŋmɩŋ kaatɩ ma, dama die tɩ ka mɩŋŋɩna dɩ mɩraha, ama Masia gbaŋ gbaŋ die tuo tɩ kuŋ a kpi, ta bie wo kaatɩka ma ta vʋarɩ tɩ a nyɩŋ ka ma, dama dɩ maagɩya Ŋmɩŋ gbaŋkʋ ma dɩ, Vuodieke nɩŋ mana ba taaŋ wa guuŋ Ŋmɩŋ kaatɩ bie ʋ ma.

eng: He redeemed us so that the blessing of Abraham would come to the Gentiles through Christ Jesus, and that we would receive the promise of the Spirit through faith.
local: Ŋmɩŋ die yaala ʋ daagɩ Yisa Masia ma ta vaa vuodiekemba dɩ kana ka yi Juu vuosisi dɩaŋ ye wʋvɩɩŋ dieke Ŋmɩŋ dɩ yɩna Abarahami nʋaŋ dɩ ʋ nan yi wa; dɩ tɩ yi yada, ta tuo Halɩkasɩka dieke Ŋmɩŋ die yɩna nʋaŋ dɩ ʋ nan yɩ tɩ wa.

eng: Brothers and sisters, Ill use an example from human experience. No one ignores or makes additions to a validated will.
local: N nɩmballɩ, nɩ vaa n nagɩ vuota aŋaŋ ʋ chanchaalɩŋ beriŋ a magɩsɩ aŋ nɩ mɩŋŋɩ sɩmma wudieke n balala chɩaŋ: dɩɩ yi vuosi bale dɩ saagɩ dɩ ba yi wɩɩŋ, ta maagɩ ba saara, ba wʋnyɩ kaaŋ bɩagɩ a zeti yaa a chʋsɩ saŋkʋ halɩ bɩta gbaŋ.

eng: The promises were made to Abraham and to his descendant. It doesnt say, and to the descendants, as if referring to many rather than just one. It says, and to your descendant, who is Christ.
local: Ŋmɩŋ die dɩ yɩna Abarahami aŋaŋ ʋ haagɩŋ ʋ nʋarɩ, die ʋ ka baarɩ dɩ, Fʋ haagɩsɩ, ama die ʋ baarɩ dɩ, Fʋ haagɩŋ vuobalɩmɩŋ, vuodieke dɩ yine Masia wa.

eng: Im saying this: the Law, which came four hundred thirty years later, doesnt invalidate the agreement that was previously validated by God so that it cancels the promise.
local: Wudieke n balala wa yiwo naa, Ŋmɩŋ die zieŋ wo nʋaŋ aŋaŋ Abarahami ta die baarɩ dɩ ʋ nan yi wudieke ʋ yɩna nʋaŋ dɩ ʋ nan yiwo; ta mɩrɩ dieke dɩ kenne ka kʋaŋ chaaŋ bɩna kɔbɩsɩ-nɩɩsa aŋaŋ baŋɩsɩ-taa wa kaaŋ bɩagɩ a chʋʋsɩ wudieke Ŋmɩŋ dɩ ziene nʋarɩ ta yɩ nʋaŋ dɩ ʋ nan yiwo.

eng: If the inheritance were based upon the Law, it would no longer be from the promise. But God has given it graciously to Abraham through a promise.
local: Dama dɩɩ yi Mosisi mɩraha dɩɩsɩŋ wɩa Ŋmɩŋ dɩ yɩ vuosi ʋ piini, die nɩŋ dɩ dagɩya dɩ ʋ tɩŋ kaaŋ yi vuoŋ ʋ piini ʋ nʋarɩ wɩa; ama ʋ nʋarɩ wɩa die ʋ yɩ Abarahami ʋ piinike.

eng: So why was the Law given? It was added because of offenses, until the descendant would come to whom the promise had been made. It was put in place through angels by the hand of a mediator.
local: Ta bɩa wɩa Ŋmɩŋ die dɩ yɩ ba mɩraha? Tʋntʋmbɩatɩ wɩa Ŋmɩŋ die dɩ yɩ vuota mɩraha a gʋtɩ ʋ nʋarɩ ma, ta die yaala mɩraha pɔgɩlɩ ba dee a ga tʋgɩ saŋŋa dieke Abarahami haagɩŋ vuodieke wʋnɩŋ Ŋmɩŋ die dɩ yɩ nʋaŋ a yɩ wa dɩ ʋ nan keŋ wo keŋ. Malakasi die nagɩna mɩraha a yi vuota nuusi me ta Mosisi die dɩ yi ka naazʋa.

eng: Now the mediator does not take one side; but God is one.
local: Ama Ŋmɩŋ gbaŋ gbaŋ die yɩna Abarahami nʋarɩ, daa naazʋa die yɩna wa.

eng: So, is the Law against the promises of God? Absolutely not! If a Law had been given that was able to give life, then righteousness would in fact have come from the Law.
local: Naa dagɩya dɩ mɩraha waga mɩŋ aŋaŋ Ŋmɩŋ nʋa? Aayɩ, dɩ ka daga dene; ama dɩɩ yi Ŋmɩŋ die dɩ yi mɩrɩ dieke dɩ baaŋ bɩagɩ a yɩ vuota miivoli, ʋ tɩŋ nan baarɩ dɩ vuosi yiwo vuovɩɩna ʋ jigiŋ mɩraha dɩɩsɩŋ wɩa.

eng: But scripture locked up all things under sin, so that the promise based on the faithfulness of Jesus Christ might be given to those who have faith.
local: Dɩ maagɩya Ŋmɩŋ gbaŋkʋ ma dɩ vuoŋ mana dʋnɩaka gie me bie wo bɩaŋ dansarɩka ma mɩŋ, ama sie dieke nyɩɩna ma vuoŋ dɩ baaŋ daagɩ a tuo Ŋmɩŋ nʋarɩ yiwo ʋ yi Yisa Masia yada.

eng: Before faith came, we were guarded under the Law, locked up until faith that was coming would be revealed.
local: Mɩraha die dɩ pɔgɩlɩ tɩ sɩba tɩ bie wo dansarɩka ma a ga tʋgɩ saŋŋa dieke Ŋmɩŋ dɩ yuori yada yiile wɩa a dagɩ tɩ.

eng: so that the Law became our custodian until Christ so that we might be made righteous by faith.
local: Die wɩa, mɩraha die sɩɩ sɩba tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ ta die pɔgɩlɩ tɩ dee a ga tʋgɩ saŋŋa dieke Masia die dɩ kenne keŋ, dɩ tɩ yi wo yada aŋ Ŋmɩŋ vaa tɩ yi vuovɩɩna ʋ jigiŋ.

eng: But now that faith has come, we are no longer under a custodian.
local: Ama lele nɩŋ tɩ yi Masia yada mɩŋ; die wɩa mɩraha ka bɩ yi tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ.

eng: You are all Gods children through faith in Christ Jesus.
local: Nɩ yine Masia yada wa vana nɩ mana dɩ bɩrɩŋ Ŋmɩŋ ballɩ.

eng: All of you who were baptized into Christ have clothed yourselves with Christ.
local: Nɩnɩŋ vuodiekemba die ba sɩna nɩ Ŋmɩŋ nyaabʋ Masia saaŋ ma wa, nɩnɩŋ nɩ tuone ʋ gbaŋ gbaŋ beriŋ.

eng: There is neither Jew nor Greek; there is neither slave nor free; nor is there male and female, for you are all one in Christ Jesus.
local: Die wɩa, puole bɩ wori vuodiekemba dɩ yine Juu vuosi aŋaŋ vuodiekemba dɩ kana ka yi Juu vuosi mi, ka bɩ wori vuodiekemba dɩ yine yɔŋɩsɩ aŋaŋ vuodiekemba dɩ sɩna ba gbaŋ ma, ka bɩ wori hɔɔŋ aŋaŋ dembisi sʋnsʋŋ, nɩ benne Yisa Masia jigiŋ naa wɩa yine nɩ mana vuobalɩmɩŋ.

eng: Now if you belong to Christ, then indeed you are Abrahams descendants, heirs according to the promise.
local: Dɩɩ yi nɩ yi Masia sɩɩtɩ, die nɩŋ nɩ yiwo Abarahami haagɩsɩ, ta nɩ nan keŋ tuo piini dieke Ŋmɩŋ die dɩ yɩna wa nʋaŋ dɩ ʋ nan yɩ wa wa.

eng: Im saying that as long as the heirs are minors, they are no different from slaves, though they really are the owners of everything.
local: N bɩ bala nɩ mɩŋ dɩ bʋadembiŋ dieke dɩ bala ʋ keŋ dii ʋ chɔɔŋ faarɩ wa, saŋŋa dieke ʋ yene yi bʋanyaalɩŋ ba ŋaaŋ pɔgɩlɩ wa mɩŋ sɩba yɔmʋ.

eng: However, they are placed under trustees and guardians until the date set by the parents.
local: Saŋŋa dieke ʋ yene yi bʋanyaalɩka, vuosi bataŋ ŋaaŋ wube wo ta daansa ʋ nyinti dee a ga tʋgɩ saŋŋa dieke ʋ chɔɔŋ wa dɩ ziene wo.

eng: In the same way, when we were minors, we were also enslaved by this worlds system.
local: Die gbaŋ gbaŋ dɩ sɩɩ aŋaŋ tɩ, saŋŋa dieke tɩ kana ka sɩba Masia wa, die tɩ sɩɩ sɩba bʋanyaalɩsɩ, ta dʋnɩaka gie haalɩŋ hagɩrɩŋ die pɔgɩlɩna tɩ.

eng: But when the fulfillment of the time came, God sent his Son, born through a woman, and born under the Law.
local: Ama saŋka die Ŋmɩŋ dɩ ziene dɩ kenne tʋgɩ, Ŋmɩŋ die tʋŋ wa ʋ gbaŋ gbaŋ ʋ Bʋadembiŋ tɩŋgbaŋka gie me, ta hɔgʋ dɩ mɩɩrɩ wa, ta ʋ bie Juu vuosi mɩraha ma.

eng: This was so he could redeem those under the Law so that we could be adopted.
local: dɩ ʋ gbatɩ vuodiekemba dɩ benne mɩraha hagɩrɩŋ ma, amʋ tɩ bɩrɩŋ Ŋmɩŋ ballɩ wusie.

eng: Because you are sons and daughters, God sent the Spirit of his Son into our hearts, crying, Abba, Father.
local: Tɩ yine ʋ ballɩ wɩa ʋ tʋŋ ʋ Bʋadembike Halɩkasɩka ʋ bie tɩ sʋgɩtɩ ma aŋ tɩ wasa wa dɩ N Chʋa.

eng: Therefore, you are no longer a slave but a son or daughter, and if you are his child, then you are also an heir through God.
local: Die wɩa, ka bɩ yi yɔmʋ, ama yiwo Ŋmɩŋ bʋa, fʋ yine ʋ bʋa wa wɩa ʋ nan yɩ fʋ jadieke mana ʋ yallɩnana a yɩa ʋ ballɩ.

eng: At the time, when you didnt know God, you were enslaved by things that arent gods by nature.
local: Saŋŋa dieke dɩ tɩanna wa die nɩ ka sɩba Ŋmɩŋ, saŋka mi die nɩ yiwo yɔŋɩsɩ a yi jadieke dɩ senne ka yi Nabidie Ŋmɩŋ.

eng: But now, after knowing God , how can you turn back again to the weak and worthless world system? Do you want to be slaves to it again?.
local: Ama lele nɩŋ, nɩ wa sɩba Ŋmɩŋ yaa nɩ vaa n balɩ dɩ Ŋmɩŋ sɩba nɩ mɩŋ, dɩ wa yiwo lalɩa nɩ bɩ yaala nɩ yiŋŋi a dɩ dʋnɩaka gie haalɩtɩ wabɩtɩ dɩ pɔgɩlɩna tɩŋgbaŋka gie? Bɩa yine nɩ bɩ yaala nɩ bɩrɩŋ ba yɔŋɩsɩ?.

eng: You observe religious days and months and seasons and years.
local: Nɩ faasɩna vaa nɩ baga dɩ bie wo daraa ataŋ aŋaŋ chɩɩtɩ ataŋ aŋaŋ saŋŋa ataŋ aŋaŋ bɩna ataŋ ma pam.

eng: Im afraid for you! Perhaps my hard work for you has been for nothing.
local: ta die dɩ yi ŋmaamɩŋ dɩ yigi mɩŋ yaa gamma nɩ ma dɩ wudieke mana n yine a yɩ nɩ wa yiwo yɔrɩ.

eng: I beg you to be like me, brothers and sisters, because I have become like you! You havent wronged me.
local: N nɩmballɩ, n jʋʋsa nɩ, nɩ sɩmma sɩba manɩŋ, dama n gbaŋ n sɩɩ sɩba nɩnɩŋ mɩŋ. Nɩ ka yi wɩɩŋ a chʋʋsɩ mɩŋ.

eng: You know that I first preached the gospel to you because of an illness.
local: Nɩ tɩɩnsɩ saŋŋa dieke n wolinne a mʋʋlɩ wʋvɩɩnaha a yɩ nɩ wa; die n yʋagɩna wɩa maŋ ye sieŋ a woliŋ mʋʋlɩ wʋvɩɩnaha a yɩ nɩ wa.

eng: Though my poor health burdened you, you didnt look down on me or reject me, but you welcomed me as if I were an angel from God, or as if I were Christ Jesus!.
local: Ama aŋaŋ n yʋagɩbʋ die dɩ faasɩna a yi mugisiŋ a yɩ nɩ mana yɔrɩ, die nɩ ka daansɩ mɩŋ yɔrɩ ta zeti mɩŋ, ama ta die tuo mɩŋ sɩba nɩ tɩnna baa nɩ tuo Ŋmɩŋ malaka dene, ta bɩ tuo mɩŋ sɩba nɩ tɩnna baa nɩ tuo Yisa Masia dene wo.

eng: Where then is the great attitude that you had? I swear that, if possible, you would have dug out your eyes and given them to me.
local: Ta die nɩ sʋgɩtɩ die dɩ fɩalɩ pam, bɩa wana yi? N nan bɩagɩ a balɩ dɩ saŋka mi die nɩ tɩŋ nan bɩagɩ a vʋarɩ nɩ nine a yɩ mɩŋ nɩ tɩŋ nan yi die.

eng: So then, have I become your enemy by telling you the truth?.
local: Lele n wa yiwo nɩ dataaŋ die n bala nɩ wusieke wɩa?.

eng: They are so concerned about you, though not with good intentions. Rather, they want to shut you out so that you would run after them.
local: Vuosi mi mɩa mɩŋ aŋaŋ nɩŋŋmɩna amʋ nɩ nan yiŋŋi a dɩ ba, ama ba wo sʋŋanyile vɩɩna. Wudieke ba yaalɩnana yiwo dɩ ba puo maŋ aŋaŋ nɩ amʋ nɩ nan yi nɩŋŋmɩna a dɩ ba.

eng: However, its always good to have people concerned about you with good intentions, and not just when Im there with you.
local: Dɩ vɩɩna mɩŋ dɩ fʋ dɩa vuoŋ aŋaŋ nɩŋŋmɩna dɩɩ yi wudieke ʋ dagɩnana wa dɩ vɩɩna. Nɩ yime naa saŋŋa mana daa maŋ keŋ bie nɩ jigiŋ nyɩɩna ma.

eng: My little children, Im going through labor pains again until Christ is formed in you.
local: N ballɩ choti, dɩ bɩ yʋagɩ mɩŋ bɩbra nɩ wɩa sɩba hɔgʋ dɩ ŋaana baa ʋ mɩɩrɩ ta dɩ yʋagɩ wa dene wo. N nan dɩ bie kanɩŋ yʋagɩbʋ ma a ga tʋgɩ saŋŋa dieke nɩ beriŋ dɩ baaŋ nɩasɩ Masia beriŋ.

eng: But I wish I could be with you now and change how I sound, because Im at a loss about you.
local: Dɩ tɩnɩŋ nan yi mɩŋ nansɩŋ pam maŋ tɩŋ bie nɩ jigiŋ lele gie, amʋ n nan bɩagɩ tarɩgɩ n balɩŋ aŋaŋ nɩ dama dɩ mugisi mɩŋ mɩŋ pam nɩ wɩa.

eng: Tell me—those of you who want to be under the Law—dont you listen to the Law?.
local: Nɩnɩŋ vuodiekemba dɩ yaala mɩraha pɔgɩlɩ nɩ wa, nɩ ka wʋŋ wudieke mɩraha dɩ dagɩna wa?.

eng: Its written that Abraham had two sons, one by the slave woman and one by the free woman.
local: Dɩ maagɩya mɩŋ dɩ Abarahami die yaa wa ballɩdembisi bale; ta wʋnyɩ nuŋ dɩ yi yɔmʋ ta wʋnyɩ wa dɩaŋ nuŋ dɩ ka yi yɔmʋ.

eng: The son by the slave woman was conceived the normal way, but the son by the free woman was conceived through a promise.
local: Yɔmʋ wa die mɩɩrɩ ʋ bʋa dembike sɩba ba ŋaana a mɩɩrɩ vuota dene wo, ama hɔgʋ dieke dɩ kana ka yi yɔmʋ wa die dɩ mɩɩrɩ ʋ bʋa dembike sɩba Ŋmɩŋ die dɩ yɩna nʋaŋ dene wo.

eng: These things are an allegory: the women are two covenants. One is from Mount Sinai, which gives birth to slave children; this is Hagar.
local: Hɔgʋba bale wo gie mana zie wo Ŋmɩŋ nʋazielikiŋ ale wo nagɩsɩ ma mɩŋ. Yɔmʋ wa saaŋ die yiwo Haga, ta ʋ die zie nʋa dieke Ŋmɩŋ die dɩ yɩna Sayina Kunkogiri me wo ta die mɩɩrɩ ʋ bʋa ʋ yɔŋɩsɩ ma wa.

eng: Hagar is Mount Sinai in Arabia, and she corresponds to the present-day Jerusalem, because the city is in slavery with her children.
local: Haga zie a yi wa Sayina Kunkogiri dɩ benne Arabia tɩŋgbaŋ ma wa, ta sɩɩ sɩba tɩgɩkpɩɩka gie Jerusalemi wo, ta wʋnɩŋ aŋaŋ ʋ ballɩ yiwo yɔŋɩsɩ.

eng: But the Jerusalem that is above is free, and she is our mother.
local: Ta arɩzanna Jerusalemi dɩ sɩ-ʋ-gbaŋ, wʋnɩŋ ʋ yine tɩ nuŋ.

eng: Its written: Rejoice, barren woman, you who have not given birth . Break out with a shout, you who have not suffered labor pains; because the woman who has been deserted will have many more children than the woman who has a husband .
local: Dama dɩ maagɩya Ŋmɩŋ gbaŋkʋ sʋŋ dɩ; Fʋnɩŋ hɔgʋpɩrɩŋ, yallɩma sʋgɩfɩalɩŋ! Fʋnɩŋ vuodieke dɩ yene ka sɩba maarɩŋ yʋagɩŋ dɩ sɩna dene, chɩama sʋgɩfɩalɩŋ yɩla Dama hɔgʋ dieke ba zetine wo nan keŋ yaa ballɩ pam a tɩaŋ hɔgʋ dieke dɩ benne aŋaŋ ʋ chʋrʋ wa.

eng: Brothers and sisters, you are children of the promise like Isaac.
local: Tɔ, n nɩmballɩ, nɩnɩŋ nɩ wana yi Ŋmɩŋ nʋaŋ ballɩ, sɩba Aziki die dɩ yine dene wo.

eng: But just as it was then, so it is now also: the one who was conceived the normal way harassed the one who was conceived by the Spirit.
local: Die saŋka mi die bʋa dieke ba mɩɩrɩna wa sɩba ba mɩɩrɩna vuota dene wo die dɩ mugise vuodieke ba mɩɩrɩna wa aŋaŋ Ŋmɩŋ Halɩkasɩka hagɩrɩbʋ, die dɩ sɩɩ lele gbaŋ.

eng: But what does the scripture say? Throw out the slave woman and her son, because the slave womans son wont share the inheritance with the free womans son .
local: Ama lalɩa ba maagɩ Ŋmɩŋ gbaŋkʋ sʋŋ? Dɩ maagɩya mɩŋ dɩ, Yagɩ hɔgʋ yɔmʋ wa aŋaŋ ʋ bʋadembike a taaŋ, dama hɔgʋ yɔmʋ bʋadembike kaaŋ gʋtɩ dii ʋ chɔɔŋ wa faarɩ aŋaŋ hɔgʋ dieke dɩ kana ka yi yɔmʋ wa bʋa wa.

eng: Therefore, brothers and sisters, we arent the slave womans children, but we are the free womans children.
local: Die wɩa n nɩmballɩ, tɩnɩŋ tɩ ka yi hɔgʋ yɔmʋ wa ballɩ, ama tɩ yiwo hɔgʋ dieke dɩ kana ka yi yɔmʋ wa ballɩ.

eng: Christ has set us free for freedom. Therefore, stand firm and dont submit to the bondage of slavery again.
local: Yisa Masia wɔŋ gbatɩ tɩ a taaŋ mɩŋ, ta tɩ beri tɩ dʋŋŋʋ. Die wɩa, nɩ zie keŋ keŋ ta da vaa jaaŋ bɔbɩ nɩ bɩbra aŋ nɩ bɩrɩŋ ka yɔŋɩsɩ bɩbra.

eng: Look, I, Paul, am telling you that if you have yourselves circumcised, having Christ wont help you.
local: Nɩ wʋmma, manɩŋ Pɔɔli balala nɩ naa, dɩ dɩɩ yi nɩ saagɩ a dɩ kɔla gobiŋ mɩraha, die nɩnɩŋ dɩ dagɩya dɩ Masia wo nyʋarɩ a yɩ nɩ.

eng: Again I swear to every man who has himself circumcised that he is required to do the whole Law.
local: N bɩ bala nɩ bɩbra, vuodieke dɩ dɩna kɔla gobiŋ mɩraha, dɩ yiwo talasɩ dɩ ʋ dɩa mɩraha mana mana.

eng: You people who are trying to be made righteous by the Law have been estranged from Christ. You have fallen away from grace!.
local: Nɩnɩŋ vuodiekemba dɩ kpaŋŋɩnana nɩ gbaŋ dɩ Ŋmɩŋ vaa nɩ yi vuovɩɩna ʋ jigiŋ mɩraha dɩɩsɩŋ wɩa, nɩ wɔŋ puo wo nɩ gbaŋ a nyɩŋ Masia ma, ta bɩ vʋarɩ nɩ gbaŋ a nyɩŋ Ŋmɩŋ zɔɔlɩnchɩgɩla ma.

eng: We eagerly wait for the hope of righteousness through the Spirit by faith.
local: Tɩnɩŋ nɩŋ Ŋmɩŋ Halɩkasɩka yɩ tɩ wa tama dɩ Ŋmɩŋ nan vaa tɩ yi vuovɩɩna ʋ jigiŋ tɩ yine Masia yada wa wɩa.

eng: Being circumcised or not being circumcised doesnt matter in Christ Jesus, but faith working through love does matter.
local: Dama dɩɩ yi tɩ taasɩ aŋaŋ Yisa Masia, tɩ gobi tɩ kɔla yaa tɩ ka gobiye, dɩ ka yi talasɩ. Dɩɩ yi tɩ yi Masia yada ta ka vaa tɩ cho taŋ, kanɩŋ ka yine nɩŋŋmɩna.

eng: You were running well—who stopped you from obeying the truth?.
local: Die nɩ kpaŋŋa nɩ gbaŋ mɩŋ, mɩnɩa wana yi ta nɩ zeti wusieke? Lalɩa ʋ tieŋ dɩ halɩŋ nɩ?.

eng: This line of reasoning doesnt come from the one who calls you.
local: Da Ŋmɩŋ vuodieke dɩ wana nɩ wa tʋnna dene.

eng: A little yeast works through the whole lump of dough.
local: Sɩba ba bala dɩ, Dabɔtɩ bɩta vasɩnana paanʋ zɔŋ mana dɩ yire.

eng: Im convinced about you in the Lord that you wont think any other way. But the one who is confusing you will pay the penalty, whoever that may be.
local: Ama n ye yaa tama nɩ ma. Tɩ taasɩna aŋaŋ tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ wo vaa maŋ yaa wa tama dɩ nɩ kaaŋ daagɩ sie gaaŋ, ta bɩ yaa tama dɩ vuoŋ nɩnɩŋ mana dɩ mugisinene nɩ wo, Ŋmɩŋ nan datɩ ʋ tɩbɩŋ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, if Im still preaching circumcision, why am I still being harassed? In that case, the offense of the cross would be canceled.
local: N nɩmballɩ, dɩɩ yi maŋ ye mʋʋla dɩ vuosi gobi ba kɔla gbaŋ, bɩa wɩa ba mugise mɩŋ? Dɩɩ yi wusie dɩ n mʋʋla kɔla gobiŋ wɩa, die nɩŋ n mʋʋlɩkʋ yaa gamma dagarɩkʋ ma dene wo, kaaŋ dɩ yaa mugisiŋ keŋ.

eng: I wish that the ones who are upsetting you would castrate themselves!.
local: Dɩ tɩŋ nan yi mɩŋ nansɩŋ dɩɩ yi vuodiekemba dɩ chɔrɩnnana nɩ wa jaa ba gbaŋ gʋtɩ kɔla gobiŋ me.

eng: You were called to freedom, brothers and sisters; only dont let this freedom be an opportunity to indulge your selfish impulses, but serve each other through love.
local: N nɩmballɩ, nɩnɩŋ nɩŋ Ŋmɩŋ wana nɩ mɩŋ dɩ nɩ bemme nɩ dʋŋŋʋ, ama nɩ daa vaa nɩ dʋŋŋʋ beriku gie vaa nɩ nyɩŋgbanɩŋ lɔla nyaŋŋɩna nɩ. Ama nɩ nagɩ choti a suŋŋime taŋ.

eng: All the Law has been fulfilled in a single statement: Love your neighbor as yourself .
local: Dama mɩraha mana kalɩ wa mɩrɩbalɩmɩŋ ma dɩ, Chome fʋ chanchaaŋ sɩba fʋ chone fʋ gbaŋ dene.

eng: But if you bite and devour each other, be careful that you dont get eaten up by each other!.
local: Ama dɩɩ yi nɩ yie taŋ daŋŋa ta chʋʋsa taŋ sɩba haagɩŋ nyɩnbɩatɩ, die nɩŋ dɩ sɩmma dɩ nɩ nan chʋʋsɩ taŋ.

eng: I say be guided by the Spirit and you wont carry out your selfish desires.
local: N bala nɩ mɩŋ, dɩ nɩ vaa Halɩkasɩka pɔgɩlɩ nɩ, ta da vaa nɩ lɔla vaa nɩ yime vuota choti.

eng: A persons selfish desires are set against the Spirit, and the Spirit is set against ones selfish desires. They are opposed to each other, so you shouldnt do whatever you want to do.
local: Dama vuota nyɩŋgbanɩŋ choti aŋaŋ Ŋmɩŋ Halɩkasɩka choti ka dɩa taŋ. Halɩkasɩka aŋaŋ vuota nyɩŋgbanɩŋ yiwo dataasɩ, ta naa dagɩya dɩ nɩ kaaŋ bɩagɩ yi wudieke nɩ yaalala.

eng: But if you are being led by the Spirit, you arent under the Law.
local: Dɩɩ yi Halɩkasɩka dɩ dagɩna nɩ sieŋ, die nɩŋ nɩ bɩ wo mɩraha sʋŋ.

eng: The actions that are produced by selfish motives are obvious, since they include sexual immorality, moral corruption, doing whatever feels good.
local: Wudieke vuota nyɩŋgbanɩŋ dɩ yinene yiwo daakpana aŋaŋ hɔgʋkpana tʋʋma, aŋaŋ dɩgɩntɩ tʋʋma yiri yiri, aŋaŋ lɔlɩbɩatɩ.

eng: idolatry, drug use and casting spells, hate, fighting, obsession, losing your temper, competitive opposition, conflict, selfishness, group rivalry.
local: aŋaŋ bugile jɩamɩŋ aŋaŋ yuŋ. Vuosi bɩrɩma dataasɩ aŋaŋ taŋ ta waga, ta yaa sʋgɩbɩaŋ aŋaŋ taŋ ta jɩa sɩnyɩɩrɩŋ aŋaŋ taŋ, aŋaŋ halɩbɩaŋ, ta puo ta luge taŋ.

eng: jealousy, drunkenness, partying, and other things like that. I warn you as I have already warned you, that those who do these kinds of things wont inherit Gods kingdom.
local: ta bɩ yaa sʋgɩbɩaŋ, ta nyuo daaŋ a buge, ta yie wɩa yɔrɩ yɔrɩ, ta yie wudiekemba dɩ nɩasɩna naa a gʋtɩ. N kpaama nɩ mɩŋ sɩba n wone a kpaaŋ nɩ dene wo, dɩ vuodiekemba dɩ yinene wɩaha gie wo kaaŋ wɔŋ juu Ŋmɩŋ naarɩ ma.

eng: But the fruit of the Spirit is love, joy, peace, patience, kindness, goodness, faithfulness.
local: Ama Ŋmɩŋ Halɩkasɩka vasa vuoŋ dɩ yaa choti aŋaŋ sʋgɩfɩalɩŋ aŋaŋ sʋgɩdʋagɩŋ aŋaŋ suguru, aŋaŋ burichini ta tʋma vɩɩnɩŋ, ta yi wusietieŋ.

eng: gentleness, and self-control. There is no law against things like this.
local: ta sʋʋŋ ʋ gbaŋ tɩŋgbaŋ, ta bɩagɩ yige ʋ gbaŋ. Mɩra wori a bala dɩ vuoŋ da yie naa.

eng: Those who belong to Christ Jesus have crucified the self with its passions and its desires.
local: Ta vuodiekemba dɩ yine Yisa Masia sɩɩtɩ wa nɩŋ wɔŋ kʋʋ ba vuota beriŋ aŋaŋ ka lɔlɩbɩatɩ mana mɩŋ.

eng: If we live by the Spirit, lets follow the Spirit.
local: Halɩkasɩka yɩ tɩ wa miivoli ta tɩ mʋ tɩ dɩa wa.

eng: Lets not become arrogant, make each other angry, or be jealous of each other.
local: Dɩ ka mʋ dɩ tɩ yallɩma kalinbaani yaa a yime vuosi jɩɩma sɩnyɩɩrɩŋ, yaa a yaa wa sʋgɩbɩaŋ aŋaŋ taŋ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, if a person is caught doing something wrong, you who are spiritual should restore someone like this with a spirit of gentleness. Watch out for yourselves so you wont be tempted too.
local: N nɩmballɩ, dɩɩ yi nɩ wʋnyɩ dɩ yi bɩaŋ, nɩnɩŋ vuodiekemba dɩ bemme aŋaŋ Ŋmɩŋ Halɩkasɩka mʋ nɩ suŋŋi wo sɔmm aŋ ʋ yiŋŋi sieku me. Ama nɩ sɩmma amʋ nɩ gbaŋ nɩ kaaŋ juu kanɩŋ bɩabʋ mi.

eng: Carry each others burdens and so you will fulfill the law of Christ.
local: Nɩ suŋŋime a chime taŋ chiidʋnsa, nɩ yie naa nɩ nan dɩ dɩ Masia mɩrɩka.

eng: If anyone thinks they are important when they arent, theyre fooling themselves.
local: Dɩɩ yi vuoŋ dɩ yile dɩ ʋ yiwo vuoŋ ama ta ka yi vuoŋ die nɩŋ ʋ gaama ʋ gbaŋ.

eng: Each person should test their own work and be happy with doing a good job and not compare themselves with others.
local: Dɩ vɩɩna dɩ vuoŋ mana magɩsɩ ʋ gbaŋ gbaŋ ʋ beriŋ, ta ʋ wa yallɩma sʋgɩfɩalɩŋ yaa gamma ʋ tʋnvɩɩna ma, ta daa nagɩ ʋ gbaŋ a magɩsɩma aŋaŋ vuogaaŋ tʋʋma.

eng: Each person will have to carry their own load.
local: Dama dɩ yiwo talasɩ dɩ vuoŋ mana chii ʋ gbaŋ gbaŋ chiiti.

eng: Those who are taught the word should share all good things with their teacher.
local: Vuodieke ba dagɩna wa Yisa Masia wʋvɩɩnaha mʋ ʋ tɩa nyɩnvɩɩna mana ʋ yallɩ aŋaŋ ʋ dɩdagɩrʋ.

eng: Make no mistake, God is not mocked. A person will harvest what they plant.
local: Nɩ da gaama nɩ gbaŋ; vuoŋ kaaŋ bɩagɩ gaaŋ Ŋmɩŋ; vuota gobe jadieke ʋ bʋrɩna wa mɩŋ.

eng: Those who plant only for their own benefit will harvest devastation from their selfishness, but those who plant for the benefit of the Spirit will harvest eternal life from the Spirit.
local: Vuodieke dɩ bʋrɩna dɩ ʋ fɩalɩ ʋ nyɩŋgbanɩŋ choti, ʋ nan keŋ gobi kuŋ ʋ nyɩŋgbanɩŋ lɔlɩbɩatɩ ma wɩa; ama vuodieke nɩŋ dɩ bʋrɩna dɩ ʋ fɩalɩ Ŋmɩŋ Halɩkasɩka, nan keŋ gobi miivoli dieke dɩ wone kpatɩ Ŋmɩŋ Halɩkasɩka wɩa.

eng: Lets not get tired of doing good, because in time well have a harvest if we dont give up.
local: Die wɩa, nɩ daa vaa tɩ gbalɩgɩ aŋaŋ vɩɩnɩŋ yiile, dama dɩɩ yi tɩ ka vaa vɩɩnɩŋ yiile, tɩ nan keŋ ye ka nyʋarɩ saŋŋa dieke dɩ mʋna.

eng: So then, lets work for the good of all whenever we have an opportunity, and especially for those in the household of faith.
local: Die wɩa, dɩɩ yi tɩ ye sieŋ, tɩ yime wudieke dɩ vɩɩna a yɩma vuoŋ mana; a tɩaŋ a mana tɩ yime a yɩma vuodiekemba dɩ yine tɩ nɩmballɩ tɩ mana dɩ yine Yisa Masia yadaka wɩa.

eng: Look at the large letters Im making with my own handwriting!.
local: Lele, nɩ ye n maagɩna aŋaŋ maagɩkpɩɩma dene aŋaŋ n gbaŋ gbaŋ n nuuŋ.

eng: Whoever wants to look good by human standards will try to get you to be circumcised, but only so they wont be harassed for the cross of Christ.
local: Vuodiekemba dɩ yaala ba vaa Juu vuosi sʋŋ fɩalɩ wa, banɩŋ ba mugisine nɩ dɩ nɩ gobi nɩ kɔla, amʋ Juu vuosisi kaaŋ mugisi be Masia dagarɩkʋ ma wɩa.

eng: Those who are circumcised dont observe the Law themselves, but they want you to be circumcised, so they can boast about your physical body.
local: Vuodiekemba dɩ gobinene ba kɔlaha gbaŋ ka dɩa Mosisi mɩraha, ama ba yaala nɩ gobi wo nɩ kɔla amʋ ba nan bɩagɩ kuuli nɩ kɔlaha gobiŋ wɩa.

eng: But as for me, God forbid that I should boast about anything except for the cross of our Lord Jesus Christ. The world has been crucified to me through him, and I have been crucified to the world.
local: Manɩŋ nɩŋ n nan kuuli yaa gamma tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Yisa Masia dagarɩkʋ ma nyɩɩna ma, dama ʋ dagarɩkʋ wɩa maŋ kʋʋ tɩŋgbaŋka gie wɩa n nyɩŋgbanɩŋ ma, ta tɩŋgbaŋka gie wɩa dɩ bɩ wo hagɩrɩŋ n nyɩŋgbanɩŋ ma.

eng: Being circumcised or not being circumcised doesnt mean anything. What matters is a new creation.
local: Puole wori yaa gamma vuodieke dɩ gobine ʋ kɔlɩ aŋaŋ vuodieke dɩ kana ka gobi ʋ kɔlɩ. Wudieke dɩ yine nɩŋŋmɩna yine berihaalɩ dieke Ŋmɩŋ dɩ yɩ tɩ wa mɩŋ.

eng: May peace and mercy be on whoever follows this rule and on Gods Israel.
local: Sʋgɩfɩalɩŋ aŋaŋ zɔɔlɩnchɩgɩla bemme vuodiekemba die dɩna dagɩkʋ gie ma, banɩŋ ba yine Ŋmɩŋ vuosi.

eng: From now on, no one should bother me because I bear the marks of Jesus on my body.
local: Ka kpatɩŋ, nɩ sɩmma dɩ vuoŋ bɩ yɩ mɩŋ wumugisikiŋ, dama n wɔŋ yaa wa kɔjagɩlagɩsɩ a dagɩ dɩ n yiwo Yisa Masia yɔmʋ.

eng: From Paul, an apostle of Christ Jesus by Gods will. To the holy and faithful people in Christ Jesus in Ephesus.
local: Manɩŋ Pɔɔli vuodieke Ŋmɩŋ dɩ vʋarɩna dɩ n yi Yisa Masia tʋntʋntʋ maagɩnana gbaŋkʋ gie a yɩa nɩnɩŋ Yisa Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrɩ diekemba dɩ yine wo yada ta bie Efesusi tɩŋ ma.

eng: Brothers and sisters, may the grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with your spirit. Amen.
local: N nɩmballɩ, tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Yisa Masia suŋŋi nɩ mana. Wusie.

eng: Grace and peace to you from God our Father and our Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Tɩ Chɔɔŋ Nabidie Ŋmɩŋ aŋaŋ tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Yisa Masia suŋŋi nɩ ta yɩ nɩ sʋgɩfɩalɩŋ.

eng: Bless the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ! He has blessed us in Christ with every spiritual blessing that comes from heaven.
local: Nɩ vaa tɩ waasɩ Ŋmɩŋ, vuodieke dɩ yine tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Yisa Masia Chɔɔŋ wa, dama tɩ benne Yisa Masia ma wɩa ta wʋnɩŋ Ŋmɩŋ dɩ yɩ tɩ ʋ Halɩkasɩka piini diekemba mana dɩ benne arɩzanna ma.

eng: God chose us in Christ to be holy and blameless in Gods presence before the creation of the world.
local: Ŋmɩŋ die wɔŋ woliŋ a vʋarɩ tɩ mɩŋ Yisa Masia ma dɩ tɩ yi ʋ sɩɩtɩ ta wa keŋ naaŋ tɩŋgbaŋka gie, amʋ tɩ nan dɩ bie kasɩ ta wo bɩaŋ ʋ nɩŋŋa.

eng: God destined us to be his adopted children through Jesus Christ because of his love. This was according to his goodwill and plan.
local: Ʋ cho tɩ wɩa, die wɩa ʋ saŋkʋ ma, die ʋ yile dɩ Yisa Masia ma ʋ nan vaa tɩ bɩrɩŋ ʋ ballɩ.

eng: and to honor his glorious grace that he has given to us freely through the Son whom he loves.
local: Nɩ vaa tɩ bɩrɩ Ŋmɩŋ dama ʋ zɔɔlɩnchɩgɩla dɩ faasɩna a dala wɩa, ta ʋ chɩgɩ tɩ zɔɔlɩŋ ʋ Bʋadembike choti wo me.

eng: We have been ransomed through his Sons blood, and we have forgiveness for our failures based on his overflowing grace.
local: Dama Ŋmɩŋ nagɩ wa tɩ wʋbɩatɩ a chaa tɩ ta tɩ bie tɩ dʋŋŋʋ ʋ Bʋadembike choti wo zɩmbʋ wɩa. Ye, Ŋmɩŋ zɔɔlɩnchɩgɩla die dɩ benne tɩ ma dene ta wo magɩsɩŋ.

eng: which he poured over us with wisdom and understanding.
local: Ŋmɩŋ vuodieke dɩ yalla yɩaŋ aŋaŋ sɩbɩŋ pam wa, ta tʋŋ sɩba ʋ yiline dene.

eng: God revealed his hidden design to us, which is according to his goodwill and the plan that he intended to accomplish through his Son.
local: ta yuori dagɩ tɩ wʋlɔbɩrɩkɩŋ wudiekemba die ʋ ziene dɩ ʋ nan keŋ yi Masia ma wa.

eng: This is what God planned for the climax of all times: to bring all things together in Christ, the things in heaven along with the things on earth.
local: Saŋka mi dɩ keŋ tʋgɩ, ʋ nan yi ʋ saŋkʋ a kpatɩ ta lagɩsɩ jadieke ʋ naanna mana ta a bie ŋmɩŋsikpeŋ aŋaŋ tɩŋgbaŋka gie me mana ta vaa Masia yi a sikpeŋtieŋ.

eng: We have also received an inheritance in Christ. We were destined by the plan of God, who accomplishes everything according to his design.
local: Ŋmɩŋ ŋaaŋ yie wo wudieke ʋ sanna mɩŋ, die wɩa ʋ vaa Yisa Masia dɩ vʋarɩ tɩ.

eng: We are called to be an honor to Gods glory because we were the first to hope in Christ.
local: Die wɩa nɩ vaa tɩnɩŋ vuodiekemba dɩ wolinne a yaa tama Masia ma wa bɩrɩma Ŋmɩŋ ta kɔtɩma ʋ saaŋ ŋmɩŋsikpeŋ.

eng: You too heard the word of truth in Christ, which is the good news of your salvation. You were sealed with the promised Holy Spirit because you believed in Christ.
local: Die nɩ gbaŋ dɩ keŋ bɩrɩŋ Ŋmɩŋ vuosi die nɩ wʋnna wʋvɩɩŋ diekemba dɩ yalla gbatɩtaanɩŋ wa. Die nɩ yine Masia yada wa wɩa Ŋmɩŋ die dɩ nagɩ ʋ Halɩkasɩka dieke dɩ yine ʋ chaanɩŋ magɩlɩŋ a yɩ nɩ sɩba ʋ yɩna nʋaŋ dɩ ʋ nan yɩ wa.

eng: The Holy Spirit is the down payment on our inheritance, which is applied toward our redemption as Gods own people, resulting in the honor of Gods glory.
local: Ŋmɩŋ yɩ tɩ wa Halɩkasɩka dɩ ʋ yi siara dɩ tɩ nan keŋ ye jadieke wʋnɩŋ Ŋmɩŋ dɩ yɩna nʋaŋ dɩ ʋ nan yɩ ʋ vuosisi, ta bɩ dagɩ dɩ ʋ nan seŋ yɩ vuosi gbatɩtaanɩŋ aŋaŋ wusie. Nɩ vaa tɩ bɩrɩma wa ta kɔtɩma ʋ saaŋ.

eng: Since I heard about your faith in the Lord Jesus and your love for all Gods people, this is the reason that.
local: Die wɩa, a nyɩŋ daa dieke n wʋnna dɩ nɩ yi tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Yisa Masia yada aŋaŋ nɩ chone Ŋmɩŋ vuosi dene wo a keŋ tʋgɩ jinne wo.

eng: I dont stop giving thanks to God for you when I remember you in my prayers.
local: n ka vaa Ŋmɩŋ waasɩŋ nɩ wɩa. N ŋaaŋ tɩɩnsa nɩ wɩa n Ŋmɩŋ jʋʋsɩŋ ma.

eng: I pray that the God of our Lord Jesus Christ, the Father of glory, will give you a spirit of wisdom and revelation that makes God known to you.
local: ta jʋʋsa tɩ Chɔɔŋ Ŋmɩŋ, vuodieke dɩ yine hagɩrɩtieŋ ta bɩ yi tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Yisa Masia Ŋmɩnnɩ, dɩ ʋ yɩ nɩ yɩaŋ ta yuori ʋ gbaŋ a dagɩ nɩ aŋ nɩ mɩŋŋɩ sɩmma wa.

eng: I pray that the eyes of your heart will have enough light to see what is the hope of Gods call, what is the richness of Gods glorious inheritance among believers.
local: Ta bɩ jʋʋsa wa dɩ ʋ yuori nɩ nine aŋ nɩ sɩmma tama dieke wɩa ʋ wana nɩ, ta bɩ sɩba a baarɩ dɩ nyindiekemba ʋ bala ʋ keŋ a nagɩ yɩ ʋ vuosisi faasɩ vɩɩna.

eng: and what is the overwhelming greatness of Gods power that is working among us believers. This power is conferred by the energy of Gods powerful strength.
local: ta bɩ sɩba ʋ hagɩrɩŋ dɩ dala dene ta nan suŋŋi tɩnɩŋ vuodiekemba dɩ yine wo yada naa. Bʋnɩŋ hagɩrɩkpeŋkpɩɩbʋ mi.

eng: Gods power was at work in Christ when God raised him from the dead and sat him at Gods right side in the heavens.
local: die ʋ nagɩ a sʋgɩrɩ Masia a nyɩŋ kuŋ me ta vaa ʋ kalɩ ʋ nuudiigiŋ chaaŋ arɩzanna ma.

eng: far above every ruler and authority and power and angelic power, any power that might be named not only now but in the future.
local: Masia sɩna ŋmɩŋsikpeŋ naara aŋaŋ yikotieliŋ aŋaŋ hagɩrɩtieliŋ aŋaŋ sikpeŋtieliŋ mana; wʋnɩŋ ʋ yalla saaŋ dieke dɩ tɩanna yiko mana saara diekemba dɩ benne dʋnɩaka gie me aŋaŋ dʋnɩa dieke dɩ bala ka keŋ wo.

eng: God put everything under Christs feet and made him head of everything in the church.
local: Ta Ŋmɩŋ dɩ nagɩ jaaŋ mana a yi ʋ nuusi me ta vʋarɩ wa dɩ ʋ yi Ŋmɩŋ vuovʋarɩka mana Sikpeŋtieŋ.

eng: which is his body. His body, the church, is the fullness of Christ, who fills everything in every way.
local: Masia yine ʋ vuovʋarɩkaha sikpeŋ, ta vuovʋarɩkaha yine ʋ nyɩŋgbanɩŋ, ta ʋ nyɩŋgbaŋka dɩ suuli aŋaŋ ʋ hagɩrɩŋ, ta ʋ dɩaŋ ʋ suuli aŋaŋ Ŋmɩŋ hagɩrɩŋ.

eng: At one time you were like a dead person because of the things you did wrong and your offenses against God.
local: Saŋŋa dieke dɩ tɩanna wa, nɩ nʋazetiŋ aŋaŋ bɩaŋ yiile wɩa, die nɩ sɩɩ sɩba nɩ kpiye mɩŋ.

eng: You used to live like people of this world. You followed the rule of a destructive spiritual power. This is the spirit of disobedience to Gods will that is now at work in persons whose lives are characterized by disobedience.
local: Saŋka mi die nɩ dɩ wa tɩŋgbaŋka gie haalɩbɩatɩ sieŋ ta tuo tɩŋgbaŋka gie naaŋ Sitaani nʋaŋ vuodieke dɩ pɔgɩlɩna vuodiekemba dɩ kana ka tuose Ŋmɩŋ nʋarɩ.

eng: At one time you were like those persons. All of you used to do whatever felt good and whatever you thought you wanted so that you were children headed for punishment just like everyone else.
local: wusie, tɩ mana die sɩɩ sɩba banɩŋ, ta dɩɩ tɩ nyɩŋgbanɩŋ lɔla, ta yie tɩ nyɩŋgbanɩŋ aŋaŋ sʋŋ dɩ yaala dene. Tɩnɩŋ aŋaŋ banɩŋ tʋʋma die yaa wa Ŋmɩŋ sɩnyɩɩrɩŋ a kieŋ tɩ ma.

eng: However, God is rich in mercy. He brought us to life with Christ while we were dead as a result of those things that we did wrong. He did this because of the great love that he has for us. You are saved by Gods grace!.
local: Ama Ŋmɩŋ zɔɔlɩnchɩgɩla aŋaŋ ʋ choti faasɩ dala mɩŋ ta wo magɩsɩŋ.

eng: However, God is rich in mercy. He brought us to life with Christ while we were dead as a result of those things that we did wrong. He did this because of the great love that he has for us. You are saved by Gods grace!.
local: die wɩa, die tɩ zetine Ŋmɩŋ nʋarɩ ta die sɩɩ sɩba tɩ kpiye mɩŋ saŋka mi wo, saŋka mi, Ŋmɩŋ dɩ vʋarɩ tɩ a nyɩŋ kuŋ me, a yaa tɩ juu miivoli me Masia wɩa; Ŋmɩŋ zɔɔlɩnchɩgɩla wɩa tɩ ye gbatɩtaanɩŋ.

eng: And God raised us up and seated us in the heavens with Christ Jesus.
local: Tɩ benne Yisa Masia ma wɩa Ŋmɩŋ dɩ lagɩŋ a sʋgɩrɩ tɩnɩŋ aŋaŋ wʋnɩŋ, ta tɩ lagɩŋ a dii naaŋ aŋaŋ wa arɩzanna ma.

eng: God did this to show future generations the greatness of his grace by the goodness that God has shown us in Christ Jesus.
local: Ʋ yiwo naa dɩ ʋ dagɩ vuoŋ mana saŋŋa mana ʋ zɔɔlɩnchɩgɩla dɩ dala dene, ta yi burichini a yɩ tɩ Yisa Masia wɩa.

eng: You are saved by Gods grace because of your faith. This salvation is Gods gift. Its not something you possessed.
local: Ŋmɩŋ zɔɔlɩnchɩgɩla wɩa nɩ ye gbatɩtaanɩŋ, dama nɩ yine Masia yada wa wɩa. Ŋmɩŋ piini wonde a yɩ nɩ, daa nɩ gbaŋ gbaŋ nɩ yine wudieke.

eng: Its not something you did that you can be proud of.
local: Vuoŋ kaaŋ bɩagɩ nɩgɩ ʋ nyʋʋŋ ka wɩa, a ka yi nɩ gbaŋ gbaŋ nɩ tʋʋma.

eng: Instead, we are Gods accomplishment, created in Christ Jesus to do good things. God planned for these good things to be the way that we live our lives.
local: Yisa Masia ma Ŋmɩŋ dɩ yi tɩ vuodiekemba tɩ yine, ta yɩ tɩ tʋnvɩɩna beriŋ dɩ tɩ tʋma wudieke ʋ wone a saŋ dɩ tɩ tʋmma wa.

eng: So remember that once you were Gentiles by physical descent, who were called uncircumcised by Jews who are physically circumcised.
local: Die wɩa, nɩnɩŋ vuodiekemba dɩ kana ka yi Juu vuosi naa, ta Juu vuosi dɩ wasa nɩ kɔlɩyootieliŋ ta wasa ba gbaŋ vuodiekemba dɩ gobine ba kɔla naa, nɩ tɩɩnsɩ die nɩ yine vuodiekemba saŋŋa dieke dɩ tɩanna. Die kɔlagobiŋ die yiwo wudieke vuota dɩ yinene ba nyɩŋgbanɩŋ ma.

eng: At that time you were without Christ. You were aliens rather than citizens of Israel, and strangers to the covenants of Gods promise. In this world you had no hope and no God.
local: Saŋka mi die nɩ ka sɩba Masia. Die nɩ yiwo chaanɩŋ ta ka gʋtɩ Ŋmɩŋ vuovʋarɩkaha ma. Die nɩ bie wo tɩŋgbaŋka gie ta ka sɩba Ŋmɩŋ, ta bɩ wo tama, dama ʋ yɩna ʋ vuosi nʋa dieke wo die nɩ ka gʋtɩya.

eng: But now, thanks to Christ Jesus, you who once were so far away have been brought near by the blood of Christ.
local: Ama lele, nɩ bie wo Masia ma, die wɩa nɩnɩŋ vuodiekemba die dɩ benne saasaa wa wa keŋ a gbigi wo Ŋmɩŋ, Masia kumbu wɩa.

eng: Christ is our peace. He made both Jews and Gentiles into one group. With his body, he broke down the barrier of hatred that divided us.
local: Wʋnɩŋ ʋ lagɩsɩna Juu vuosisi aŋaŋ vuodiekemba dɩ kana ka yi Juu vuosisi ta yi be bʋnyɩ, ta sʋgɩfɩalɩŋ dɩ keŋ, ʋ kpine wo wɩa ʋ kpisi dataasɩsɩ die dɩ benne ba sʋnsʋkʋ.

eng: He canceled the detailed rules of the Law so that he could create one new person out of the two groups, making peace.
local: Juu vuosi mɩraha die yaa wa chʋara pam ama Masia die dɩ kpisihe aŋaŋ ʋ kumbu amʋ ʋ nan lagɩsɩ Juu vuosisi aŋaŋ vuodiekemba dɩ kana ka yi Juu vuosisi a keŋ ʋ jigiŋ aŋ buuriŋ bule wa gie lagɩŋ a yi buurihaalɩ balɩmɩŋ dɩ ʋ yi aŋ sʋgɩfɩalɩŋ keŋ buuriŋ bule wa gie jigiŋ.

eng: He reconciled them both as one body to God by the cross, which ended the hostility to God.
local: Ʋ dagarɩkɩrɩ kumbu yine ʋ kpisi dataasɩsɩ ba sʋnsʋŋ, ta lagɩsɩ ba mana ba yi buuribalɩmɩŋ ta yaa ba a yiŋŋi keŋ Ŋmɩŋ jigiŋ.

eng: When he came, he announced the good news of peace to you who were far away from God and to those who were near.
local: Die wɩa, Masia die keŋye mɩŋ a mʋʋlɩ sʋgɩfɩalɩŋ wʋvɩɩna a yɩ nɩnɩŋ vuodiekemba dɩ kana ka yi Juu vuosisi, ta die yʋa aŋaŋ Ŋmɩŋ, ta bɩ mʋʋlɩ a yɩ Juu vuosisi, vuodiekemba die dɩ gbigine Ŋmɩnnɩ.

eng: We both have access to the Father through Christ by the one Spirit.
local: Dɩ yiwo Masia wɩa Juu vuosisi aŋaŋ vuodiekemba dɩ kana ka yi Juu vuosisi mana bɩagɩ keŋ tɩ Chɔɔŋ Ŋmɩŋ jigiŋ, ʋ Halɩkasɩ balɩŋka ma.

eng: So now you are no longer strangers and aliens. Rather, you are fellow citizens with Gods people, and you belong to Gods household.
local: Die wɩa, lele, nɩnɩŋ vuodiekemba dɩ kana ka yi Juu vuosisi aŋaŋ Ŋmɩŋ vuosisi yiwo tɩŋgbaŋ balɩmɩŋ ballɩ, ta bɩ yi Ŋmɩŋ tigiŋ vuosi, nɩ ka bɩ yi chaanɩŋ.

eng: As Gods household, you are built on the foundation of the apostles and prophets with Christ Jesus himself as the cornerstone.
local: Nɩ sɩɩ sɩba juoŋ waara ta Ŋmɩŋ naazʋalɩŋ aŋaŋ Ŋmɩŋ tʋntʋntɩba dɩ yi ka nyabɩlɩŋ, ta Masia dɩ yi ka gɔŋgɔŋyʋgɩrɩŋ taŋkpeŋkpɩɩŋ dieke dɩ vana ka zie keŋ keŋ.

eng: The whole building is joined together in him, and it grows up into a temple that is dedicated to the Lord.
local: Wʋnɩŋ Yisa Masia lagɩsɩna a pɔgɩlɩ Ŋmɩŋ vuosisi ta ba beri vɩɩnɩŋ ta bɩrɩma ʋ jigiŋ.

eng: Christ is building you into a place where God lives through the Spirit.
local: Nɩ lagɩsɩna aŋaŋ Masia wɩa, Masia taasa nɩ mɩŋ aŋaŋ ʋ dɩdɩɩsɩrɩŋ banɩŋ ba, ta nɩ mana dɩ lagɩŋ a yi juoku gie ta Ŋmɩŋ Halɩkasɩka dɩ bie ka ma.

eng: This is why I, Paul, am a prisoner of Christ for you Gentiles.
local: Naa wɩa manɩŋ Pɔɔli vuodieke dɩ june dansarɩka Yisa Masia tʋʋma wɩa dɩ ko jʋʋsa Ŋmɩŋ a yɩa nɩnɩŋ vuodiekemba dɩ kana ka yi Juu vuosisi.

eng: Youve heard, of course, about the responsibility to distribute Gods grace, which God gave to me for you, right?.
local: N yaa tama dɩ nɩ wʋŋya mɩŋ dɩ Ŋmɩŋ zɔɔlɩnchɩgɩla wɩa ʋ yɩ mɩŋ tʋʋmaha gie nɩ suŋŋiŋ wɩa.
