eng: God showed me his secret plan in a revelation, as I mentioned briefly before .
local: Ŋmɩŋ yuori wo ʋ wʋlɔbɩrɩkaha a dagɩ mɩŋ mɩŋ. N wɔŋ maagɩ nɩ wɩaha gie bɩta mɩŋ.

eng: when you read this, youll understand my insight into the secret plan about Christ.
local: Dɩɩ yi nɩ karɩŋ wudieke n maagɩna wa, nɩ nan dɩ sɩba dɩ n sɩba jaaŋ yaa gamma Masia ma.

eng: Earlier generations didnt know this hidden plan that God has now revealed to his holy apostles and prophets through the Spirit.
local: Saŋŋa dieke dɩ tɩanna wa vuota die ka sɩba wʋlɔbɩkɩrɩ gie, ama lele Ŋmɩŋ vaa wa ʋ Halɩkasɩka dɩ yuorike a dagɩ ʋ tʋntʋntɩba aŋaŋ ʋ naazʋalɩba ʋ vʋarɩna wa.

eng: This plan is that the Gentiles would be coheirs and parts of the same body, and that they would share with the Jews in the promises of God in Christ Jesus through the gospel.
local: Ʋ wʋlɔbɩrɩkɩŋ yiwo naa: Wʋvɩɩnaha wɩa vuodiekemba dɩ kana ka yi Juu vuosisi dɩ nan ye jadieke Ŋmɩŋ dɩ bala ʋ yɩ Juu vuosisi, ba bɩ lagɩŋ aŋaŋ ba a yi nyɩŋgbaŋ balɩmɩŋ, ta gʋtɩ a die jadieke Ŋmɩŋ dɩ yɩna nʋaŋ Yisa Masia ma dɩ ʋ nan yɩ wa.

eng: I became a servant of the gospel because of the grace that God showed me through the exercise of his power.
local: Ŋmɩŋ zɔɔlɩnchɩgɩla wɩa die ʋ yɩ mɩŋ sieŋ dɩ n bɩrɩŋ ʋ tʋntʋntʋ ta mʋʋlɩma ʋ wʋvɩɩnaha sɩba ʋ yɩna mɩŋ hagɩrɩŋ dene.

eng: God gave his grace to me, the least of all Gods people, to preach the good news about the immeasurable riches of Christ to the Gentiles.
local: Ŋmɩŋ vuosi mana sʋŋ n yine vuodieke dɩ wɩarɩna ba kʋaŋ ta ka mʋ wɩɩŋ ama Ŋmɩŋ chɩgɩ mɩŋ wa zɔɔlɩŋ ta vʋarɩ mɩŋ dɩ n balɩ a yɩ vuodiekemba dɩ kana ka yi Juu vuosisi yaa gamma wʋvɩɩna diekemba Masia dɩ yɩnana ta a wo magɩsɩŋ wa.

eng: God sent me to reveal the secret plan that had been hidden since the beginning of time by God, who created everything.
local: Ŋmɩŋ, vuodieke dɩ naanna nyinti mana die vʋarɩ wa mɩŋ dɩ n suŋŋi vuoŋ mana aŋ ba sɩmma ʋ saŋkʋ gie. Saŋŋa dieke dɩ tɩanna Ŋmɩŋ die lɔbɩrɩ ʋ saŋkʋ gie mɩŋ ʋ vuosi jigiŋ.

eng: Gods purpose is now to show the rulers and powers in the heavens the many different varieties of his wisdom through the church.
local: Ʋ yiwo naa dɩ lele ʋ dagɩ haalɩtɩ aŋaŋ ba naara dɩ yalla yiko ŋmɩŋsikpeŋ me ʋ yalla yɩaŋ ʋ wuyiike mana mana ma dene. Ʋ daagɩ wa ʋ dɩdɩɩsɩrɩba ma a dagɩ ba ʋ yalla yɩaŋ dene.

eng: This was consistent with the plan he had from the beginning of time that he accomplished through Christ Jesus our Lord.
local: Tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Yisa Masia ma ta Ŋmɩŋ die yi naa sɩba ʋ sanna dene wo ta keŋ naaŋ dʋnɩa.

eng: In Christ we have bold and confident access to God through faith in him.
local: Tɩ yine Masia yada ta bie ʋ ma wɩa, Ŋmɩŋ sieku yuori yi tɩ mɩŋ, ta tɩ nan bɩagɩ ga ʋ jigiŋ ta ka chɩga ŋmaamɩŋ.

eng: So then, I ask you not to become discouraged by what Im suffering for you, which is your glory.
local: Die wɩa, n jʋʋsa nɩ mɩŋ, nɩ daa vaa nɩ sʋŋ chʋʋsɩ n dinene wahala nɩ wɩa, dama dɩ yiwo nɩ suŋŋiŋ wɩa.

eng: This is why I kneel before the Father.
local: Naa wɩa maŋ gbirige tɩ Chɔɔŋ Ŋmɩŋ nɩŋŋa a jʋʋsa wa.

eng: Every ethnic group in heaven or on earth is recognized by him.
local: ʋ ma buuriŋ mana dɩ benne arɩzanna ma aŋaŋ tɩŋgbaŋka gie me dɩ yese ba miivoli.

eng: I ask that he will strengthen you in your inner selves from the riches of his glory through the Spirit.
local: Ŋmɩŋ hagɩrɩŋ dɩ dala pam dene wo, n jʋʋsa wa mɩŋ dɩ ʋ yɩ nɩ hagɩrɩbʋ mi ʋ Halɩkasɩka wɩa, aŋ hagɩrɩbʋ bemme nɩ ma.

eng: I ask that Christ will live in your hearts through faith. As a result of having strong roots in love.
local: a bɩ jʋʋsa wa dɩ Masia nagɩ nɩ sʋgɩtɩ a bɩrɩŋ ʋ jigiberisikiŋ, nɩ yada wɩa, n jʋʋsa wa mɩŋ dɩ nɩ chone Ŋmɩŋ aŋaŋ taŋ dene wo nan vaa aŋ nɩ mɩŋŋɩ zie keŋ keŋ ta ka nanna.

eng: I ask that youll have the power to grasp loves width and length, height and depth, together with all believers.
local: ta nɩnɩŋ aŋaŋ Ŋmɩŋ vuosi mana nan bɩagɩ sɩba Masia choti teeliŋ aŋaŋ ka wagɩrɩŋ aŋaŋ ka goli dɩ dala dene.

eng: I ask that youll know the love of Christ that is beyond knowledge so that you will be filled entirely with the fullness of God.
local: Aŋaŋ dɩ tʋana dɩ vuoŋ sɩmma Masia dɩ chone tɩ dene wo, n jʋʋsa Ŋmɩŋ dɩ nɩnɩŋ nɩ nan dɩ sɩba, ta vaa nɩ beriŋ sɩɩ sɩba Ŋmɩŋ beriŋ.

eng: Glory to God, who is able to do far beyond all that we could ask or imagine by his power at work within us.
local: Ŋmɩŋ hagɩrɩ dieke dɩ tʋnnana tɩ ma wa wɩa, ʋ nan bɩagɩ a yi jaaŋ mana a yɩ tɩ a tɩaŋ tɩ yilinene wudieke ta jʋʋsa wa;.

eng: glory to him in the church and in Christ Jesus for all generations, forever and always. Amen.
local: tɩnɩŋ vuodiekemba dɩ yine Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrɩŋ ta taasɩ aŋaŋ wa wa mʋ tɩ bɩrɩma Ŋmɩŋ saŋŋa mana haahuu. Wusie.

eng: Therefore, as a prisoner for the Lord, I encourage you to live as people worthy of the call you received from God.
local: Manɩŋ vuodieke dɩ june dansarɩka tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ tʋʋma wɩa naa, n kpaama nɩ dɩ nɩ vaa nɩ beriŋ vɩɩŋma sɩba Ŋmɩŋ dɩ yaala ka sɩmma dene ta wa nɩ wa.

eng: Conduct yourselves with all humility, gentleness, and patience. Accept each other with love.
local: Nɩ sʋʋma nɩ gbaŋ tɩŋgbaŋ, ta bemme sɔmm, ta yallɩma suguru aŋaŋ taŋ, ta chome taŋ saŋŋa mana.

eng: and make an effort to preserve the unity of the Spirit with the peace that ties you together.
local: Ŋmɩŋ Halɩkasɩka yi nɩ wo jabalɩmɩŋ, die wɩa nɩ kpaŋŋɩ nɩ gbaŋ aŋaŋ nɩŋŋmɩna a bemme aŋaŋ sʋgɩfɩalɩŋ amʋ nɩ nan wɩarɩ yi jabalɩmɩŋ.

eng: You are one body and one spirit, just as God also called you in one hope.
local: Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrɩŋ yiwo nyɩŋgbaŋ balɩmɩŋ, ta Ŋmɩŋ Halɩkasɩ balɩmɩŋ benne, ta Ŋmɩŋ dɩ gbatɩ tɩ a taaŋ a yɩ tɩ tama balɩmɩŋ.

eng: There is one Lord, one faith, one baptism.
local: Yɔmʋtieŋ balɩmɩŋ nyɩɩna ma benne, ta tɩ mana dɩ lagɩŋ yiwo yada, ta Ŋmɩŋ nyaaŋ sɩɩla dɩaŋ dɩ yi jabalɩmɩŋ.

eng: and one God and Father of all, who is over all, through all, and in all.
local: Ŋmɩŋ yiwo jabalɩmɩŋ ta yi vuota mana Chɔɔŋ, ta bɩ yi vuoŋ mana Yɔmʋtieŋ ta tʋma vuoŋ mana ma, ta bɩ bie vuoŋ mana ma.

eng: God has given his grace to each one of us measured out by the gift that is given by Christ.
local: Masia yɩ wa tɩ wʋnyɩ mana piini yiri yiri sɩba ʋ yaalala dene.

eng: Thats why scripture says, When he climbed up to the heights, he captured prisoners, and he gave gifts to people .
local: Sɩba dɩ maagɩna dene Ŋmɩŋ gbaŋkʋ ma wa dɩ: Saŋŋa dieke ʋ jʋalɩna ŋmɩŋsikpeku die ʋ nagɩ yɔŋɩsɩ pam ʋ nyaŋŋɩna a gʋtɩ ʋ ma ta yɩ vuota piinisi.

eng: What does the phrase he climbed up mean if it doesnt mean that he had first gone down into the lower regions, the earth?.
local: Lele, Die ʋ jʋalɩ ga ŋmɩŋsikpeŋ chɩaŋ? Dɩ dagɩya dɩ die ʋ woliŋ a keŋ sʋʋŋ wa tɩŋgbaŋka gie kpiile tigiŋ mɩŋ.

eng: The one who went down is the same one who climbed up above all the heavens so that he might fill everything.
local: Die wɩa, wʋnɩŋ vuodieke die dɩ kenne sʋʋŋ tɩŋgbaŋka gie me wo, wʋnɩŋ ʋ bɩna jʋalɩ ga saasaa amʋ ʋ nan ligi dʋnɩaka gie mana aŋaŋ ʋ yiko.

eng: He gave some apostles, some prophets, some evangelists, and some pastors and teachers.
local: Wʋnɩŋ, ʋ yɩna vuota piinisi, ta vʋarɩ bataŋ a yi be tʋntʋntɩŋ, a yi bataŋ dɩaŋ Ŋmɩŋ naazʋalɩŋ, ta bataŋ dɩaŋ dɩ yi wʋvɩɩnaha mʋmʋlɩtɩŋ, ta yi bataŋ wʋnɩŋ Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrɩba dɩdaansɩrɩŋ aŋaŋ Ŋmɩŋ wusieke dɩdagɩrɩŋ.

eng: His purpose was to equip Gods people for the work of serving and building up the body of Christ.
local: Die ʋ yiwo naa dɩ vuodiekemba dɩ yine Ŋmɩŋ vuosisi mana mʋma aŋaŋ tʋnvɩɩnaha, ta vaa wʋnɩŋ Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrɩŋ sʋgɩtɩ hagɩrɩma.

eng: until we all reach the unity of faith and knowledge of Gods Son. Gods goal is for us to become mature adults—to be fully grown, measured by the standard of the fullness of Christ.
local: Die wɩa, tɩ dene sɩba Ŋmɩŋ Bʋa dembike ta yiwo yada naa, tɩ mʋ tɩ lagɩŋ bʋnyɩ a bɩrɩŋ nyɩŋkʋrɩ diekemba beriŋ dɩ vɩɩŋna, ta sɩmma sɩba wʋnɩŋ Masia.

eng: As a result, we arent supposed to be infants any longer who can be tossed and blown around by every wind that comes from teaching with deceitful scheming and the tricks people play to deliberately mislead others.
local: Tɩ kaaŋ bɩ yi sɩba ballɩbɩsɩ amʋ vuobɩatɩ aŋaŋ gɩgaantɩba nan vaa tɩ leeŋi sɩba ba yinene vuosi bataŋ dene wo.

eng: Instead, by speaking the truth with love, lets grow in every way into Christ.
local: Ama tɩ nan dɩ bala wusie yaa gamma Ŋmɩŋ wɩaha aŋaŋ choti ta bɩrɩma Masia ma, wʋnɩŋ ʋ yine tɩ sikpeŋtieŋ.

eng: who is the head. The whole body grows from him, as it is joined and held together by all the supporting ligaments. The body makes itself grow in that it builds itself up with love as each one does its part.
local: ta tɩnɩŋ vuodiekemba dɩ yine wo yada wa dɩaŋ dɩ yi sɩba ʋ nyɩŋgbanɩŋ. Nyɩŋgbaŋka taasɩ wa taŋ aŋaŋ gbeme aŋaŋ zɩŋ aŋaŋ gɩlɩsɩ, dɩɩ yi ka lʋga mana dɩ mɩŋŋɩ tʋma nyɩŋgbaŋka nan dɩ bɩrɩma ta hagɩrɩ. Die gbaŋ gbaŋ dɩ sɩɩ, dɩɩ yi tɩ mana dɩ cho taŋ ta tʋma tʋŋ dieke Yisa Masia dɩ nagɩna a yɩ tɩ wa, tɩ nan dɩ hagɩrɩ a bɩrɩŋ nyɩŋkʋra. Naa baa ka yi mɩŋ Masia hagɩrɩŋ dɩ benne tɩ ma wa wɩa.

eng: So Im telling you this, and I insist on it in the Lord: you shouldnt live your life like the Gentiles anymore. They base their lives on pointless thinking.
local: Tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ saaŋ ma, maŋ kpaama nɩ, dɩ nɩ daa bɩ bemme sɩba vuodiekemba dɩ kana ka sɩba Ŋmɩŋ, ta ba sʋŋanyile dɩ bie lɩmɩŋ ma ta wo nyʋarɩ wa.

eng: and they are in the dark in their reasoning. They are disconnected from Gods life because of their ignorance and their closed hearts.
local: Ba yallɩ wa sʋŋanyilibɩatɩ ta ba tɩba dɩ hagɩrɩ, ta ba ka sɩba wɩa chɩasɩ, die wɩa ba ka gʋtɩ miivoli haalɩ dieke Ŋmɩŋ dɩ yɩna wa ma.

eng: They are people who lack all sense of right and wrong, and who have turned themselves over to doing whatever feels good and to practicing every sort of corruption along with greed.
local: Ba ka chɩga viivi, ta dɩdɩa a tʋma dɩgɩntɩ tʋʋma, ta ka bɩagɩ yige ba gbaŋ halɩ bɩta gbaŋ.

eng: But you didnt learn that sort of thing from Christ.
local: Ama nɩnɩŋ nɩŋ, daa die nɩ bʋgɩrɩ yaa gamma Masia ma.

eng: Since you really listened to him and you were taught how the truth is in Jesus.
local: Die nɩ wʋŋ yaa gamma ʋ ma, ta yi ʋ dɩdɩɩsɩrɩŋ, ta ba dagɩ nɩ wusie yaa gamma ʋ ma mɩŋ.

eng: change the former way of life that was part of the person you once were, corrupted by deceitful desires.
local: Die wɩa, nɩ kpaŋŋɩ nɩ gbaŋ a vaa berikʋʋrɩ lɔlɩbɩatɩ diekemba dɩ tʋnnana a chʋʋsa nɩ wa.

eng: Instead, renew the thinking in your mind by the Spirit.
local: Lele, nɩ vaa aŋ Ŋmɩŋ tarɩgɩ nɩ sʋŋanyile aŋaŋ nɩ sʋgɩtɩ.

eng: and clothe yourself with the new person created according to Gods image in justice and true holiness.
local: amʋ nɩ nan pɔgɩlɩ berihaalɩ dieke Ŋmɩŋ dɩ yɩna nɩ wa, ta nɩ nɩasɩ Ŋmɩŋ nɩ wuyiike me, ta bemme vɩɩnɩŋ, ta yi sʋgɩyɩalɩntieliŋ aŋaŋ wusie.

eng: Therefore, after you have gotten rid of lying, Each of you must tell the truth to your neighbor because we are parts of each other in the same body.
local: Die wɩa, nɩ vaa ŋmɩnchɩbɩsɩ, ta vuoŋ mana balɩma wusie a yɩma ʋ nɩmbʋa, dama tɩ yiwo jabalɩmɩŋ Masia ma.

eng: Be angry without sinning. Dont let the sun set on your anger.
local: Dɩɩ yi fʋ keŋ jɩɩ sɩnyɩɩrɩŋ, ama da vaa ka vaa fʋ yi bɩaŋ, ta daa bɩ yallɩma fʋ sɩnyɩɩrɩbʋ fʋ sʋŋ ma aŋ ŋmɩŋ nan.

eng: Dont provide an opportunity for the devil.
local: Nɩ da keŋ yɩ Sitaani sieŋ aŋ ʋ magɩsɩ nɩ.

eng: Thieves should no longer steal. Instead, they should go to work, using their hands to do good so that they will have something to share with whoever is in need.
local: Vuodieke die dɩ gaarɩnana, ʋ vaa gaarɩŋ ta kpaŋŋɩ ʋ gbaŋ a tʋŋ tʋʋma a dii, ta bɩ bɩagɩ suŋŋime zɔɔlɩntieliŋ.

eng: Dont let any foul words come out of your mouth. Only say what is helpful when it is needed for building up the community so that it benefits those who hear what you say.
local: Nɩ da balɩma wʋbɩatɩ a yɩma nɩ chanchaalɩŋ, ama nɩ balɩma wudiekemba dɩ yine talasɩ ta yaa nyʋarɩ, amʋ nɩ chanchaalɩŋ dɩ keŋ wʋŋ ka nan bɩagɩ suŋŋi be.

eng: Dont make the Holy Spirit of God unhappy—you were sealed by him for the day of redemption.
local: Nɩ da yime wudieke dɩ baaŋ nan yi aŋ Halɩkasɩka, vuodieke dɩ yine Ŋmɩŋ chaanɩŋ magɩlɩŋ nɩ ma wa ye sʋgɩchʋʋsɩŋ. Wʋnɩŋ ʋ yine magɩlɩŋ dieke dɩ dagɩna dɩ daaŋ kieŋ ta Ŋmɩŋ nan keŋ yɩ nɩ sɩ-n-gbaŋ aŋaŋ wusie.

eng: Put aside all bitterness, losing your temper, anger, shouting, and slander, along with every other evil.
local: Nɩ vaa bɩaŋ beriŋ mana, ta da yallɩma sɩnyɩɩrɩŋ. Vuoŋ da bɩ natɩma ʋ chanchaalɩŋ aŋaŋ sɩnyɩɩrɩŋ, vuoŋ da bɩ zɩama ʋ chanchaalɩŋ, ta bɩ vʋarɩ haasɩ sʋŋanyile mana nɩ ma.

eng: Be kind, compassionate, and forgiving to each other, in the same way God forgave you in Christ.
local: Ama nɩ yi vuodiekemba dɩ chɩgɩnana nɩ chanchaalɩŋ zɔɔlɩŋ, ta vasɩma nɩ chanchaalɩŋ tʋmbɩatɩ a chama ba sɩba Ŋmɩŋ dɩ nagɩna nɩ tʋmbɩatɩ a chaa nɩ dene wo Masia ma wɩa wa.

eng: Therefore, imitate God like dearly loved children.
local: Nɩ yine Ŋmɩŋ ballɩchoti wɩa wa, nɩ kpaŋŋɩ nɩ gbaŋ ta sɩmma sɩba wʋnɩŋ.

eng: Live your life with love, following the example of Christ, who loved us and gave himself for us. He was a sacrificial offering that smelled sweet to God.
local: nɩ chome vuoŋ mana sɩba Masia die dɩ faasɩna a cho tɩ ta tuo tɩ kuŋ a kpi ta yi kaabɩ dieke Ŋmɩŋ dɩ yaalala wa.

eng: Sexual immorality, and any kind of impurity or greed, shouldnt even be mentioned among you, which is right for holy persons.
local: Nɩ yine Ŋmɩŋ ballɩ wɩa naa, dɩ ka wɔŋ vɩɩna dɩ daakpana aŋaŋ hɔgʋkpana, yaa dɩgɩntɩ yaa lɔlɩbɩatɩ tʋʋma bemme nɩ sʋŋ.

eng: Obscene language, silly talk, or vulgar jokes arent acceptable for believers. Instead, there should be thanksgiving.
local: Nɩ waasɩma Ŋmɩŋ saŋŋa mana ama nɩ daa vaa daakpana yaa hɔgʋkpana tʋʋma wʋbalɩka, yaa dɩgɩntɩ wʋbalɩka, yaa wʋbalɩkɩ tɔgɩtɩ nyɩmma nɩ nʋa ma.

eng: Because you know for sure that persons who are sexually immoral, impure, or greedy—which happens when things become gods—those persons wont inherit the kingdom of Christ and God.
local: Dɩ mʋ nɩ sɩmma a baarɩ dɩ vuodieke dɩ dʋaga hɔgʋkpana yaa a dʋaga dembikpana yaa ta yi dɩgɩntɩ vuoŋ yaa halɩ vuoŋ, wʋnɩŋ ʋ kaaŋ ye jigiŋ Masia aŋaŋ Ŋmɩŋ naarɩ ma; vuodiekemba dɩ yalla halɩ faasɩ cho nyinti a tɩaŋ Ŋmɩŋ.

eng: Nobody should deceive you with stupid ideas. Gods anger comes down on those who are disobedient because of this kind of thing.
local: Die wʋbɩatɩ yiilehe wɩa Ŋmɩŋ nan keŋ datɩ nʋazetitielibe tɩba. Nɩ daa vaa vuoŋ nagɩ ʋ gaantɩ dagɩŋ a gaaŋ nɩ.

eng: So you shouldnt have anything to do with them.
local: Nɩ vʋarɩ nɩ gbaŋ, ta vaa vuosi mi.

eng: You were once darkness, but now you are light in the Lord, so live your life as children of light.
local: Nɩ wa yiwo Ŋmɩŋ ballɩ ta bie chaanɩŋ ma, nɩ ka bɩ bie lɩmɩŋ ma sɩba die nɩ benne wo ta yie bɩabʋ, dɩ mʋ nɩ beriŋ sɩmma sɩba chaanɩŋ ballɩ beriŋ.

eng: Light produces fruit that consists of every sort of goodness, justice, and truth.
local: dama wudieke dɩ yine wusie aŋaŋ Ŋmɩŋ chɩgɩla aŋaŋ tʋnvɩɩna mana yiwo chaanɩŋ ma sɩɩtɩ.

eng: Therefore, test everything to see whats pleasing to the Lord.
local: Die wɩa, nɩ kpaŋŋɩ nɩ gbaŋ ta tʋma wudieke dɩ bala ka fɩalɩ tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ sʋŋ.

eng: and dont participate in the unfruitful actions of darkness. Instead, you should reveal the truth about them.
local: Nɩ daa chansɩma vuodiekemba dɩ tʋnnana lɩmɩŋ ma tʋʋma ta a wo nyʋarɩ wa, ama ta vaa ba lɩmɩŋ ma tʋʋmaha nyɩŋ yaalɩŋ ma.

eng: Its embarrassing to even talk about what certain persons do in secret.
local: Wudieke ba yinene lɩmɩŋ ma wa yaa wa viivi pam aŋaŋ tɩ baaŋ dɩ bala yaa gamma ka ma gbaŋ.

eng: But everything exposed to the light is revealed by the light.
local: Ama saŋŋa dieke jaaŋ mana dɩ bala a keŋ nyɩŋ yeŋ me wo, ba lɩmɩŋ ma beriŋ mana nan keŋ nyɩŋ yaalɩŋ ma firrr.

eng: Everything that is revealed by the light is light. Therefore, it says, Wake up, sleeper! Get up from the dead, and Christ will shine on you. .
local: Dama wudieke mana ba keŋ yuori dagɩ yaalɩŋ ma ŋaaŋ bie wo chaanɩŋ ma mɩŋ. Die wɩa die dɩ maagɩ Ŋmɩŋ gbaŋkʋ ma dɩ: Fʋnɩŋ vuodieke dɩ gʋʋrɩnana, fʋ hagɩ gbɩɩŋ ma ta hagɩ kuŋ me, ta Masia nan yɩ fʋ ʋ chaanɩŋ.

eng: So be careful to live your life wisely, not foolishly.
local: Die wɩa, nɩ daa bemme gaantɩŋ beriŋ, ama nɩ yi sɩsɩbɩrɩŋ.

eng: Take advantage of every opportunity because these are evil times.
local: Nɩ nagɩ nɩ saŋŋa a yime vɩɩnɩŋ dama vuosi yie bɩaŋ saŋŋa gie me mɩŋ.

eng: Because of this, dont be ignorant, but understand the Lords will.
local: Die wɩa nɩ daa yi gaantɩŋ ama nɩ sɩmma wudieke tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ dɩ yaalala nɩ yi.

eng: Dont get drunk on wine, which produces depravity. Instead, be filled with the Spirit in the following ways.
local: Nɩ daa nyume daaŋ a bugime; dama kanɩŋ ka bala ka chʋʋsɩ nɩ, ama nɩ kpaŋŋɩ nɩ gbaŋ ta vaa Ŋmɩŋ Halɩkasɩka yalla nɩ a tʋma.

eng: speak to each other with psalms, hymns, and spiritual songs; sing and make music to the Lord in your hearts.
local: Nɩ chama yɩla a bɩrɩma tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ aŋaŋ nɩ sʋgɩtɩ mana aŋaŋ nɩ chanchaalɩŋ, ta chama Ŋmɩŋ gbaŋkʋ yɩla aŋaŋ Halɩkasɩka yɩla.

eng: always give thanks to God the Father for everything in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Vuoŋ mana waasɩma tɩ Chɔɔŋ Ŋmɩŋ jaaŋ mana wɩa, tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Yisa Masia wɩa.

eng: and submit to each other out of respect for Christ.
local: Nɩ yɩnana Masia jɩlɩma wɩa, nɩ sʋʋŋ nɩ gbaŋ a yɩma taŋ.

eng: For example, wives should submit to their husbands as if to the Lord.
local: Hɔgʋba, nɩ sʋʋŋ nɩ gbaŋ tɩŋgbaŋ a yɩma nɩ chʋllɩba sɩba nɩ sʋʋna nɩ gbaŋ a yɩ tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ dene wo.

eng: A husband is the head of his wife like Christ is head of the church, that is, the savior of the body.
local: Dama Masia dɩ yine ʋ vuosi sikpeŋtieŋ dene wo, die gbaŋ gbaŋ dembiŋ dɩ yi ʋ hɔgʋ sikpeŋtieŋ. Masia vuosi yiwo ʋ nyɩŋgbanɩŋ ta ʋ yi ba Gbɩgbatɩtaantʋ.

eng: So wives submit to their husbands in everything like the church submits to Christ.
local: Die wɩa, hɔgʋba mʋ ba sʋʋŋ wa ba gbaŋ tɩŋgbaŋ jaaŋ mana ma a yɩ ba chʋllɩba sɩba Masia vuosisi dɩ sʋʋna ba gbaŋ a yɩ wa dene.

eng: As for husbands, love your wives just like Christ loved the church and gave himself for her.
local: Dembisi, nɩ chome nɩ hɔgʋba sɩba die Masia dɩ chone ʋ vuosi ta tuo ba kuŋ a kpi dene wo.

eng: He did this to make her holy by washing her in a bath of water with the word.
local: Die ʋ yiwo naa, amʋ ʋ nan yi ba kasɩ, ta bɩ nagɩ Ŋmɩŋ wʋbalɩkaha aŋaŋ Ŋmɩŋ nyaaŋ a sɩɩ ba dɩ ʋ wʋnsɩ ba vɩɩnɩŋ.

eng: He did this to present himself with a splendid church, one without any sort of stain or wrinkle on her clothes, but rather one that is holy and blameless.
local: ta yiŋŋi nagɩ ba a yɩ ʋ gbaŋ gbaŋ nuusi me aŋaŋ vɩɩnɩŋ, ta ba vɩɩŋkʋ dɩ wo dɩgɩntɩ, ta ba bɩ yi sʋgɩyɩalɩntieliŋ, ta wo bɩaŋ, halɩ bɩta gbaŋ.

eng: Thats how husbands ought to love their wives—in the same way as they do their own bodies. Anyone who loves his wife loves himself.
local: Dembisi mʋ ba chome ba hɔgʋba sɩba ba chone ba gbaŋ gbaŋ ba nyɩŋgbanɩŋ dene, dembiŋ dieke dɩ chone ʋ hɔgʋ, cho wo ʋ gbaŋ gbaŋ mɩŋ.

eng: No one ever hates his own body, but feeds it and takes care of it just like Christ does for the church.
local: Vuoŋ wori a haa ʋ gbaŋ gbaŋ ʋ nyɩŋgbanɩŋ, ama vuoŋ mana mɩŋŋɩ daansa ʋ nyɩŋgbanɩŋ mɩŋ sɩba Masia dɩ daansɩnana ʋ dɩdɩɩsɩrɩba dene wo.

eng: because we are parts of his body.
local: Tɩnɩŋ tɩ yine ʋ nyɩŋgbaŋka.

eng: This is why a man will leave his father and mother and be united with his wife, and the two of them will be one body .
local: Ŋmɩŋ gbaŋkʋ baarɩ dɩ, Naa wɩa, dembiŋ nan vaa ʋ chɔɔŋ aŋaŋ ʋ nuŋ, ama ta nagɩ ʋ gbaŋ a lagɩŋ aŋaŋ ʋ hɔgʋ aŋ ba yi jabalɩmɩŋ.

eng: Marriage is a significant allegory, and Im applying it to Christ and the church.
local: Ŋmɩŋ wɩɩrɩ gie dagɩ tɩ wa wusie dieke dɩ lɔbɩrɩna mɩŋ, ama n sɩba dɩ ka daga tɩ mɩŋ yaa gamma Masia aŋaŋ ʋ dɩdɩɩsɩrɩŋ wɩa mɩŋ.

eng: In any case, as for you individually, each one of you should love his wife as himself, and wives should respect their husbands.
local: Ama ka bɩ daga nɩ mɩŋ dɩ dɩ vɩɩna dɩ dembiŋ mana chome ʋ hɔgʋ sɩba ʋ chone ʋ gbaŋ dene wo, ta hɔgʋ mana dɩaŋ yɩma ʋ chʋrʋ jɩlɩma.

eng: As for children, obey your parents in the Lord, because it is right.
local: Ballɩ, nɩ mʋ nɩ saagɩma yɩma nɩ tieliŋ tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ wɩa, dama die mʋna dɩ nɩ yi.

eng: The commandment Honor your father and mother is the first one with a promise attached.
local: Mɩraha sʋŋ, mɩrɩka gie yiwo mɩrɩ dieke Ŋmɩŋ dɩ woliŋ a yi nʋaŋ a gʋtɩ ka ma dɩ, Yɩma fʋ chʋa aŋaŋ fʋ naa jɩlɩma.

eng: so that things will go well for you, and you will live for a long time in the land .
local: amʋ jaaŋ mana nan yi vɩɩnɩŋ a yɩ fʋ, ta fʋ bɩ ye miivoli waŋ tɩŋgbaŋka gie me.

eng: As for parents, dont provoke your children to anger, but raise them with discipline and instruction about the Lord.
local: Chʋalɩŋ, nɩ da pɔgɩlɩ nɩ ballɩ aŋaŋ tʋaŋ ta vaa ba sɩnyɩɩrɩŋ dɩ haga, ama nɩ dagɩma ba ta kpaama ba yaa gamma wudieke tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ dɩ yaalala.

eng: As for slaves, obey your human masters with fear and trembling and with sincere devotion to Christ.
local: Nɩnɩŋ vuodiekemba dɩ yine yɔŋɩsɩ dɩaŋ, nɩ saagɩma nɩ tieliŋ nʋa, ta chɩgɩma ba ŋmaamɩŋ, ta tʋma yɩma ba aŋaŋ nɩ sʋgɩtɩ mana sɩba nɩ tɩnna baa nɩ tʋma dene a yɩma Masia wa.

eng: Dont work to make yourself look good and try to flatter people, but act like slaves of Christ carrying out Gods will from the heart.
local: Nɩ da tʋma a yɩma ba saŋŋa dieke ba keŋ daansa nɩ nyɩɩna ma, dɩ ba bɩrɩ nɩ, ama nɩ nagɩ nɩ gbaŋ a bɩrɩŋ Masia yɔŋɩsɩ ta yime wudieke dɩ yine Ŋmɩŋ choti aŋaŋ nɩ sʋgɩtɩ mana.

eng: Serve your owners enthusiastically, as though you were serving the Lord and not human beings.
local: Nɩ tʋma nɩ tʋʋma aŋaŋ sʋgɩfɩalɩŋ sɩba nɩ tʋma yɩa tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Masia ama nɩ daa yilime dɩ nɩ tʋma a yɩa vuota nyɩɩna ma.

eng: You know that the Lord will reward every person who does what is right, whether that person is a slave or a free person.
local: ta sɩmma a baarɩ tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Masia nan keŋ tuŋ vuoŋ mana yaa gamma wʋvɩɩŋ dieke mana ʋ yine, ʋ yiwo yɔmʋ yaa vuodieke dɩ sɩna ʋ gbaŋ.

eng: As for masters, treat your slaves in the same way. Stop threatening them, because you know that both you and your slaves have a master in heaven. He doesnt distinguish between people on the basis of status.
local: Yɔŋɩsɩ tieliŋ, nɩ dɩaŋ nɩ mɩŋŋɩ pɔgɩlɩ nɩ yɔŋɩsɩ ta da pɔgɩlɩ ba aŋaŋ tʋaŋ, ta sɩmma dɩ nɩnɩŋ aŋaŋ nɩ yɔŋɩsɩsɩ mana yallɩ wa Yɔmʋtieŋ balɩmɩŋ arɩzanna ma, ta ʋ die vuosi sarɩya ta ka luge.

eng: Finally, be strengthened by the Lord and his powerful strength.
local: Wudieke dɩ kpatɩna kʋaŋ yiwo naa, nɩ vaa tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ hagɩrɩbʋ yi nɩ hagɩrɩma.

eng: Put on Gods armor so that you can make a stand against the tricks of the devil.
local: Ta nagɩ Ŋmɩŋ tɔntaala nyinti mana ʋ yɩnana nɩ wa a gbara nɩ gbaŋ, amʋ nɩ nan bɩagɩ zie a tuuli Sitaani wʋsanbɩatɩ.

eng: We arent fighting against human enemies but against rulers, authorities, forces of cosmic darkness, and spiritual powers of evil in the heavens.
local: Dama tɩ ka waga aŋaŋ vuodieke dɩ yalla nyɩŋgbanɩŋ aŋaŋ zɩŋ, ama tɩ waga aŋaŋ haalɩbɩatɩ mana aŋaŋ ba yikotieliŋ, aŋaŋ lele wo dʋnɩa ka gie lɩmɩŋ ma sikpeŋtieliŋ, aŋaŋ ŋmɩŋsikpeŋ haalɩbɩatɩ.

eng: Therefore, pick up the full armor of God so that you can stand your ground on the evil day and after you have done everything possible to still stand.
local: Die wɩa, nɩ nagɩ Ŋmɩŋ tɔntaala nyinti mana a gbara nɩ gbaŋ lele, amʋ dabɩakʋ dɩ keŋ tʋgɩ nɩ nan bɩagɩ a tuuli daarɩ mi a gbatɩ nɩ gbaŋ, ta tɔmbʋ dɩ keŋ tɩaŋ nɩ nan ye zie keŋ keŋ.

eng: So stand with the belt of truth around your waist, justice as your breastplate.
local: Die wɩa nɩ zie keŋ keŋ, ta vaa nɩ wusie sɩmma sɩba gbanɩŋ a bɔbɩ nɩ chɩasɩ, ta vaa sʋgɩyɩalɩŋ beriŋ sɩmma sɩba jakagɩkɩŋ a kagɩ nɩ nyʋa aŋaŋ nɩ kʋasɩ.

eng: and put shoes on your feet so that you are ready to spread the good news of peace.
local: ta nɩ yi siri a mʋʋla wʋvɩɩŋ dieke dɩ fɩalɩnana vuosi sʋgɩtɩ aŋ ka sɩɩ sɩba nɩ sunene nɩ nɩɩra.

eng: Above all, carry the shield of faith so that you can extinguish the flaming arrows of the evil one.
local: Wudieke dɩ gʋtɩna nyinti gie ma yiwo naa, nɩ nagɩ nɩ yada Masia ma aŋ ka sɩmma sɩba jakagɩkɩ dieke nɩ pɔgɩlɩna nɩ nuusi me a yaa kaga Sitaani yɩɩma dɩ sɩna sɩba boliŋ wo.

eng: Take the helmet of salvation and the sword of the Spirit, which is Gods word.
local: ta pɔgɩlɩ nɩ gbatɩtaanɩŋ aŋ ka sɩmma sɩba kuuti sibubiŋ, ta bɩ pɔgɩlɩ Ŋmɩŋ wɩaha aŋ ka sɩmma sɩba takoobi dieke Halɩkasɩka dɩ yaa tʋma wa.

eng: Offer prayers and petitions in the Spirit all the time. Stay alert by hanging in there and praying for all believers.
local: Nɩ jʋʋsɩma Ŋmɩŋ sɩba Halɩkasɩka dɩ dagɩna nɩ dene saŋŋa mana. Nɩ jʋʋsɩma Ŋmɩŋ dɩ ʋ suŋŋi nɩ jaaŋ mana ma. Nɩ gbara ta daa vaa Ŋmɩŋ jʋʋsɩŋ, ta jʋʋsɩma Ŋmɩŋ saŋŋa mana a yɩma Ŋmɩŋ vuosi mana.

eng: As for me, pray that when I open my mouth, Ill get a message that confidently makes this secret plan of the gospel known.
local: Ta jʋʋsɩma a yɩma n gbaŋ, dɩ Ŋmɩŋ suŋŋi mɩŋ n wʋbalɩkaha ma amʋ n nan bɩagɩ yuori a balɩ wʋlɔbɩrɩka diekemba dɩ benne wʋvɩɩnaha ma ta da chɩgɩma ŋmaamɩŋ.

eng: Im an ambassador in chains for the sake of the gospel. Pray so that the Lord will give me the confidence to say what I have to say.
local: Dama wʋvɩɩnaha naŋ ma maŋ zie ta bie dansarɩka sʋŋ naa. Die wɩa nɩ jʋʋsɩma Ŋmɩŋ dɩ n bɩagɩ a balɩma dɩ mʋna dɩ n balɩ wʋvɩɩnaha dene ta da chɩgɩma ŋmaamɩŋ.

eng: Tychicus, my loved brother and faithful servant of the Lord, can inform you about my situation and what Im doing.
local: Tɩ nɩmbʋa choti Tichikusi, vuodieke dɩ yine tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ tʋntʋntʋ aŋaŋ wusie wo, nan balɩ nɩ wɩa mana yaa gamma n ma amʋ nɩ nan dɩ sɩba n beriŋ dɩ sɩna dene.

eng: Ive sent him for this reason—so that you will know about us. He can reassure you.
local: Die wɩa maŋ tʋma wa nɩ jigiŋ, dɩ ʋ keŋ balɩ nɩ tɩ mana beriŋ dɩ sɩna dene, ta bɩ kpaŋŋɩsɩ nɩ.

eng: May there be peace with the brothers and sisters as well as love with the faith that comes from God the Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Tɩ Chɔɔŋ Ŋmɩŋ aŋaŋ tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Yisa Masia yɩ tɩ nɩmballɩ mana sʋgɩdʋagɩŋ aŋaŋ choti aŋaŋ yada.

eng: May grace be with all those who love our Lord Jesus Christ forever.
local: Ŋmɩŋ suŋŋi vuodiekemba mana dɩ chone tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Yisa Masia wa aŋaŋ choti dieke dɩ wone kpatɩŋ.

eng: From Paul and Timothy, slaves of Christ Jesus. To all those in Philippi who are Gods people in Christ Jesus, along with your supervisors and servants.
local: Manɩŋ Pɔɔli aŋaŋ Timoti, tɩnɩŋ vuodiekemba dɩ yine Yisa Masia tʋntʋntɩŋ wa maagɩnana gbaŋkʋ gie a yɩa Ŋmɩŋ vuovɩɩna diekemba mana dɩ yine Yisa Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrɩŋ ta bie Filipi tɩŋ ma, aŋaŋ ba nɩŋŋandɩɩsɩrɩba aŋaŋ ba susuŋŋiribe.

eng: May the grace and peace from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ be with you.
local: Tɩ Chɔɔŋ Ŋmɩŋ aŋaŋ tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Yisa Masia suŋŋi nɩ, ta bɩ yɩ nɩ sʋgɩdʋagɩŋ.

eng: I thank my God every time I mention you in my prayers.
local: N waasa Ŋmɩŋ saŋŋa dieke mana maŋ keŋ tɩɩnsɩ nɩ wɩa.

eng: Im thankful for all of you every time I pray, and its always a prayer full of joy.
local: saŋŋa mana maŋ keŋ jʋʋsa Ŋmɩŋ a yɩa nɩ, n ŋaaŋ jʋʋsa mɩŋ aŋaŋ sʋgɩfɩalɩŋ.

eng: Im glad because of the way you have been my partners in the ministry of the gospel from the time you first believed it until now.
local: dama nɩ suŋŋine mɩŋ dene wo yaa gamma wʋvɩɩnaha tʋʋmaha ma ka piiliku me wo a keŋ tʋgɩ jinne wɩa.

eng: Im sure about this: the one who started a good work in you will stay with you to complete the job by the day of Christ Jesus.
local: Die wɩa, n ka chɩɩlɩya dɩ Ŋmɩŋ vuodieke die dɩ piiline tʋnvɩɩŋkʋ gie nɩ sʋgɩtɩ ma nan pɔgɩlɩka die yaa gamma, a ga tʋgɩ saŋŋa dieke ʋ balla ʋ keŋ kpatɩ tʋnvɩɩŋkʋ gie daa dieke Yisa Masia dɩ balla ʋ keŋ wo.

eng: I have good reason to think this way about all of you because I keep you in my heart. You are all my partners in Gods grace, both during my time in prison and in the defense and support of the gospel.
local: Nɩ bie n sʋŋ ma saŋŋa mana. Die wɩa, maŋ yile nɩ wɩa naa dɩ vɩɩna, dama a nyɩŋ saŋŋa dieke die n benne n dʋŋŋʋ ta mɩa dɩ n vaa wʋvɩɩnaha zie wo, a keŋ tʋgɩ saŋŋa dieke n june dansarɩka ma wa, nɩ mana die suŋŋi mɩŋ mɩŋ aŋaŋ tʋŋ dieke Ŋmɩŋ dɩ suŋŋine mɩŋ a nagɩ a yɩ mɩŋ wa.

eng: God is my witness that I feel affection for all of you with the compassion of Christ Jesus.
local: Ŋmɩŋ yine n siaratieŋ dɩ n sʋŋ seŋ bie nɩ ma aŋaŋ Yisa Masia gbaŋ gbaŋ choti.

eng: This is my prayer: that your love might become even more and more rich with knowledge and all kinds of insight.
local: N jʋʋsa Ŋmɩŋ dɩ nɩ choti nan dɩ gʋta saŋŋa mana, dɩ nɩ wusie yɩaŋ aŋaŋ nɩ sɩbɩŋ mana gbaŋ nan dɩ gʋta.

eng: I pray this so that you will be able to decide what really matters and so you will be sincere and blameless on the day of Christ.
local: amʋ nɩ nan bɩagɩ vʋarɩ jadieke dɩ faasɩna vɩɩna, amʋ ka kʋaŋ chaaŋ nɩ kaaŋ bɩ yaa dɩgɩntɩ aŋaŋ bɩaŋ daa dieke Masia dɩ bala ʋ keŋ wo.

eng: I pray that you will then be filled with the fruit of righteousness, which comes from Jesus Christ, in order to give glory and praise to God.
local: ta yime tʋnvɩɩna pam Yisa Masia hagɩrɩŋ ma, amʋ Ŋmɩŋ saaŋ nan ye bɩrɩŋ aŋaŋ pɩmpagɩŋ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, I want you to know that the things that have happened to me have actually advanced the gospel.
local: N nɩmballɩ, n yaala nɩ sɩmma dɩ wudieke dɩ haarɩna mɩŋ wa suŋŋi wo wʋvɩɩnaha dɩ gara nɩŋŋa wusie.

eng: The whole Praetorian Guard and everyone else knows that Im in prison for Christ.
local: Die wɩa, naalɩba gbɩgbarɩtɩba mana aŋaŋ vuodiekemba dɩ benne giena mana wa sɩba a baarɩ dɩ n yine Masia tʋntʋntʋ wɩa maŋ bie dansarɩka sʋŋ.

eng: Most of the brothers and sisters have had more confidence through the Lord to speak the word boldly and bravely because of my jail time.
local: N dansarɩka ma beriŋ yɩ wa tɩ nɩmballɩ pam sikimiŋ tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ sieŋ me, ta ba bala wʋvɩɩnaha ta ka chɩga ŋmaamɩŋ.

eng: Some certainly preach Christ with jealous and competitive motives, but others preach with good motives.
local: Vuosi bataŋ mʋʋla Masia wɩaha dama ba yaa wa sʋgɩbɩaŋ aŋaŋ nyantaatɩ, ama bataŋ nɩŋ mʋʋlaha mɩŋ aŋaŋ sʋŋanyilivɩɩna.

eng: They are motivated by love, because they know that Im put here to give a defense of the gospel.
local: Vuodiekemba dɩ tʋnnana aŋaŋ ba choti naa sɩba a baarɩ Ŋmɩŋ die yɩna mɩŋ wʋvɩɩnaha tʋʋma dɩ n vaa wʋvɩɩnaha zie.

eng: the others preach Christ because of their selfish ambition. They are insincere, hoping to cause me more pain while Im in prison.
local: Vuosi bataŋ dɩaŋ ka mʋʋla Masia wɩaha aŋaŋ ba sʋgɩtɩ, ama ba mʋʋla aŋaŋ sʋŋanyilibɩatɩ; ta yile dɩ ba nan nagɩ mɩŋ a yi wɩɩŋ ma n yene bie dansarɩka ma naa.

eng: What do I think about this? Just this: since Christ is proclaimed in every possible way, whether from dishonest or true motives, Im glad and Ill continue to be glad.
local: Die ka chʋʋsɩya. N yaa wa sʋgɩfɩalɩŋ ka wɩa, dama dɩɩ yi ba mʋʋla aŋaŋ sʋŋanyilivɩɩna yaa sʋŋanyilibɩatɩ, wudieke dɩ yine talasɩ yiwo ba mʋʋla wa Masia wɩaha. N nan dɩ yaa sʋgɩfɩalɩŋ saŋŋa mana.

eng: Im glad because I know that this will result in my release through your prayers and the help of the Spirit of Jesus Christ.
local: dama n sɩba a baarɩ dɩ nɩ Ŋmɩŋ jʋʋsɩŋ aŋaŋ nɩ suŋŋi dieke dɩ nyɩnnana Yisa Masia Halɩkasɩka ma wa wɩa, n nan keŋ a nyɩŋ dansarɩka ma.

eng: It is my expectation and hope that I wont be put to shame in anything. Rather, I hope with daring courage that Christs greatness will be seen in my body, now as always, whether I live or die.
local: N sʋgɩnanɩŋ aŋaŋ tama yiwo dɩ n da keŋ yi n gbaŋ viivi, ama ta yallɩma sʋgɩhagɩrɩŋ lele aŋaŋ saŋŋa mana, ta dɩɩ yi maŋ kpi yaa maŋ beri n miivoli me, n nan vaa Masia saaŋ ye bɩrɩŋ.

eng: Because for me, living serves Christ and dying is even better.
local: Dama dɩɩ yi maŋ beri n miivoli me, n beri mɩŋ a yɩa Masia, ama dɩɩ yi kuŋ maŋ kpi, die nan faasɩ yɩ mɩŋ nyʋarɩ.

eng: If I continue to live in this world, I get results from my work.
local: Dɩɩ yi maŋ nan dɩ bie n miivoli me ta nan bɩagɩ yi wudieke dɩ yaa nyʋarɩ, die nɩŋ, n ka sɩba jadieke n baaŋ vʋarɩ.

eng: But I dont know what I prefer. Im torn between the two because I want to leave this life and be with Christ, which is far better.
local: Nyinti ale wa gie yine wudiekemba dɩ datɩnana mɩŋ; n tɩŋ nan faasɩ yaala dɩ n vaa miivolike gie, ta ga bemme aŋaŋ Masia, die tɩŋ nan faasɩ vɩɩna.

eng: However, its more important for me to stay in this world for your sake.
local: Ama nɩ wɩa, dɩ faasɩ vɩɩna dɩ n bemme n miivoli me.

eng: Im sure of this: I will stay alive and remain with all of you to help your progress and the joy of your faith.
local: N sɩba mɩŋ dɩ kanɩŋ ka vɩɩŋna ta chɩɩlɩŋ wori, die wɩa maŋ sɩba dɩ n nan dɩ beri. N nan dɩ beri aŋaŋ nɩ mana, amʋ nɩ nan dɩ hagɩrɩ ta yaa sʋgɩfɩalɩŋ nɩ Masia dɩɩsɩŋ ma.

eng: and to increase your pride in Christ Jesus through my presence when I visit you again.
local: Nɩ nan dɩ faasɩ yaa sʋgɩfɩalɩŋ Yisa Masia ma dɩɩ yi maŋ keŋ keŋ nɩ jigiŋ bɩbra.

eng: Most important, live together in a manner worthy of Christs gospel. Do this, whether I come and see you or Im absent and hear about you. Do this so that you stand firm, united in one spirit and mind as you struggle together to remain faithful to the gospel.
local: Tɔ, wudieke dɩ yine nɩŋŋmɩna yiwo naa, nɩ vaa nɩ beriŋ sɩmma sɩba Masia wʋvɩɩnaha dɩ dagɩna dene, ta dɩɩ yi maŋ bɩagɩ a keŋ ye nɩ yaa maŋ ka keŋye, ama n nan wʋŋ dɩ nɩ mɩŋŋɩ zie mɩŋ aŋaŋ sʋŋanyili balɩmɩŋ, ta yaa nʋabalɩmɩŋ ta kpaŋŋa nɩ gbaŋ ta wʋvɩɩnaha yaa gamma nɩ yadaka Yisa Masia ma nan dɩ gara nɩŋŋa.

eng: That way, you wont be afraid of anything your enemies do. Your faithfulness and courage are a sign of their coming destruction and your salvation, which is from God.
local: Nɩ da chɩgɩma nɩ dataasɩ, nɩ yallɩma sʋgɩhagɩrɩŋ saŋŋa mana ta die nan dagɩ ba dɩ banɩŋ ba bala ba nan, ta nɩnɩŋ nɩ hagɩ, dama Ŋmɩŋ yɩna nɩ nyaŋŋɩŋ.

eng: God has generously granted you the privilege, not only of believing in Christ but also of suffering for Christs sake.
local: Nɩ wɔŋ yaa sieŋ mɩŋ dɩ nɩ tʋŋ yɩ Masia, daa nɩ yine wo yada nyɩɩna ma, ama nɩ die wahala ʋ wɩa.

eng: You are having the same struggle that you saw me face and now hear that Im still facing.
local: Lele, nɩ nan gʋtɩ n ma tɔmbʋ ma. Dɩ yiwo tɔŋ dieke die nɩ yene mɩŋ n wagɩnana wa, ta lele nɩ wʋŋ dɩ n ye waga mɩŋ.

eng: Therefore, if there is any encouragement in Christ, any comfort in love, any sharing in the Spirit, any sympathy.
local: Nɩ benne Masia ma naa yine nɩ mɩŋŋɩ zie, ta ʋ choti dɩ vaa nɩ sʋgɩtɩ dɩ fɩala, ta nɩ yaa Halɩkasɩka dɩdɩɩsɩrɩtaŋ, ta yaa choti aŋaŋ zɔɔlɩnchɩgɩla aŋaŋ taŋ.

eng: complete my joy by thinking the same way, having the same love, being united, and agreeing with each other.
local: Die wɩa maŋ bala nɩ dɩ nɩ yallɩma sʋŋanyili balɩmɩŋ ta vaa n sʋgɩfɩalɩŋ gʋtɩ, ta yallɩma choti balɩmɩŋ ta nɩ sʋŋanyile mana yi bʋnyɩ.

eng: Dont do anything for selfish purposes, but with humility think of others as better than yourselves.
local: Nɩ da yime wɩɩŋ a nyɩmma sʋgɩbɩaŋ aŋaŋ kalinbaani ma, ama nɩ sʋʋŋ nɩ gbaŋ tɩŋgbaŋ, ta kɔtɩma taŋ a tɩaŋ nɩ kɔtɩna nɩ gbaŋ dene wo.

eng: Instead of each person watching out for their own good, watch out for what is better for others.
local: Nɩ da vasɩma nɩ baga bemme nɩ nyinti nyɩɩna ma, ama nɩ vaa nɩ baga bemme nɩ chanchaalɩŋ nyinti ma gbaŋ.

eng: Adopt the attitude that was in Christ Jesus.
local: Nɩ vaa beri dieke Yisa Masia die dɩ yalla wa bemme nɩ ma:.

eng: Though he was in the form of God, he did not consider being equal with God something to exploit.
local: Ʋ nɩasɩ wa Ŋmɩŋ saŋŋa mana ama die ʋ ka vaa ʋ nɩasɩna aŋaŋ Ŋmɩnnɩ dɩ yi jadieke ʋ yigine keŋ keŋ.

eng: But he emptied himself by taking the form of a slave and by becoming like human beings. When he found himself in the form of a human.
local: ama ta saagɩ ʋ gbaŋ gbaŋ choti me ta vaa jadieke ʋ yalla wa ta nagɩ ʋ gbaŋ a bɩrɩŋ sɩba yɔmʋ. Ta yi vuota ta keŋ nyɩŋ a yi vuota.

eng: he humbled himself by becoming obedient to the point of death, even death on a cross.
local: Die ʋ sʋʋŋ ʋ gbaŋ, ta saagɩ Ŋmɩŋ nʋaŋ a keŋ a kpi dagarɩkʋ ma gbaŋ.

eng: Therefore, God highly honored him and gave him a name above all names.
local: Naa wɩa Ŋmɩŋ dɩ kɔtɩ wa a tɩaŋ vuoŋ mana, ta yɩ wa saaŋ dieke dɩ yine saaŋ kpeŋkpɩɩŋ a tɩaŋ saara mana.

eng: so that at the name of Jesus everyone in heaven, on earth, and under the earth might bow.
local: dɩ ka yi aŋ vuodiekemba dɩ benne arɩzanna ma aŋaŋ tɩŋgbaŋka gie me aŋaŋ kpiile tigiŋ ba mana keŋ gbirigi ba dune me, ta yɩma wʋnɩŋ Yisa saarɩ gie jɩlɩma.

eng: and every tongue confess that Jesus Christ is Lord, to the glory of God the Father.
local: ta vuoŋ mana nan daansɩ balɩ dɩ wʋnɩŋ Yisa Masia yine Yɔmʋtieŋ aŋ ka bɩrɩ tɩ Chɔɔŋ Ŋmɩŋ saaŋ.

eng: Therefore, my loved ones, just as you always obey me, not just when I am present but now even more while I am away, carry out your own salvation with fear and trembling.
local: N nɩmballɩ, die nɩ saaga a yɩa mɩŋ mɩŋ saŋŋa dieke die n bene nɩ jigiri, lele n wone nɩ jigiri naa, nɩ mʋ nɩ faasɩ a saagɩma a yɩma mɩŋ mɩŋ. Die wɩa nɩ ko ye tʋma aŋaŋ ŋmaamɩŋ ta chelime ta tʋmma tʋŋ dieke Ŋmɩŋ dɩ gbatɩ nɩ a taaŋ dɩ nɩ tʋma wa.

eng: God is the one who enables you both to want and to actually live out his good purposes.
local: dama Ŋmɩŋ tʋma nɩ ma saŋŋa mana dɩ nɩ yaalɩma ʋ choti yiile ta bɩ yime ke.

eng: Do everything without grumbling and arguing.
local: Nɩ yime wɩɩŋ mana ta da vʋʋmma yaa a nɩgɩma nɩnhagɩrɩŋ.

eng: so that you may be blameless and pure, innocent children of God surrounded by people who are crooked and corrupt. Among these people you shine like stars in the world.
local: amʋ nɩ nan dɩ wo bɩaŋ, ama ta yi sʋgɩyɩalɩntieliŋ, ta yi Ŋmɩŋ ballɩ diekemba dɩ wone daŋŋa, dama nɩ bie wo tɩŋgbaŋka gie vuotɔgɩtɩ aŋaŋ vuobɩatɩ sʋnsʋŋ mɩŋ. Dɩ yiwo talasɩ dɩ nɩ nyɩgɩsɩma ba sʋnsʋŋ sɩba chɩŋmarɩsɩ dɩ nyɩgɩsɩnana ŋmɩŋsikpeŋ dene wo.

eng: because you hold on to the word of life. This will allow me to say on the day of Christ that I havent run for nothing or worked for nothing.
local: ama ta balɩ miivoli wɩa. Dɩɩ yi nɩ tʋma die, n nan daansɩ yallɩ nyʋʋŋ nɩgɩŋ daa dieke Yisa Masia dɩ bala ʋ keŋ wo, dama ka nan keŋ dagɩ dɩ n wahala aŋaŋ n tʋʋmaha ka yi yɔrɩ.

eng: But even if I am poured out like a drink offering upon the altar of service for your faith, I am glad. Im glad with all of you.
local: Dɩɩ yi maŋ nagɩ n miivoli gie a taaŋ a gʋtɩ wahala dieke n wone dii wo ta vaa nɩ yi yada naa wa, n nan dɩ yaa sʋgɩfɩalɩŋ, aŋ tɩ mana lagɩŋ a yallɩma sʋgɩfɩalɩŋ.

eng: You should be glad about this in the same way. Be glad with me!.
local: Die gbaŋ gbaŋ dɩ yi talasɩ dɩ nɩ yallɩma sʋgɩfɩalɩŋ aŋ manɩŋ aŋaŋ nɩ mana lagɩŋ yallɩma sʋgɩfɩalɩŋ.

eng: I hope in the Lord Jesus to send Timothy to see you soon so that I may be encouraged by hearing about you.
local: N yaa tama tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Yisa ma dɩ n tʋŋ Timoti nɩ jigiŋ lele, ta wʋŋ nɩ wɩa aŋ n sʋŋ dʋa.

eng: I have no one like him. He is a person who genuinely cares about your well-being.
local: Ʋ nyɩɩna ma ʋ baga benne nɩ ma aŋaŋ wusie sɩba n baga dɩ benne nɩ ma dene wo.

eng: All the others put their own business ahead of Jesus Christs business.
local: Vuodiekemba mana dɩ tɩalɩna nɩŋ, vuoŋ mana nine ŋmɩntɩ wa aŋaŋ ʋ tʋaŋ jaaŋ, ta ba baga wo wudieke dɩ yine Yisa Masia sɩɩtɩ ma.

eng: You know his character, how he labors with me for the gospel like a son works with his father.
local: Nɩ sɩba dɩ Timoti tʋʋma dagɩya dɩ ʋ tʋma aŋaŋ wusie. Ʋ tʋma mɩŋ aŋaŋ mɩŋ wʋvɩɩnaha tʋʋma ma sɩba bʋa dɩ ŋaana tʋma aŋaŋ ʋ chɔɔŋ dene wo.

eng: So he is the one that I hope to send as soon as I find out how things turn out here for me.
local: N yaa tama dɩ dɩ kaaŋ yʋasɩ n nan tʋŋ wa nɩ jigiŋ maŋ ye wɩa dɩ bala a yiŋŋi dene.

eng: I trust in the Lord that I also will visit you soon.
local: Tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ wɩa, n yaa tama dɩ dɩ kaaŋ yʋasɩ n gbaŋ n nan keŋ nɩ jigiŋ.

eng: So then, my brothers and sisters, be glad in the Lord. Its no trouble for me to repeat the same things to you because they will help keep you on track.
local: N nɩmballɩ, ka kpatɩŋ yiwo nɩ yallɩma sʋgɩfɩalɩŋ tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ ma. Manɩŋ n baga wori dɩ n bɩ maagɩ nɩ wudiekemba die n wone maagɩ a yɩ nɩ wa, maŋ yi die, ka nan yi nɩ suŋŋiŋ.

eng: I think it is also necessary to send Epaphroditus to you. He is my brother, coworker, and fellow soldier; and he is your representative who serves my needs.
local: N yile dɩ dɩ yiwo talasɩ dɩ n tʋŋ tɩ nɩmbʋa Epafirodatusi, vuodieke dɩ tʋnna aŋaŋ nɩŋŋmɩna ta mɩa dɩ ʋ suŋŋi mɩŋ aŋaŋ Masia tʋʋmaha, wʋnɩŋ ʋ bɩna yi vuodieke die nɩ tʋnna wa ʋ keŋ suŋŋi mɩŋ wo.

eng: Watch out for the dogs. Watch out for people who do evil things. Watch out for those who insist on circumcision, which is really mutilation.
local: Nɩ sɩmma wʋbɩayiiribe, vuodiekemba dɩ sɩna sɩba gbaasɩ ta bala dɩ nɩ mʋ nɩ gobi wo nɩ kɔla wa.

eng: He misses you all, and he was upset because you heard he was sick.
local: Ʋ chele mɩŋ dɩ ʋ ye nɩ mana. Ʋ sʋŋ die chʋʋsɩya mɩŋ die nɩ wʋnna dɩ ʋ yʋagɩ mɩŋ wa.

eng: We are the circumcision. We are the ones who serve by Gods Spirit and who boast in Christ Jesus. We dont put our confidence in rituals performed on the body.
local: Tɩnɩŋ vuodiekemba dɩ jɩanna Ŋmɩŋ Halɩkasɩka hagɩrɩŋ ma wa yine vuodiekemba dɩ senne gobi tɩ kɔla. Tɩnɩŋ tɩ ka yaa tama vuota chʋara ma, ama tɩ kuule mɩŋ yaa gamma wudieke Yisa Masia dɩ yine. Tɩnɩŋ tɩ ka kuule yaa gamma wudieke tɩ yine.

eng: In fact, he was so sick that he nearly died. But God had mercy on him—and not just on him but also on me, because his death would have caused me great sorrow.
local: Ka seŋ yiwo wusie dɩ die ʋ yʋagɩ mɩŋ ta gbigi kuŋ, ama Ŋmɩŋ die dɩ chɩgɩ wa zɔɔlɩŋ, daa ʋ nyɩɩna ma, ama die ʋ chɩgɩ wa n gbaŋ zɔɔlɩŋ, ta vʋarɩ mɩŋ nyɩŋ ʋ kuŋ sʋgɩchʋʋsɩŋ dɩ bala ka gʋtɩ ʋ yʋagɩŋ sʋgɩchʋʋsɩŋ ma wa.

eng: though I have good reason to have this kind of confidence. If anyone else has reason to put their confidence in physical advantages, I have even more.
local: ama n tɩŋ nan bɩagɩ a kuuli. Dɩɩ yi bataŋ dɩ kuule yaa gamma vuota chʋara, die nɩŋ n yaa wɩa pam dɩ n kuule a tɩaŋ die.

eng: Therefore, I am sending him immediately so that when you see him again you can be glad and I wont worry.
local: Die wɩa, n chele mɩŋ dɩ n tʋŋ wa nɩ jigiŋ amʋ nɩ keŋ ye wo, nɩ nan dɩ yaa sʋgɩfɩalɩŋ bɩbra, ta n gbaŋ n sʋgɩchʋʋsɩkʋ bɩa.

eng: I was circumcised on the eighth day. I am from the people of Israel and the tribe of Benjamin. I am a Hebrew of the Hebrews. With respect to observing the Law, Im a Pharisee.
local: Dama die ba mɩɩrɩna mɩŋ ta ka daraa anɩɩ daraaŋ ba gobi n kɔlɩ, ta ba mɩɩrɩ mɩŋ Juu vuoŋ, Benjamani buuriŋ ma, ta maŋ yi Juu vuoŋ aŋaŋ wusie. Dɩɩ yi Mosisi mɩraha dɩɩsɩŋ, die n yiwo Farasi vuoŋ ta dɩha sɩba Farasisi vuosi dɩ dɩna dene wo, die n dɩha mɩŋ aŋaŋ nɩŋŋmɩna.

eng: So welcome him in the Lord with great joy and show great respect for people like him.
local: Nɩ tuo wo aŋaŋ sʋgɩfɩalɩŋ tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ saaŋ ma, ta yɩma vuodiekemba dɩ sɩna sɩba wʋnɩŋ jɩlɩma.

eng: With respect to devotion to the faith, I harassed the church. With respect to righteousness under the Law, Im blameless.
local: ta die dɩ keŋ mugise Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrɩŋ gbaŋ. Dɩɩ yi vuoŋ dɩ nan dɩ dɩ mɩraha ta yi vuovɩɩnʋ Ŋmɩŋ jigiŋ, manɩŋ nɩŋ n wo bɩaŋ yaa gamma ka ma.

eng: He risked his life and almost died for the work of Christ, and he did this to make up for the help you couldnt give me.
local: dama die ʋ ka waga ʋ miivoli wɩa, ta die baa ʋ kpi Masia tʋʋmaha wɩa gbaŋ, dɩ ʋ yɩ mɩŋ suŋŋi dieke die nɩ kana ka bɩagɩ a yɩ mɩŋ wa.

eng: These things were my assets, but I wrote them off as a loss for the sake of Christ.
local: N tɩŋ nan bɩagɩ biisi wɩaha gie mana dɩ a yaa wa nyʋarɩ, ama n daansɩ ye ta a mana wo nyʋarɩ Masia wɩa.

eng: But even beyond that, I consider everything a loss in comparison with the superior value of knowing Christ Jesus my Lord. I have lost everything for him, but what I lost I think of as sewer trash, so that I might gain Christ.
local: Daa genhe nyɩɩna ma wone nyʋarɩ a yɩ mɩŋ: ama n daansɩ ye ta jaaŋ mana wo nyʋarɩ; dama n sɩbɩna n Yɔmʋtieŋ Yisa Masia ta ʋ sɩbɩkʋ nyʋarɩ dɩ faasɩ dala naa wɩa. Ʋ wɩa maŋ nagɩ jaaŋ mana a vigi taaŋ, manɩŋ n wasa a mana taŋgɔɔŋ ma jagɩma, dɩ n mɩŋŋɩ sɩmma Masia.

eng: and be found in him. In Christ I have a righteousness that is not my own and that does not come from the Law but rather from the faithfulness of Christ. It is the righteousness of God that is based on faith.
local: ta mɩŋŋɩ taasɩ aŋaŋ wa aŋaŋ wusie. Lele nɩŋ, n yiwo vuovɩɩnʋ Ŋmɩŋ jigiŋ daa n dɩna mɩraha wɩa, ama n yine Masia yada wa wɩa. N yadaka wɩa Ŋmɩŋ dɩ nagɩ mɩŋ a bɩrɩŋ vuovɩɩnʋ ʋ jigiŋ.

eng: The righteousness that I have comes from knowing Christ, the power of his resurrection, and the participation in his sufferings. It includes being conformed to his death.
local: Wudieke mana n yaalala yiwo dɩ n mɩŋŋɩ sɩmma Masia, ta bɩ sɩmma ʋ kumbu hagɩkʋ hagɩrɩŋ, ta bɩ dii wahala aŋaŋ wa, ta n berikʋʋrɩ kpi sɩba ʋ kpine dene wo.

eng: so that I may perhaps reach the goal of the resurrection of the dead.
local: ta yaa tama dɩ n gbaŋ n nan keŋ hagɩ kuŋ me ta ye miivoli.

eng: Its not that I have already reached this goal or have already been perfected, but I pursue it, so that I may grab hold of it because Christ grabbed hold of me for just this purpose.
local: N ka bala dɩ n wɔŋ yiwo vuovɩɩŋ dieke Ŋmɩŋ dɩ yaalala dɩ n yi wo, n ye ka tʋgɩ die, ama n ye ko mɩa mɩŋ sɩba chɩchɩgɩrʋ dɩ n ga nyaŋŋɩ a ga tuo tune dieke wɩa Yisa Masia die dɩ vʋarɩna mɩŋ dɩ n tuo wo.

eng: Brothers and sisters, I myself dont think Ive reached it, but I do this one thing: I forget about the things behind me and reach out for the things ahead of me.
local: N nɩmballɩ, n sɩba a baarɩ dɩ n ye ka nyaŋŋɩ nyaŋŋɩkʋ, ama wʋbalɩmɩŋ maŋ yie, n daama wa wudiekemba mana dɩ benne n kʋaŋ, ta mɩa dɩ n tʋgɩ jadieke dɩ benne n nɩŋŋa wa.

eng: The goal I pursue is the prize of Gods upward call in Christ Jesus.
local: Die wɩa maŋ chɩga a tuole jigidieke chɩgɩlaha dɩ bala ka kpatɩ wa, dɩ n ga a tuo tune dieke dɩ yine arɩzanna ma miivoli, ta Ŋmɩŋ dɩ wa mɩŋ ka wɩa Yisa Masia ma wa.

eng: So all of us who are spiritually mature should think this way, and if anyone thinks differently, God will reveal it to him or her.
local: Dɩ yiwo talasɩ dɩ tɩnɩŋ vuodiekemba dɩ kʋrɩnna Halɩkasɩka ma wa mʋ tɩ yallɩma sʋŋanyileke gie, ama nɩ bataŋ yaa wa sʋŋanyili gaasɩ, ama Ŋmɩŋ nan yuori nɩ nine.

eng: Only lets live in a way that is consistent with whatever level we have reached.
local: Die wɩa, nɩ vaa tɩ pɔgɩlɩ wusieke gie sɩba die tɩ pɔgɩlɩna ka dene a keŋ tʋgɩ lele wo.

eng: Brothers and sisters, become imitators of me and watch those who live this way—you can use us as models.
local: N nɩmballɩ, nɩ chansɩma mɩŋ. Nɩ nagɩ nɩ sʋŋanyile a yi vuodiekemba dɩ dɩna wʋvɩɩŋ dieke die tɩ nagɩna a yɩ nɩ wa sieku.

eng: As I have told you many times and now say with deep sadness, many people live as enemies of the cross.
local: Die n wɔŋ balɩ nɩ wɩaha gie mana saŋŋa dieke dɩ tɩanna wa, ama lele n bɩ bala nɩ aŋaŋ nintaantɩ, dɩ vuosi pam benne ta ba beriŋ dɩ nagɩ ba a bɩrɩŋ Masia dagarɩkʋ kumbu dataasɩ.

eng: Their lives end with destruction. Their god is their stomach, and they take pride in their disgrace because their thoughts focus on earthly things.
local: Ba kpatɩŋ yiwo chʋʋsɩŋ, dama ba nyuuti yine ba ŋmɩna. Ba kuule aŋaŋ jadieke dɩ nagɩnana ba yie viivi me, ta yile yaa gamma tɩŋgbaŋka gie nyinti nyɩɩna ma.

eng: Our citizenship is in heaven. We look forward to a savior that comes from there—the Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Ama tɩnɩŋ nɩŋ, tɩ yiwo arɩzanna ma ballɩ, ta tɩ chele a chɩɩsa tɩ Gbɩgbatɩtaantʋ, vuodieke dɩ yine tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Yisa Masia wa dɩ ʋ nyɩŋ arɩzanna ma a keŋ.

eng: He will transform our humble bodies so that they are like his glorious body, by the power that also makes him able to subject all things to himself.
local: Ʋ nan keŋ tarɩgɩ tɩ tɩŋgbaŋka gie nyɩŋgbaŋ dieke dɩ wone hagɩrɩŋ ta nan keŋ kpi wo aŋ ka nɩasɩ ʋ gbaŋ gbaŋ arɩzanna ma nyɩŋgbanɩŋ. Ʋ nan keŋ a nagɩ hagɩrɩ dieke dɩ vana ʋ sɩɩ jaaŋ mana wa a yi die.

eng: Therefore, my brothers and sisters whom I love and miss, who are my joy and crown, stand firm in the Lord. Loved ones.
local: Die wɩa, n nɩmballɩ, nɩnɩŋ vuodiekemba n chone, ta yaala n ye nɩ naa, nɩnɩŋ nɩ yine maŋ yallɩ sʋgɩfɩalɩŋ ta vasa maŋ kuule nɩ ma. N nɩmballɩ choti, nɩ mɩŋŋɩ zie ta dɩa tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Yisa Masia dene.

eng: I urge Euodia and I urge Syntyche to come to an agreement in the Lord.
local: N taa Yuwodia aŋaŋ Sintike, n jʋʋsa nɩ, nɩ kpaŋŋɩ nɩ gbaŋ a bemme aŋaŋ taŋ aŋaŋ sʋgɩfɩalɩŋ tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ wɩa.

eng: Yes, and Im also asking you, loyal friend, to help these women who have struggled together with me in the ministry of the gospel, along with Clement and the rest of my coworkers whose names are in the scroll of life.
local: Ta fʋnɩŋ vuodieke dɩ yine n dɩdɩɩsɩrɩtaŋ aŋaŋ wusie wo, n yaala fʋ suŋŋi wo hɔgʋba bale wo gie, dama banɩŋ aŋaŋ Kilementi aŋaŋ vuodiekemba mana dɩ yine n tʋntʋŋ chanchaalɩŋ, ta ba saara dɩ bie Ŋmɩŋ miivoli gbaŋkʋ ma wa, die lagɩsɩ tʋma mɩŋ pam, wʋvɩɩnaha mʋʋlɩŋ ma.

eng: Be glad in the Lord always! Again I say, be glad!.
local: Nɩ yallɩma sʋgɩfɩalɩŋ nɩ taasɩna aŋaŋ tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ wɩa. N bɩ bala nɩ, nɩ yallɩma sʋgɩfɩalɩŋ.

eng: Let your gentleness show in your treatment of all people. The Lord is near.
local: Nɩ bemme sɔmm aŋaŋ vuoŋ mana. Tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ keniŋ gbigiye mɩŋ.

eng: Dont be anxious about anything; rather, bring up all of your requests to God in your prayers and petitions, along with giving thanks.
local: Nɩ daa vaa nɩ sʋŋ chʋʋsɩ jaaŋ mana ma. Ama nɩ jʋʋsɩma Ŋmɩŋ a yaalɩma jadieke dɩ yine talasɩ a yɩ nɩ. Nɩ jʋʋsɩma Ŋmɩŋ, a waasɩma wa nɩ sʋgɩtɩ ma saŋŋa mana, ta balɩ wa wudieke nɩ yaalala.

eng: Then the peace of God that exceeds all understanding will keep your hearts and minds safe in Christ Jesus.
local: Ta Ŋmɩŋ nan yɩ nɩ ʋ sʋgɩfɩalɩ dieke dɩ tɩanna vuota sʋgɩfɩalɩŋ mana aŋ ka suŋŋi nɩ sʋgɩtɩ aŋ nɩ sʋŋanyile dʋa jigibalɩmɩŋ dama nɩ taasɩna aŋaŋ Yisa Masia wɩa.

eng: From now on, brothers and sisters, if anything is excellent and if anything is admirable, focus your thoughts on these things: all that is true, all that is holy, all that is just, all that is pure, all that is lovely, and all that is worthy of praise.
local: N nɩmballɩ, wudieke dɩ yine kpatɩŋ wʋnna, nɩ vaa nɩ sʋŋanyile suuli aŋaŋ wudieke dɩ vɩɩna ta yaa bɩrɩŋ, aŋaŋ wudieke dɩ yine wusie, aŋaŋ wudieke dɩ yalla jɩlɩma, aŋaŋ wudieke Ŋmɩŋ dɩ yene aŋ ka vɩɩna, aŋaŋ wudieke dɩ wone bɩaŋ, aŋaŋ wudieke vuosi dɩ chone, aŋaŋ wudieke dɩ yalla saaŋ vɩɩnɩŋ, aŋaŋ wudieke dɩ vɩɩŋna, aŋaŋ wudieke mana dɩ vɩɩna aŋaŋ bɩrɩŋ.

eng: Practice these things: whatever you learned, received, heard, or saw in us. The God of peace will be with you.
local: Ta nɩ nagɩ wudiekemba mana nɩ bʋgɩrɩna aŋaŋ wudiekemba nɩ tuone a nyɩŋ n jigiŋ, aŋaŋ n wʋbalɩkaha aŋaŋ n wuyiike mana a tʋŋ tʋʋma. Ta Ŋmɩŋ, vuodieke dɩ yɩnana tɩ sʋgɩdʋagɩkʋ nan dɩ beri aŋaŋ nɩ.

eng: I was very glad in the Lord because now at last you have shown concern for me again.
local: N yaa sʋgɩfɩalɩŋ ta waasa tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ, dama aŋaŋ ka yʋasɩna mana ama nɩ baga ye bie n ma. Wusie, nɩ seŋ cho mɩŋ mɩŋ, ama die nɩ ka ye sieŋ mɩŋ dɩ nɩ dagɩ die.

eng: Im not saying this because I need anything, for I have learned how to be content in any circumstance.
local: N ka yile dɩ nɩ daaŋ wa n wɩa die wɩa maŋ bala naa, dama manɩŋ n wɔŋ bʋgɩrɩ wa n nine dɩ bala ka suuli jadieke mana n yalla dene.

eng: I know the experience of being in need and of having more than enough; I have learned the secret to being content in any and every circumstance, whether full or hungry or whether having plenty or being poor.
local: N sɩba waarɩŋ beriŋ aŋaŋ chagɩtɩ beriŋ. N wɔŋ bʋgɩrɩ a mana; die wɩa, dɩɩ yi jigidieke n benne wo dɩ yi kɔŋ yaa chagɩtɩ, dɩɩ yi ka dala yaa dɩɩ yi bɩta, ama n nine suule jadieke n yalla saŋŋa mana mɩŋ.

eng: I can endure all these things through the power of the one who gives me strength.
local: Masia dɩ yɩna mɩŋ hagɩrɩŋ wɩa, n nan bɩagɩ yi wɩɩŋ mana.

eng: Still, you have done well to share my distress.
local: Ama die nɩ yiwo vɩɩnɩŋ pam nɩ suŋŋine mɩŋ n wumugisikehe me wo.

eng: You Philippians know from the time of my first mission work in Macedonia how no church shared in supporting my ministry except you.
local: Nɩnɩŋ Filipi vuosi sɩba dɩ die n wolinne piili Masia wʋvɩɩnaha mʋʋlɩkʋ, die n nyɩnna Masedonia tɩŋ ma wa, die nɩ nyɩɩna ma die nɩ yine Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrɩŋ diekemba dɩ suŋŋinene mɩŋ. Die nɩ yiwo vuodiekemba die dɩ gʋtɩna a dii n nyʋarɩ aŋaŋ n nanɩŋ.

eng: You sent contributions repeatedly to take care of my needs even while I was in Thessalonica.
local: Die n benne Tesalonika tɩŋ ma wa ta die yaala suŋŋiŋ wo, die nɩ ŋaana suŋŋe mɩŋ.

eng: Im not hoping for a gift, but I am hoping for a profit that accumulates in your account.
local: Dɩ ka sɩɩ sɩba n yaala piinisi nɩ jigiŋ, ama n yaala nɩ tuo wo nyʋarɩ a nyɩŋ Ŋmɩŋ ma mɩŋ.

eng: I now have plenty and it is more than enough. I am full to overflowing because I received the gifts that you sent from Epaphroditus. Those gifts give off a fragrant aroma, an acceptable sacrifice that pleases God.
local: N tuo nɩ piinisi mana mɩŋ, amʋ a yɩ mɩŋ. Piini dieke nɩ nagɩna a tʋŋ Epafirodatusi wo vaa maŋ chagɩ mɩŋ. Piinisi mi sɩɩ sɩba kaabɩ dieke nyuugiŋ dɩ vɩɩŋna ba nagɩna a yɩ Ŋmɩŋ, ta ka fɩalɩ ʋ sʋŋ, ʋ tuo ke.

eng: My God will meet your every need out of his riches in the glory that is found in Christ Jesus.
local: Die wɩa, Nabidie Ŋmɩŋ vuodieke n jɩanna nan yɩ nɩ nɩ nyɩŋyaalɩka mana, ta a nan nyɩŋ wa ʋ nyinti dieke dɩ faasɩna dala ta bie arɩzanna ma wa, Yisa Masia wɩa.

eng: Let glory be given to God our Father forever and always. Amen.
local: Vuosi bɩrɩma tɩ Chɔɔŋ Ŋmɩŋ saaŋ yaa gamma haahuu. Wusie.

eng: Greet all Gods people in Christ Jesus. The brothers and sisters with me send you their greeting.
local: Nɩ waasɩ vuodiekemba dɩ yine Ŋmɩŋ vuosi Yisa Masia wɩa. Tɩ nɩmballɩ diekemba dɩ benne giena wa waasa nɩ.

eng: All Gods people here, especially those in Caesars household, send you their greeting.
local: Ŋmɩŋ vuosi mana waasa nɩ, a tɩaŋ ba mana vuodiekemba dɩ yine naaŋ Siiza tigiŋ tʋntʋntɩŋ gbaŋ waasa nɩ.

eng: The grace of the Lord Jesus Christ be with your spirits.
local: Tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Yisa Masia suŋŋi nɩ mana.

eng: From Paul, an apostle of Christ Jesus by Gods will, and Timothy our brother.
local: Manɩŋ Pɔɔli, vuodieke dɩ yine Yisa Masia tʋntʋntʋ Ŋmɩŋ choti wɩa, aŋaŋ tɩ nɩmbʋa Timoti, maagɩnana gbaŋkʋ gie.

eng: To the holy and faithful brothers and sisters in Christ in Colossae. Grace and peace to you from God our Father.
local: a yɩa Ŋmɩŋ vuosi diekemba dɩ benne Kolosia tɩŋ ma, ta yi tɩ nɩmballɩ diekemba dɩ yine Yisa Masia yada wa. Tɩ Chɔɔŋ Nabidie Ŋmɩŋ suŋŋi nɩ, ta yɩ nɩ sʋgɩdʋagɩŋ.

eng: We always give thanks to God, the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, when we pray for you.
local: Tɩ ŋaaŋ waasa Ŋmɩŋ vuodieke dɩ yine tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Yisa Masia Chɔɔŋ wa tɩ keŋ jʋʋsa Ŋmɩŋ a yɩa nɩ saŋŋa mana.

eng: Weve done this since we heard of your faith in Christ Jesus and your love for all Gods people.
local: dama tɩ wʋŋya mɩŋ nɩ yine Yisa Masia yada dene ta bɩ cho Ŋmɩŋ vuosi mana dene.

eng: You have this faith and love because of the hope reserved for you in heaven. You previously heard about this hope through the true message, the good news.
local: Die piiliku me saŋŋa dieke nɩ wʋnna wʋvɩɩnaha dɩ yine wusie wo, die nɩ wʋŋya mɩŋ yaa gamma wʋvɩɩna diekemba dɩ chɩɩsɩnana nɩ arɩzanna ma wa mɩŋ.

eng: which has come to you. This message has been bearing fruit and growing among you since the day you heard and truly understood Gods grace, in the same way that it is bearing fruit and growing in the whole world.
local: Wʋvɩɩnaha gie dɩ kenne nɩ jigiri tʋga jigiŋ mana mɩŋ tɩŋgbaŋka gie me ta wʋnsa vuosi beriŋ sɩba ka wʋnsɩna nɩ beriŋ a nyɩŋ daa dieke die nɩ wʋnna ta sɩba Ŋmɩŋ zɔɔlɩnchɩgɩla aŋaŋ wusieke dɩ sɩna die wo.

eng: You learned it from Epaphras, who is the fellow slave we love and Christs faithful minister for your sake.
local: Die nɩ bʋgɩrɩ wa wɩarɩ gie a nyɩŋ tɩ tʋntʋŋ chanchaaŋ Epafirasi, vuodieke n faasɩna cho jigiŋ, wʋnɩŋ ʋ yine Masia tʋntʋntʋ dieke dɩ tʋnnana aŋaŋ wusie a yɩ tɩ.

eng: He informed us of your love in the Spirit.
local: Ʋ bɩ balɩ tɩ nɩ choti yaa gamma nɩ chanchaalɩŋ ma dɩ sɩna dene Ŋmɩŋ Halɩkasɩka suŋŋiŋ wɩa.

eng: Because of this, since the day we heard about you, we havent stopped praying for you and asking for you to be filled with the knowledge of Gods will, with all wisdom and spiritual understanding.
local: Naa wɩa, a nyɩŋ daa dieke tɩ wʋnna nɩ wɩa wa, tɩ ka vaa Ŋmɩŋ jʋʋsɩŋ nɩ wɩa, dɩ wʋnɩŋ Ŋmɩŋ yi aŋ nɩ sɩba wudieke ʋ yaalala, ta yɩ nɩ ʋ Halɩkasɩka yɩaŋ aŋaŋ ka sɩbɩŋ mana.

eng: Were praying this so that you can live lives that are worthy of the Lord and pleasing to him in every way: by producing fruit in every good work and growing in the knowledge of God.
local: amʋ nɩ nan bɩagɩ beri beri dieke tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ dɩ yaalala, ta yie wudieke dɩ nannana ʋ sʋŋ, amʋ nɩ nan dɩ bɩrɩma ta sɩba wa saŋŋa mana.

eng: by being strengthened through his glorious might so that you endure everything and have patience.
local: Wʋnɩŋ Ŋmɩŋ yɩ nɩ hagɩrɩŋ pam sɩba ʋ yalla hagɩrɩŋ mana dene wo amʋ nɩ nan dɩ yaa hanɩa aŋaŋ suguru.

eng: and by giving thanks with joy to the Father. He made it so you could take part in the inheritance, in light granted to Gods holy people.
local: Nɩ waasɩma tɩ Chɔɔŋ Ŋmɩŋ aŋaŋ sʋgɩfɩalɩŋ. Wʋnɩŋ ʋ vana nɩ mʋ dɩ nɩ gʋtɩ atɩa faarɩ dieke ʋ yɩna nʋaŋ dɩ ʋ nan nagɩ yɩ ʋ vuosi arɩzanna ma wa.

eng: He rescued us from the control of darkness and transferred us into the kingdom of the Son he loves.
local: Wʋnɩŋ ʋ vʋarɩna tɩ a nyɩŋ Sitaani hagɩrɩŋ ma a nagɩ tɩ a yi ʋ Bʋa dembiŋ choti naarɩ ma.

eng: He set us free through the Son and forgave our sins.
local: Ʋ Bʋa dembike wɩa ʋ nagɩ tɩ tʋmbɩatɩ a chaa tɩ ta vʋarɩ tɩ a nyɩŋ yɔŋɩsɩ ma.

eng: The Son is the image of the invisible God, the one who is first over all creation.
local: Vuoŋ kaaŋ bɩagɩ ye Ŋmɩŋ ama ʋ Bʋa dembiŋ Masia yiwo ʋ nɩasɩŋ. Wʋnɩŋ ʋ tɩanna jaaŋ mana, ta yi Ŋmɩŋ nyɩŋnaaŋka mana sikpeŋ tieŋ.

eng: Because all things were created by him: both in the heavens and on the earth, the things that are visible and the things that are invisible. Whether they are thrones or powers, or rulers or authorities, all things were created through him and for him.
local: Dama ʋ ma Ŋmɩŋ dɩ naaŋ jaaŋ mana dɩ benne arɩzanna ma aŋaŋ tɩŋgbaŋka gie me, nyindiekemba tɩ yesinene aŋaŋ nyindiekemba tɩ kana ka yese. Wʋnɩŋ ʋ naanna nyindiekemba mana dɩ yalla hagɩrɩŋ aŋaŋ yiko, aŋaŋ malakasi diekemba dɩ yalla hagɩrɩŋ aŋaŋ haalɩtɩ mana. Masia ma Ŋmɩŋ dɩ naaŋ jaaŋ mana ta nagɩ jaaŋ mana a yɩ wa.

eng: He existed before all things, and all things are held together in him.
local: Wʋnɩŋ Masia wɔŋ beri mɩŋ ta jaaŋ mana wori, ta ʋ wɩa jaaŋ mana dɩ beri sɩba Ŋmɩŋ dɩ sanna dene wo.

eng: He is the head of the body, the church, who is the beginning, the one who is firstborn from among the dead so that he might occupy the first place in everything.
local: Wʋnɩŋ ʋ yine ʋ vuosi mana sikpeŋ ta ʋ vuosi dɩaŋ dɩ yi ʋ nyɩŋgbanɩŋ. Ʋ vuosisi miivoli nyɩnna ʋ jigiŋ. Wʋnɩŋ ʋ yine Ŋmɩŋ Bʋa dembiŋ dieke dɩ kpine ta woliŋ hagɩ kuŋ me, dɩ ʋ nyɩɩna ma ʋ yi jaaŋ mana mana sikpeŋ tieŋ.

eng: Because all the fullness of God was pleased to live in him.
local: dama die dɩ yiwo Ŋmɩŋ nansɩŋ dɩ Masia yallɩma wʋnɩŋ Ŋmɩŋ gbaŋ gbaŋ beriŋ aŋaŋ wusie.

eng: and he reconciled all things to himself through him— whether things on earth or in the heavens. He brought peace through the blood of his cross.
local: Ʋ Bʋa dembike wɩa ta Ŋmɩŋ yi jadieke mana dɩ benne ŋmɩŋsikpeŋ aŋaŋ tɩŋgbaŋ dɩ yiŋŋi yi ʋ zʋalɩŋ aŋaŋ sʋgɩfɩalɩŋ; ta zɩŋ dieke die dɩ nyɩna ʋ Bʋa dembike ma wa dagarɩkʋ ma wa wɩa ʋ yi sʋgɩfɩalɩŋ dɩ beri tɩnɩŋ aŋaŋ wʋnɩŋ sʋnsʋŋ.

eng: Once you were alienated from God and you were enemies with him in your minds, which was shown by your evil actions.
local: Saŋŋa kaanɩ, nɩ sʋŋanyilibɩatɩ aŋaŋ nɩ tʋmbɩatɩ die yine nɩ Ŋmɩŋ dataasɩ, ta nɩ yʋa aŋaŋ wa.

eng: But now he has reconciled you by his physical body through death, to present you before God as a people who are holy, faultless, and without blame.
local: ama lele nɩŋ, ʋ Bʋa dembike nyɩŋgbanɩŋ kumbu dagarɩkʋ ma wɩa ʋ bɩ yi nɩ ʋ zʋalɩŋ dɩ ʋ nagɩ nɩ aŋ nɩ yi sʋgɩyɩalɩntieliŋ, ta wome dɩgɩntɩ, yaa bɩaŋ, ta keŋ ʋ jigiŋ.

eng: But you need to remain well established and rooted in faith and not shift away from the hope given in the good news that you heard. This message has been preached throughout all creation under heaven. And I, Paul, became a servant of this good news.
local: Ama sie nɩ kpaŋŋɩ nɩ gbaŋ aŋaŋ wusie ta bemme nɩ yadaka ma ta zie keŋ keŋ, ta daa tarɩ a nyɩŋ nɩ tamaka ma, tama dieke die nɩ yene saŋŋa dieke nɩ wʋnna wʋvɩɩnaha; ta die ba mʋʋlɩ wʋvɩɩnaha a yɩ vuota mana wa tɩŋgbaŋka gie me; ta manɩŋ Pɔɔli yiwo ka tʋntʋntɩba wʋnyɩ wa.

eng: Now Im happy to be suffering for you. Im completing what is missing from Christs sufferings with my own body. Im doing this for the sake of his body, which is the church.
local: Lele nɩŋ n wa yaa sʋgɩfɩalɩŋ n dinene wahala nɩ wɩa wa, dama wahala dieke n dinene, n tʋma kpata wa wahala dieke Masia dɩ nagɩna zie dɩ n dii wo, ʋ nyɩŋgbaŋ dieke dɩ yine ʋ dɩdɩɩsɩrɩba wa.

eng: I became a servant of the church by Gods commission, which was given to me for you, in order to complete Gods word.
local: Ta Ŋmɩŋ dieke dɩ yɩna mɩŋ tʋʋmaha dɩ tʋŋ wa, wʋnɩŋ ʋ yine mɩŋ Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrɩba mi yɔmʋ nɩ suŋŋiŋ wɩa, dɩ vuosi sɩmma Ŋmɩŋ wɩaha.

eng: Im completing it with a secret plan that has been hidden for ages and generations but which has now been revealed to his holy people.
local: Wɩaha yiwo wʋlɔbɩrɩ diekemba Ŋmɩŋ dɩ nagɩna a lɔbɩrɩ vuota saŋŋa kaanɩ, ta buuriŋ mana dɩ ka sɩba ha, ama ta lele ʋ wa yuori dagɩ ʋ vuosi.

eng: God wanted to make the glorious riches of this secret plan known among the Gentiles, which is Christ living in you, the hope of glory.
local: Ŋmɩŋ saŋya dɩ ʋ yuori wʋlɔbɩrɩka wɩaha a dagɩ ʋ vuosisi mɩŋ. Ʋ wʋlɔbɩrɩka wɩaha faasɩ vɩɩna mɩŋ, ta yaa nyʋarɩ a yɩ vuota mana. Dɩ daga dɩ Masia bie nɩ ma, die wɩa, nɩ yaa tama dɩ nɩ nan daansɩ gʋtɩ a bie Ŋmɩŋ chuulikpeŋkpɩɩkʋ ma.

eng: This is what we preach as we warn and teach every person with all wisdom so that we might present each one mature in Christ.
local: Die wɩa, Masia wa wɩa tɩ mʋʋla, ta kpaama vuoŋ mana, ta naga yɩaŋ yiri yiri mana a daga vuoŋ mana, dɩ tɩ yi aŋ vuoŋ mana hagɩrɩma ʋ Masia dɩɩsɩŋ ma, ta nagɩ ba a yɩ Ŋmɩŋ.

eng: I work hard and struggle for this goal with his energy, which works in me powerfully.
local: Naa wɩa, maŋ ko kpaŋŋa n gbaŋ aŋaŋ hagɩrɩ dieke mana Masia dɩ yɩ mɩŋ ta bʋ dala wa.

eng: I want you to know how much I struggle for you, for those in Laodicea, and for all who havent known me personally.
local: N yaala nɩ sɩmma n kpaŋŋɩnana n gbaŋ nɩ wɩa aŋaŋ Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrɩ diekemba dɩ benne Lodisia tɩŋ ma, aŋaŋ vuodiekemba dɩ yene ka ye mɩŋ ma dene.

eng: My goal is that their hearts would be encouraged and united together in love so that they might have all the riches of assurance that come with understanding, so that they might have the knowledge of the secret plan of God, namely Christ.
local: N yaala ba sʋgɩtɩ hagɩrɩma, ta ba lagɩsɩ taŋ aŋaŋ choti, ta sɩmma Masia wɩaha chɩasɩ, ta yi wo yada aŋaŋ wusie, ta ye sʋgɩfɩalɩ dieke vuosi dɩ ŋaana ye ba keŋ sɩba Ŋmɩŋ wɩaha chɩasɩ dene, ta sɩmma Ŋmɩŋ wʋlɔbɩrɩkɩrɩ dieke dɩ yine Masia wa.

eng: All the treasures of wisdom and knowledge are hidden in him.
local: ʋ nyɩɩna ma yalla wusie yɩaŋ aŋaŋ sɩbɩŋ.

eng: Im telling you this so that no one deceives you with convincing arguments.
local: Die wɩa maŋ bala nɩ naa, nɩ daa vaa vuoŋ nagɩ nʋanansɩŋ a gaaŋ nɩ.

eng: because even though I am absent physically, Im with you in spirit. Im happy to see the discipline and stability of your faith in Christ.
local: dama n wone nɩ jigiŋ aŋaŋ n nyɩŋgbanɩŋ naa, ama n yile nɩ wɩa saŋŋa mana ta n baga dɩ bie nɩ ma, ta n sʋŋ dɩ fɩalɩ aŋaŋ nɩ, ta ye nɩ benne vɩɩnɩŋ dene wo, aŋaŋ nɩ yine Masia yada aŋaŋ wusie dene wo.

eng: So live in Christ Jesus the Lord in the same way as you received him.
local: Die nɩ tuone Yisa Masia dɩ ʋ yiwo nɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ wo, nɩ bemme ʋ ma dene.

eng: Be rooted and built up in him, be established in faith, and overflow with thanksgiving just as you were taught.
local: ta vaa nɩ yada dagɩrɩsɩ sʋʋŋ ʋ ma, ta nɩ yada bie ʋ ma ta yaa hagɩrɩŋ sɩba ba dagɩna nɩ dene wo, ta waasɩma wa saŋŋa mana.

eng: See to it that nobody enslaves you with philosophy and foolish deception, which conform to human traditions and the way the world thinks and acts rather than Christ.
local: Die wɩa, nɩ daa vaa vuoŋ nagɩ vuota yɩaŋ a gaaŋ nɩ; wudieke dɩ kana ka taasɩ aŋaŋ Masia, ama ta yi tɩŋgbaŋka gie yɩaŋ aŋaŋ vuota dagɩŋ.

eng: All the fullness of deity lives in Christs body.
local: Dama Masia nyɩŋgbanɩŋ ma Ŋmɩŋ beriŋ dɩ beri.

eng: And you have been filled by him, who is the head of every ruler and authority.
local: ta nɩ tuo wusie miivolike nɩ taasɩna aŋaŋ wa wɩa. Wʋnɩŋ ʋ yine sikpeŋ tieliŋ aŋaŋ hagɩrɩtieliŋ mana jakʋʋŋ.

eng: In him you were also circumcised with a circumcision not administered by human hands. The circumcision of Christ is realized in the stripping away of the whole self dominated by sin.
local: Nɩnɩŋ aŋaŋ wʋnɩŋ beriŋ wɩa nɩ tuo kɔlagobiŋ, ama ka ka yi vuota dɩ nagɩna nuuŋ a gobi nɩ nyɩŋgbanɩŋ wa. Masia gobiku die vʋarɩna tɩ a nyɩŋ bɩaŋ ma wa.

eng: You were buried with him through baptism and raised with him through faith in the power of God, who raised him from the dead.
local: dama saŋŋa dieke ba sɩna nɩ Ŋmɩŋ nyaabʋ die nɩ gʋtɩ wa Masia ma ba guu nɩ, ta nɩ bɩ hagɩ aŋaŋ wa nɩ nyaabʋ sɩɩlaha ma, nɩ yada dieke dɩ benne Ŋmɩŋ hagɩrɩŋ tʋʋma dieke dɩ sʋgɩrɩna Masia a nyɩŋ kumbu me wo wɩa.

eng: When you were dead because of the things you had done wrong and because your body wasnt circumcised, God made you alive with Christ and forgave all the things you had done wrong.
local: Saŋŋa dieke dɩ tɩanna wa, die nɩ yiwo sɩba kunti nɩ bɩaŋ wɩa aŋaŋ die nɩ kana ka yi Juu vuosi wɩa, ta die bɩ wo mɩraha. Ama lele, Ŋmɩŋ yɩ nɩ miivoli mɩŋ, ta nagɩ nɩ bɩaŋ a chaa nɩ Masia ma.

eng: He destroyed the record of the debt we owed, with its requirements that worked against us. He canceled it by nailing it to the cross.
local: Saŋŋa dieke ba kpaasɩna wa dagarɩkʋ ma wa, die ʋ kpisi tɩ bɩaŋ hamɩŋ dieke dɩ maagɩ a dʋaŋ yaa gamma mɩraha ma mɩŋ.

eng: When he disarmed the rulers and authorities, he exposed them to public disgrace by leading them in a triumphal parade.
local: Dagarɩkʋ ma wɩa Masia die dɩ chʋʋsɩ Sitaani aŋaŋ haalɩbɩatɩ hagɩrɩŋ mana, ta yaa ʋ nyaŋŋɩna ba dene wo siara a keŋ nyɩŋ yaalɩŋ ma.

eng: So dont let anyone judge you about eating or drinking or about a festival, a new moon observance, or sabbaths.
local: Die wɩa, nɩ daa vaa vuoŋ zieŋ mɩra yaa gamma jadieke nɩ baaŋ dɩ die ta nyuo, nɩ daa vaa vuoŋ vʋarɩma nɩ dʋʋga daavɩɩna, yaa chɩɩhaalɩŋ dʋʋga yaa davʋʋsɩkɩrɩ daraa a yɩa nɩ.

eng: These religious practices are only a shadow of what was coming—the body that cast the shadow is Christ.
local: Hanɩŋ mɩraha gie mana die yiwo ligisiŋ ta daga dɩ vuoŋ kieŋ; die vuoke yiwo Masia.

eng: Dont let anyone who wants to practice harsh self-denial and worship angels rob you of the prize. They go into detail about what they have seen in visions and have become unjustifiably arrogant by their selfish way of thinking.
local: Dɩɩ yi vuoŋ dɩ baarɩ ʋ tɩaŋ wa ʋ chanchaalɩŋ ta ka gʋʋra ta yese daansa ta yaala nɩ sʋʋŋ nɩ gbaŋ a jɩama malakasi, nɩ daa saagɩ, die nan chʋʋsɩ nɩ. Vuoke mi kɔtɩ wa ʋ gbaŋ ʋ sʋŋanyile me, ta ka wo chɩaŋ;.

eng: They dont stay connected to the head. The head nourishes and supports the whole body through the joints and ligaments, so the body grows with a growth that is from God.
local: ʋ ka bɩ pɔgɩlɩ Masia; Masia yine ʋ vuosi sikpeŋ ta lagɩsɩ ba ba taasɩ aŋaŋ taŋ ta sɩɩ sɩba nyɩŋgbanɩŋ gbeme aŋaŋ ka gɩrɩsɩ, wʋnɩŋ Masia yɩnana ba nyindiike, ta ba gʋta sɩba Ŋmɩŋ dɩ yaalala dene wo.

eng: If you died with Christ to the way the world thinks and acts, why do you submit to rules and regulations as though you were living in the world?.
local: Nɩ kpiye mɩŋ aŋaŋ Masia, ta ʋ gbatɩ nɩ a nyɩŋ tɩŋgbaŋka gie haalɩtɩ hagɩrɩŋ ma, bɩa wɩa nɩ ye beri sɩba nɩ ye yiwo tɩŋgbaŋka gie sɩɩtɩ? Bɩa wɩa nɩ nagɩ nɩ gbaŋ a yɩ mɩrɩ dieke dɩ bala dɩ.

eng: Dont handle! Dont taste! Dont touch.
local: Da keŋ pɔgɩlɩ jaabʋ gie, yaa Daa keŋ laŋ jaabʋ gie yaa Daa keŋ gbi jaabʋ gie.

eng: All these things cease to exist when they are used. Such rules are human commandments and teachings.
local: Nyinti gie mana vuota nan nagɩha a tʋŋ tʋʋma aŋ ka chʋʋsɩ ta kaaŋ yʋasɩ. Mɩraha gie mana yiwo vuota dagɩŋ.

eng: They look like they are wise with this self-made religion and their self-denial by the harsh treatment of the body, but they are no help against indulging in selfish immoral behavior.
local: Ka seŋ yi wusie, mɩraha chanchaalɩŋ nɩasɩ wa wudieke dɩ yalla yɩaŋ, ama ta wo, ba jɩama ba yaala dene, ta gaama dɩ ba sʋʋna ba gbaŋ tɩŋgbaŋ, ta mugise ba nyɩŋgbanɩŋ, ama dɩɩ yi vuoŋ dɩdɩ wɩaha mana, ka kaaŋ bɩagɩ suŋŋi wo aŋ ʋ mɩŋŋɩ pɔgɩlɩ ʋ nyɩŋgbanɩŋ a nyɩŋ nyɩŋgbanɩŋ lɔlɩbɩatɩ yiile me.

eng: Therefore, if you were raised with Christ, look for the things that are above where Christ is sitting at Gods right side.
local: Die nɩ hagɩya mɩŋ aŋaŋ Masia a nyɩŋ kuŋ me, die wɩa nɩ nagɩ nɩ sʋgɩtɩ a taasɩ aŋaŋ arɩzanna ma nyinti, jigidieke Masia dɩ kalla Ŋmɩŋ nuudiigiŋ chaaŋ.

eng: Think about the things above and not things on earth.
local: Nɩ vaa nɩ sʋgɩtɩ bemme mi nyinti ma, ama daa tɩŋgbaŋka gie nyinti ma.

eng: You died, and your life is hidden with Christ in God.
local: dama die nɩ wɔŋ kpie mɩŋ aŋaŋ Masia, ta nɩ miivoli bie aŋaŋ wa Ŋmɩŋ jigiŋ.

eng: When Christ, who is your life, is revealed, then you also will be revealed with him in glory.
local: Masia vuodieke dɩ yɩnana tɩ miivoli wo saŋŋa dieke ʋ keŋ nyɩŋ yaalɩŋ ma, nɩ gbaŋ nɩ nan daansɩ gʋtɩ nyɩŋ aŋaŋ wa ʋ chaankpeŋkpɩɩŋ ma.

eng: So put to death the parts of your life that belong to the earth, such as sexual immorality, moral corruption, lust, evil desire, and greed .
local: Die wɩa, nɩ vaa tɩŋgbaŋka gie lɔla dɩ tʋnnana tʋʋma nɩ ma wa, ataŋ yine daakpana aŋaŋ hɔgʋkpana tʋʋma, aŋaŋ dɩgɩntɩ, aŋaŋ lɔlɩbɩatɩ, aŋaŋ sʋŋanyilibɩatɩ aŋaŋ halɩ. Halɩ yiwo bugile kaabɩŋ buuriŋ.

eng: The wrath of God is coming upon disobedient people because of these things.
local: Wɩaha gie wɩa Ŋmɩŋ sɩnyɩɩrɩŋ nan dɩ bie vuodiekemba dɩ kana ka tuose ʋ nʋarɩ ma.

eng: You used to live this way, when you were alive to these things.
local: Saŋŋa dieke dɩ tɩanna wa die nyinti gie die sɩna nɩ, ta nɩ bie ka ma.

eng: But now set aside these things, such as anger, rage, malice, slander, and obscene language.
local: Ama lele nɩ mʋ nɩ vaa nyinti gie mana a taaŋ mɩŋ; a yine sɩnyɩɩrɩŋ aŋaŋ lɔlɩbɩatɩ aŋaŋ haasa. Nɩ daa vaa juume yaa wʋbalɩkɩ bɩatɩ nyɩma nɩ nʋa ma.

eng: Dont lie to each other. Take off the old human nature with its practices.
local: Nɩ da chɩbɩma wɩa a yɩma taŋ, dama nɩ vaa wɩaha gie mana die dɩ benne nɩ berikʋʋrɩ ma mɩŋ;.

eng: and put on the new nature, which is renewed in knowledge by conforming to the image of the one who created it.
local: ta wa nagɩ berihaalɩŋ. Berihaalɩkʋ gie ta Ŋmɩŋ vuodieke dɩ naanna ka wa dɩ yie ke jahaalɩŋ saŋŋa mana, ta ka nɩasa ʋ gbaŋ gbaŋ beriŋ, dɩ ʋ yi aŋ nɩ seŋ sɩmma wa aŋaŋ wusie.

eng: In this image there is neither Greek nor Jew, circumcised nor uncircumcised, barbarian, Scythian, slave nor free, but Christ is all things and in all people.
local: Die wɩa puole bɩ wori vuodiekemba dɩ yine Juu vuosi aŋaŋ vuodiekemba dɩ kana ka yi Juu vuosi sʋnsʋŋ; vuodiekemba dɩ gobine ba kɔla aŋaŋ vuodiekemba dɩ kana ka gobiye mana puole bɩ wori ba sʋnsʋŋ; puole bɩ wo haagɩŋ vuosi aŋaŋ tɩka vuosi sʋŋ; ta bɩ wo yɔŋɩsɩ aŋaŋ vuodiekemba dɩ sɩna ba gbaŋ sʋŋ, ama nɩ mana yiwo Masia sɩɩtɩ, ta ʋ bie nɩ mana ma.

eng: Therefore, as Gods choice, holy and loved, put on compassion, kindness, humility, gentleness, and patience.
local: Ŋmɩŋ cho nɩ mɩŋ ta yi nɩ ʋ vuovʋarɩka ta nɩ yi ʋ vuokasɩmba. Die wɩa nɩ bemme sɔmm, ta chɩgɩma zɔɔlɩŋ ta sʋʋŋ nɩ gbaŋ tɩŋgbaŋ ta yallɩma suguru.

eng: Be tolerant with each other and, if someone has a complaint against anyone, forgive each other. As the Lord forgave you, so also forgive each other.
local: Nɩ dime suguru aŋaŋ taŋ, ta dɩɩ yi vuoŋ dɩ yaa wɩɩŋ aŋaŋ ʋ chanchaaŋ ba nagɩ chaa taŋ. Dɩ mʋ nɩ nagɩ chama taŋ sɩba tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ nagɩna chaa nɩ dene wo.

eng: And over all these things put on love, which is the perfect bond of unity.
local: Genhe mana ma nɩ nagɩ choti a gʋtɩ, kanɩŋ ka bɔbɩna wɩaha mana a lagɩŋ taŋ aŋaŋ wusie.

eng: The peace of Christ must control your hearts—a peace into which you were called in one body. And be thankful people.
local: Nɩ wʋnyɩ mana gʋtɩ wa Masia nyɩŋgbaŋka ma ta Ŋmɩŋ dɩ vʋarɩ nɩ dɩ nɩ lagɩsɩ bemme aŋaŋ sʋgɩfɩalɩŋ. Die wɩa nɩ vaa Masia sʋgɩfɩalɩkʋ dagɩma nɩ sʋŋanyile ta bɩrɩma Ŋmɩŋ saŋŋa mana.

eng: The word of Christ must live in you richly. Teach and warn each other with all wisdom by singing psalms, hymns, and spiritual songs. Sing to God with gratitude in your hearts.
local: Dɩ yiwo talasɩ dɩ Masia wɩaha gie bemme nɩ sʋgɩtɩ ma vɩɩnɩŋ vɩɩnɩŋ, aŋ nɩ dagɩma taŋ, ta bɩ kpaama taŋ aŋaŋ nɩ sʋŋanyile mana; ta chɩama Ŋmɩŋ gbaŋkʋ yɩla, aŋaŋ Ŋmɩŋ bɩrɩŋ yɩla, aŋaŋ Halɩkasɩka yɩla, ta chɩama yɩla aŋaŋ waasɩŋ nɩ sʋgɩtɩ ma a yɩma Ŋmɩŋ.

eng: Whatever you do, whether in speech or action, do it all in the name of the Lord Jesus and give thanks to God the Father through him.
local: Die wɩa, wudieke mana nɩ yinene, yaa wudiekemba nɩ bala, nɩ yime tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Yisa saaŋ ma, ta waasɩma tɩ Chɔɔŋ Ŋmɩŋ ʋ wɩa.

eng: Wives, submit to your husbands in a way that is appropriate in the Lord.
local: Hɔgʋba, nɩ nagɩ nɩ gbaŋ a yɩ nɩ chʋllɩŋ, sɩba dɩ yine talasɩ dɩ Masia vuosi yime die wo.

eng: Husbands, love your wives and dont be harsh with them.
local: Dembisi, nɩ chome nɩ hɔgʋba ta da pɔgɩlɩma ba aŋaŋ tʋaŋ.

eng: Children, obey your parents in everything, because this pleases the Lord.
local: Ballɩ, nɩ tuosime nɩ tieliŋ nʋa saŋŋa mana, dama die fɩala Ŋmɩŋ sʋŋ.

eng: Parents, dont provoke your children in a way that ends up discouraging them.
local: Chʋalɩŋ, nɩ da vaa nɩ ballɩ sɩnyɩɩrɩŋ hagɩma, nɩ yi die ba kaaŋ bɩ yaa kpaŋŋɩ n gbaŋ.

eng: Slaves, obey your masters on earth in everything. Dont just obey like people pleasers when they are watching. Instead, obey with the single motivation of fearing the Lord.
local: Yɔŋɩsɩ, nɩ tuosime nɩ tieliŋ nʋa jaaŋ mana ma, aŋ ka daa yi saŋŋa dieke ba kenne daansa nɩ nyɩɩna ma, dɩ nɩ fɩalɩ ba sʋgɩtɩ aŋ ba bɩrɩma nɩ, ama nɩ tʋma aŋaŋ nɩŋŋmɩna saŋŋa mana, dama nɩ yinene tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ jɩlɩma wɩa.

eng: Whatever you do, do it from the heart for the Lord and not for people.
local: Wudieke mana nɩ yinene nɩ yime aŋaŋ nɩŋŋmɩna sɩba nɩ yie a yɩa wa tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ daa vuota.

eng: You know that you will receive an inheritance as a reward. You serve the Lord Christ.
local: Tɩɩnsɩma dɩ tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ wo nan daansɩ yɩ nɩ nyʋarɩ dieke dɩ yine ʋ vuosi sɩɩtɩ arɩzanna ma, dama Masia yine wusie Yɔmʋtieŋ ta nɩ yie a yɩa wa.

eng: But evildoers will receive their reward for their evil actions. There is no discrimination.
local: Wʋbɩayiiru dɩaŋ nan daansɩ tuo ʋ wʋbɩatɩ tɩbɩdatɩŋ ʋ yinene wudieke wo wɩa, dama Ŋmɩŋ nan keŋ datɩ ʋ tɩbɩŋ ta lugiŋ wori.

eng: Masters, be just and fair to your slaves, knowing that you yourselves have a master in heaven.
local: Yɔmʋtieliŋ, nɩ yime vɩɩnɩŋ a yɩma nɩ yɔŋɩsɩ, ta sɩmma dɩ nɩ gbaŋ yaa wa Yɔmʋtieŋ arɩzanna ma.

eng: Keep on praying and guard your prayers with thanksgiving.
local: Nɩ kpaŋŋɩsɩma nɩ gbaŋ aŋaŋ Ŋmɩŋ jʋʋsɩŋ saŋŋa mana, ta jʋʋsɩma wa aŋaŋ nɩŋŋmɩna, ta waasɩma wa.

eng: At the same time, pray for us also. Pray that God would open a door for the word so we can preach the secret plan of Christ—which is why Im in chains.
local: Ta bɩ jʋʋsɩma Ŋmɩŋ dɩ ʋ yɩ tɩ sievɩɩnɩŋ aŋ tɩ mʋʋlɩma ʋ wɩaha, ta yuori dagɩ Masia lɔbɩrɩŋ wɩaha, dama ka wɩa maŋ bie dansarɩka sʋŋ naa.

eng: Pray that I might be able to make it as clear as I ought to when I preach.
local: Die wɩa nɩ jʋʋsɩma Ŋmɩŋ a yɩma mɩŋ aŋ n bɩagɩ balɩ sɩba n mʋna n mɩŋŋɩ balɩ die wo.

eng: Act wisely toward outsiders, making the most of the opportunity.
local: Nɩ sɩmma nɩ beriŋ aŋaŋ vuodiekemba dɩ kana ka yi Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrɩba, ta nagɩma nɩ saŋŋa a balɩma yɩma ba ʋ wɩa.

eng: Your speech should always be gracious and sprinkled with insight so that you may know how to respond to every person.
local: Dɩ yiwo talasɩ dɩ nɩ wʋbalɩka nansɩma, ta yaa jɩlɩma, ta sɩmma nɩ baaŋ yiŋŋi a balɩ wʋpɩasɩkɩŋ mana aŋ ka tʋgɩsɩ dene a yɩma vuoŋ mana.

eng: Tychicus, our dearly loved brother, faithful minister, and fellow slave in the Lord, will inform you about everything that has happened to me.
local: Tɩ nɩmbʋa choti Tikikusi, vuodieke dɩ yine tɩ wusie tʋntʋntʋ, ta bɩ yi tɩ tʋntʋŋ chanchaaŋ tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ tʋʋma ma nan balɩ nɩ yaa gamma n wɩa.

eng: This is why I sent him to you, so that youll know all about us and so he can encourage your hearts.
local: Die wɩa maŋ tʋma wa nɩ jigiŋ dɩ ʋ keŋ kpaŋŋɩsɩ nɩ, ta balɩ nɩ yaa gamma tɩ mana dɩ bemme dene.

eng: I sent him with Onesimus, our faithful and dearly loved brother, who is one of you. They will let you know about everything here.
local: Ʋ kieŋ mɩŋ aŋaŋ tɩ nɩmbʋa choti Onisimusi vuodieke dɩ yine yada ta ʋ yi nɩ wʋnyɩ wa. Ba nan balɩ wudieke dɩ yinene giena.

eng: Aristarchus, my fellow prisoner, says hello to you. So does Mark, Barnabas cousin .
local: Arisitakusi vuodieke dɩ benne dansarɩka ma aŋaŋ mɩŋ wa waasa nɩ, ta Banabasi wara bʋadembiŋ Maki gbaŋ waasa nɩ.

eng: Jesus, called Justus, also says hello. These are my only fellow workers for Gods kingdom who are Jewish converts. They have been an encouragement to me.
local: Josua vuodieke ba bɩna wasa Jusitusi gbaŋ waasa nɩ. Vuosi bataa wa gie nyɩɩna ma yine Juu vuodiekemba dɩ dɩna Masia ta lagɩsɩ tʋma aŋaŋ mɩŋ Ŋmɩŋ naarɩ tʋʋma ma. Banɩŋ ba yiwo vuodieke dɩ suŋŋine mɩŋ pam.

eng: Epaphras, who is one of you, says hello. Hes a slave of Christ Jesus who always wrestles for you in prayers so that you will stand firm and be fully mature and complete in the entire will of God.
local: Eparasi, vuodieke dɩ yine nɩ wʋnyɩ wa ta yi Masia tʋntʋntʋ wa waasa nɩ. Ʋ jʋʋsa Ŋmɩŋ aŋaŋ nɩŋŋmɩna saŋŋa mana a yɩa nɩ dɩ Ŋmɩŋ vaa aŋ nɩ mɩŋŋɩ zie keŋ keŋ ta yi sɩsɩbɩrɩŋ ta yie Ŋmɩŋ dɩ yaalala dene.

eng: I can vouch for him that he has worked hard for you and for those in Laodicea and Hierapolis.
local: N dii wo siara dɩ ʋ seŋ faasɩ tʋma aŋaŋ nɩŋŋmɩna a suŋŋe nɩnɩŋ aŋaŋ Lodisia tɩŋ aŋaŋ Hirapolisi tɩŋ vuosi.

eng: Luke, the dearly loved physician, and Demas say hello.
local: N nɩmbʋa choti Luki vuodieke dɩ yine dɔgɩta wa, wʋnɩŋ aŋaŋ Demasi waasa nɩ.

eng: Say hello to the brothers and sisters in Laodicea, along with Nympha and the church that meets in her house.
local: Nɩ waasɩ tɩ nɩmballɩ choti diekemba dɩ benne Lodisia, ta bɩ waasɩ tɩ taa Nimifa aŋaŋ Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrɩba dɩ lagɩsɩnana ʋ tigiri me wo ta jɩama Ŋmɩnnɩ.

eng: After this letter has been read to you publicly, make sure that the church in Laodicea reads it and that you read the one from Laodicea.
local: Nɩ keŋ karɩŋ gbaŋkʋ gie a kpatɩ, nɩ kpaŋŋɩ nɩ gbaŋ a nagɩ a yɩ Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrɩ diekemba dɩ benne Lodisia ma aŋ ba karɩŋ, ta bɩ karɩŋ Lodisia vuosi gbaŋ dieke die n maagɩna a yɩ ba wa.

eng: And tell Archippus, See to it that you complete the ministry that you received in the Lord.
local: Nɩ balɩ Akipusi dɩ ʋ kpaŋŋɩ ʋ gbaŋ ta tʋmma tʋŋ dieke tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ dɩ nagɩna a yɩ wa wa vɩɩnɩŋ.

eng: I, Paul, am writing this greeting personally. Remember that Im in prison. Grace be with you.
local: Lele manɩŋ Pɔɔli maagɩnana kpatɩkʋ wɩaha gie aŋaŋ n gbaŋ gbaŋ n nuuŋ. Manɩŋ n waasa nɩ. Nɩ da daaŋ dɩ nɩ jʋʋsɩma Ŋmɩŋ a yɩma mɩŋ n benne dansarɩka ma wa. Ŋmɩŋ suŋŋi nɩ.

eng: From Paul, Silvanus, and Timothy. To the Thessalonians church that is in God the Father and the Lord Jesus Christ. Grace and peace to all of you.
local: Manɩŋ Pɔɔli aŋaŋ Silasi aŋaŋ Timoti maagɩnana gbaŋkʋ gie a yɩa Yisa Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrɩ diekemba dɩ benne Tesalonika tɩŋ ma ta yi tɩ Chɔɔŋ Ŋmɩŋ aŋaŋ tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Yisa Masia vuovʋarɩkaha; wʋnɩŋ Ŋmɩŋ suŋŋi nɩ, ta bɩ yɩ nɩ sʋgɩdʋagɩŋ.

eng: We always thank God for all of you when we mention you constantly in our prayers.
