local: Tɩ waasa Ŋmɩŋ saŋŋa mana nɩ mana wɩa, ta tɩɩnsa nɩ wɩa tɩ Ŋmɩŋ jʋʋsɩŋ ma.

eng: This is because we remember your work that comes from faith, your effort that comes from love, and your perseverance that comes from hope in our Lord Jesus Christ in the presence of our God and Father.
local: Ŋmɩŋ, vuodieke dɩ yine tɩ Chɔɔŋ wa nɩŋŋa, tɩ tɩɩnsa nɩ yine wo yada ta tʋma tʋnvɩɩna, aŋaŋ nɩ choti die dɩ vana nɩ tʋma aŋaŋ nɩŋŋmɩna dene wo, ta nɩ tama dɩ bie tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Yisa Masia ma keŋ keŋ dene.

eng: Brothers and sisters, you are loved by God, and we know that he has chosen you.
local: Tɩ nɩmballɩ, tɩ sɩba a baarɩ dɩ Ŋmɩŋ cho nɩ mɩŋ ta vʋarɩ nɩ dɩ nɩ yi ʋ vuosi.

eng: We know this because our good news didnt come to you just in speech but also with power and the Holy Spirit and with deep conviction. You know as well as we do what kind of people we were when we were with you, which was for your sake.
local: dama wʋvɩɩnaha die ka yi nʋaŋ wʋbalɩka nyɩɩna ma tɩ keŋ nagɩ yɩ nɩ, ama die ka yaa wa Halɩkasɩka hagɩrɩŋ, ta die tɩ balaha ta ka chɩɩlɩya. Nɩ sɩba tɩ beriŋ dɩ sɩna die aŋaŋ tɩ suŋŋine nɩ die saŋŋa dieke die tɩ benne nɩ jigiri.

eng: You became imitators of us and of the Lord when you accepted the message that came from the Holy Spirit with joy in spite of great suffering.
local: Die nɩ tuone Ŋmɩŋ wɩaha, die nɩ chaansa tɩ mɩŋ tɩ dɩna tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ dene wo, ta die dii wahala ama Halɩkasɩka die yɩ nɩ wa sʋgɩfɩalɩŋ.

eng: As a result you became an example to all the believers in Macedonia and Achaia.
local: Die wɩa nɩ beriŋ die dɩ yi dagɩtɩ a yɩ tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ dɩdɩɩsɩrɩ diekemba mana dɩ benne Masedonia aŋaŋ Akaya tɩŋgbaŋɩsɩ ma wa ba mʋna ba bemme dene.

eng: The message about the Lord rang out from you, not only in Macedonia and Achaia but in every place. The news about your faithfulness to God has spread so that we dont even need to mention it.
local: Dama tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ wʋvɩɩnaha die nyɩŋ nɩ jigiŋ mɩŋ ta dɩa a ga Masedonia aŋaŋ Akaya tɩŋgbaŋɩsɩ ma, a bɩ gʋtɩ, nɩ yine Ŋmɩŋ yada dene wo wɔŋ ga lʋga mana mɩŋ. Die wɩa dɩ ka bɩ yi talasɩ dɩ tɩ balɩma wɩɩŋ ba jigiŋ.

eng: People tell us about what sort of welcome we had from you and how you turned to God from idols. As a result, you are serving the living and true God.
local: Vuosi gie mana bala yaa gamma die nɩ mɩŋŋɩna a tuo tɩ chaantɩ dene saŋŋa dieke tɩ kenne nɩ jigiri, aŋaŋ nɩ vana nɩ bugile ta keŋ Ŋmɩŋ jigiŋ dene, dɩ nɩ jɩaŋ wʋnɩŋ Ŋmɩŋ, vuodieke dɩ yine wusietieŋ Ŋmɩnnɩ aŋaŋ miivolitieŋ wo.

eng: and you are waiting for his Son from heaven. His Son is Jesus, who is the one he raised from the dead and who is the one who will rescue us from the coming wrath.
local: ta chɩɩsa ʋ bʋa Yisa Masia, vuodieke die ʋ sʋgɩrɩna a nyɩŋ kumbu me wo, dɩ ʋ nyɩŋ arɩzanna ma a keŋ, wʋnɩŋ ʋ gbatɩna tɩ a nyɩŋ wʋnɩŋ Ŋmɩŋ sɩnyɩɩrɩ dieke dɩ kienene tɩ ma wa.

eng: As you yourselves know, brothers and sisters, our visit with you wasnt a waste of time.
local: N nɩmballɩ, nɩ gbaŋ nɩ sɩba dɩ die tɩ kenne kaagɩ nɩ wa die ka ka yi yɔrɩ.

eng: On the contrary, we had the courage through God to speak Gods good news in spite of a lot of opposition, although we had already suffered and were publicly insulted in Philippi, as you know.
local: Nɩ sɩba die tɩ dine wahala dene Filipi tɩŋ ma, ta ba zɩa tɩ, ama die tɩ kenne nɩ jigiri, die tɩ yaa wa sʋgɩhagɩrɩ dieke dɩ nyɩna Ŋmɩŋ jigiŋ dɩ tɩ mʋʋlɩma wʋvɩɩnaha a yɩma nɩ. Aŋaŋ vuosi pam die dɩ kana ka saaga a yɩa tɩ mana yɔrɩ.

eng: Our appeal isnt based on false information, the wrong motives, or deception.
local: Dama wudieke die tɩ bala nɩ die ka nyɩŋ ŋmɩnchɩbɩsɩ yaa sʋŋanyilibɩatɩ ma, die tɩ ka gaama nɩ.

eng: Rather, we have been examined and approved by God to be trusted with the good news, and thats exactly how we speak. We arent trying to please people, but we are trying to please God, who continues to examine our hearts.
local: ama saŋŋa mana tɩ mʋʋla wudieke Ŋmɩŋ dɩ yaala tɩ mʋʋlɩma mɩŋ, dama ʋ wɔŋ ye tɩ ta tɩ mʋ tɩ pɔgɩlɩma wʋvɩɩnaha mɩŋ. Die wɩa, tɩ ka mʋʋla dɩ tɩ fɩalɩma vuota sʋgɩtɩ, ama tɩ yaala tɩ fɩalɩma Ŋmɩŋ sʋŋ, wʋnɩŋ ʋ magɩsɩnana tɩ sʋgɩtɩ aŋaŋ tɩ sʋŋanyile.

eng: As you know, we never used flattery, and God is our witness that we didnt have greedy motives.
local: Dama nɩ sɩba aŋaŋ wusie dɩ Ŋmɩŋ yiwo tɩ siaratieŋ dɩ die tɩ ka keŋ nɩ jigiŋ aŋaŋ nʋanansɩŋ, yaa aŋaŋ wʋbalɩkɩ dieke dɩ ligine tɩ lɔlɩbɩatɩ.

eng: We didnt ask for special treatment from people—not from you or from others.
local: Die tɩ ka yaala bɩrɩŋ a nyɩnna nɩ jigiŋ yaa vuogaasɩ jigiŋ.

eng: although we could have thrown our weight around as Christs apostles. Instead, we were gentle with you like a nursing mother caring for her own children.
local: Tɩ yine Masia tʋntʋntɩŋ wɩa, die tɩ tɩŋ yaa sieŋ dɩ tɩ balɩ nɩ dɩ nɩ suŋŋi tɩ. Ama die tɩ bie wo sɔmm nɩ jigiri sɩba nuŋ dɩ ŋaana daansa ʋ ballɩ dene wo.

eng: We were glad to share not only Gods good news with you but also our very lives because we cared for you so much.
local: Die tɩ faasɩna cho nɩ wɩa die tɩ mʋʋla Ŋmɩŋ wʋvɩɩnaha a yɩa nɩ; daa die nyɩɩna ma ama die tɩ yiwo siri dɩ tɩ kpi nɩ wɩa, dama tɩ faasɩ cho nɩ mɩŋ.

eng: You remember, brothers and sisters, our efforts and hard work. We preached Gods good news to you, while we worked night and day so we wouldnt be a burden on any of you.
local: Tɩ nɩmballɩ, n yaa tama dɩ nɩ tɩɩnsa tɩ tʋʋma aŋaŋ tɩ wahala diilehe saŋŋa dieke die tɩ benne nɩ jigiŋ a mʋʋla Ŋmɩŋ wʋvɩɩnaha a yɩa nɩ wa. Die tɩ tʋma ŋmɩntʋasɩ aŋaŋ yuŋ amʋ tɩ kaaŋ yi chiiti a yɩ nɩ.

eng: You and God are witnesses of how holy, just, and blameless we were toward you believers.
local: Nɩnɩŋ aŋaŋ Ŋmɩŋ yine tɩ siaratieliŋ yaa gamma die tɩ benne aŋaŋ nɩ aŋaŋ berivɩɩnɩŋ aŋaŋ wusie ta die wo bɩaŋ dene.

eng: Likewise, you know how we treated each of you like a father treats his own children.
local: Nɩ sɩba dɩ die tɩ beri mɩŋ aŋaŋ nɩ wʋnyɩ mana sɩba chɔɔŋ dɩ ŋaana beri aŋaŋ ʋ gbaŋ gbaŋ ballɩ dene wo.

eng: We appealed to you, encouraged you, and pleaded with you to live lives worthy of the God who is calling you into his own kingdom and glory.
local: Die tɩ kpaŋŋɩsa nɩ mɩŋ, ta yie nɩ sʋgɩtɩ dɩ fɩala, ta kpaama nɩ saŋŋa mana dɩ nɩ bemme beri dieke dɩ baaŋ suuli Ŋmɩŋ nine. Wʋnɩŋ ʋ wana nɩ dɩ nɩ keŋ juu ʋ gbaŋ gbaŋ ʋ naarɩ ma aŋaŋ ʋ nansɩkpeŋkpɩɩŋ ma.

eng: We also thank God constantly for this: when you accepted Gods word that you heard from us, you welcomed it for what it truly is. Instead of accepting it as a human message, you accepted it as Gods message, and it continues to work in you who are believers.
local: Tɩ bɩ waasa Ŋmɩŋ saŋŋa mana dama die tɩ kenne aŋaŋ Ŋmɩŋ wɩaha nɩ jigiri die nɩ wʋŋya mɩŋ ta tuohe; die nɩ ka tuohe sɩba a yiwo vuota wɩa, ama die nɩ tuohe mɩŋ sɩba Ŋmɩŋ wɩa. Ka seŋ yiwo Ŋmɩŋ wɩa, dama nɩ vuodiekemba dɩ yine wo yada wa, wɩaha mi tʋma nɩ sʋgɩtɩ ma mɩŋ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, you became imitators of the churches of God in Judea, which are in Christ Jesus. This was because you also suffered the same things from your own people as they did from the Jews.
local: Tɩ nɩmballɩ, mugisi dieke dɩ haarɩna nɩ naa, kanɩŋ mugisiku mi chanchaaŋ die haarɩ wa vuodiekemba dɩ yine Ŋmɩŋ vuosi Yisa Masia wɩa Judia tɩŋgbaŋ ma; nɩnɩŋ aŋaŋ ba ye wo mugisi balɩmɩŋ. Die nɩ gbaŋ gbaŋ nɩ vuosi dɩ mugisine nɩ dene wo, die gbaŋ gbaŋ mugisiŋ ba vuosisi Juu vuosi die dɩ mugisi be.

eng: They killed both the Lord Jesus and the prophets and drove us out. They dont please God, and they are hostile to the entire human race.
local: Banɩŋ Juu vuosisi die kʋna tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Yisa Masia aŋaŋ Ŋmɩŋ naazʋalɩba, ta bɩ mugisi tɩ wo. Naa wɩa Ŋmɩŋ sʋŋ ka fɩalɩya aŋaŋ ba, ta ba bɩ yi vuoŋ mana dataasɩ.

eng: when they try to stop us from speaking to the Gentiles so they can be saved. Their sins are constantly pushing the limit. Gods wrath has caught up with them in the end.
local: Ba mɩa mɩŋ dɩ ba kagɩ tɩ aŋ tɩ da mʋʋlɩma Ŋmɩŋ wʋvɩɩnaha a yɩma vuodiekemba dɩ kana ka yi Juu vuosisi aŋ ba ye gbatɩtaanɩŋ. Naa dagɩya dɩ ba gʋta ba tʋntʋmbɩatɩ diekemba ba yinene wo mɩŋ. Lele, Ŋmɩŋ sɩnyɩɩrɩŋ hagɩya mɩŋ ba ma, ta ʋ nan datɩ ba tɩba.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we were separated from you for a while physically but not in our hearts. We made every effort in our desire to see you again face-to-face.
local: Tɩ nɩmballɩ, die vuosi dɩ mugisine tɩ wɩa, tɩ nyɩŋ nɩ jigiŋ daraa ale, ama saŋŋa mana tɩ yile nɩ wɩa ta mɩa dɩ tɩ keŋ ye nɩ aŋaŋ tɩ nine.

eng: We wanted to come to you—I, Paul, tried over and over again—and Satan stopped us.
local: Tɩ tɩŋ seŋ yaala tɩ yiŋŋi keŋ ye nɩ mɩŋ. Ta manɩŋ Pɔɔli gbaŋ gbaŋ dɩ mɩa saŋŋa pam dɩ n keŋ nɩ jigiŋ ama Sitaani dɩ kagɩ mɩŋ.

eng: What is our hope, joy, or crown that we can brag about in front of our Lord Jesus when he comes? Isnt it all of you?.
local: Tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Yisa dɩ keŋ keŋ saŋŋa dieke, nɩnɩŋ nɩ bala nɩ yi tɩ tama aŋaŋ tɩ nyʋarɩ, ta nɩ wɩa tɩ baa tɩ keŋ zie ʋ jigiŋ aŋaŋ sʋgɩfɩalɩŋ aŋaŋ kuuliŋ.

eng: You are our glory and joy!.
local: Wusie, nɩ wɩa tɩ yaa saaŋ aŋaŋ sʋgɩfɩalɩŋ.

eng: So then, brothers and sisters, we ask and encourage you in the Lord Jesus to keep living the way you already are and even do better in how you live and please God—just as you learned from us.
local: Die wɩa, tɩ nɩmballɩ, die tɩ wɔŋ kpaaŋ nɩ mɩŋ nɩ mʋna nɩ bemme dene amʋ Ŋmɩŋ sʋŋ nan fɩalɩ. Kanɩŋ beriku mi nɩ beri dene. Lele tɩ jʋʋsa nɩ mɩŋ ta bɩ kpaŋŋɩsa nɩ tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Yisa saaŋ ma dɩ nɩ vaa kanɩŋ beriku mi gʋtɩma.

eng: You know the instructions we gave you through the Lord Jesus.
local: Nɩ sɩba tɩ kpaanna nɩ dene tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Yisa saaŋ ma.

eng: Gods will is that your lives are dedicated to him. This means that you stay away from sexual immorality.
local: Ŋmɩŋ yaala nɩ bemme kasɩ ta vʋarɩ nɩ gbaŋ a nyɩŋ daakpana aŋaŋ hɔgʋkpana tʋʋma ma.

eng: and learn how to control your own body in a pure and respectable way.
local: Nɩ yɩma nɩ hɔgʋba jɩlɩma.

eng: Dont be controlled by your sexual urges like the Gentiles who dont know God.
local: ta da bemme aŋaŋ lɔlɩbɩatɩ sɩba vuodiekemba dɩ kana ka sɩba Ŋmɩŋ dɩ benne dene wo.

eng: No one should mistreat or take advantage of their brother or sister in this issue. The Lord punishes people for all these things, as we told you before and sternly warned you.
local: Vuoŋ da keŋ yime ʋ Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrʋ chanchaaŋ bɩaŋ yaa a nyɩrɩ wa. Tɩ wɔŋ balɩ nɩ mɩŋ ta kpaaŋ nɩ dɩ tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ nan keŋ datɩ vuodiekemba mana dɩ yinene kanɩŋ bɩabʋ mi tɩba.

eng: God didnt call us to be immoral but to be dedicated to him.
local: Ŋmɩŋ wa tɩ mɩŋ dɩ tɩ keŋ bemme kasɩ, ama daa tɩ keŋ a yime daakpana yaa hɔgʋkpana tʋʋma.

eng: Therefore, whoever rejects these instructions isnt rejecting a human authority. They are rejecting God, who gives his Holy Spirit to you.
local: Die wɩa, vuodieke nɩŋ mana dɩ zetine dagɩkʋ gie, ka zeti wo vuota dagɩŋ, ama dɩ yiwo Ŋmɩŋ vuodieke dɩ yɩnana nɩ ʋ Halɩkasɩka ʋ zete.

eng: You dont need us to write about loving your brothers and sisters because God has already taught you to love each other.
local: Dɩ ka bɩ yi nɩŋŋmɩna dɩ tɩ maagɩ a balɩ nɩ yaa gamma taŋ choti wɩa, dama Ŋmɩŋ wɔŋ dagɩ nɩ mɩŋ yaa gamma nɩ mʋna nɩ chome taŋ dene.

eng: In fact, you are doing loving deeds for all the brothers and sisters throughout Macedonia. Now we encourage you, brothers and sisters, to do so even more.
local: Ta nɩnɩŋ nɩ wɔŋ cho nɩ Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrɩŋ chanchaalɩba mana dɩ bene Masedonia tɩŋ ma wa mana. Tɩ nɩmballɩ, tɩ jʋʋsa nɩ mɩŋ dɩ nɩ vaa chotiti mi gʋtɩma yaa gamma.

eng: Aim to live quietly, mind your own business, and earn your own living, just as I told you.
local: Nɩ kpaŋŋɩ nɩ gbaŋ a bemme sɔmm, ta nɩ baga bemme nɩ gbaŋ gbaŋ tʋʋma ma, ta tʋmma a dime, sɩba tɩ wolinne a bala nɩ dene wo.

eng: That way youll behave appropriately toward outsiders, and you wont be in need.
local: amʋ vuodiekemba dɩ kana ka yi Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrɩba nan dɩ yɩa nɩ jɩlɩma, amʋ nɩ kaaŋ dɩ naga nɩ gbaŋ a jalɩma vuoŋ a yaala nɩ nyɩŋyaalɩka.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we want you to know about people who have died so that you wont mourn like others who dont have any hope.
local: Tɩ nɩmballɩ, tɩ yaala nɩ sɩmma wusie yaa gamma Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrɩ diekemba dɩ kpine wo, ta da yallɩma sʋgɩchʋʋsɩŋ sɩba vuodiekemba dɩ wone tama wa.

eng: Since we believe that Jesus died and rose, so we also believe that God will bring with him those who have died in Jesus.
local: Tɩ yi yada mɩŋ dɩ Yisa die kpiye mɩŋ ta bɩ hagɩ kuŋ me. Die wɩa tɩ bɩ yi yada dɩ Ŋmɩŋ nan keŋ yi aŋ Yisa yiŋŋi keŋ aŋaŋ ʋ dɩdɩɩsɩrɩ diekemba die dɩ kpine wo.

eng: What we are saying is a message from the Lord: we who are alive and still around at the Lords coming definitely wont go ahead of those who have died.
local: Tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ dagɩ tɩ wa naa, dɩ ʋ keŋ kieŋ tɩnɩŋ vuodiekemba dɩ bene tɩ miivoli me wo kaaŋ woliŋ vuodiekemba dɩ kpine wo a keŋ tuoli wo.

eng: This is because the Lord himself will come down from heaven with the signal of a shout by the head angel and a blast on Gods trumpet. First, those who are dead in Christ will rise.
local: Dama tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ nan keŋ nyɩŋ arɩzanna ma a keŋ sʋʋŋ aŋaŋ natɩkpeŋkpɩɩŋ, aŋaŋ Ŋmɩŋ malakasi Naaŋ wa lɔlɩŋ, aŋaŋ Ŋmɩŋ kantanɩ kpaŋ, ta vuodiekemba die dɩ yine Masia yada ta kpi wo nan woliŋ hagɩ kuŋ me.

eng: Then, we who are living and still around will be taken up together with them in the clouds to meet with the Lord in the air. That way we will always be with the Lord.
local: Ta ka kʋaŋ chaaŋ tɩnɩŋ vuodiekemba dɩ yene bie tɩ miivoli me nan laŋɩsɩ aŋaŋ ba a ga haarɩ tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ nɩɩŋmaraha ma. A nyɩŋ saŋka mi tɩ nan dɩ beri aŋaŋ wa yaa gamma haahuu.

eng: So encourage each other with these words.
local: Die wɩa nɩ kpaŋŋɩsɩma taŋ aŋaŋ wɩaha gie.

eng: So when we couldnt stand it any longer, we thought it was a good idea to stay on in Athens by ourselves.
local: Die wɩa die tɩ sʋŋ dɩ chʋʋsɩ pam tɩ kana ka bɩagɩ yese nɩ wo, die tɩ saŋ dɩ tɩ wɩarɩ bemme Atensi tɩŋ ma tɩ nyɩɩna ma.

eng: and we sent you Timothy, who is our brother and Gods coworker in the good news about Christ. We sent him to strengthen and encourage you in your faithfulness.
local: ta tʋŋ tɩ nɩmbʋa Timoti vuodieke dɩ yine Ŋmɩŋ tʋntʋntʋ aŋaŋ tɩ yaa gamma Masia wʋvɩɩnaha mʋʋlɩkʋ ma wa, dɩ ʋ keŋ a kpaŋŋɩsɩ nɩ ta vaa nɩ yadaka hagɩrɩma.

eng: We didnt want any of you to be shaken by these problems. You know very well that we were meant to go through this.
local: amʋ nɩ wʋnyɩ kaaŋ yiŋŋi kʋaŋ wahalaka gie wɩa. Nɩ gbaŋ gbaŋ nɩ sɩba dɩ Ŋmɩŋ yɩna sieŋ dɩ vuosi gie mugisi tɩ.

eng: In fact, when we were with you, we kept on predicting that we were going to face problems exactly like what happened, as you know.
local: Dama die tɩ yene bie nɩ jigiri, die tɩ ŋaaŋ bala nɩ mɩŋ dɩ ba nan keŋ mugisi tɩnɩŋ vuodiekemba dɩ yine Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrɩŋ mana, a seŋ keŋ yi die gbaŋ gbaŋ.

eng: Thats why I sent Timothy to find out about your faithfulness when I couldnt stand it anymore. I was worried that the tempter might have tempted you so that our work would have been a waste of time.
local: N sʋgɩchʋʋsɩkʋ faasɩ dala mɩŋ, die wɩa maŋ tʋŋ Timoti dɩ ʋ keŋ a ye nɩ yadaka sɩɩ lalɩa. Dama ŋmaamɩŋ die yalla mɩŋ mɩŋ dɩ dɩ mʋna naa Sitaani die magɩsɩ nɩ mɩŋ nɩ va Masia kʋaŋ dɩɩsɩŋ ta vaa tɩ tʋʋmaha dɩ yi yɔrɩ.

eng: Now Timothy has returned to us from you and has given us good news about your faithfulness and love! He says that you always have good memories about us and that you want to see us as much as we want to see you.
local: Lele, Timoti nyɩŋ nɩ jigiŋ a keŋ mɩŋ, a keŋ balɩ tɩ wʋvɩɩna yaa gamma nɩ yada aŋaŋ nɩ choti wɩa. Ta balɩ tɩ dɩ saŋŋa mana nɩ tɩɩnsa tɩ wɩa vɩɩnɩŋ, ta yaala nɩ ye tɩ sɩba tɩ yaalala tɩ yene nɩ dene wo.

eng: We dont need to write to you about the timing and dates, brothers and sisters.
local: Tɩ nɩmballɩ, dɩ ka yi talasɩ dɩ tɩ maagɩ a balɩ nɩ yaa gamma saŋŋa dieke wɩaha gie dɩ balla a yi.

eng: Because of this, brothers and sisters, we were encouraged in all our distress and trouble through your faithfulness.
local: Tɩ nɩmballɩ, tɩ bie wahala aŋaŋ mugisiŋ mana mana ma mɩŋ, ama Timoti dɩ bala tɩ wudieke wo yaa gamma nɩ yada ma, die dɩ vaa tɩ sʋŋ dɩ dʋa.

eng: You know very well that the day of the Lord is going to come like a thief in the night.
local: Dama nɩ gbaŋ gbaŋ nɩ wɔŋ sɩba dɩ tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ yiŋŋi kieŋku daarɩ nan dɩ sɩɩ sɩba gaarʋ dɩ ŋaana kieŋ yuku dene wo.

eng: For now we are alive if you are standing your ground in the Lord.
local: Lele tɩ nan bɩagɩ a taaŋ jɩa tɩ sɩbɩna dɩ nɩ zie wo keŋ keŋ tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ sieŋ me naa wa.

eng: When they are saying, There is peace and security, at that time sudden destruction will attack them, like labor pains start with a pregnant woman, and they definitely wont escape.
local: Saŋŋa dieke vuosi dɩ keŋ bala dɩ, Sʋgɩdʋagɩŋ aŋaŋ alaafɩa beri wo, kanɩŋ saŋka mi ba baa ba juu wahala ma bʋnyɩ. Kanɩŋ wahalɩka nan keŋ bʋnyɩ sɩba hɔgʋnyuutitieŋ dɩ ŋaana baa ʋ mɩɩrɩ yʋagɩbʋ keŋ bʋnyɩ dene wo, ta ba kaaŋ nyɩŋ bʋ ma.

eng: How can we thank God enough for you, given all the joy we have because of you before our God?.
local: Lele tɩ nan bɩagɩ waasɩ Ŋmɩŋ nɩ wɩa. Tɩ waasa wa aŋaŋ tɩ yalla sʋgɩfɩalɩ dieke nɩ wɩa wʋnɩŋ Ŋmɩŋ nɩŋŋa naa.

eng: But you arent in darkness, brothers and sisters, so the day wont catch you by surprise like a thief.
local: Ama tɩ nɩmballɩ, nɩnɩŋ nɩŋ nɩ wo lɩmɩŋ ma, die wɩa tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ keniŋ daarɩ kaaŋ keŋ pirigi nɩ sɩba gaarʋ keniŋ.

eng: Night and day, we pray more than ever to see all of you in person and to complete whatever you still need for your faith.
local: Yuŋ aŋaŋ ŋmɩntʋasɩ mana tɩ ŋaaŋ jʋʋsa wa mɩŋ aŋaŋ tɩ sʋŋ mana dɩ ʋ vaa tɩ bɩ ye nɩ bɩbra aŋaŋ tɩ nine, amʋ tɩ nan bɩagɩ suŋŋi nɩ aŋ nɩ yadaka hagɩrɩma.

eng: All of you are children of light and children of the day. We dont belong to night or darkness.
local: Nɩ mana yiwo chaanɩŋ ma vuosi, ta bɩ yi ŋmɩntʋasɩ vuosi, tɩ ka yi yuŋ yaa lɩmɩŋ ma vuosi.

eng: Now may our God and Father himself and our Lord Jesus guide us on our way back to you.
local: Tɩ Chɔɔŋ Ŋmɩŋ gbaŋ gbaŋ aŋaŋ tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Yisa Masia yɩ tɩ sieŋ aŋ tɩ bɩagɩ keŋ a kaagɩ nɩ bɩbra.

eng: So then, lets not sleep like the others, but lets stay awake and stay sober.
local: Die wɩa, tɩ da dʋa gʋʋrɩma sɩba vuosi bataŋ dɩ yinene die wo, ama tɩ mʋ tɩ yesime ta mɩŋŋɩ pɔgɩlɩma tɩ gbaŋ.

eng: May the Lord cause you to increase and enrich your love for each other and for everyone in the same way as we also love you.
local: Choti dieke nɩ yalla aŋaŋ tamba wa aŋaŋ vuoŋ mana naa, tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ vaa ka gʋtɩma saŋŋa mana ta keŋ sɩmma sɩba tɩ yalla choti dieke aŋaŋ nɩ wa.

eng: People who sleep sleep at night, and people who get drunk get drunk at night.
local: Dama yuŋ vuosi dɩ gʋʋra ta bataŋ dɩ nyuo daaŋ a buge.

eng: May the love cause your hearts to be strengthened, to be blameless in holiness before our God and Father when our Lord Jesus comes with all his people. Amen.
local: Wʋnɩŋ tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ wo vaa nɩ sʋgɩtɩ hagɩrɩma ta vaa nɩ bemme ta wome bɩaŋ ta yi kasɩ tɩ Chɔɔŋ Ŋmɩŋ nɩŋŋa saŋŋa dieke wʋnɩŋ tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Masia dɩ keŋ keŋ aŋaŋ ʋ vuodiekemba mana dɩ yine ʋ sɩɩtɩ wa.

eng: Since we belong to the day, lets stay sober, wearing faithfulness and love as a piece of armor that protects our body and the hope of salvation as a helmet.
local: Ama tɩnɩŋ nɩŋ tɩ yiwo ŋmɩntʋasɩ ballɩ ta tɩ mʋ tɩ mɩŋŋɩ pɔgɩlɩ tɩ gbaŋ, ta nagɩ yada aŋaŋ choti a yeegi aŋ ka sɩɩ sɩba jakagɩkɩŋ, ta bɩ nagɩ gbatɩtaanɩŋ tamaka a bubi aŋ ka sɩmma sɩba kʋʋtɩ sibubiŋ.

eng: God didnt intend for us to suffer his wrath but rather to possess salvation through our Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Ŋmɩŋ die ka vʋarɩ tɩ dɩ ʋ keŋ datɩ tɩ tɩbɩŋ, ama die ʋ vʋarɩ tɩ dɩ tɩ ye gbatɩtaanɩŋ tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Yisa Masia ma.

eng: Jesus died for us so that, whether we are awake or asleep, we will live together with him.
local: wʋnɩŋ die ʋ tuone tɩ kuŋ a kpi, dɩ dɩɩ yi tɩ kpi yaa tɩ beri tɩ miivoli me ʋ keniŋ saŋka mi, tɩnɩŋ aŋaŋ wa nan lagɩŋ a beri.

eng: So continue encouraging each other and building each other up, just like you are doing already.
local: Die wɩa, nɩ kpaŋŋɩsɩma taŋ ta suŋŋime taŋ sɩba nɩ yinene die lele wo.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we ask you to respect those who are working with you, leading you, and instructing you.
local: Tɩ nɩmballɩ, tɩ jʋʋsa nɩ dɩ nɩ vaa nɩ baga bemme vuodiekemba dɩ tʋnnana tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ tʋʋma nɩ jigiri, ta yi nɩ nɩŋŋandɩɩsɩrɩŋ ʋ sieŋ me, ta kpaama nɩ wa.

eng: Think of them highly with love because of their work. Live in peace with each other.
local: Nɩ pɔgɩlɩ ba aŋaŋ jɩlɩma pam, aŋaŋ choti ba tʋʋmaha wɩa. Ta bemme aŋaŋ sʋgɩdʋagɩŋ aŋaŋ taŋ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we urge you to warn those who are disorderly. Comfort the discouraged. Help the weak. Be patient with everyone.
local: Tɩ nɩmballɩ, tɩ jʋʋsa nɩ dɩ nɩ kpaama walɩnkpɩatieliŋ, ta kpaŋŋɩsɩma vuodiekemba dɩ chɩgɩnana ŋmaamɩŋ, ta suŋŋime wabɩtɩ, ta yallɩma suguru aŋaŋ vuoŋ mana.

eng: Make sure no one repays a wrong with a wrong, but always pursue the good for each other and everyone else.
local: Nɩ da yime bɩaŋ a yɩma vuodiekemba dɩ yine nɩ bɩaŋ, ama nɩ vaa aŋ ka yi nɩ sɩŋsaŋmɩŋ saŋŋa mana dɩ nɩ yime vɩɩnɩŋ a yɩma taŋ aŋaŋ vuoŋ mana.

eng: Rejoice always.
local: Nɩ yallɩma sʋgɩfɩalɩŋ saŋŋa mana.

eng: Pray continually.
local: ta jʋʋsɩma Ŋmɩŋ saŋŋa mana.

eng: Give thanks in every situation because this is Gods will for you in Christ Jesus.
local: ta waasɩma Ŋmɩŋ wɩɩŋ mana mana ma, dama die Ŋmɩŋ dɩ yaala, nɩ yine Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrɩba wɩa.

eng: Dont suppress the Spirit.
local: Nɩ da kagɩma Ŋmɩŋ Halɩkasɩka.

eng: Dont brush off Spirit-inspired messages.
local: ta da bɩ zetime Ŋmɩŋ naazʋalɩŋ wɩa.

eng: but examine everything carefully and hang on to what is good.
local: ama nɩ mʋ nɩ fɩalɩ a magɩsɩma jaaŋ mana, ta tuo jadieke dɩ vɩɩŋna.

eng: Avoid every kind of evil.
local: ta chɩgɩ nyɩŋ bɩaŋ yiri yiri mana ma.

eng: Now, may the God of peace himself cause you to be completely dedicated to him; and may your spirit, soul, and body be kept intact and blameless at our Lord Jesus Christs coming.
local: Ŋmɩŋ vuodieke dɩ yɩnana tɩ sʋgɩdʋagɩŋ, yi nɩ sʋgɩyɩalɩntieliŋ aŋaŋ wusie, ta pɔgɩlɩ nɩ haalɩtɩ aŋaŋ nɩ miivoli aŋaŋ nɩ nyɩŋgbanɩŋ ta nɩ da yallɩma bɩaŋ tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Yisa Masia yiŋŋi kieŋku saŋŋa.

eng: The one who is calling you is faithful and will do this.
local: Ŋmɩŋ vuodieke dɩ wana nɩ nan yi naa, dama ʋ yiwo wusietieŋ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, pray for us.
local: Tɩ nɩmballɩ, nɩ jʋʋsɩma Ŋmɩŋ a yɩma tɩ gbaŋ.

eng: Greet all the brothers and sisters with a holy kiss.
local: Nɩ waasɩ Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrɩba mana vɩɩnɩŋ vɩɩnɩŋ.

eng: By the Lords authority, I order all of you to have this letter read aloud to all the brothers and sisters.
local: Tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ saaŋ ma maŋ kpaama nɩ, dɩ nɩ karɩŋ gbaŋkʋ gie a yɩ Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrɩba mana.

eng: The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with all of you.
local: Tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Yisa Masia suŋŋi nɩ.

eng: From Paul, Silvanus, and Timothy: To the church of the Thessalonians, which is in God our Father, and in the Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Manɩŋ Pɔɔli aŋaŋ Silasi aŋaŋ Timoti maagɩna gbaŋkʋ gie a yɩa tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Yisa Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrɩ diekemba dɩ benne Tesalonika tɩŋ ma ta bɩ yi tɩ Chɔɔŋ Ŋmɩŋ sɩɩtɩ wa.

eng: Grace and peace to all of you from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Tɩ Chɔɔŋ Ŋmɩŋ aŋaŋ tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Yisa Masia suŋŋi nɩ, ta bɩ yɩ nɩ sʋgɩdʋagɩŋ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we must always thank God for you. This is only right because your faithfulness is growing by leaps and bounds, and the love that all of you have for each other is increasing.
local: Tɩ nɩmballɩ, dɩ mʋ tɩ waasɩma Ŋmɩŋ saŋŋa mana nɩ wɩa. Tɩ yi die dɩ vɩɩna mɩŋ, dama nɩ yadaka gʋta mɩŋ ta nɩ yalla choti dieke aŋaŋ taŋ wa dɩ gʋta pam.

eng: Thats why we ourselves are bragging about you in Gods churches. We tell about your endurance and faithfulness in all the harassments and trouble that you have put up with.
local: Die wɩa tɩ gbaŋ tɩ kuule mɩŋ nɩ wɩa Ŋmɩŋ vuosi jigiŋ. Tɩ kuule yaa gamma suguru aŋaŋ yada dieke nɩ yene yallɩ nɩ mugisiku gie me aŋaŋ nɩ wahalaka gie me ta beri aŋaŋ hanɩa naa.

eng: This shows that Gods judgment is right, and that you will be considered worthy of Gods kingdom for which you are suffering.
local: Naa daga dɩ Ŋmɩŋ sarɩya diile yiwo wusie; die wɩa ʋ nan keŋ balɩ dɩ nɩ mʋ nɩ bemme ʋ naarɩ ma; ʋ naarɩ dieke wɩa nɩ dinene wahalaka.

eng: After all, its right for God to pay back the ones making trouble for you with trouble.
local: Ŋmɩŋ nan yi wudieke dɩ mʋna: ʋ nan vaa vuodiekemba mana dɩ mugisinene nɩ wo dii wahala.

eng: and to pay back you who are having trouble with relief along with us. This payback will come when the Lord Jesus is revealed from heaven with his powerful angels.
local: ta ʋ nan gbatɩ nɩnɩŋ vuodiekemba dɩ dinene wahalaka, ta bɩ gbatɩ tɩ dɩaŋ. Ʋ nan yi naa saŋŋa dieke tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Yisa dɩ keŋ nyɩŋ arɩzanna ma a kieŋ aŋaŋ ʋ malakasi diekemba dɩ yalla yiko ke.

eng: He will give justice with blazing fire to those who dont recognize God and dont obey the good news of our Lord Jesus.
local: Ba nan keŋ aŋaŋ bolinyaaŋ dɩ ba datɩ vuodiekemba dɩ kana ka sɩba Ŋmɩŋ aŋaŋ vuodiekemba dɩ kana ka saagɩ tuo wʋvɩɩnaha yaa gamma tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Yisa ma wa.

eng: They will pay the penalty of eternal destruction away from the Lords presence and away from his mighty glory.
local: Banɩŋ vuosi mi chʋʋsɩkʋ nan dɩ beri yaa gamma haahuu, ta ba kaaŋ gbigi tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ aŋaŋ ʋ chuulikpeŋkpɩɩŋ aŋaŋ ʋ hagɩrɩbʋ nɩŋŋa.

eng: This will happen when he comes on that day to receive honor from his holy people and to be admired by everyone who has believed—and our testimony to you was believed.
local: ʋ keŋ keŋ daa dieke dɩ ʋ ye jɩlɩma a nyɩŋ ʋ vuosi jigiŋ aŋaŋ vuodiekemba mana dɩ yine wo yada wa. Nɩ gbaŋ nɩ nan gʋtɩ ba ma, dama nɩ tuo wudieke die tɩ balla nɩ wa mɩŋ.

eng: We are constantly praying for you for this: that our God will make you worthy of his calling and accomplish every good desire and faithful work by his power.
local: Die wɩa tɩ jʋʋsa Ŋmɩŋ a yɩa nɩ mɩŋ saŋŋa mana. Tɩ jʋʋsa wa dɩ ʋ vaa nɩ bɩrɩŋ vuovɩɩna ʋ nɩŋŋa. Ta bɩ jʋʋsa wa dɩ ʋ vaa ʋ hagɩrɩbʋ suŋŋi nɩ aŋ nɩ bɩagɩ tʋŋ wʋvɩɩna diekemba nɩ yada dɩ yaalala nɩ yi wo.

eng: Then the name of our Lord Jesus will be honored by you, and you will be honored by him, consistent with the grace of our God and the Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Die nan vaa tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Yisa saaŋ ye bɩrɩŋ nɩ wɩa, ta nɩ dɩaŋ nɩ ye bɩrɩŋ ʋ wɩa, Ŋmɩŋ aŋaŋ tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Yisa Masia zɔɔlɩnchɩgɩla wɩa.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we have a request for you concerning our Lord Jesus Christs coming and when we are gathered together to be with him.
local: N nɩmballɩ, yaa gamma tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ yiŋŋi kieŋku wɩa aŋaŋ tɩ bala tɩ keŋ a lagɩŋ bemme aŋaŋ wa wa.

eng: We dont want you to be easily confused in your mind or upset if you hear that the day of the Lord is already here, whether you hear it through some spirit, a message, or a letter supposedly from us.
local: n yaala n balɩ nɩ ta nɩ da ŋmaaŋ ma yaa ta chelime vuosi bataŋ dɩ balala dɩ tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ daarɩ wɔŋ keŋ mɩŋ wo. Vuoŋ zɩ ba bala nɩ dɩ tɩnɩŋ die tɩ bala die Ŋmɩŋ naazʋalɩŋ wʋbalɩka dagɩŋ ma, yaa wʋbalɩka ma, yaa gbanɩŋ ma.

eng: Dont let anyone deceive you in any way. That day wont come unless the rebellion comes first and the person who is lawless is revealed, who is headed for destruction.
local: Nɩ da vaa vuoŋ gaaŋ nɩ wɩɩŋ mana ma. Dama daarɩ kaaŋ keŋ ntaala nʋazetiŋ saŋŋa woliŋ keŋ, saŋŋa dieke vuosi pam dɩ bala ba keŋ a zeti Ŋmɩŋ nʋarɩ, ta vuobɩakʋ dɩaŋ nan keŋ a nyɩŋ yaalɩŋ ma; Ŋmɩŋ wɔŋ saŋ dɩ ʋ chʋʋsɩ wa mɩŋ.

eng: He is the opponent of every so-called god or object of worship and promotes himself over them. So he sits in Gods temple, displaying himself to show that he is God.
local: Ʋ nan keŋ zeti Ŋmɩŋ jɩamɩŋ aŋaŋ jɩamɩŋ mana, ta yi ʋ gbaŋ sikpeŋ tieŋ dieke dɩ tɩanna jadieke mana vuota dɩ jɩanna. Ʋ nan keŋ juu Ŋmɩŋ jɩamɩŋ juoku gbaŋ ta wasa ʋ gbaŋ Ŋmɩŋ.

eng: You remember that I used to tell you these things while I was with you, dont you?.
local: Nɩ tɩɩnsɩya dɩ die n yene bie nɩ jigiri die n balɩ wɩaha mana mɩŋ?.

eng: Now you know what holds him back so that he can be revealed when his time comes.
local: Ta lele, nɩ sɩba wudieke dɩ kagɩnana wa, ama ʋ nan keŋ saŋŋa dieke Ŋmɩŋ dɩ sanna dɩ ʋ keŋ wo.

eng: The hidden plan to live without any law is at work now, but it will be secret only until the one who is holding it back is out of the way.
local: Vuobɩatɩ wɔŋ beri mɩŋ ta tʋma wʋbɩatɩ lɔbɩrɩŋ ma, ta vuodieke dɩ yigine be a yallɩ wa nan dɩ yallɩ ba dene a ga tʋgɩ saŋŋa dieke Ŋmɩŋ dɩ bala ʋ yagɩ wa a taaŋ.

eng: Then the person who is lawless will be revealed. The Lord Jesus will destroy him with the breath from his mouth. When the Lord comes, his appearance will put an end to him.
local: Saŋka mi wʋbɩayiiru wo nan keŋ nyɩŋ ama tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Yisa nan kʋʋ wa aŋaŋ ʋ nʋaŋ wɩɩŋ, ta ʋ yiŋŋi kieŋku chuulikpeŋkpɩɩkʋ bɩ chʋʋsɩ wa a gʋtɩ.

eng: When the person who is lawless comes, it will happen through Satans effort, with all kinds of fake power, signs, and wonders.
local: Wʋbɩayiiru wo nan keŋ aŋaŋ Sitaani hagɩrɩŋ ta yi ŋmɩnchɩbɩsɩ mamachi aŋaŋ dagɩtɩ yiri yiri mana dɩ ʋ gaaŋ vuosi.

eng: It will happen with every sort of wicked deception of those who are heading toward destruction because they have refused to love the truth that would allow them to be saved.
local: Ʋ nan keŋ nagɩ ŋmɩnchɩbɩsɩ yiri yiri mana a gaaŋ vuodiekemba Ŋmɩŋ dɩ bala ʋ chʋʋsɩ wa. Ʋ nan keŋ chʋʋsɩ ba dama ba kana ka yaala wusie dieke dɩ bala ka gbatɩ ba a taaŋ ta zetike wɩa.

eng: This is why God will send them an influence that will mislead them so that they will believe the lie.
local: Die wɩa Ŋmɩŋ dɩ vaa ŋmɩnchɩbɩsɩ hagɩrɩŋ dɩ tʋma ba ma ta ba yie wudiekemba dɩ kana ka yi wusie yada.

eng: The result will be that everyone will be judged who is not convinced by the truth but is happy with injustice.
local: Ŋmɩŋ nan daansɩ chʋʋsɩ vuodiekemba dɩ kana ka yi wusieke yada ama ta yaala wʋbɩatɩ yiile he.

eng: But we always must thank God for you, brothers and sisters who are loved by God. This is because he chose you from the beginning to be the first crop of the harvest. This brought salvation, through your dedication to God by the Spirit and through your belief in the truth.
local: Tɩ nɩmballɩ, nɩnɩŋ vuodiekemba tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ dɩ chone naa, dɩ mʋ tɩ waasɩma Ŋmɩŋ saŋŋa mana nɩ wɩa, dama Ŋmɩŋ wɔŋ vʋarɩ nɩ piiliku me mɩŋ dɩ nɩ ye gbatɩtaanɩŋ. Die nɩ yiwo wusie wʋvɩɩnaha yada mɩŋ, ta ʋ Halɩkasɩka dɩ bɩ yi nɩ kasɩ, die wɩa nɩ ye gbatɩtaaŋkʋ.

eng: God called all of you through our good news so you could possess the honor of our Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Die tɩ mʋʋlɩna wʋvɩɩnaha a yɩ nɩ wa wɩa Ŋmɩŋ dɩ wa nɩ dɩ nɩ bemme vɩɩnɩŋ sɩba tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Yisa Masia dɩ benne vɩɩnɩŋ dene wo.

eng: So then, brothers and sisters, stand firm and hold on to the traditions we taught you, whether we taught you in person or through our letter.
local: Die wɩa tɩ nɩmballɩ, nɩ mɩŋŋɩ zie keŋ keŋ ta mɩŋŋɩ pɔgɩlɩ wusie diekemba tɩ dagɩna nɩ wa tɩ wʋbalɩka ma aŋaŋ tɩ gbaŋtɩ ma wa.

eng: Our Lord Jesus Christ himself and God our Father loved us and through grace gave us eternal comfort and a good hope.
local: Tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Yisa Masia gbaŋ gbaŋ aŋaŋ tɩ Chɔɔŋ Ŋmɩŋ vuodieke dɩ chone tɩ ta suŋŋi tɩ a yɩ tɩ sʋgɩdʋagɩ dieke dɩ wone kpatɩkʋ aŋaŋ tama dieke dɩ vɩɩŋna ʋ zɔɔlɩnchɩgɩla wɩa wa.

eng: May he encourage your hearts and give you strength in every good thing you do or say.
local: vaa nɩ sʋgɩtɩ hagɩrɩma ta yɩ nɩ hagɩrɩŋ, aŋ nɩ bɩagɩ balɩma wudieke dɩ vɩɩŋna ta bɩ yime wudieke dɩ vɩɩŋna.

eng: Finally, brothers and sisters, pray for us so that the Lords message will spread quickly and be honored, just like it happened with you.
local: Tɩ nɩmballɩ, ka kpatɩŋ yiwo naa, nɩ jʋʋsɩma Ŋmɩŋ a yɩma tɩ, dɩ tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ wʋvɩɩnaha nan ye jata lagɩ lagɩ ta yese jɩlɩma sɩba die ka yene jɩlɩma nɩ jigiŋ dene wo.

eng: Pray too that we will be rescued from inappropriate and evil people since everyone that we meet wont respond with faith.
local: Ta bɩ jʋʋsɩma dɩ ʋ vʋarɩ tɩ a nyɩŋ vuobɩatɩ nuusi me, dama daa vuoŋ mana yine wʋvɩɩnaha yada.

eng: But the Lord is faithful and will give you strength and protect you from the evil one.
local: Ama tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ yiwo wusietieŋ, ta nan yɩ nɩ hagɩrɩŋ ta gbarɩ nɩ aŋ Sitaani kaaŋ yi nɩ wɩɩŋ.

eng: We are confident about you in the Lord—that you are doing and will keep doing what we tell you to do.
local: Tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ wɩa tɩ yaa yada dɩ nɩ yie wudieke die tɩ bala nɩ wa, ta nan dɩ yie die saŋŋa mana.

eng: May the Lord lead your hearts to express Gods love and Christs endurance.
local: Tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ wo suŋŋi nɩ aŋ nɩ sɩmma Ŋmɩŋ dɩ chone tɩ dene, ta bɩ suŋŋi nɩ aŋ nɩ yallɩma hanɩa dieke Masia dɩ yɩna tɩ wa.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we command you in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ to stay away from every brother or sister who lives an undisciplined life that is not in line with the traditions that you received from us.
local: Tɩ nɩmballɩ, tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Yisa Masia saaŋ ma tɩ bala nɩ naa, nɩ vʋarɩ nɩ gbaŋ a nyɩŋ tɩ nɩmballɩ diekemba dɩ yalla walɩnkpɩasɩ ta ka dɩ kpaaŋ dieke die tɩ yɩna nɩ wa.

eng: You yourselves know how you need to imitate us because we were not undisciplined when we were with you.
local: Nɩ gbaŋ gbaŋ nɩ sɩba vɩɩnɩŋ dɩ nɩ mʋ nɩ yiwo wudieke die tɩ yine wo. Die tɩ wo walɩnkpɩasɩ saŋŋa dieke die tɩ benne nɩ jigiri.

eng: We didnt eat anyones food without paying for it. Instead, we worked night and day with effort and hard work so that we would not impose on you.
local: Die tɩ ka tuo suŋŋiŋ a nyɩŋ vuoŋ jigiŋ ta ka tuŋye. Ama die tɩ tʋma mɩŋ ta sɩa walɩŋ, ta tʋma yuŋ aŋaŋ ŋmɩntʋasɩ mana amʋ tɩ kaaŋ yi chiiti a yɩ nɩ wʋnyɩ mana.

eng: We did this to give you an example to imitate, not because we didnt have a right to insist on financial support.
local: Die tɩ ka yie naa dɩ dagɩ sɩba tɩ wo yiko dieke tɩ baaŋ pɩasɩ dɩ nɩ suŋŋi tɩ, die tɩ yie naa, dɩ ka yi dagɩtɩ a yɩ nɩ aŋ nɩ dɩa.

eng: Even when we were with you we were giving you this command: If anyone doesnt want to work, they shouldnt eat.
local: Die tɩ yene bie nɩ jigiri, die tɩ balɩ nɩ dɩ, Vuodieke nɩŋ mana dɩ kana ka yaala tʋʋma, die vuoke ka mʋ ʋ dii.

eng: We hear that some of you are living an undisciplined life. They arent working, but they are meddling in other peoples business.
local: Tɩ bala naa dama tɩ wʋŋya mɩŋ dɩ vuosi bataŋ benne nɩ sʋŋ ta yaa walɩnkpɩasɩ, ba ka yie wɩɩŋ mana ntaala ba jume vuosi wɩa ma.

eng: By the Lord Jesus Christ, we command and encourage such people to work quietly and put their own food on the table.
local: Tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Yisa Masia saaŋ ma tɩ bala ba ta kpaama ba dɩ ba vaa ba baga bemme ba gbaŋ gbaŋ ba tʋʋma ma, aŋ ba bemme sɔmm ta dime ba gbaŋ ba walɩŋ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, dont get discouraged in doing what is right.
local: N nɩmballɩ, nɩnɩŋ nɩŋ nɩ da gbalɩgɩma aŋaŋ vɩɩnɩŋ yiile.

eng: Take note of anyone who doesnt obey what we have said in this letter. Dont associate with them so they will be ashamed of themselves.
local: Dɩɩ yi vuoŋ dɩ ka saagɩ a yi wudiekemba tɩ bala gbaŋkʋ gie me wo, nɩ yigi nɩ gbaŋ aŋaŋ die vuoke, ta nɩ baga da bemme ʋ ma, aŋ ʋ dii viivi.

eng: Dont treat them like enemies, but warn them like you would do for a brother or sister.
local: Ama nɩ da bemme aŋaŋ wa sɩba nɩ dataaŋ, ama nɩ kpaaŋ wa sɩba nɩ nɩmbʋa.

eng: May the Lord of peace himself give you peace always in every way. The Lord be with all of you.
local: Tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ vuodieke dɩ yɩnana tɩ sʋgɩdʋagɩkʋ yɩ nɩ sʋgɩdʋagɩŋ saŋŋa mana aŋaŋ wɩɩŋ mana ma. Tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ bemme aŋaŋ nɩ mana.

eng: I, Paul, am writing this greeting with my own hand. This verifies that the letter is from me, as in every letter of mine. This is how I write.
local: Manɩŋ Pɔɔli maagɩnana kpatɩkʋ gie aŋaŋ n gbaŋ gbaŋ n nuuŋ a waasa nɩ naa. N gbaŋtɩ mana siara wʋnna; n maaga a kpata n gbaŋtɩ naa.

eng: The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with all of you.
local: Tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Yisa Masia suŋŋi nɩ mana.

eng: From Paul, who is an apostle of Jesus Christ by the command of God our savior and of Christ Jesus our hope.
local: Manɩŋ Pɔɔli yiwo Yisa Masia tʋntʋntʋ, dama tɩ Gbɩgbatɩtaantʋ Nabidie Ŋmɩŋ aŋaŋ Yisa Masia, vuodiekemba dɩ yine tɩ tamaha yɩna mɩŋ nʋaŋ aŋaŋ nɩŋŋmɩna;.

eng: To Timothy, my true child in the faith. Grace, mercy, and peace from God the Father and from Christ Jesus our Lord.
local: maŋ maaga gbaŋkʋ gie a yɩa fʋnɩŋ Timoti, vuodieke dɩ yine n bʋa wusie, tɩ yadaka gie wɩa. Tɩ Chɔɔŋ Nabidie Ŋmɩŋ aŋaŋ tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Yisa Masia suŋŋi fʋ, ta chɩgɩ fʋ zɔɔlɩŋ, ta bɩ yɩ fʋ sʋgɩfɩalɩŋ.

eng: When I left for Macedonia, I asked you to stay behind in Ephesus so that you could instruct certain individuals not to spread wrong teaching.
local: N yaala fʋ bemme Efesusi me sɩba die n wone kpaaŋ fʋ dene wo, saŋŋa dieke die n benne sieŋ me a gara Masedonia tɩŋgbaŋ ma wa. Kpaaŋ vuodiekemba dɩ benne mi ta daga ŋmɩnchɩbɩsɩ dagɩkʋ dɩ ba vaa.

eng: They shouldnt pay attention to myths and endless genealogies. Their teaching only causes useless guessing games instead of faithfulness to Gods way of doing things.
local: Balɩ ba dɩ ba vaa ba chɔɔŋkʋʋla nandagaha aŋaŋ ba maarɩŋ maarɩŋ saaraha wudieke dɩ yalla nɩnhagɩrɩŋ kieŋ wo. Naa ka suŋŋe vuoŋ ʋ bɩagɩ tʋma Ŋmɩŋ tʋʋma. Ŋmɩŋ tʋʋmaha gie nan bɩagɩ tʋŋ dɩɩ yi vuoŋ dɩ yaa yada aŋaŋ Ŋmɩŋ.

eng: The goal of instruction is love from a pure heart, a good conscience, and a sincere faith.
local: Mʋ fʋ dagɩ wa vuosi aŋ ba yallɩma wusie choti dieke dɩ nyɩnana sʋgɩyɩalɩŋ aŋaŋ sʋŋanyile vɩɩna aŋaŋ wusie yada ma.

eng: Because they missed this goal, some people have been distracted by talk that doesnt mean anything.
local: Vuosi bataŋ vaa wa naa ta ga juu gaanwʋbalɩka ma.

eng: They want to be teachers of Law without understanding either what they are saying or what they are talking about with such confidence.
local: Ba yaala ba yiwo Ŋmɩŋ mɩraha dɩdagɩrɩŋ, ama ba zɩ ba gbaŋ gbaŋ ba nʋaŋ wʋbalɩka chɩaŋ, ta bɩ ka sɩba wudieke ba balala aŋaŋ nɩŋŋmɩna wa chɩaŋ.

eng: Now we know that the Law is good if used appropriately.
local: Tɩ sɩba a baarɩ mɩraha vɩɩna mɩŋ dɩɩ yi vuoŋ dɩ mɩŋŋɩ a dɩha sɩba a dagɩna die wo.

eng: We understand this: the Law isnt established for a righteous person but for people who live without laws and without obeying any authority. They are the ungodly and the sinners. They are people who are not spiritual, and nothing is sacred to them. They kill their fathers and mothers, and murder others.
local: Dɩ mʋ tɩ tɩɩnsɩ dɩ ba ka zieŋ mɩra vuovɩɩna wɩa, ama ba zie wo vuodiekemba dɩ kana ka dɩha wɩa, aŋaŋ tɩbɩhagɩrɩtieliŋ aŋaŋ vuodiekemba dɩ kana ka dɩ Ŋmɩŋ aŋaŋ wʋbɩayiiriŋ aŋaŋ vuodiekemba dɩ kana ka jɩama Ŋmɩŋ aŋaŋ vuodiekemba dɩ kana ka chɩga Ŋmɩŋ vuosi aŋaŋ vuodiekemba dɩ kana ka yɩa Ŋmɩŋ jɩlɩma wa wɩa aŋaŋ vuodiekemba dɩ kʋnana ba chʋalɩŋ aŋaŋ ba nɩɩlɩŋ aŋaŋ vuotakʋʋla.

eng: They are people who are sexually unfaithful, and people who have intercourse with the same sex. They are kidnappers, liars, individuals who give false testimonies in court, and those who do anything else that is opposed to sound teaching.
local: aŋaŋ hɔgʋkpaŋ yaalɩtɩŋ yaa daakpaŋ yaalɩtɩŋ aŋaŋ vuodiekemba dɩ yalla lɔla a dʋaga aŋaŋ ba dembiŋ chanchaalɩŋ aŋaŋ vuodieke dɩ gaarɩnana vuosi a daa aŋaŋ ŋmɩnchɩbɩtieliŋ aŋaŋ vuodiekemba dɩ dinene ŋmɩnchɩbɩsɩ siara aŋaŋ vuodieke nɩŋ mana dɩ kana ka dɩ wusie dagɩkʋ wɩa.

eng: Sound teaching agrees with the glorious gospel of the blessed God that has been trusted to me.
local: Masia wʋbalɩkɩ vɩɩna diekemba dɩ dagɩnana Nabidie Ŋmɩŋ die dɩ faasɩna a vɩɩna ta mʋ bɩrɩŋ dene wo gbaŋ daga die; ta wʋnɩŋ Nabidie Ŋmɩŋ die nagɩna a yɩ n nuusi me ta maŋ mʋʋla.

eng: I thank Christ Jesus our Lord, who has given me strength because he considered me faithful. So he appointed me to ministry.
local: N waasa tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Yisa Masia, wʋnɩŋ ʋ yɩna mɩŋ hagɩrɩŋ n tʋʋmaha gie me. N waasa wa dama ʋ yi mɩŋ yada ta vʋarɩ mɩŋ a yɩ ʋ tʋʋmaha ma dɩ n tʋŋ a yɩ wa.

eng: even though I used to speak against him, attack his people, and I was proud. But I was shown mercy because I acted in ignorance and without faith.
local: aŋaŋ die n ŋaana bala a chʋʋsa ʋ saaŋ, ta die mugise ʋ vuosi ta die zɩa wa mana, ama Ŋmɩŋ die chɩgɩ mɩŋ wa zɔɔlɩŋ, dama die n ka yiwo yada, die wɩa ta ka sɩba wudieke n yinene.

eng: Our Lords favor poured all over me along with the faithfulness and love that are in Christ Jesus.
local: Ta die tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Yisa dɩ keŋ chɩgɩ mɩŋ zɔɔlɩ dieke dɩ wone naamagɩsɩŋ, ta vaa maŋ yi wo yada ta cho n chanchaalɩŋ.

eng: This saying is reliable and deserves full acceptance: Christ Jesus came into the world to save sinners—and Im the biggest sinner of all.
local: Wɩɩrɩ gie yiwo wusie amʋ tɩ tuoke ta yi yada dɩ Yisa Masia die keŋ tɩŋgbaŋka gie me dɩ ʋ gbatɩ wʋbɩayiiriŋ a taaŋ mɩŋ, ta die n wʋbɩatɩ die tɩanna wʋbɩayiiribe mana.

eng: But this is why I was shown mercy, so that Christ Jesus could show his endless patience to me first of all. So Im an example for those who are going to believe in him for eternal life.
local: ama Ŋmɩŋ die chɩgɩ mɩŋ wa zɔɔlɩŋ, manɩŋ vuodieke die dɩ yine wʋbɩatɩtieliŋ jakʋʋŋ ta dii suguru pam aŋaŋ mɩŋ, dɩ ka yi siaria a dagɩ vuodiekemba dɩ bala ba daansɩ yiwo yada ta ye miivoli dieke dɩ wone kpatɩkʋ.

eng: Now to the king of the ages, to the immortal, invisible, and only God, may honor and glory be given to him forever and always! Amen.
local: Vuosi bɩrɩma Naakpeŋkpɩɩŋ dieke naarɩ dɩ wone kpatɩŋ ta wʋnɩŋ ʋ ka kpie wo. Vuoŋ ka yese wo ta wʋnɩŋ ʋ yine Ŋmɩŋ balɩŋka. Vuosi bɩrɩma wa ta yɩma wa jɩlɩma yaa gamma haahuu. Wusie.

eng: Timothy, my child, Im giving you these instructions based on the prophecies that were once made about you. So if you follow them, you can wage a good war.
local: N bʋa Timoti, n naga kpaaŋkʋ gie a yie fʋ nuusi me. Kpaaŋkʋ gie sɩɩ sɩba wudieke Ŋmɩŋ naazʋalɩba die dɩ wone a balɩ yaa gamma fʋ ma wa. Vaa wɩaha gie yi fʋ dembisiŋaŋ jaaŋ aŋ fʋ mɩŋŋɩ a wagɩ.

eng: because you have faith and a good conscience. Some people have ruined their faith because they refused to listen to their conscience.
local: Yallɩma fʋ yadaka aŋaŋ sʋŋanyile vɩɩnɩŋ ta tʋma wudiekemba fʋ sɩbɩna dɩ a yiwo tʋnvɩɩna. Vuosi bataŋ ka saagɩ naa die yine ba taarɩ nyɩŋ ba yadaka sieŋ me mana mana.

eng: such as Hymenaeus and Alexander. Ive handed them over to Satan so that they can be taught not to speak against God.
local: Ba bataŋ yine Himinuusi aŋaŋ Alekizanda, manɩŋ n nagɩna ba a yi Sitaani nuusi me dɩ ʋ mugisi be. Naa nan dagɩ ba yɩaŋ aŋ ba vaa Ŋmɩŋ saaŋ chʋʋsɩŋ.

eng: First of all, then, I ask that requests, prayers, petitions, and thanksgiving be made for all people.
local: Wudieke dɩ yine talasɩ yiwo naa, nɩ jʋʋsɩma Ŋmɩŋ a yɩma vuoŋ mana. Ta jʋʋsɩ wa dɩ ʋ suŋŋi be ta bɩ yi alibarika a yɩ ba mana, ta waasɩma wa ba mana wɩa.

eng: Pray for kings and everyone who is in authority so that we can live a quiet and peaceful life in complete godliness and dignity.
local: Nɩ jʋʋsɩma Ŋmɩŋ a yɩma naalɩŋ aŋaŋ vuodiekemba mana dɩ yalla yiko amʋ tɩ nan dɩ beri sɔmm aŋaŋ sʋgɩfɩalɩŋ ta mɩŋŋɩ beri sɩba vuodiekemba dɩ chɩgɩnana Ŋmɩŋ ta yime wudieke dɩ mʋna a yɩma tɩ chanchaalɩŋ.

eng: This is right and it pleases God our savior.
local: Naa vɩɩna ta nanna tɩ Gbɩgbatɩtaantʋ Ŋmɩŋ sʋŋ.

eng: who wants all people to be saved and to come to a knowledge of the truth.
local: wʋnɩŋ ʋ yaala vuota mana ye gbatɩtaanɩŋ ta keŋ sɩmma wusieke.

eng: There is one God and one mediator between God and humanity, the human Christ Jesus.
local: Dama Ŋmɩŋ balɩmɩŋ bene, ta nɩɩpɔɔnɩgɩrʋ yiwo vuobalɩmɩŋ a bie Ŋmɩŋ aŋaŋ vuota sʋnsʋŋ, die vuoke yine Yisa Masia.

eng: who gave himself as a payment to set all people free. This was a testimony that was given at the right time.
local: wʋnɩŋ die ʋ nagɩna ʋ gbaŋ a yi kaabɩŋ dɩ ʋ gbatɩ vuota mana a nyɩŋ wʋbɩatɩ aŋaŋ kuŋ me, Ŋmɩŋ die dagɩ tɩ naa saŋŋa dieke dɩ mʋna.

eng: I was appointed to be a preacher and apostle of this testimony—Im telling the truth and Im not lying! Im a teacher of the Gentiles in faith and truth.
local: Naa wɩa Ŋmɩŋ dɩ vʋarɩ mɩŋ dɩ n yi Masia tʋntʋntʋ aŋaŋ dɩdagɩrʋ, ta mʋʋlɩma wʋvɩɩnaha a yɩma vuodiekemba dɩ kana ka yi Juu vuosisi, a dagɩma ba wʋnɩŋ Masia wudieke dɩ yine wusie wo dɩ ba yi yada. Wudieke n balala yɩa nɩ naa, daa ŋmɩnchɩbɩsɩ maŋ chɩba, ka yiwo wusie.

eng: Therefore, I want men to pray everywhere by lifting up hands that are holy, without anger or argument.
local: N yaala nɩ jʋʋsɩma Ŋmɩŋ saŋŋa dieke nɩ keŋ a lagɩŋ dɩ nɩ jɩaŋ Ŋmɩŋ. Vuodiekemba dɩ senne yi sʋgɩyɩalɩntieliŋ ta wo sɩnyɩɩrɩŋ yaa nɩnhagɩrɩŋ nan bɩagɩ a kɔtɩ ba nuusi ŋmɩŋsikpeŋ a jʋʋsɩ Ŋmɩŋ.

eng: In the same way, I want women to enhance their appearance with clothing that is modest and sensible, not with elaborate hairstyles, gold, pearls, or expensive clothes.
local: N bɩ yaala hɔgʋba yallɩma yɩaŋ yaa gamma ba garɩtɩ jigiŋ ta mɩŋŋɩ bɔbɩma sɩba Yisa dɩdɩɩsɩrɩŋ dɩ mʋna ba bɔmma die; ba da bɔbɩma ba sikpeŋ zoosi aŋaŋ ligire pam yaa a bɔbɩma garɩtɩ diekemba ligire dɩ faasɩna a tʋa pam yaa nyieleeti yaa nuupiriŋ diekemba ba wʋnsɩna aŋaŋ salɩma; daa naa bala ka yi ba vɩɩŋ ma;.

eng: They should make themselves attractive by doing good, which is appropriate for women who claim to honor God.
local: ama ba yime wʋvɩɩna a yɩma ba chanchaalɩŋ sɩba hɔgʋ diekemba dɩ balala dɩ ba jɩama Ŋmɩŋ dɩ mʋna ba yi dene.

eng: A wife should learn quietly with complete submission.
local: Hɔgʋba bemme sɔmm ta sʋʋŋ ba gbaŋ tɩŋgbaŋ ta bʋgɩrɩma.

eng: I dont allow a wife to teach or to control her husband. Instead, she should be a quiet listener.
local: Manɩŋ n ka saagɩya dɩ hɔgʋba dagɩma yaa yallɩma yiko dembisi ma; ba mʋ ba bemme sɔmm ta da balɩma wɩa nɩ keŋ lagɩŋ dɩ nɩ jɩaŋ Ŋmɩŋ.

eng: Adam was formed first, and then Eve.
local: Dama Ŋmɩŋ die woliŋ a naaŋ wa Adami ta ka kʋaŋ chaaŋ die ʋ naaŋ Evi.

eng: Adam wasnt deceived, but rather his wife became the one who stepped over the line because she was completely deceived.
local: A bɩ gʋtɩ, Sitaani die bɩagɩ a gaaŋ wa Evi ta ʋ chʋʋsɩ Ŋmɩŋ mɩraha, daa Adami.

eng: But a wife will be brought safely through childbirth, if they both continue in faith, love, and holiness, together with self-control.
local: Ama dii yi ta hɔgʋ dɩ yie Yisa yada ta cho vuosi, ta yi sʋgɩyɩalɩntieŋ ta beri beri dieke dɩ mʋna, Ŋmɩŋ nan gbatɩ wa a taaŋ ʋ maarɩŋ ma.

eng: The Spirit clearly says that in latter times some people will turn away from the faith. They will pay attention to spirits that deceive and to the teaching of demons.
local: Ŋmɩŋ Halɩkasɩka senne daga yaalɩŋ ma dɩ saŋŋa kienene, vuosi bataŋ nan daansɩ vaa Masia wɩɩrɩ gie, ta saagɩ yɩ jɩmbɩatɩ diekemba dɩ bala ba gaaŋ ba wa, ta bɩ dɩɩ Sitaani dagɩkʋ.

eng: They will be controlled by the pretense of lying, and their own consciences will be seared.
local: Vuodiekemba dɩ dagɩna gɩgaantɩŋ dagɩkʋ gie, chɩba ŋmɩnchɩbɩsɩ ta ba sʋŋanyile ka bɩ mugisi be ka wɩa sɩba vuoŋ dɩ ŋaana mɔlɩ aŋaŋ jatuoliŋ dene ta ka bɩ chɩga ka.

eng: They will prohibit marriage and eating foods that God created—and he intended them to be accepted with thanksgiving by those who are faithful and have come to know the truth.
local: Die vuosisi daga dɩ dembiŋ yallɩŋ aŋaŋ hɔgʋ faarɩŋ ka vɩɩna, ta nyindiike a taŋ ka vɩɩna aŋaŋ diile; ama tɩnɩŋ vuodiekemba dɩ sɩba Masia wusieke ta yi yada naa, tɩ sɩba a baarɩ Ŋmɩŋ naanna jaaŋ mana dɩ vuosi waasɩ wa a ma ta diihe.

eng: Everything that has been created by God is good, and nothing that is received with thanksgiving should be rejected.
local: Jadieke nɩŋ mana Ŋmɩŋ dɩ naanna vɩɩna mɩŋ ta yi nyindiike; tɩ yɩma wa aŋwaasɩ a ma ta dii, a vɩɩna aŋaŋ diile; tɩ daa zetime a kaanɩ gbaŋ.

eng: These things are made holy by Gods word and prayer.
local: dama Nabidie Ŋmɩŋ baarɩ a mana vɩɩna; tɩ ŋaana jʋʋsa wa ta waasɩ wa wa ŋaana vasa nyindiikehe dɩ vɩɩna.

eng: If you point these things out to the believers, you will be a good servant of Christ Jesus who has been trained by the words of faith and the good teaching that youve carefully followed.
local: Dɩɩ yi fʋ nagɩ kpaaŋkʋ gie a yɩ Yisa Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrɩŋ chanchaalɩŋ, nan yi ʋ tʋntʋntʋ vɩɩna tieŋ, nan dagɩ dɩ bɩrɩŋ a nyɩŋ wa tɩ yada dagɩtɩtɩ aŋaŋ kpaaŋ vɩɩnaha fʋ dɩna wa.

eng: But stay away from the godless myths that are passed down from the older women. Train yourself for a holy life!.
local: Vʋarɩ fʋ gbaŋ a nyɩŋ ŋmɩnchɩbɩsɩ nandaga diekemba dɩ kana ka nyɩŋ Ŋmɩŋ jigiŋ; a wo nyʋarɩ; ama bʋgɩrɩma Ŋmɩŋ chaanɩŋ beriŋ aŋaŋ nɩŋŋmɩna.

eng: While physical training has some value, training in holy living is useful for everything. It has promise for this life now and the life to come.
local: Tʋʋma bʋgɩrɩ dieke dɩ gʋtɩnana nyɩŋgbanɩŋ hagɩrɩŋ yaa nyʋarɩ bɩta mɩŋ ama chaaŋkʋ bʋgɩrɩŋ faasɩ yaa nyʋarɩ jaaŋ mana ma, dama ka yɩa nyʋarɩ tɩŋgbaŋka gie me lele wo gie aŋaŋ arɩzanna ma saŋŋa dieke dɩ kienene.

eng: This saying is reliable: if anyone has a goal to be a supervisor in the church, they want a good thing.
local: Wɩɩrɩ gie yiwo wusie, dɩ dembiŋ dieke dɩ yaala ʋ yi Yisa dɩdɩɩsɩrɩŋ nɩŋŋandɩɩsɩrʋ, dɩ yiwo tʋnvɩɩnɩŋ ʋ yaala.

eng: This saying is reliable and deserves complete acceptance.
local: Wɩɩrɩ gie yiwo wusie amʋ tɩ tuoke a dii.

eng: So the churchs supervisor must be without fault. They should be faithful to their spouse, sober, modest, and honest. They should show hospitality and be skilled at teaching.
local: Dɩ ka mʋ dɩ Yisa dɩdɩɩsɩrɩŋ nɩŋŋandɩɩsɩrʋ yallɩma wʋbɩaŋ mana. Ʋ mʋ ʋ yallɩma hɔgʋbalɩmɩŋ nyɩɩna ma, ta mɩŋŋɩ a pɔgɩlɩ ʋ gbaŋ, ta yi yɩantieŋ, ta mɩŋŋɩ beri; ʋ mʋ ʋ yi vuodieke dɩ bɩagɩna a tuose chaanɩŋ ʋ tigiŋ me, ta bɩagɩ daga vuosi Ŋmɩŋ wɩa.

eng: We work and struggle for this: Our hope is set on the living God, who is the savior of all people, especially those who believe.
local: Tɩ mɩa mɩŋ ta tʋma aŋaŋ nɩŋŋmɩna, dama tɩ yaa tama Miivolitieŋ Nabidie Ŋmɩŋ ma, wʋnɩŋ ʋ yine vuoŋ mana Gbɩgbɩtɩtaantʋ ta nan gbatɩ vuodieke nɩŋ mana dɩ yine wo yada.

eng: They shouldnt be addicted to alcohol or be a bully. Instead, they should be gentle, peaceable, and not greedy.
local: ta da bɩ yi vuodieke dɩ nyunene daaŋ a buge, ta daa yaalɩma watɩ aŋaŋ waagɩŋ, ama ta bemme sɔmm, ta da faasɩ chome ligire pam.

eng: Command these things. Teach them.
local: Dagɩ ba ta kpaaŋ vuoŋ mana dɩ ba yime wudieke fʋ balala wa gie mana.

eng: They should manage their own household well—they should see that their children are obedient with complete respect.
local: Ʋ mʋ ʋ yiwo vuodieke dɩ bɩagɩna a pɔgɩla ʋ gbaŋ gbaŋ ʋ deŋ vɩɩnɩŋ, ta yi ʋ ballɩ dɩ saaga a yɩa wa, ta yɩa vuosi jɩlɩma.

eng: Dont let anyone look down on you because you are young. Instead, set an example for the believers through your speech, behavior, love, faith, and by being sexually pure.
local: Da vaa vuoŋ daansɩ fʋ yɔrɩ fʋ yine dalʋakɩŋ wɩa, ama vaa ta fʋ balɩŋ aŋaŋ fʋ beriŋ aŋaŋ fʋ choti aŋaŋ fʋ yada aŋaŋ sʋgɩyɩalɩŋ beriŋ dagɩma Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrɩŋ dɩ mʋna ba bemme die.

eng: because if they dont know how to manage their own household, how can they take care of Gods church?.
local: Dama dɩɩ yi vuoŋ dɩ ka sɩba ʋ baaŋ pɔgɩlɩ ʋ gbaŋ gbaŋ ʋ deŋ die, lalɩa ʋ baa ʋ yi a pɔgɩlɩ Ŋmɩŋ vuosi?.

eng: Until I arrive, pay attention to public reading, preaching, and teaching.
local: Nagɩ fʋ saŋŋa mana aŋaŋ fʋ hagɩrɩŋ a karɩmma Ŋmɩŋ gbaŋkʋ yaalɩŋ ma ta dagɩma a chɩasɩ ta mʋʋlɩma Masia wɩaha a ga tʋgɩ saŋŋa dieke n baa keŋ.

eng: They shouldnt be new believers so that they wont become proud and fall under the devils spell.
local: Dɩ yiwo talasɩ dɩ ʋ yi vuodieke dɩ wone a dɩɩsa Yisa Masia a yʋasɩ; daa die ʋ nan keŋ kɔtɩ ʋ gbaŋ aŋaŋ kalinbaani, ta ye tɩbɩdatɩŋ sɩba Ŋmɩŋ die dɩ datɩna Sitaani tɩbɩŋ die wo.

eng: Dont neglect the spiritual gift in you that was given through prophecy when the elders laid hands on you.
local: Da daaŋ ma Halɩkasɩka piini dieke dɩ benne fʋ sʋkʋ ma wa; Ŋmɩŋ die yɩ fʋ piinike saŋŋa dieke Ŋmɩŋ naazʋalɩba dɩ bala fʋ wɩa ta nyɩŋkʋraha die dɩ nagɩ ba nuusi a dɩɩsɩ fʋ ma wa.

eng: They should also have a good reputation with those outside the church so that they wont be embarrassed and fall into the devils trap.
local: Dɩ mʋ ʋ yiwo vuodieke, vuodiekemba dɩ kana ka dɩɩ Yisa Masia gbaŋ dɩ baaŋ nan baarɩ dɩ ʋ beriŋ vɩɩna, amʋ ʋ kaaŋ juu viivi me aŋ Sitaani chachabɩ kaaŋ yigi wo.

eng: Practice these things, and live by them so that your progress will be visible to all.
local: Nagɩma fʋ saŋŋa mana a yime naa aŋaŋ nɩŋŋmɩna amʋ vuoŋ mana nan ye fʋ bɩrɩnana dene Yisa tʋʋma ma.

eng: In the same way, servants in the church should be dignified, not two-faced, heavy drinkers, or greedy for money.
local: Ka bɩ yiwo talasɩ dɩ Yisa dɩdɩɩsɩrɩŋ susuŋŋiribe gbaŋ yallɩma berivɩɩnɩŋ, ta bɩ yi wusie bɩbalɩtɩŋ; ba da faasɩ nyume daaŋ pam, yaa a faasɩ chome ligire pam.

eng: Focus on working on your own development and on what you teach. If you do this, you will save yourself and those who hear you.
local: Sɩmma fʋ beriŋ aŋaŋ wudiekemba fʋ dagɩnana wa. Mɩŋŋɩ pɔgɩlɩ dagɩkʋ gie, dama dɩɩ yi fʋ pɔgɩlɩha nan gbatɩ fʋ gbaŋ aŋaŋ vuodiekemba fʋ dagɩnana wa a nyɩŋ Ŋmɩŋ sarɩya diile me.

eng: They should hold on to the faith that has been revealed with a clear conscience.
local: Ba mʋ ba mɩŋŋɩ a pɔgɩlɩ yada dieke Ŋmɩŋ dɩ yuorine a dagɩ ba wa aŋaŋ sʋgɩyɩalɩŋ.

eng: They should also be tested and then serve if they are without fault.
local: Dɩ yiwo talasɩ dɩ ba woliŋ magɩsɩ ba a ye; dɩɩ yi ba wo wɩɩŋ mana ba magɩsɩkʋ ma ba nan bɩagɩ tʋma a suŋŋe Ŋmɩŋ tʋʋmaha.

eng: In the same way, women who are servants in the church should be dignified and not gossip. They should be sober and faithful in everything they do.
local: Dɩ yiwo talasɩ dɩ ba hɔgʋba gbaŋ yallɩma beri vɩɩnɩŋ, ta da yi vuodiekemba dɩ gaarɩnana vuosi kʋasɩ, ta mɩŋŋɩ pɔgɩlɩ ba gbaŋ, ta yi vuodiekemba ba yine yada dɩ ba nan bɩagɩ yi wɩɩŋ mana vɩɩnɩŋ vɩɩnɩŋ.

eng: Servants must be faithful to their spouse and manage their children and their own households well.
local: Dɩ yiwo talasɩ dɩ Yisa dɩdɩɩsɩrɩŋ susuŋŋiru yallɩma hɔgʋbalɩmɩŋ, ta bɩagɩ pɔgɩla ʋ ballɩ aŋaŋ ʋ deŋ mana vɩɩnɩŋ.

eng: Those who have served well gain a good standing and considerable confidence in the faith that is in Christ Jesus.
local: Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrɩŋ susuŋŋiribe diekemba dɩ mɩŋŋɩna tʋma tʋʋmaha, banɩŋ ba nan ye jɩlɩma pam a nyɩŋ Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrɩŋ aŋaŋ Ŋmɩŋ jigiŋ ta nan bɩagɩ a balɩ aŋaŋ dembisi yaa gamma ba yine Yisa Masia yada die wo.

eng: I hope to come to you quickly. But Im writing these things to you so that.
local: N maaga gbaŋkʋ gie a yɩa fʋ mɩŋ, ama n yaa tama dɩ n nan keŋ ye fʋ daraa ale wa gie nʋaŋ.

eng: if Im delayed, youll know how you should behave in Gods household. It is the church of the living God and the backbone and support of the truth.
local: Ama dɩɩ yi maŋ keŋ a yʋasɩ, gbaŋkʋ gie nan vaa nɩ sɩmma tɩ mʋna tɩ bemme die Ŋmɩŋ vuosi sʋnsʋŋ vuodiekemba die wʋnɩŋ Miivoli tieŋ Nabidie Ŋmɩŋ die dɩ vʋarɩna wa. Banɩŋ ba pɔgɩlɩna wʋvɩɩŋ dieke dɩ yine wusie wo, ta zie gbarɩ ha.

eng: Without question, the mystery of godliness is great: he was revealed as a human, declared righteous by the Spirit, seen by angels, preached throughout the nations, believed in around the world, and taken up in glory.
local: Dɩ yiwo wusie dɩ Masia wudieke Ŋmɩŋ dɩ yuorine a dagɩ tɩ naa faasɩ yaa hagɩrɩŋ mɩŋ: Die ʋ keŋ nyɩŋ mɩŋ aŋaŋ nyɩŋgbanɩŋ, Ŋmɩŋ Halɩkasɩka die dagɩya dɩ ʋ beriŋ vɩɩna; ta malakasisi die dɩ ye wo. Ta vuosi die dɩ mʋʋlɩ ʋ wɩa a yi buuriŋ mana, die ba yi wo yada dʋnɩa ka gie me, ta Ŋmɩŋ die dɩ keŋ kɔtɩ wa a ga arɩzanna ma ta ʋ ye bɩrɩŋ.

eng: Dont correct an older man, but encourage him like hes your father; treat younger men like your brothers.
local: Da galɩma daajakʋʋŋ mana, ama kpaama wa sɩba fʋ gbaŋ gbaŋ fʋ chʋa, yallɩma dalʋakaha sɩba fʋ gbaŋ gbaŋ fʋ nɩmballɩ.

eng: treat older women like your mother, and treat younger women like your sisters with appropriate respect.
local: ta yallɩma hɔgʋ nyɩŋkʋraha sɩba fʋ nɩɩlɩŋ, ta bemme aŋaŋ hɔgʋlɩabaha sɩba fʋ taalɩŋ aŋaŋ sʋgɩyɩalɩŋ.

eng: Take care of widows who are truly needy.
local: Yɩma kpihɔgʋ diekemba dɩ senne bie ba nyɩɩna ma jɩlɩma aŋaŋ suŋŋiŋ.

eng: But if a particular widow has children or grandchildren, they should first learn to respect their own family and repay their parents, because this pleases God.
local: ama kpihɔgʋ dieke dɩ yalla ballɩ yaa haagɩsɩ, ʋ ballɩlɩ yaa haagɩsɩsɩ mʋ ba piili a bʋgɩrɩma ba ŋmɩŋchɩgɩla tʋʋma a woliŋ a daansɩma ba tigiŋ vuosi, naa nan vaa ba tieliŋ gbaŋ dii ba wubiŋ nyʋarɩ, dama die Ŋmɩŋ dɩ yaala.

eng: A widow who is truly needy and all alone puts her hope in God and keeps on going with requests and prayers, night and day.
local: Kpihɔgʋ dieke dɩ senne mʋ suŋŋiŋ yine vuodieke dɩ wone vuosi. Wʋnɩŋ ʋ yaa wa tama Ŋmɩŋ ma ta jʋʋsa wa saŋŋa mana yuŋ aŋaŋ ŋmɩntʋasɩ dɩ ʋ suŋŋi wo.

eng: But a widow who tries to live a life of luxury is dead even while she is alive.
local: Ama kpihɔgʋ dieke dɩ yinene ʋ dʋŋŋʋ wɔŋ kpii mɩŋ ta ye bie ʋ mɩsɩ ma.

eng: Teach these things so that the families will be without fault.
local: Yɩma ba kpaaŋkʋ gie aŋ ba dɩmaha amʋ ba kaaŋ dɩ yaa wʋbɩaŋ.

eng: But if someone doesnt provide for their own family, and especially for a member of their household, they have denied the faith. They are worse than those who have no faith.
local: Vuodieke dɩ kana ka daansa ʋ maarɩŋ, a tɩaŋ a mana ʋ tigiŋ vuosi, ʋ ka mɩŋŋɩ dɩ yadaka; ta vuodieke dɩ kana ka yi Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrɩŋ gbaŋ dɩ tɩaŋ wa.

eng: Put a widow on the list who is older than years old and who was faithful to her husband.
local: Da bɩsɩma kpihɔgʋ diekemba dɩ kana ka kʋrɩŋ tɩaŋ bɩna baŋɩsɩ-yʋaba a gʋtɩma kpihɔgʋba bɩsɩkʋ ma. A bɩ gʋtɩ ʋ mʋ ʋ yiwo vuodieke die dɩ yalla chʋrʋ balɩmɩŋ.

eng: She should have a reputation for doing good: raising children, providing hospitality to strangers, washing the feet of the saints, helping those in distress, and dedicating herself to every kind of good thing.
local: ta ba sɩba wa dɩ ʋ yiwo vuodieke dɩ tʋnnana tʋnvɩɩna: sɩba ballɩ mɩŋŋɩ wubiŋ, ta tuose chaanɩŋ ʋ tigiŋ me, ta yie sʋʋŋ-n-gbaŋ tʋʋma a suŋŋi ʋ Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrɩŋ chanchaalɩŋ, ta suŋŋe vuodiekemba dɩ benne wumugisike me, ta bɩ yi vuodieke dɩ nagɩna ʋ gbaŋ mana a yi tʋnvɩɩna yiile me.

eng: But dont accept younger widows for the list. When their physical desires distract them from Christ, they will want to get married.
local: Ama da nagɩ kpihɔgʋlɩabaha a gʋtɩma kpihɔgʋba bɩsɩkʋ ma dama saŋŋa dieke ba keŋ yaa lɔla dɩ ba yallɩ chʋllɩŋ ba ŋaaŋ zeti Masia mɩŋ.

eng: Then they will be judged for setting aside their earlier commitment.
local: ta gobi nʋa dieke ba yɩna wa wa ta juu bɩaŋ ma.

eng: Also, they learn to be lazy by going from house to house. They are not only lazy, but they also become gossips and busybodies, talking about things they shouldnt.
local: A bɩ gʋtɩ ba ŋaaŋ chʋʋsa ba saŋŋa ta ka yaala tʋʋma, ama ta dɩdɩa gara tige tige ta bʋgɩra kʋagaarɩŋ, ta juo vuosi wɩa ma, ta dɩdɩa bala wudiekemba dɩ kana ka mʋ dɩ ba balɩ.

eng: So I want younger widows to marry, have children, and manage their homes so that they wont give the enemy any reason to slander us. .
local: Die wɩa manɩŋ n tɩŋ nan dɩ yaala kpihɔgʋ diekemba dɩ yene ka kʋrɩŋya wa yallɩ chʋllɩŋ a mɩɩrɩ ballɩ ta daansɩma ba deŋ, amʋ tɩ dataasɩ kaaŋ ye sieŋ a bala wʋbɩatɩ yaa gamma tɩ ma.

eng: Some have already turned away to follow Satan.
local: dama kpihɔgʋba bataŋ wɔŋ yiŋŋi a dɩ Sitaani mɩŋ.

eng: If any woman who is a believer has widows in her family, she should take care of them and not burden the church, so that it can help other widows who are truly needy.
local: Ama dɩɩ yi ta hɔgʋ dieke dɩ yine Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrʋ dɩ yaa kpihɔgʋba ʋ tigiŋ me, ʋ mʋ ʋ mɩŋŋɩ daansɩma ba, ta da nagɩ ba chiidʋnsa a chiime Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrɩŋ, amʋ ba nan bɩagɩ a mɩŋŋɩ daansɩma kpihɔgʋ diekemba dɩ benne ba nyɩɩna ma.

eng: Elders who lead well should be paid double, especially those who work with public speaking and teaching.
local: Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrɩŋ nyɩŋkʋra diekemba dɩ mɩŋŋɩna a tʋma ba tʋʋma wa mʋ vuosi yɩma ba jɩlɩma aŋaŋ tune vɩɩnɩŋ; ta vuodiekemba dɩ mʋʋlɩna Masia wɩa ta daga ba a chɩasɩ, banɩŋ ba faasɩna mʋ aŋaŋ jɩlɩma aŋaŋ tune vɩɩnɩŋ.

eng: The scripture says, Dont put a muzzle on an ox while it treads grain , and Workers deserve their pay .
local: dama dɩ maagɩya Ŋmɩŋ gbaŋkʋ sʋŋ dɩ, Naakʋakɩŋ dɩ tɩba zaa ta zaabie dɩ nyɩnna, daa bɔbɩ ka nʋaŋ, ka bɩ maagɩ dɩ, Tʋntʋntʋ mʋ ʋ tuo ʋ tune.

eng: Dont accept an accusation made against an elder unless it is confirmed by two or three witnesses.
local: Dɩɩ yi vuoŋ dɩ balɩ dɩ nyɩŋkʋraha wʋnyɩ yi wɩɩŋ, daa vaa fʋ baga bemme ka ma, ntaala siara vuosi yi vuosi bale yaa bataa.

eng: Discipline those who are sinning in front of everyone so that all the others will be afraid.
local: Vuodiekemba dɩ yinene bɩabʋ, galɩŋ ba vuosi sʋŋ, amʋ vuotɩalɩkaha nan dɩ chɩga ŋmaamɩŋ.

eng: I charge you before God and Christ Jesus and the elect angels to follow these practices without bias, and without playing favorites.
local: Nabidie Ŋmɩŋ aŋaŋ Yisa Masia aŋaŋ wʋnɩŋ Ŋmɩŋ malakasi nɩŋŋa maŋ yɩa fʋ kpaaŋkʋ gie aŋaŋ nɩŋŋmɩna, dɩ fʋ tuo dagɩkʋ gie ta daa lugime fʋ wɩɩŋ mana ma.

eng: Dont rush to commission anyone to leadership, and dont participate in the sins of others. Keep yourself morally pure.
local: Daa yime lagɩ lagɩ dɩ fʋ nagɩ fʋ nuusi dɩɩsɩ vuoŋ ma aŋ ʋ yi Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrɩŋ nɩŋŋandɩɩsɩrʋ. Daa nagɩma fʋ nuuŋ a lume vuosi wʋbɩatɩ ma; ama mɩŋŋɩ pɔgɩlɩ fʋ gbaŋ.

eng: Dont drink water anymore, but use a little wine because of your stomach problems and your frequent illnesses.
local: Fʋ kana ka hagɩrɩŋ saŋŋa mana wa, daa nyume nyaaŋ nyɩɩna ma, ama ŋaaŋ nyu daaŋ bɩta aŋ bʋ suŋŋi fʋ nyuutiti.

eng: The sins of some people are obvious, and the sins are judged before the people must face judgment, but the sins of other people show up later.
local: Vuosi bataŋ tʋmbɩatɩ wɔŋ dʋa wa yaalɩŋ ma ta ba ye ka dii ba sarɩya; ta vuosi bataŋ tʋmbɩatɩ nan daansɩ nyɩŋ yaalɩŋ ma ba sarɩya diile kʋaŋ.

eng: In the same way, the good that people do is also obvious and cant be hidden.
local: Tʋnvɩɩna gbaŋ yiwo die, a taŋ nyɩŋ wa yaalɩŋ ma, ta nyindiekemba dɩ kana ka nyɩŋ yaalɩŋ ma gbaŋ dɩ kaaŋ bɩagɩ lɔbɩrɩ.

eng: From Paul, an apostle of Christ Jesus by Gods will, to promote the promise of life that is in Christ Jesus.
local: Manɩŋ Pɔɔli, vuodieke dɩ yine Yisa Masia tʋntʋntʋ Ŋmɩŋ choti ma wa, dɩ n mʋʋlɩma miivoli dieke Ŋmɩŋ dɩ yɩ nʋaŋ dɩ ʋ nan yɩ wa Masia wɩa wa.

eng: To Timothy, my dear child. Grace, mercy, and peace from God the Father and Christ Jesus our Lord.
local: n maaga gbaŋkʋ gie a yɩa n bʋachoti Timoti. Tɩ Chʋa Ŋmɩŋ aŋaŋ tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Yisa Masia suŋŋi fʋ, ta chɩgɩ fʋ zɔɔlɩŋ, ta bɩ yɩ fʋ sʋgɩdʋagɩŋ.

eng: Im grateful to God, whom I serve with a good conscience as my ancestors did. I constantly remember you in my prayers day and night.
local: Ŋmɩŋ vuodieke n jɩanna aŋaŋ sʋgɩyɩalɩŋ sɩba n chɔɔŋkʋʋlɩŋ die dɩ jɩanna wa dene wo, maŋ keŋ jʋʋsa wa n ŋaaŋ tɩɩnsɩ wa fʋ wɩa saŋŋa mana n jʋʋsɩkʋ ma, yuŋ aŋaŋ ŋmɩntʋasɩ, ta waasa wa fʋ wɩa.

eng: When I remember your tears, I long to see you so that I can be filled with happiness.
local: N tɩɩnsa fʋ nɩntaantɩ wɩa, ta ko yaala n ye fʋ ta yallɩma sʋgɩfɩalɩŋ pam.

eng: Im reminded of your authentic faith, which first lived in your grandmother Lois and your mother Eunice. Im sure that this faith is also inside you.
local: Ta tɩɩnsa fʋ yine Yisa Masia yada aŋaŋ wusie dene wo, yada dieke fʋ nuŋkʋʋŋ Lowisi aŋaŋ fʋ nuŋ Yunisi die dɩ yalla wa, n sɩba dɩ fʋ gbaŋ yaa wa kanɩŋ yadaka mi.

eng: Because of this, Im reminding you to revive Gods gift that is in you through the laying on of my hands.
local: Die wɩa maŋ tɩɩnsa fʋ dɩ fʋ vaa piini dieke Ŋmɩŋ dɩ yɩna fʋ saŋŋa dieke n nagɩna n nuuŋ a diisi fʋ ma wa hagɩ ŋmɩŋsikpeŋ.

eng: God didnt give us a spirit that is timid but one that is powerful, loving, and self-controlled.
local: Dama Halɩkasɩ dieke Ŋmɩŋ dɩ yɩna tɩ ka yɩa tɩ ŋmaamɩŋ, ama Halɩkasɩka yɩa tɩ hagɩrɩŋ aŋaŋ choti aŋaŋ yigi-n-gbaŋ beriŋ.

eng: So dont be ashamed of the testimony about the Lord or of me, his prisoner. Instead, share the suffering for the good news, depending on Gods power.
local: Die wɩa, mʋʋlɩma tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ wɩaha ta daa chɩgɩma viivi. Da bɩ chɩgɩma viivi n benne dansarɩka sʋŋ ʋ wɩa wa, ama saagɩma a dime wahala wʋvɩɩnaha wɩa, sɩba Ŋmɩŋ dɩ yɩnana fʋ hagɩrɩŋ dene wo.

eng: God is the one who saved and called us with a holy calling. This wasnt based on what we have done, but it was based on his own purpose and grace that he gave us in Christ Jesus before time began.
local: Wʋnɩŋ Ŋmɩŋ gbatɩna tɩ a taaŋ ta wa tɩ dɩ tɩ keŋ yi ʋ gbaŋ gbaŋ ʋ vuosi, daa tɩ tʋnvɩɩna wɩa, ama ʋ gbaŋ gbaŋ die sanna dɩ ʋ nan chɩgɩ tɩ zɔɔlɩŋ. Die ʋ saŋ wa naa ta ye ka naaŋ dʋnɩa, dɩ ʋ nan chɩgɩ tɩ zɔɔlɩkʋ gie Yisa Masia wɩa.

eng: Now his grace is revealed through the appearance of our savior, Christ Jesus. He destroyed death and brought life and immortality into clear focus through the good news.
local: Ama tɩ Gbɩgbatɩtaantʋ Yisa Masia keniŋ yuorine a dagɩ tɩ, wʋnɩŋ Yisa Masia die chʋʋsɩna kuŋ hagɩrɩŋ, ta bɩ dagɩ tɩ dɩ tɩ saagɩ ʋ wʋvɩɩnaha tɩ nan ye miivoli dieke dɩ wone kpatɩŋ.

eng: I was appointed a messenger, apostle, and teacher of this good news.
local: Ŋmɩŋ wɔŋ wa mɩŋ mɩŋ dɩ n yi tʋntʋntʋ aŋaŋ dɩdagɩrʋ ta mʋʋlɩma wʋvɩɩnaha.

eng: This is also why Im suffering the way I do, but Im not ashamed. I know the one in whom Ive placed my trust. Im convinced that God is powerful enough to protect what he has placed in my trust until that day.
local: Die wɩa, maŋ die wahalaka mi ta ka chɩga viivi. Dama n sɩba vuodieke n tuone a dii wo, ta sɩba aŋaŋ wusie dɩ ʋ nan bɩagɩ gbarɩ jadieke ʋ nagɩna a yi n nuusi me wo a ga tʋgɩ Dakpatɩkɩrɩ daarɩ.

eng: Hold on to the pattern of sound teaching that you heard from me with the faith and love that are in Christ Jesus.
local: Wudieke fʋ wʋnna a nyɩŋ n jigiri, mɩŋŋɩ pɔgɩlɩka aŋaŋ yada aŋaŋ choti dieke Yisa Masia dɩ yɩnana tɩ wa.

eng: Protect this good thing that has been placed in your trust through the Holy Spirit who lives in us.
local: Ŋmɩŋ Halɩkasɩ hagɩrɩŋ dɩ benne fʋ ma wɩa, mɩŋŋɩ pɔgɩlɩ wʋvɩɩŋ diekemba ʋ nagɩna yi fʋ nuusi me wo.

eng: You know that everyone in Asia has turned away from me, including Phygelus and Hermogenes.
local: Sɩba a baarɩ dɩ vuodiekemba mana dɩ benne Asia tɩŋgbaŋ ma wa die chɩgɩ ta vaa mɩŋ mɩŋ; ba bataŋ yine Fejelusi aŋaŋ Hemojenesi.

eng: May the Lord show mercy to Onesiphorus household, because he supported me many times and he wasnt ashamed of my imprisonment.
local: Tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ, chɩgɩ Onesiforusi tigiŋ vuosi zɔɔlɩŋ, dama die ʋ kpaŋŋɩsa mɩŋ mɩŋ saŋŋa mana. Die ʋ ka chɩga viivi aŋaŋ n benne dansarɩka ma wa.

eng: After I arrived in Rome, he quickly looked for me and found me.
local: die ʋ kenne tʋgɩ Romi tɩŋ ma wa, die ʋ piiliye mɩŋ a yaala n jigiŋ a ga tʋgɩ saŋŋa dieke ʋ yene mɩŋ.

eng: May the Lord allow him to find his mercy on that day .
local: Tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ chɩgɩ wa zɔɔlɩŋ Dakpatɩkɩrɩ daarɩ ma. Fʋ gbaŋ sɩba vɩɩnɩŋ die ʋ suŋŋine mɩŋ dene, Efesusi tɩŋ ma.

eng: So, my child, draw your strength from the grace that is in Christ Jesus.
local: N bʋa, fʋnɩŋ nɩŋ vaa fʋ sʋŋ hagɩrɩma Yisa Masia die dɩ suŋŋine fʋ dene ʋ zɔɔlɩnchɩgɩla ma wɩa.

eng: Take the things you heard me say in front of many other witnesses and pass them on to faithful people who are also capable of teaching others.
local: Die fʋ wone a wʋŋ dagɩ dieke a nyɩŋ n jigiri vuosi pam nine me wo, nagɩ kanɩŋ dagɩkʋ mi a dagɩ vuodiekemba dɩ yine yɩantieliŋ, ta nan bɩagɩ dagɩ ba chanchaalɩŋ.

eng: Accept your share of suffering like a good soldier of Christ Jesus.
local: Saagɩma wahala diile Yisa Masia wɩa sɩba soja vɩɩnʋ dɩ ŋaana die wahala dene wo.

eng: Nobody who serves in the military gets tied up with civilian matters, so that they can please the one who recruited them.
local: Soja dieke dɩ yaala ʋ jakʋʋŋ nine suuli wo ʋ ka bɩ lagɩma ʋ beriŋ aŋaŋ wudieke dɩ kana ka yi sojasi tʋʋma.

eng: Also in the same way, athletes dont win unless they follow the rules.
local: Vuodieke dɩ chɩgɩnana pagɩsɩŋ chɩgɩla kaaŋ bɩagɩ chɩgɩ dii ta tuo diilehe tune ntaala ʋ dɩɩ chɩgɩlaha mɩraha mana.

eng: A hardworking farmer should get the first share of the crop.
local: Kpɩkpaarʋ dieke dɩ faasɩna tʋŋ aŋaŋ nɩŋŋmɩna mʋ ʋ woliŋ ye wo nyindiikehe tʋaŋ.

eng: Think about what Im saying; the Lord will give you understanding about everything.
local: Yilime yaa gamma wudieke n balala dama tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ nan yɩ fʋ yɩaŋ aŋ fʋ sɩmma a mana chɩasɩ.

eng: Remember Jesus Christ, who was raised from the dead and descended from David. This is my good news.
local: Tɩɩnsɩma Yisa Masia wɩa, vuodieke die dɩ yine naaŋ Davidi haagɩŋ ta hagɩ kumbu me wo, sɩba n mʋʋlɩna wʋvɩɩnaha a dagɩ dene wo.

eng: This is the reason Im suffering to the point that Im in prison like a common criminal. But Gods word cannot be imprisoned.
local: N mʋʋlɩnana wʋvɩɩnaha wɩa n die wahala ta ba bɔbɩ mɩŋ aŋaŋ chɔrɩma sɩba wʋbɩayiiru. Ama Ŋmɩŋ wɩaha nɩŋ ka bɔbɩ aŋaŋ chɔrɩma.

eng: This is why I endure everything for the sake of those who are chosen by God so that they too may experience salvation in Christ Jesus with eternal glory.
local: Ta yaa hanɩa wahala mana ma Ŋmɩŋ vuovʋarɩkaha wɩa, amʋ ba gbaŋ ba nan ye gbatɩtaanɩŋ Yisa Masia ma, ta yallɩma sʋgɩfɩalɩ dieke dɩ wone kpatɩŋ.

eng: This saying is reliable: If we have died together, we will also live together.
local: Wɩaha gie yiwo wusie dɩ: Dɩɩ yi tɩ kpiye mɩŋ aŋaŋ wa tɩ nan keŋ yaa miivoli aŋaŋ wa.

eng: If we endure, we will also rule together. If we deny him, he will also deny us.
local: Dɩɩ yi tɩ bɩ kpaŋŋa tɩ gbaŋ tɩ nan keŋ gʋtɩ dii naaŋ aŋaŋ wa; ama tɩ baarɩ tɩ ka sɩba wa ʋ gbaŋ ʋ nan keŋ baarɩ dɩ ʋ ka sɩba tɩ.

eng: If we are disloyal, he stays faithful because he cant be anything else than what he is.
local: Dɩɩ yi tɩ keŋ yiŋŋi ʋ kʋaŋ ama wʋnɩŋ nɩŋ ʋ nan wɩarɩ yi wusietieŋ dama ʋ kaaŋ bɩagɩ chiisi ʋ gbaŋ gbaŋ beriŋ.

eng: Remind them of these things and warn them in the sight of God not to engage in battles over words that arent helpful and only destroy those who hear them.
local: Tɩɩnsɩma fʋ vuosi wɩɩrɩ gie, ta kpaaŋ ba aŋaŋ nɩŋŋmɩna Ŋmɩŋ nɩŋŋa dɩ ba daa wagɩma yaa gamma wʋpɩasɩtɔgɩtɩ ma, a wo nyʋarɩ ama a chʋʋsa vuodiekemba dɩ wʋnnana wa mɩŋ.

eng: Make an effort to present yourself to God as a tried-and-true worker, who doesnt need to be ashamed but is one who interprets the message of truth correctly.
local: Kpaŋŋɩ fʋ gbaŋ aŋ Ŋmɩŋ bɩrɩ fʋ, ta yi tʋntʋntʋ dieke dɩ kana ka chɩga viivi aŋaŋ ʋ tʋʋma, ta mɩŋŋɩ daga Ŋmɩŋ wusieke.

eng: Avoid their godless discussions, because they will lead many people into ungodly behavior.
local: Vʋarɩ fʋ gbaŋ a nyɩŋ wʋbalɩkɩ tɔgɩtɩ ma, dama ka wo nyʋarɩ ta nan bɩ vaa vuosi bemme saasaa aŋaŋ Ŋmɩŋ.

eng: and their ideas will spread like an infection. This includes Hymenaeus and Philetus.
local: Hanɩŋ wʋbalɩka nɩŋ sɩɩ sɩba kʋjagɩ dieke dɩ kana ka kpiye. Hamenusi aŋaŋ Filetusi ye daga die dagɩkʋ.

eng: who have deviated from the truth by claiming that the resurrection has already happened. This has undermined some peoples faith.
local: Ba va wa wusie dagɩkʋ ta bala dɩ kumbu hagɩkʋ wɔŋ keŋ a tɩaŋ mɩŋ, die wɩa ta chʋʋsa vuosi bataŋ yada.

eng: Gods solid foundation is still standing with this sign: The Lord knows the people who belong to him, and Everyone who confesses the Lords name must avoid wickedness. .
local: ama Ŋmɩŋ vuovʋarɩka nɩŋ zie mɩŋ ta ka dɔma, ta wudieke dɩ maagɩna a dɩɩsɩ ba ma yiwo naa: Tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ sɩba vuodiekemba dɩ yine ʋ sɩɩtɩ, ta a bɩ maagɩ dɩ, Vuodieke nɩŋ mana dɩ balala dɩ ʋ yiwo tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ sɩɩtɩ mʋ ʋ chɩgɩ nyɩŋ wa bɩaŋ yiile me.

eng: In a mansion, there arent just gold and silver bowls but also some bowls that are made of wood and clay. Some are meant for special uses, some for garbage.
local: Kpala yiri yiri bie wo tigikpɩɩŋ ma, daa a mana yine kʋrɩbɩsɩ, ataŋ yiwo tɩmbala ta ataŋ dɩaŋ dɩ yi kpala. A taŋ zie mɩŋ a gbarɩ wa daakpɩɩŋ daraaŋ, ataŋ dɩaŋ ba yaa tʋma daaŋ mana.

eng: So if anyone washes filth off themselves, they will be set apart as a special bowl. They will be useful to the owner of the mansion for every sort of good work.
local: Vuodieke dɩ vana bɩaŋ ta yi sʋgɩyɩalɩntieŋ, bala ʋ yi kpalɩ dieke Ŋmɩŋ dɩ bala ʋ nagɩ tʋŋ ʋ tʋʋma, fʋ beriŋ nan dɩ vɩɩna, ta nan yi siri dɩ tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ nagɩ fʋ tʋŋ tʋnvɩɩnɩŋ mana.

eng: Run away from adolescent cravings. Instead, pursue righteousness, faith, love, and peace together with those who confess the Lord with a clean heart.
local: Vʋarɩ fʋ gbaŋ a nyɩŋ dalʋaka lɔlɩbɩatɩ ma, ta mɩma a yaalɩma sʋgɩyɩalɩŋ, aŋaŋ yada, aŋaŋ choti, aŋaŋ sʋgɩdʋagɩŋ, ta lagɩma aŋaŋ vuodiekemba dɩ yalla sʋgɩyɩalɩŋ ta wasa tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ dɩ ʋ suŋŋi be wo.

eng: Avoid foolish and thoughtless discussions, since you know that they produce conflicts.
local: Chɩgɩ nyɩŋ gaantɩŋ aŋaŋ nɩnhagɩrɩtɔgɩtɩ ma, dama sɩba a baarɩ a kpatɩŋ yiwo waagɩŋ.

eng: Gods slave shouldnt be argumentative but should be kind toward all people, able to teach, patient.
local: Tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ tʋntʋntʋ ka mʋ ʋ wagɩma waagɩŋ. Ʋ mʋ ʋ yi burichi vuoŋ, ta yi dɩdagɩrʋvɩɩŋ dieke dɩ yalla suguru.

eng: and should correct opponents with gentleness. Perhaps God will change their mind and give them a knowledge of the truth.
local: ta yi vuodieke dɩ benne sɔmm, ta kpaama vuodiekemba dɩ nɩgɩnana nɩnhagɩrɩŋ aŋaŋ wa. Vuoŋ zɩ Ŋmɩŋ nan keŋ vaa ba tarɩgɩ ba beriŋ ta keŋ sɩmma wusieke.

eng: They may come to their senses and escape from the devils trap that holds them captive to do his will.
local: ta ba sʋŋanyile nan yiŋŋi keŋ aŋ ba chɩgɩ nyɩŋ Sitaani chachabɩ ma, chachabɩ dieke dɩ yigine be ta vaa ba yie ʋ dʋŋŋʋkʋ wa.

eng: Understand that the last days will be dangerous times.
local: N yaala fʋ sɩmma wɩɩrɩ gie, dɩ dakpatɩkaha saŋŋa dɩ nan dɩ tʋa.

eng: People will be selfish and love money. They will be the kind of people who brag and who are proud. They will slander others, and they will be disobedient to their parents. They will be ungrateful, unholy.
local: Vuota nan yi halɩtieliŋ, ta faasɩ cho ligire, ta yi kalinbaan tieliŋ, ta kuule, ta bɩ yi vuodiekemba dɩ zɩanana vuosi, aŋaŋ vuodiekemba dɩ kana ka tuose ba tieliŋ nʋa, aŋaŋ vuodiekemba nine dɩ kana ka suule jaaŋ, aŋaŋ vuodiekemba dɩ kana ka chɩga Ŋmɩŋ.

eng: unloving, contrary, and critical. They will be without self-control and brutal, and they wont love what is good.
local: ta yi vuodiekemba dɩ wone choti aŋaŋ taŋ, ta kaaŋ dɩ chɩga zɔɔlɩŋ, ta yi mɔlanfɩkɩtieliŋ, ta kaaŋ bɩagɩ yige ba gbaŋ, ta nan dɩ tʋa, ta kaaŋ dɩ yaala wʋvɩɩnɩŋ.

eng: They will be people who are disloyal, reckless, and conceited. They will love pleasure instead of loving God.
local: ta nan dɩ nyɩnna ba chanchaalɩŋ kʋaŋ, ta yi pogi pogi tieliŋ, ta kɔta ba gbaŋ, ba nan dɩ cho nansɩŋ a tɩaŋ Ŋmɩŋ.

eng: They will look like they are religious but deny Gods power. Avoid people like this.
local: ba nan keŋ a yi sɩba vuodiekemba dɩ jɩanna Ŋmɩŋ ama ta zeti Ŋmɩŋ hagɩrɩbʋ. Nɩ vʋarɩ nɩ gbaŋ a nyɩŋ banɩŋ vuosi mi.

eng: Some will slither into households and control immature women who are burdened with sins and driven by all kinds of desires.
local: Ba bataŋ juo tige me a gaama hɔgʋgaatɩba, vuodiekemba dɩ yinene bɩaŋ pam wa ta dɩ ba sʋgɩtɩ lɔlɩbɩatɩ yiri yiri wo.

eng: These women are always learning, but they can never arrive at an understanding of the truth.
local: Saŋŋa mana hɔgʋba gie bʋgɩra mɩŋ ama ba kaaŋ wɔŋ sɩba wusie sieku.

eng: These people oppose the truth in the same way that Jannes and Jambres opposed Moses. Their minds are corrupt and their faith is counterfeit.
local: Sɩba Janesi aŋaŋ Jamberesi die dɩ kana ka saagɩ a yɩ Mosisi wo, dembisi gie sɩwa dene, ba waga aŋaŋ wusieke, ba sʋŋanyile ka vɩɩna, ba ka bɩ dɩ yadaka sieŋ.

eng: But they wont get very far. Their foolishness will become obvious to everyone like those others.
local: Ama ba kaaŋ dɩ gaama vuosi a yʋasɩ, dama vuoŋ mana nan keŋ ye ba gaatɩŋ dɩ sɩna die sɩba die dɩ yine a yi Janesi aŋaŋ Jamberesi dene wo.

eng: But you have paid attention to my teaching, conduct, purpose, faithfulness, patience, love, and endurance.
local: Ama fʋnɩŋ nɩŋ, dɩ wa n dagɩkʋ aŋaŋ n beriŋ aŋaŋ n sʋŋanyile. Wɔŋ sɩba n yine Masia yada dene, aŋaŋ suguru, aŋaŋ n choti aŋaŋ vuota, aŋaŋ n hanɩa.

eng: You have seen me experience physical abuse and ordeals in places such as Antioch, Iconium, and Lystra. I put up with all sorts of abuse, and the Lord rescued me from it all!.
local: ta bɩ sɩba vuosi dɩ mugisine mɩŋ dene, aŋaŋ n wahala diile. Sɩba wudiekemba mana die dɩ yine mɩŋ Antiyoku aŋaŋ Yikonumi aŋaŋ Lisitira tɩgɩsɩ me. Sɩba die n yene mugisibɩatɩ dene, ama tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ die vʋarɩ mɩŋ mɩŋ a nyɩŋ a mana ma.

eng: In fact, anyone who wants to live a holy life in Christ Jesus will be harassed.
local: Wusie, vuodiekemba mana dɩ yine Yisa Masia sɩɩtɩ ta yaala ba bemme vɩɩnɩŋ nan ye mugisiŋ a nyɩŋ vuosi jigiŋ;.

eng: But evil people and swindlers will grow even worse, as they deceive others while being deceived themselves.
local: ta vuobɩatɩ aŋaŋ gɩgaantɩba nan keŋ gʋta ba wʋbɩatɩ ta gaama vuosi ta vuosi dɩaŋ dɩ gaama ba.

eng: But you must continue with the things you have learned and found convincing. You know who taught you.
local: Ama fʋnɩŋ nɩŋ, ye yalla wusie dieke ba dagɩna fʋ wa, ta fʋ faasɩ tuo dii wo, dama wɔŋ sɩba dɩ vuodiekemba dɩ yine fʋ dɩdagɩrɩŋ yiwo wusietieliŋ.

eng: Since childhood you have known the holy scriptures that help you to be wise in a way that leads to salvation through faith that is in Christ Jesus.
local: Ta fʋ ballɩbɩsɩ mi wɔŋ sɩba Ŋmɩŋ gbaŋkʋ dɩ bɩagɩna yɩa fʋ yɩaŋ ta daga fʋ fʋ baaŋ yi Yisa yada dene ta ye gbatɩtaanɩŋ.

eng: Every scripture is inspired by God and is useful for teaching, for showing mistakes, for correcting, and for training character.
local: Wudieke mana dɩ benne Ŋmɩŋ gbaŋkʋ ma wa nyɩŋ wa ʋ nʋaŋ ma, ta a mana dɩ yaa nyʋarɩ, ta daga ʋ wɩa, ta kpaama tɩ, ta wʋnsa tɩ beriŋ, ta daga tɩ sʋgɩyɩalɩŋ beriŋ.

eng: so that the person who belongs to God can be equipped to do everything that is good.
local: dɩ vuodieke dɩ jɩanna Ŋmɩŋ beriŋ vɩɩŋ ma, dɩ ʋ yi siri ta tʋma wʋvɩɩna yiri yiri mana.

eng: Those who are under the bondage of slavery should consider their own masters as worthy of full respect so that Gods name and our teaching wont get a bad reputation.
local: Dɩ yiwo talasɩ dɩ vuodiekemba mana dɩ yine yɔŋɩsɩ yɩma ba tieliŋ jɩlɩma, amʋ vuoŋ kaaŋ balɩ wʋbɩaŋ yaa gamma Ŋmɩŋ ma aŋaŋ tɩ dagɩkʋ.

eng: And those who have masters who are believers shouldnt look down on them because they are brothers. Instead, they should serve them more faithfully, because the people who benefit from your good service are believers who are loved. Teach and encourage these things.
local: Yɔŋɩsɩ diekemba tieliŋ dɩ yine Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrɩba daa vaa ba jɩlɩma yɩɩla dɩ ba yine ba nɩmballɩ wɩa, ama dɩ yiwo talasɩ dɩ banɩŋ ba faasɩ tʋma vɩɩnɩŋ, dama vuodiekemba dɩ yenene ba tʋʋmaha nyʋarɩka yiwo ba Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrɩŋ chanchaalɩŋ ta ba cho be. Dɩ yiwo talasɩ dɩ fʋ dagɩma ta mʋʋlɩma wɩaha gie.

eng: If anyone teaches anything different and doesnt agree with sound teaching about our Lord Jesus Christ and teaching that is consistent with godliness.
local: Vuodieke nɩŋ mana dɩ dagɩnana dagɩgaaŋ ta ka saagɩ a yi tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Yisa Masia nʋawɩaha aŋaŋ tɩ jɩaŋkʋ dagɩkʋ.

eng: that person is conceited. They dont understand anything but have a sick obsession with debates and arguments. This creates jealousy, conflict, verbal abuse, and evil suspicions.
local: suuliye mɩŋ aŋaŋ kalinbaani ta ka sɩba wɩɩŋ, ta bɩ yallɩ nɩnhagɩrɩŋ aŋaŋ waagɩŋ lɔla yaa gamma wʋbalɩka chɩasɩ, ta naa yaa wa sʋgɩbɩaŋ aŋaŋ waagɩŋ, aŋaŋ vuosi zɩala aŋaŋ wʋbɩsɩbɩsɩ.

eng: There is constant bickering between people whose minds are ruined and who have been robbed of the truth. They think that godliness is a way to make money!.
local: aŋaŋ nɩnhagɩrɩŋ saŋŋa mana vuobɩatɩ jigiŋ. Banɩŋ ba sʋgɩtɩ ka mɩŋŋɩ tʋma, ta ba bɩ wo wusieke. Ta bɩ yile dɩ Ŋmɩŋ dɩɩsɩŋ nan yi vuoŋ yi nyintitieŋ.

eng: Actually, godliness is a great source of profit when it is combined with being happy with what you already have.
local: Dɩɩ yi vuoŋ nine dɩ suuli jadieke ʋ yalla, Ŋmɩŋ jɩaŋkʋ seŋ yie vuosi dɩ yie nyintitieliŋ.

eng: We didnt bring anything into the world and so we cant take anything out of it.
local: dama die tɩ ka yaa jaaŋ mana a keŋ dʋnɩa ka gie me, ta tɩ kaaŋ bɩ nyɩŋ ka ma aŋaŋ jaaŋ mana.

eng: well be happy with food and clothing.
local: Die wɩa dɩɩ yi tɩ yaa nyindiike aŋaŋ garɩtɩ tɩ vaa tɩ nine suulihe.

eng: But people who are trying to get rich fall into temptation. They are trapped by many stupid and harmful passions that plunge people into ruin and destruction.
