eng: But what praise comes from enduring patiently when you have sinned and are beaten for it? But if you endure steadfastly when youve done good and suffer for it, this is commendable before God.
local: Ama dɩɩ yi fʋ yi bɩaŋ ta ba nɩgɩ fʋ ta fʋ tuo tɩbɩdatɩkʋ sɔmm, lalɩa fʋ baa fʋ ye bɩrɩŋ? Ama dɩɩ yi fʋ yi wudieke dɩ vɩɩŋna ta ba nɩgɩ fʋ ta fʋ tuo nɩgɩkʋ sɔmm, die vɩɩŋna Ŋmɩŋ nɩŋŋa.

eng: You were called to this kind of endurance, because Christ suffered on your behalf. He left you an example so that you might follow in his footsteps.
local: Naa wɩa Ŋmɩŋ die dɩ vʋarɩ nɩ, dama Masia gbaŋ gbaŋ die dii wo wahala nɩ wɩa, aŋ ka yi dagɩtɩ a yɩ nɩ dɩ nɩ dɩa ʋ nagɩsɩ.

eng: He committed no sin, nor did he ever speak in ways meant to deceive.
local: Dɩ, Die ʋ ka yi bɩaŋ mana, ta die ba ka ye wo ta ʋ gaama vuosi aŋaŋ ʋ wʋbalɩka.

eng: When he was insulted, he did not reply with insults. When he suffered, he did not threaten revenge. Instead, he entrusted himself to the one who judges justly.
local: Die ba zɩa wa mɩŋ ama die ʋ ka yiŋŋi a zɩa ba, ta die ba vaa ʋ dii wahalaha, die ʋ ka yiŋŋi vuoŋ wɩɩŋ aŋaŋ sɩnyɩɩrɩŋ, ama ta die nagɩ ʋ gbaŋ a yi Ŋmɩŋ nuusi me, vuodieke dɩ dinene vuoŋ mana sarɩya ta ka luge wo.

eng: He carried in his own body on the cross the sins we committed. He did this so that we might live in righteousness, having nothing to do with sin. By his wounds you were healed.
local: Wʋnɩŋ Masia gbaŋ gbaŋ die chine tɩ tʋmbɩatɩ ʋ nyɩŋgbanɩŋ ma dagarɩkʋ ma, amʋ tɩ nan nyɩŋ bɩaŋ ma ta yi vuovɩɩna Ŋmɩŋ jigiŋ. Dama ʋ daŋŋa wɩa tɩ ye gbaamɩŋ.

eng: Though you were like straying sheep, you have now returned to the shepherd and guardian of your lives.
local: Die nɩ sɩɩ sɩba yii diekemba dɩ bana mɩŋ, ama lele nɩ yiŋŋi keŋ wo nɩ Yiyagɩrʋ wa jigiŋ vuodieke dɩ gbarɩna nɩ.

eng: Wives, likewise, submit to your own husbands. Do this so that even if some of them refuse to believe the word, they may be won without a word by their wives way of life.
local: Hɔgʋba, die gbaŋ gbaŋ dɩ sɩɩ aŋaŋ nɩnɩŋ, nɩ sʋʋma nɩ gbaŋ a yɩma nɩ chʋllɩŋ amʋ dɩɩ yi ba bataŋ dɩ ka yi Ŋmɩŋ wʋvɩɩnaha yada, ama vuoŋ zɩ nɩ beriŋ wɩa ba nan keŋ yi yada, ta dɩ kaaŋ bɩ yi talasɩ dɩ nɩ balɩ wɩɩŋ gbaŋ.

eng: After all, they will have observed the reverent and holy manner of your lives.
local: naa nan yi dama ba ye nɩ beriŋ dɩ vɩɩŋna aŋaŋ wusie ta nɩ yaa jɩlɩma dene.

eng: Dont try to make yourselves beautiful on the outside, with stylish hair or by wearing gold jewelry or fine clothes.
local: Hɔgʋ diekemba dɩ yine Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrɩba vɩɩnɩŋ ka nyɩna nyindiekemba ba yeeginene me, da a nyɩna nyinti sɩba sikpeŋ zoosi bobiŋ yaa salɩma tʋkpaarɩsɩ yiile yaa aŋaŋ garɩvɩɩna bobiŋ.

eng: Instead, make yourselves beautiful on the inside, in your hearts, with the enduring quality of a gentle, peaceful spirit. This type of beauty is very precious in Gods eyes.
local: Ama ba vɩɩnɩŋ nyɩna ba sʋgɩtɩ ma, a nyɩna nyinti sɩba sʋʋŋ-n gbaŋ tɩŋgbaŋ aŋaŋ sɔmm beriŋ. Kanɩŋ vɩɩŋkʋ wo chʋʋsɩŋ ta bɩ faasɩ vɩɩna Ŋmɩŋ nɩŋŋa.

eng: For it was in this way that holy women who trusted in God used to make themselves beautiful, accepting the authority of their own husbands.
local: Dama naa die hɔgʋ diekemba die dɩ jɩanna Ŋmɩŋ kʋrɩŋ ma ta yaa ba tama ʋ ma wa die dɩ ye ba vɩɩnɩŋ. Hɔgʋba mi die sʋʋŋ wa ba gbaŋ a yɩ ba gbaŋ gbaŋ ba chʋllɩŋ mɩŋ.

eng: For example, Sarah accepted Abrahams authority when she called him master . You have become her children when you do good and dont respond to threats with fear.
local: Sɩba Sara die dɩ sɩna dene wo, Sara die tuose ʋ chʋrʋ Abarahami nʋaŋ ta die wasa wa dɩ, N Tieŋ. Nɩnɩŋ hɔgʋ diekemba dɩ yine Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrɩba sɩɩ sɩba wʋnɩŋ ʋ ballɩ dama nɩ yie vɩɩnɩŋ ta ka chɩga wɩɩŋ.

eng: Husbands, likewise, submit by living with your wife in ways that honor her, knowing that she is the weaker partner. Honor her all the more, as she is also a coheir of the gracious care of life. Do this so that your prayers wont be hindered.
local: Nɩnɩŋ dembisi diekemba dɩaŋ dɩ yalla hɔgʋba, nɩ nagɩ yɩaŋ ta bemme vɩɩnɩŋ aŋaŋ ba, ta yɩma ba jɩlɩma, ta sɩmma a baarɩ ba yiwo wabɩtɩ nɩ jigiŋ. Ta bɩ sɩmma a baarɩ dɩ hɔgʋba aŋaŋ dembisi nan daansɩ lagɩsɩ taŋ a tuo Ŋmɩŋ piini dieke dɩ yine miivolike. Naa nan vaa ta wɩɩŋ kaaŋ kagɩ nɩ Ŋmɩŋ jʋʋsɩŋ.

eng: Finally, all of you be of one mind, sympathetic, lovers of your fellow believers, compassionate, and modest in your opinion of yourselves.
local: Wudieke dɩ tɩalɩna yiwo naa, nɩ mana yallɩma sʋgɩbalɩmɩŋ, ta nɩ baga bemme nɩ chanchaalɩŋ ma, ta yallɩma choti aŋaŋ taŋ, ta chɩgɩma taŋ zɔɔlɩŋ, ta sʋʋma nɩ gbaŋ tɩŋgbaŋ a yɩma taŋ.

eng: Dont pay back evil for evil or insult for insult. Instead, give blessing in return. You were called to do this so that you might inherit a blessing.
local: Dɩɩ yi vuoŋ dɩ keŋ yi nɩ bɩaŋ, nɩ da yiŋŋi yi wo bɩaŋ a tuŋ, ta dɩɩ yi vuoŋ dɩaŋ dɩ keŋ zɩa nɩ, nɩ da yiŋŋi zɩa wa a tuŋ, aayɩ, ama nɩ jʋʋsɩma Ŋmɩŋ dɩ ʋ yi alibarika a yɩ ba, dama Ŋmɩŋ vʋarɩ nɩ dɩ nɩ yime alibarika a yɩma vuosi amʋ nɩ nan ye alibarika nɩ gbaŋ gbaŋ.

eng: For those who want to love life and see good days should keep their tongue from evil speaking and their lips from speaking lies. .
local: Dama dɩ maagɩya Ŋmɩŋ gbaŋkʋ sʋŋ dɩ: Vuodiekemba dɩ yaalala miivoli ta yaala ba keŋ ye daa diekemba dɩ vɩɩŋna, mʋ ba va wa wʋbɩatɩ balɩŋ aŋaŋ ŋmɩnchɩbɩsɩ.

eng: They should shun evil and do good; seek peace and chase after it. .
local: Ba mʋ ba va wa wʋbɩatɩ yiile ta yime vɩɩnɩŋ; ta yaalɩma sʋgɩdʋagɩŋ sieŋ ta dɩa ka aŋaŋ nɩŋŋmɩna.

eng: The Lords eyes are on the righteous and his ears are open to their prayers. But the Lord cannot tolerate those who do evil. .
local: Dama tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ nine bie wo vuovɩɩna ma, ta ʋ bɩ wʋma ba jʋʋsɩŋ saŋŋa mana mɩŋ; ama ta waga aŋaŋ vuodiekemba dɩ yinene bɩaŋ.

eng: Who will harm you if you are zealous for good?.
local: Mɩnɩa balla ʋ yi nɩ bɩaŋ dɩɩ yi nɩ nine dɩ ŋmɩntɩ aŋaŋ vɩɩnɩŋ yiile? Vuoŋ wori!.

eng: But happy are you, even if you suffer because of righteousness! Dont be terrified or upset by them.
local: Ama dɩɩ yi vuoŋ dɩ vaa nɩ die wahala nɩ dɩna berivɩɩŋkʋ sieku wɩa, nɩ yaa sikpeŋ nansɩŋ, nɩ da vaa ba yi aŋ ŋmaamɩŋ yigi nɩ, ta nɩ da bɩ vaa a mugisi nɩ.

eng: Instead, regard Christ the Lord as holy in your hearts. Whenever anyone asks you to speak of your hope, be ready to defend it.
local: ama nɩ bɩrɩma Masia nɩ sʋgɩtɩ ma ta yɩ wa jɩlɩma dama ʋ yiwo tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ. Nɩ yi siri saŋŋa mana, amʋ vuoŋ dɩ keŋ pɩasɩ nɩ dɩ nɩ dagɩ nɩ tama dieke nɩ yalla wa chɩaŋ nɩ nan bɩagɩ a mɩŋŋɩ a yiŋŋi balɩ wa.

eng: Yet do this with respectful humility, maintaining a good conscience. Act in this way so that those who malign your good lifestyle in Christ may be ashamed when they slander you.
local: ama nɩ yiŋŋi balɩma sɔmm aŋaŋ jɩlɩma. Ta yime vɩɩnɩŋ amʋ nɩ sʋŋanyile da mugisi nɩ, amʋ vuodiekemba dɩ balala wʋbɩatɩ a yɩa nɩ wa nɩ benne vɩɩnɩŋ nɩ dɩna Masia wa nan dii viivi ba wʋbalɩkaha ma ta tarɩgɩ.

eng: It is better to suffer for doing good than for doing evil.
local: Dama dɩ kpɩa dɩɩ yi Ŋmɩŋ dʋŋŋʋ dɩ nɩ dii wahala nɩ tʋnvɩɩna wɩa a tɩaŋ nɩ baaŋ dii wahala nɩ tʋmbɩatɩ wɩa.

eng: Christ himself suffered on account of sins, once for all, the righteous one on behalf of the unrighteous. He did this in order to bring you into the presence of God. Christ was put to death as a human, but made alive by the Spirit.
local: Dama Masia gbaŋ gbaŋ die diye wahala bʋnyɩ nyɩɩna ma tʋmbɩatɩ mana wɩa dɩ ka bɩ mʋ dɩ ʋ dii wahala bɩbra, wʋnɩŋ vuodieke die dɩ wone bɩaŋ die tuo wo tɩnɩŋ vuobɩatɩ kuŋ a kpi dɩ ʋ yaa tɩ keŋ Ŋmɩŋ jigiŋ. Die ba kʋʋ wa mɩŋ ama Ŋmɩŋ die vaa ʋ hagɩ kuŋ me aŋaŋ ʋ Halɩkasɩka hagɩrɩŋ.

eng: And it was by the Spirit that he went to preach to the spirits in prison.
local: Naa, Halɩkasɩka ma die ʋ ga haalɩtɩ diekemba dɩ benne dansarɩka kpiiliŋ tigiŋ a ga mʋʋlɩ wusie wʋvɩɩnaha a yɩ ba.

eng: In the past, these spirits were disobedient—when God patiently waited during the time of Noah. Noah built an ark in which a few lives were rescued through water.
local: Haalɩtɩtɩ gie yiwo vuodiekemba die dɩ kana ka tuo Ŋmɩŋ nʋaŋ saŋŋa dieke ʋ dine suguru aŋaŋ ba Nowa saŋka, saŋŋa dieke wʋnɩŋ Nowa die dɩ wʋnsɩ haarɩkpɩɩkʋ, ta vuosi banɩɩŋ nyɩɩna ma die dɩ juu mi ta ye gbatɩtaanɩŋ nyaabʋ ma wa.

eng: Baptism is like that. It saves you now—not because it removes dirt from your body but because it is the mark of a good conscience toward God. Your salvation comes through the resurrection of Jesus Christ.
local: Nyaabʋ mi yiwo Ŋmɩŋ nyaaŋ sɩɩla nɩasɩŋ dɩ gbatɩna tɩ a taaŋ lele naa, daa nyɩŋgbanɩŋ nyaaŋ sɩɩla, ama dɩ yiwo tɩ jʋʋsɩnana Ŋmɩŋ dɩ ʋ sɩɩ tɩ sʋgɩtɩ ta yɩ tɩ sʋŋanyile vɩɩna Yisa Masia kumbu hagɩŋ wɩa wa.

eng: who is at Gods right side. Now that he has gone into heaven, he rules over all angels, authorities, and powers.
local: Ʋ jʋalɩ ga wa arɩzanna ma a ga kalɩ Ŋmɩŋ nuudiigiŋ chaaŋ ta yaa hagɩrɩŋ malakasi ma aŋaŋ nyindiekemba mana tɩ kana ka yese ama ta a bie ta yaa hagɩrɩŋ wa.

eng: Therefore, I have a request for the elders among you. I urge the elders.
local: Nɩnɩŋ Yisa Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrɩba nyɩŋkʋraha n kpaama nɩ mɩŋ, manɩŋ vuodieke gbaŋ dɩ yine Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrɩŋ jakʋʋŋ, ta n nine die dɩ ye Yisa Masia die dɩ dinene wahala dene, ta maŋ nan keŋ gʋtɩ a tuo jɩlɩma dieke dɩ bala ka keŋ nyɩŋ yaalɩŋ ma wa.

eng: Like shepherds, tend the flock of God among you. Watch over it. Dont shepherd because you must, but do it voluntarily for God. Dont shepherd greedily, but do it eagerly.
local: N kpaama nɩ mɩŋ, nɩ mɩŋŋɩ daansɩma Ŋmɩŋ vuosisi dieke dɩ benne nɩ nuusi me wo, aŋ ka daa yi fɔgɩmɩ, ama ka yi nɩ dʋŋŋʋ, dama die Ŋmɩŋ dɩ yaalala, ka daa bɩ yi dɩ nɩ faasɩ yaala ligire wɩa ama ka yi nɩ choti nɩ suŋŋe.

eng: Dont shepherd by ruling over those entrusted to your care, but become examples to the flock.
local: Da faasɩ pɔgɩlɩma Ŋmɩŋ vuosisi ʋ nagɩna ba a yi nɩ nuusi me aŋaŋ fɔgɩŋ, ama nɩ vaa aŋ nɩ beriŋ dagɩma ba ba mʋna ba bemme dene.

eng: And when the chief shepherd appears, you will receive an unfading crown of glory.
local: Ta Masia vuodieke dɩ yine sikpigiletieliŋ mana sikpeŋ wo dɩ keŋ yiŋŋi keŋ, nɩ nan ye jɩlɩma sibubi dieke dɩ yine nɩ nyʋarɩ ta wone chʋʋsɩŋ.

eng: In the same way, I urge you who are younger: accept the authority of the elders. And everyone, clothe yourselves with humility toward each other. God stands against the proud, but he gives favor to the humble.
local: Die gbaŋ gbaŋ dɩ sɩɩ nɩnɩŋ vuodiekemba dɩ yine ballɩhaala, nɩ sʋʋma nɩ gbaŋ tɩŋgbaŋ a yɩma nɩ nyɩŋkʋra; ta nɩ mana sʋʋma nɩ gbaŋ a yɩma taŋ, dama dɩ maagɩya Ŋmɩŋ gbaŋkʋ sʋŋ dɩ, Wʋnɩŋ Ŋmɩŋ zete kalinbaantieliŋ, ta suŋŋe vuodiekemba dɩ sʋʋna ba gbaŋ tɩŋgbaŋ.

eng: Therefore, humble yourselves under Gods power so that he may raise you up in the last day.
local: Die wɩa, nɩ sʋʋŋ nɩ gbaŋ tɩŋgbaŋ Hagɩrɩtieŋ Nabidie Ŋmɩŋ nɩŋŋa, amʋ ʋ nan kɔtɩ nɩ ŋmɩŋsikpeŋ saŋŋa dieke ʋ yaalala.

eng: Throw all your anxiety onto him, because he cares about you.
local: Nɩ nagɩ nɩ wumugisike mana a vigi taaŋ Ŋmɩŋ nɩŋŋa ta ʋ nan chiihe a yɩ nɩ, dama ʋ baga bie nɩ ma.

eng: Be clearheaded. Keep alert. Your accuser, the devil, is on the prowl like a roaring lion, seeking someone to devour.
local: Nɩ yigime nɩ gbaŋ, ta gbara dama Sitaani yiwo nɩ dataaŋ ta dɩ dɩa sɩba naachigiŋ, ʋ sɩɩ sɩba naachigi dieke dɩ dinene tʋaŋ, ta yaala vuoŋ dɩ ʋ kpasɩ wa a ŋɔbɩ.

eng: Resist him, standing firm in the faith. Do so in the knowledge that your fellow believers are enduring the same suffering throughout the world.
local: Nɩnɩŋ nɩ mʋ nɩ mɩŋŋɩ zie keŋ keŋ a wagɩ Sitaani ta da taarɩ a nyɩŋ nɩ yadaka ma, dama nɩ mʋ nɩ sɩmma dɩ nɩ nɩmballɩ diekemba dɩ benne tɩŋgbaŋka gie me gbaŋ die wahalaka mi mɩŋ.

eng: After you have suffered for a little while, the God of all grace, the one who called you into his eternal glory in Christ Jesus, will himself restore, empower, strengthen, and establish you.
local: Ŋmɩŋ chɩga zɔɔlɩŋ jaaŋ mana mana ma, ta dɩ yiwo wʋnɩŋ ʋ vʋarɩ nɩ dɩ nɩ ye jɩlɩma dieke dɩ wone kpatɩŋ Masia ma. Wusie nɩ keŋ dii wahalaka saŋŋa bɩta, wʋnɩŋ Nabidie Ŋmɩŋ nan wʋnsɩ nɩ beriŋ, ta vaa nɩ mɩŋŋɩ zie keŋ keŋ, ta yɩ nɩ hagɩrɩŋ, ta nagɩ nɩ a zieŋ nyabɩlɩvɩɩnɩŋ ma.

eng: To him be power forever and always. Amen.
local: Wʋnɩŋ ʋ sɩna hagɩrɩŋ mana yaa gamma haahuu. Wusie.

eng: I have written and sent these few lines to you by Silvanus. I consider him to be a faithful brother. In these lines I have urged and affirmed that this is the genuine grace of God. Stand firm in it.
local: Tɔ, n maagɩ wa wɩa bɩta dɩ n nagɩ tʋŋ a yɩ nɩnɩŋ, Salasi suŋŋinene mɩŋ maŋ maagɩ gbaŋ gobiri gie. N sɩba dɩ ʋ yiwo wusie Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrʋ a yɩ nɩ. N yaala n kpaŋŋɩsɩ nɩ mɩŋ, ta yaala nɩ sɩmma dɩ wɩaha gie yiwo Ŋmɩŋ wusie choti piini dieke Ŋmɩŋ dɩ yɩnana, die wɩa, nɩnɩŋ nɩ mɩŋŋɩ zie keŋ keŋ ka ma.

eng: The fellow-elect church in Babylon greets you, and so does my son Mark.
local: Ŋmɩŋ vʋarɩ wa vuosi ba yi Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrɩŋ Babiloni tɩŋgbaŋ ma gie sɩba ʋ vʋarɩna nɩ dene wo. Ba mana waasa nɩ. Ta n bʋadembiŋ Maki gbaŋ dɩ waasa nɩ.

eng: Greet each other with the kiss of love. Peace to you all who are in Christ.
local: Nɩ waasɩ taŋ vɩɩnɩŋ vɩɩnɩŋ. Sʋgɩdʋagɩŋ bemme nɩ mana ma, nɩnɩŋ vuodiekemba mana dɩ yine Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrɩba wa.

eng: Therefore, since Christ suffered as a human, you should also arm yourselves with his way of thinking. This is because whoever suffers is finished with sin.
local: Tɩ wɔŋ ye mɩŋ dɩ Masia die dii wo wahala ʋ nyɩŋgbanɩŋ ma, die wɩa tɩ mʋ tɩ yallɩma kanɩŋ sʋŋanyile ta vaa tɩ sʋgɩtɩ hagɩrɩma, dama vuodieke dɩ dinene ʋ nyɩŋgbanɩŋ ma, ʋ tieŋ nyɩŋ wa tʋmbɩatɩ yiile me a kpatɩ mɩŋ.

eng: As a result, they dont live the rest of their human lives in ways determined by human desires but in ways determined by Gods will.
local: amʋ ʋ kaaŋ bɩ beri a yie vuota lɔlɩbɩatɩ bɩbra, Aayɩ! Ama ʋ nan dɩ beri ʋ mɩsɩ mana ma a yie wudieke Ŋmɩŋ dɩ yaalala.

eng: You have wasted enough time doing what unbelievers desire—living in their unrestrained immorality and lust, their drunkenness and excessive feasting and wild parties, and their forbidden worship of idols.
local: Nɩnɩŋ die nɩ nagɩ saŋŋa pam saŋŋa dieke dɩ tɩanna a yie wudieke vuodiekemba dɩ kana ka sɩba Ŋmɩŋ dɩ yaalala. Die nɩ tʋma dɩgɩntɩ tʋʋma yaalɩŋ ma, ta die yaa lɔlɩbɩatɩ, ta die nɩ faasɩ nyuo daaŋ a buge, ta die faasɩ die dʋʋga ta yie watɩ yɔrɩ yɔrɩ, ta lagɩsa taŋ daanyule jige, ta kaaba bugile wudieke Ŋmɩŋ dɩ chʋarɩna.

eng: They think its strange that you dont join in these activities with the same flood of unrestrained wickedness. So they slander you.
local: Dɩ wa yiwo vuosi mi mamachi nɩ kana ka bɩ chɩga a gara tʋntʋmbɩatɩ kpɩɩmaha gie aŋaŋ ba wa, die wɩa ba bala wʋbɩatɩ a yɩa nɩ aŋaŋ Ŋmɩnnɩ.

eng: They will have to reckon with the one who is ready to judge the living and the dead.
local: Ama vuosi mi mʋ ba daansɩ balɩ a vʋarɩ ba gbaŋ daa dieke Ŋmɩŋ keŋ die ba sarɩya. Ŋmɩŋ yiwo siri dɩ ʋ keŋ dii vuoŋ mana sarɩya, vuodiekemba dɩ yene bie ba miivoli me aŋaŋ vuodiekemba dɩ kpine.

eng: Indeed, this is the reason the good news was also preached to the dead. This happened so that, although they were judged as humans according to human standards, they could live by the Spirit according to divine standards.
local: Naa wɩa Masia die dɩ mʋʋlɩ wʋvɩɩnaha a yɩ vuodiekemba dɩ benne kpiile tigiŋ gbaŋ; die ba kpi wo sɩba vuosi dɩ kpinene dene wo ama die ʋ balɩ wʋvɩɩnaha a yɩ ba mɩŋ, amʋ ba nan ye miivoli ba haalɩtɩ ma sɩba Ŋmɩŋ dɩ yalla miivoli dene wo.

eng: The end of everything has come. Therefore, be self-controlled and clearheaded so you can pray.
local: Jaaŋ mana kpatɩŋ gbigiye mɩŋ, die wɩa, nɩ yallɩma yɩaŋ ta yigi nɩ gbaŋ amʋ nɩ nan bɩagɩ a jʋʋsɩ Ŋmɩŋ.

eng: Above all, show sincere love to each other, because love brings about the forgiveness of many sins.
local: Wudieke dɩ yine nɩŋŋmɩna yiwo naa, nɩ chome taŋ vɩɩnɩŋ, dama choti lige wʋbɩatɩ pam mɩŋ.

eng: Open your homes to each other without complaining.
local: Ta tuosime taŋ chaantɩ nɩ tige me ta da vʋʋŋ ma.

eng: And serve each other according to the gift each person has received, as good managers of Gods diverse gifts.
local: Vuoŋ mana aŋaŋ piini dieke ʋ tuone a nyɩŋ Ŋmɩŋ jigiŋ, nɩ mɩŋŋɩ pɔgɩlɩ piini yiri yiri wo ta nagɩ suŋŋime nɩ chanchaalɩŋ.

eng: Whoever speaks should do so as those who speak Gods word. Whoever serves should do so from the strength that God furnishes. Do this so that in everything God may be honored through Jesus Christ. To him be honor and power forever and always. Amen.
local: Sɩba dɩɩ yi vuoŋ dɩ yi bɩbalɩtʋ, ʋ mʋ ʋ balɩma Ŋmɩŋ gbaŋ gbaŋ wɩa a yɩma vuosi, ta dɩɩ yi vuoŋ dɩaŋ dɩ suŋŋe vuosi, ʋ mʋ ʋ suŋŋime be aŋaŋ hagɩrɩ dieke Ŋmɩŋ dɩ nagɩna a yɩ wa wa mana. Naa wɩa vuoŋ mana nan bɩrɩ Ŋmɩŋ Yisa Masia wɩa; wʋnɩŋ Ŋmɩŋ sɩna bɩrɩŋ aŋaŋ hagɩrɩŋ mana yaa gamma haahuu. Wusie.

eng: Dear friends, dont be surprised about the fiery trials that have come among you to test you. These are not strange happenings.
local: N nɩmballɩ choti, wahala dieke nɩ dinene naa aŋ ka sɩɩ sɩba boliŋ dɩ dinene nɩ naa magɩsa nɩ mɩŋ, ama nɩ da vaa ka yi nɩ mamachi ta yilime dɩ a yiwo wʋhaalɩŋ a kieŋ nɩ ma.

eng: Instead, rejoice as you share Christs suffering. You share his suffering now so that you may also have overwhelming joy when his glory is revealed.
local: Sɩba nɩ gʋtɩna a die Masia wahalaha naa, die dɩ mʋ dɩ nɩ yallɩma sʋgɩfɩalɩŋ, naa yiye mɩŋ amʋ nɩ nan keŋ nata aŋaŋ sʋgɩfɩalɩkpeŋkpɩɩŋ saŋŋa dieke Masia chuulikpeŋkpɩɩŋ dɩ bala ka keŋ nyɩŋ yaalɩŋ ma.

eng: If you are mocked because of Christs name, you are blessed, for the Spirit of glory—indeed, the Spirit of God—rests on you.
local: Dɩɩ yi ba zɩa nɩ Masia saaŋ wɩa, nɩ yaa sikpeŋ nansɩŋ, dama naa dagɩya dɩ Ŋmɩŋ Haalɩŋ dɩ yalla hagɩrɩŋ pam wa bie nɩ ma.

eng: Now none of you should suffer as a murderer or thief or evildoer or rebel.
local: Ama nɩ sɩmma dɩ nɩ wʋnyɩ da keŋ yi vuokʋʋrʋ ta dime wahala ka wɩa, yaa gaarʋ ta dime wahala ka wɩa, yaa a yime wʋbɩatɩ mana ta dime wahala ka wɩa, yaa ta nɩ da bɩ jume vuosi wɩa ma ta dime wahala ka wɩa.

eng: But dont be ashamed if you suffer as one who belongs to Christ. Rather, honor God as you bear Christs name. Give honor to God.
local: Ama dɩɩ yi vuoŋ dɩ die wahala ʋ yine Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrʋ wɩa, die nɩŋ ʋ da vaa viivi yallɩma wa, ama ʋ mʋ ʋ bɩrɩma Ŋmɩŋ ba wasɩnana wa Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrʋ wa.

eng: because its time for judgment to begin with Gods own household. But if judgment starts with us, what will happen to those who refuse to believe Gods good news?.
local: Dama saŋŋa tʋgɩya mɩŋ dɩ Ŋmɩŋ piili a dii vuosi sarɩya; ʋ nan woliŋ dii ʋ gbaŋ gbaŋ ʋ vuosi sarɩya; ta ʋ woliŋ a dii tɩnɩŋ vuodiekemba dɩ yine ʋ vuosi sarɩya, die nɩŋ lalɩa dɩ baaŋ dɩ sɩmma a yɩ vuodiekemba dɩ kana ka yi ʋ wʋvɩɩnaha yada wa? Ka nan yi wʋbɩaŋ pam a yɩ ba.

eng: If the righteous are barely rescued, what will happen to the godless and sinful?.
local: Dɩ maagɩya Ŋmɩŋ gbaŋkʋ sʋŋ dɩ, Dɩɩ yi dɩ hagɩrɩ dɩ vuovɩɩna ye gbatɩtaanɩŋ die nɩŋ lalɩa dɩ baa dɩ sɩɩ a yɩ vuodiekemba dɩ kana ka chɩga Ŋmɩnnɩ aŋaŋ wʋbɩayiiribe? Dɩ nan dɩ tʋaŋ.

eng: So then, those who suffer because they follow Gods will should commit their lives to a trustworthy creator by doing what is right.
local: Die wɩa, vuodiekemba dɩ dinene wahala Ŋmɩŋ choti wɩa wa nagɩ ba gbaŋ a yɩ Ŋmɩŋ, dama wʋnɩŋ ʋ naanna ba ta yi wusietieŋ, die wɩa ba yime vɩɩnɩŋ yaa gamma.

eng: But false prophets also arose among the people. In the same way, false teachers will come among you. They will introduce destructive opinions and deny the master who bought them, bringing quick destruction on themselves.
local: Ŋmɩnchɩbɩsɩ naazʋalɩŋ die dɩ benne Juu vuosi sʋnsʋkʋ dene wo, die gbaŋ gbaŋ ŋmɩnchɩbɩsɩ dɩdagɩrɩŋ gbaŋ dɩ nan dɩ bie nɩ sʋnsʋŋ, ta daga ŋmɩnchɩbɩsɩ dagɩkʋ lɔbɩrɩŋ ma, wudieke dɩ bala ka chʋʋsɩ nɩ. Ba nan zeti tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Yisa Masia vuodieke dɩ gbatɩna ba a taaŋ wa gbaŋ. Ba yine die wo nan vaa Ŋmɩŋ chʋʋsɩ ba lagɩ.

eng: Many will follow them in their unrestrained immorality, and because of these false teachers the way of truth will be slandered.
local: Ta vuosi pam nan dɩ dɩ ba ta tʋma ba gbaŋ gbaŋ dɩgɩntɩ tʋʋma. Ba wɩa vuosi bataŋ nan chɩbɩ wɩa yaa gamma wusie sieku.

eng: In their greed they will take advantage of you with lies. The judgment pronounced against them long ago hasnt fallen idle, nor is their destruction sleeping.
local: Ba nan dɩ yaa lɔlɩbɩatɩ, ta gaama nɩ ta nyɩra nɩ. Saŋŋa dieke dɩ tɩanna Ŋmɩŋ die wɔŋ baarɩ dɩ ba yiwo wʋbɩayiiriŋ, ama dɩ kaaŋ yʋasɩ ʋ nan datɩ ba tɩba.

eng: God didnt spare the angels when they sinned but cast them into the lowest level of the underworld and committed them to chains of darkness, keeping them there until the judgment.
local: Malaka diekemba die dɩ yine chʋʋsɩ wa, Ŋmɩŋ die ka vaa ba tɩbɩdatɩŋ. Die ʋ bɔbɩ ba mɩŋ aŋaŋ chɔrɩma ta nagɩ ba taaŋ boli dieke dɩ wone kpisiku me; bolibu mi bie wo vɔrɩŋ dieke dɩ faasɩna sʋʋŋ ta sibi pam; ba nan dɩ bie me die a ga tʋgɩ saŋŋa dieke Ŋmɩŋ dɩ bala ʋ dii ba sarɩya.

eng: And he didnt spare the ancient world when he brought a flood on the world of ungodly people, even though he protected Noah, a preacher of righteousness, along with seven others.
local: Die gbaŋ gbaŋ die ʋ ka vaa kʋrɩŋ ma tɩŋgbaŋka gie vuosi. Die ʋ vaa wa nyaaŋ dɩ keŋ dii tɩŋgbaŋka, aŋaŋ vuodiekemba die dɩ kana ka chɩga wa, ama ta die gbatɩ Nowa, vuodieke die dɩ mʋʋlɩnana sʋgɩyɩalɩŋ beriŋ wɩaha, aŋaŋ ʋ tigiŋ vuosi bayʋpɔyɩ a gʋtɩ.

eng: God condemned the cities of Sodom and Gomorrah to total destruction, reducing them to ashes as a warning to ungodly people.
local: Wʋnɩŋ Ŋmɩŋ die bɩ chʋʋsɩ wa Sodomi aŋaŋ Gomora tɩgɩsɩ, die ʋ vaa a dii boliŋ ta bɩrɩŋ tanyeeliŋ, ta vuodiekemba die dɩ benne hanɩŋ tɩgɩsɩ ma die dɩ kpi. Naa yiwo dagɩtɩ a yɩ wʋbɩayiiribe ʋ bala ʋ keŋ a datɩ ba tɩbɩŋ dene.

eng: And he rescued righteous Lot, who was made miserable by the unrestrained immorality of unruly people. .
local: Die ʋ bɩ gbatɩ Loti, vuodieke dɩ yine vuovɩɩnʋ a nyɩŋ Sodomi aŋaŋ Gomora tɩgɩsɩ ma. Die wʋbɩayiiribe die dɩ yinene ba nyɩŋgbanɩŋ lɔlɩbɩatɩ tʋʋmaha, die dɩ chʋʋsa ʋ sʋŋ pam.

eng: While that righteous man lived among them he felt deep distress every day on account of the immoral actions he saw and heard.
local: Loti die yiwo vuovɩɩnʋ ama die ʋ benne aŋaŋ wʋbɩayiiribe wɩa saŋŋa mana ʋ ŋaaŋ yese ba tʋmbɩatɩ ta bɩ wʋmma ba wʋbɩatɩ wʋbalɩka. Naa die faasɩ chʋʋsa ʋ sʋŋ dama die ʋ yiwo vuovɩɩnʋ.

eng: These things show that the Lord knows how to rescue the godly from their trials, and how to keep the unrighteous for punishment on the Judgment Day.
local: Tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Nabidie Ŋmɩŋ sɩba ʋ baaŋ yi die a gbatɩ vuodiekemba dɩ chɩgɩnana wa a nyɩŋ mugisiŋ me, ama ta datɩ wʋbɩayiiribe tɩba die a ga tʋgɩ daa dieke ʋ baaŋ keŋ dii ba sarɩya.

eng: This is especially true for those who follow after the corrupt cravings of the sinful nature and defy the Lords authority. These reckless, brash people arent afraid to insult the glorious ones.
local: Vuodiekemba dɩ dɩna ba nyɩŋgbanɩŋ lɔlɩbɩatɩ tʋʋma ta ka yɩa Ŋmɩŋ yikoke jɩlɩma wa, ʋ nan daansɩ datɩ vuosi mi tɩba a tɩaŋ ba chanchaalɩŋ. Ŋmɩnchɩbɩsɩ dɩdagɩrɩ diekemba dɩ benne nɩ sʋnsʋkʋ yiwo tɩbɩhagɩrɩtieliŋ, ta ka chɩga vuoŋ. Ba zɩa wa malakasi ta ka chɩga ŋmaamɩŋ.

eng: yet angels, who are stronger and more powerful, dont use insults when pronouncing the Lords judgment on them.
local: Malakasi mi yaa wa hagɩrɩŋ aŋaŋ yiko pam a tɩaŋ ŋmɩnchɩbɩsɩ dɩdagɩrɩba mi, ama ba ka bala bɩaŋ ta zɩa ba Ŋmɩŋ jigiŋ.

eng: These false teachers are like irrational animals, mere creatures of instinct, born to be captured and destroyed. They slander what they dont understand and, like animals, they will be destroyed.
local: Vuosi gie ka sɩba malakasisi dɩ sɩna die ama ta zɩa ba. Banɩŋ vuosi mi wo sʋŋanyile, ba yie wudieke ba yaalala, ta sɩɩ sɩba haagɩŋ dɔmbɩatɩ diekemba vuosi dɩ yiginene a kʋa dene wo. Ba gbaŋ gbaŋ tʋmbɩatɩ bala ka chʋʋsɩ ba.

eng: In this way, they will receive payment for their wrongdoing. They even enjoy unruly parties in broad daylight. They are blots and blemishes, taking delight in their seductive pleasures while feasting with you.
local: Ba tʋmbɩatɩ nyʋarɩ yiwo chʋʋsɩŋ. Ba yie ba nyɩŋgbanɩŋ lɔlɩbɩatɩ yaalɩŋ ma mɩŋ. Ba keŋ bie nɩ jigiŋ ba ŋaaŋ sɩɩ sɩba dɩgɩntɩ dɩ ŋaana bie garɩ ma dene wo. Ba keŋ die nyindiike aŋaŋ nɩ, ama ba ŋaaŋ ko yile wo ba wʋbɩatɩ wɩa.

eng: They are always looking for someone with whom to commit adultery. They are always on the lookout for opportunities to sin. They ensnare people whose faith is weak. They have hearts trained in greed. They are under Gods curse.
local: Dɩɩ yi ba ye hɔgʋ ba ka vasa ʋ sʋgɩŋ, ta kaaŋ vaa ba bɩaŋ. Ta gaama vuodiekemba dɩ kana ka mɩŋŋɩ sɩba Ŋmɩŋ sieku ta vasa ba bɩa. Ta ba sʋgɩtɩ ma yaa chotibɩatɩ pam. Ŋmɩŋ nan daansɩ datɩ ba tɩba.

eng: Leaving the straight path, they have gone off course, following the way of Balaam son of Bosor, who loved the payment of doing wrong.
local: Ba ka saaga dɩ ba dɩa sie dieke dɩ tʋgɩsɩna wa ama ta nagɩ sie gaaŋ. Ba dɩ wa sie dieke Bori bʋadembiŋ Balaami die dɩ dɩna wa. Die ʋ yaala tʋmbɩatɩ yiile nyʋarɩ.

eng: But Balaam was rebuked for his wrongdoing. A donkey, which has no voice, spoke with a human voice and put a stop to the prophets madness.
local: ta Ŋmɩŋ dɩ kpaaŋ wa ʋ tʋmbɩatɩ wɩa, ta vaa ʋ boniŋ dɩ balɩ wɩa aŋaŋ wa aŋaŋ vuota lɔlɩŋ a kpaaŋ wa dɩ ʋ vaa ʋ yɩɩŋyaatɩ tʋʋmaha.

eng: These false teachers are springs without water, mists driven by the wind. The underworld has been reserved for them.
local: Vuosi gie sɩɩ sɩba buluŋ dieke dɩ wone nyaaŋ dene wo, ta bɩ sɩɩ sɩba nɩɩŋmara bʋlɔgɩsɩŋ dɩ nagɩnana chʋŋ dene wo. Ŋmɩŋ nan daansɩ nagɩ ba a taaŋ lɩmɩŋ pam ma.

eng: With empty, self-important speech, they use sinful cravings and unrestrained immorality to ensnare people who have only just escaped life with those who have wandered from the truth.
local: Ba bala kalinbaa wʋbalɩka diekemba dɩ wone nyʋarɩ dɩ ba gaaŋ vuodiekemba dɩ mɩnana dɩ ba nyɩŋ vuobɩatɩ jigiŋ naa, ta gaama ba dɩ ba yime nyɩŋgbanɩŋ lɔlɩbɩatɩ aŋaŋ dɩgɩntɩ tʋʋma.

eng: These false teachers promise freedom, but they themselves are slaves of immorality; whatever overpowers you, enslaves you.
local: Ta bala ba dɩ ba nan keŋ beri ba dʋŋŋʋ, ama ta ba gbaŋ gbaŋ dɩ yi bɩaŋ yɔŋɩsɩ, dama wudieke mana dɩ nyaŋŋɩna vuota, vaa wa wʋnɩŋ vuoke mi dɩ bɩrɩŋ wa ka yɔmʋ.

eng: If people escape the moral filth of this world through the knowledge of our Lord and savior Jesus Christ, then get tangled up in it again and are overcome by it, they are worse off than they were before.
local: Vuodiekemba dɩ sɩbɩna tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Yisa Masia, vuodieke dɩ yine tɩ Gbɩgbatɩtaantʋ, ta die vaa wʋbɩatɩ diekemba dɩ benne tɩŋgbaŋka gie me wo yiile, dɩɩ yi die wʋbɩatɩtɩ mi dɩ keŋ yiŋŋi keŋ a nyaŋŋɩ ba, ba kpatɩŋ nan dɩ lɔra a tɩaŋ die ba sɩna dene wo.

eng: It would be better for them never to have known the way of righteousness than, having come to know it, to turn back from the holy commandment entrusted to them.
local: Ba tɩŋ ka sɩba sʋgɩyɩalɩŋ beriku, dɩ tɩŋ nan dɩ kpɩa a tɩaŋ ba sɩbɩna ka ama ba ka saagɩ a yi wʋvɩɩna diekemba die ba wʋnna wa.

eng: They demonstrate the truth of the proverb: A dog returns to its own vomit, and a washed sow wallows in the mud.
local: Ba yie mɩŋ dɩ dagɩ dɩ nandagaha gie yiwo wusie, dɩ, Gbaaŋ ŋaaŋ yiŋŋe a ga die ka gbaŋ gbaŋ ka tɩɩtɩ, ta Peruku dɩ sɩɩ nyaaŋ ka ŋaaŋ yiŋŋe a ga nanna wa fʋnfata ma.

eng: My dear friends, this is now my second letter to you. I have written both letters to stir up your sincere understanding with a reminder.
local: N nɩmballɩ choti, gbaŋkʋ gie n maagɩnana yɩa nɩ naa, gʋtɩ wa n gbaŋtɩ bule ma. Gbaŋtɩ ale wo gie mana n tɩɩnsa nɩ mɩŋ nyinti gie mana dɩ n vaa nɩ sʋŋanyilivɩɩna hagɩ.

eng: I want you to recall what the holy prophets foretold as well as what the Lord and savior commanded through your apostles.
local: N yaala nɩ tɩɩnsɩma nʋawɩɩŋ diekemba Ŋmɩŋ naazʋalɩba die dɩ bala ka wɩa kʋrɩŋ ma wa, ta bɩ tɩɩnsɩma mɩrɩ diekemba tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ, vuodieke dɩ yine tɩ Gbɩgbatɩtaantʋ die dɩ bala ta tɩnɩŋ vuodiekemba dɩ yine ʋ tʋntʋntɩba die dɩ balɩ nɩ wa.

eng: Most important, know this: in the last days scoffers will come, jeering, living by their own cravings.
local: Wudieke dɩ tɩanna a mana yiwo naa; n yaala nɩ sɩmma dɩ vuodiekemba dɩ dɩna ba sʋgɩtɩ lɔlɩbɩatɩ nan daansɩ beri dakpatɩkɩrɩ daraaha. Ba nan dɩ vʋara nɩ fala.

eng: and saying, Where is the promise of his coming? After all, nothing has changed—not since the beginning of creation, nor even since the ancestors died.
local: ta bala dɩ, Die Yisa Masia die dɩ yɩna nʋaŋ dɩ ʋ nan daansɩ yiŋŋi a keŋ wo, ʋ bie sɩa? Die tɩ chʋalɩba die dɩ kpine a keŋ tʋgɩ jinne, jaaŋ mana ye sɩwa die ka sɩna dene dʋnɩa piiliku me wo.

eng: But they fail to notice that, by Gods word, heaven and earth were formed long ago out of water and by means of water.
local: Vuosi mi ka saaga dɩ ba tɩɩnsɩ dɩ Ŋmɩŋ die yuori wo ʋ nʋaŋ a balɩ ta naaŋ arɩzanna aŋaŋ tɩŋgbaŋka gie kʋrɩŋ ma wa; ta die vʋarɩ tɩŋgbaŋka a nyɩŋ nyaaŋ ma aŋ ka bie nyaaŋ sʋnsʋŋ.

eng: And it was through these that the world of that time was flooded and destroyed.
local: ta bɩ yi nyaaŋ dɩ dii tɩŋgbaŋka a chʋʋsɩ ka.

eng: But by the same word, heaven and earth are now held in reserve for fire, kept for the Judgment Day and destruction of ungodly people.
local: Ama wʋnɩŋ Ŋmɩŋ wʋbalɩka nan bɩ pɔgɩlɩ ŋmɩŋsikpeŋ aŋaŋ tɩŋgbaŋ dieke dɩ benne lele gie wo yaa gamma a ga tʋgɩ saŋŋa dieke ʋ nan daansɩ yi aŋ boliŋ dii a mana, ta chʋʋsɩ vuobɩatɩtɩ, dama dɩnda daarɩ mi ʋ nan dii ba sarɩya ta chʋʋsɩ ba.

eng: Dont let it escape your notice, dear friends, that with the Lord a single day is like a thousand years and a thousand years are like a single day.
local: N nɩmballɩ choti, nɩ daa daaŋma wɩɩrɩ gie. Ŋmɩŋ jigiŋ nɩŋ, dabalɩmɩŋ sɩɩ sɩba bɩna tusiŋ, ta bɩna tusiŋ dɩaŋ dɩ sɩɩ sɩba dabalɩmɩŋ.

eng: The Lord isnt slow to keep his promise, as some think of slowness, but he is patient toward you, not wanting anyone to perish but all to change their hearts and lives.
local: Vuosi yile dɩ dɩ yʋasɩya mɩŋ dɩ Ŋmɩŋ yi wudieke die ʋ yɩna nʋaŋ dɩ ʋ nan yi wo, ama daa die; ʋ yaa wa suguru aŋaŋ nɩ mɩŋ; ʋ ka yaala vuoŋ keŋ juu boliŋ me; ʋ yaala vuoŋ mana vaa ʋ tʋmbɩatɩ ta ye gbatɩtaanɩŋ.

eng: But the day of the Lord will come like a thief. On that day the heavens will pass away with a dreadful noise, the elements will be consumed by fire, and the earth and all the works done on it will be exposed.
local: Tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ daarɩ mi keniŋ nan dɩ sɩɩ sɩba gaarʋ keniŋ. Dɩnda daarɩ mi ŋmɩŋsikpeŋ nan bɩa aŋaŋ watɩkpeŋkpɩɩŋ; ta boli dieke dɩ faasɩna a die nan daansɩ dii ŋmɩŋsikpeŋ nyinti mana, ta tɩŋgbaŋka gie aŋaŋ ka nyinti mana nan keŋ dii boliŋ a kpatɩ.

eng: Since everything will be destroyed in this way, what sort of people ought you to be? You must live holy and godly lives.
local: Nyinti gie dɩ balla a keŋ dii boliŋ naa wa, nɩ yile dɩ dɩ mʋ nɩ yi vuobɩaŋtɩ? Dɩ mʋ nɩ bemme beri vɩɩnɩŋ, ta chɩgɩma Ŋmɩŋ.

eng: waiting for and hastening the coming day of God. Because of that day, the heavens will be destroyed by fire and the elements will melt away in the flames.
local: ta chɩɩsɩma Ŋmɩŋ daarɩ mi, ta kpaŋŋɩma nɩ gbaŋ a yi aŋ daarɩ keŋ lagɩ lagɩ. Dɩnda daarɩ mi, ŋmɩŋsikpeŋ nan dii a talɩ, ta bolibu tuulibu nan naŋŋɩ ŋmɩŋsikpeŋ nyinti mana.

eng: But according to his promise we are waiting for a new heaven and a new earth, where righteousness is at home.
local: Ama tɩ chɩɩsa saŋŋa dieke ŋmɩŋsikpeŋ haalɩŋ aŋaŋ tɩŋgbaŋ haalɩŋ dɩ balla ka bemme sɩba Ŋmɩŋ dɩ yɩna nʋaŋ dene wo, jigidieke vuosi mana mi nan dɩ yie vɩɩnɩŋ nyɩɩna saŋŋa mana wa.

eng: Therefore, dear friends, while you are waiting for these things to happen, make every effort to be found by him in peace—pure and faultless.
local: N nɩmballɩ choti, nɩ chɩɩsɩnana daarɩ gie wɩa, nɩ kpaŋŋɩ nɩ gbaŋ ta yallɩma sʋgɩyɩalɩŋ aŋaŋ beri vɩɩnɩŋ, ta daa yallɩma bɩaŋ Ŋmɩŋ jigiŋ ama ta bemme aŋaŋ sʋgɩdʋagɩŋ.

eng: Consider the patience of our Lord to be salvation, just as our dear friend and brother Paul wrote to you according to the wisdom given to him.
local: Tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ dɩ dine suguru ta ye ka yiŋŋi keŋ naa, ʋ yaala nɩ sɩmma dɩ ʋ yɩa vuosi sieŋ mɩŋ dɩ ba ye gbatɩtaanɩŋ ta ʋ ye yiŋŋi keŋ. Tɩ nɩmbʋa choti Pɔɔli gbaŋ die maagɩ wa gbanɩŋ a yɩ nɩ ta balɩ nɩ naa, sɩba Ŋmɩŋ dɩ yɩna wa yɩaŋ dene wo.

eng: speaking of these things in all his letters. Some of his remarks are hard to understand, and people who are ignorant and whose faith is weak twist them to their own destruction, just as they do the other scriptures.
local: Ʋ gbaŋtɩ mana ma, ʋ maagɩya mɩŋ a bala yaa gamma Ŋmɩŋ daarɩ gie, ta daga nɩ ka wɩa. Wɩa ataŋ bie ʋ gbaŋtɩ ma ta hagɩrɩ dɩ vuoŋ sɩmma a chɩasɩ, ta vuodiekemba dɩ wone yɩaŋ, ta zɩ ba zene jigidieke, dɩ tarɩgɩ a chɩasɩ, sɩba ba dagɩnana Ŋmɩŋ gbaŋkʋ wɩaha ataŋ chɩasɩ dene wo. Naa wɩa, Ŋmɩŋ nan keŋ datɩ ba tɩba.

eng: Therefore, dear friends, since you have been warned in advance, be on guard so that you arent led off course into the error of sinful people, and lose your own safe position.
local: N nɩmballɩ choti, nɩ wɔŋ sɩba wɩaha gie mɩŋ, die wɩa nɩ gbara amʋ vuodiekemba dɩ kana ka sɩba Ŋmɩnnɩ kaaŋ vaa nɩ taarɩ nyɩŋ Ŋmɩŋ sieku me.

eng: Instead, grow in the grace and knowledge of our Lord and savior Jesus Christ. To him belongs glory now and forever. Amen.
local: Nɩ bɩ tuosime tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Yisa Masia, vuodieke dɩ yine tɩ Gbɩgbatɩtaantʋ wa suŋŋiŋ a gʋtɩma, ta bʋgɩrɩma ʋ wɩaha. Wʋnɩŋ ʋ sɩna bɩrɩŋ lele yaa gamma. Wusie.

eng: From Simon Peter, a slave and apostle of Jesus Christ. To those who received a faith equal to ours through the justice of our God and savior Jesus Christ.
local: Manɩŋ Simoni Piita vuodieke dɩ yine Yisa Masia yɔmʋ aŋaŋ ʋ tʋntʋntʋ maagɩnana gbaŋkʋ gie a yɩa nɩnɩŋ vuodiekemba dɩ yine Yisa Masia yada sɩba tɩ gbaŋ tɩ yine wo yada wa. Yisa Masia vuodieke dɩ yine tɩ Ŋmɩŋ aŋaŋ tɩ gbɩgbatɩtaantʋ wa, wʋnɩŋ ʋ yine tɩ mana dɩ yiwo yada. Ʋ yiwo naa dama ʋ ka luge.

eng: May you have more and more grace and peace through the knowledge of God and Jesus our Lord.
local: Nɩ sɩbɩna Ŋmɩŋ aŋaŋ tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Yisa Masia naa, zɔɔlɩnchɩgɩla aŋaŋ sʋgɩdʋagɩŋ bɩ gʋtɩma nɩ ma.

eng: By his divine power the Lord has given us everything we need for life and godliness through the knowledge of the one who called us by his own honor and glory.
local: Ŋmɩŋ hagɩrɩŋ dala pam; ta ʋ yɩa tɩ jadieke mana dɩ mʋna dɩ tɩ bemme beri dieke dɩ fɩalɩnana ʋ sʋŋ dama tɩ sɩba wa wɩa. Wʋnɩŋ ʋ wana tɩ a keŋ ʋ chuulikpeŋkpɩɩkʋ sʋŋ aŋaŋ berivɩɩnɩŋ ma.

eng: Through his honor and glory he has given us his precious and wonderful promises, that you may share the divine nature and escape from the worlds immorality that sinful craving produces.
local: Die wɩa, ʋ zieŋ wo nʋakpɩɩma diekemba dɩ faasɩna vɩɩŋna a yɩ tɩ dɩ tɩ nyɩŋ dɩgɩntɩ dieke dɩ benne tɩŋgbaŋka gie me lɔlɩbɩatɩ wɩa, ama ta tuo ʋ beriŋ.

eng: This is why you must make every effort to add moral excellence to your faith; and to moral excellence, knowledge.
local: Naa wɩa, nɩ kpaŋŋɩ nɩ gbaŋ a gʋtɩ berivɩɩnɩŋ nɩ yada ka ma, ta bɩ gʋtɩ Ŋmɩŋ sɩbɩŋ nɩ berivɩɩŋkʋ ma;.

eng: and to knowledge, self-control; and to self-control, endurance; and to endurance, godliness.
local: ta bɩ gʋtɩ yigi-n-gbaŋ nɩ Ŋmɩŋ sɩbɩkʋ ma; ta bɩ gʋtɩ hanɩa nɩ yigi-n-gbaŋkʋ ma; ta bɩ gʋtɩ Ŋmɩŋ chɩgɩŋ nɩ hanɩaka ma;.

eng: and to godliness, affection for others; and to affection for others, love.
local: ta bɩ gʋtɩ nɩ Ŋmɩŋ chɩgɩlaha ma, zɔɔlɩnchɩgɩla nɩ nɩmballɩ ma; a bɩ gʋtɩ choti nɩ zɔɔlɩnchɩgɩla nɩ nɩmballɩ ma.

eng: If all these are yours and they are growing in you, theyll keep you from becoming inactive and unfruitful in the knowledge of our Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Dɩɩ yi nɩ beriŋ dɩ sɩɩ die, die nan vaa nɩ sɩmma tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Yisa Masia saŋŋa mana, ta yaa nyʋarɩ pam a yɩ wa.

eng: Whoever lacks these things is shortsighted and blind, forgetting that they were cleansed from their past sins.
local: Ama vuodieke nɩŋ mana dɩ wo beriku gie chanchaaŋ, die vuoke yɩɩŋya mɩŋ ta ka bɩagɩ yese, ta wɔŋ daaŋ dɩ Yisa die vʋarɩ wa mɩŋ ʋ tʋmbɩatɩ ma saŋŋa dieke dɩ tɩanna wa.

eng: Therefore, brothers and sisters, be eager to confirm your call and election. Do this and you will never ever be lost.
local: Die wɩa, n nɩmballɩ, nɩ faasɩ kpaŋŋɩ nɩ gbaŋ a tʋŋ aŋ ka dagɩ dɩ nɩ seŋ gʋtɩ wa vuodiekemba Ŋmɩŋ dɩ wana ta vʋarɩ wa ma. Dɩɩ yi nɩ yie die nɩ kaaŋ wɔŋ nan nɩ yadaka ma.

eng: In this way you will receive a rich welcome into the everlasting kingdom of our Lord and savior Jesus Christ.
local: Ta Ŋmɩŋ nan vaa aŋ nɩ daansɩ juu tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Yisa Masia vuodieke dɩ yine tɩ Gbɩgbatɩtaantʋ wa naarɩ ma; naarɩ dieke dɩ benne yaa gamma ta wo kpatɩŋ wa.

eng: So Ill keep reminding you about these things, although you already know them and stand secure in the truth you have.
local: Die wɩa n nan dɩ tɩɩnsa nɩ wɩaha saŋŋa mana; n sɩba dɩ nɩ wʋŋya mɩŋ, ta mɩŋŋɩ sɩbaha, ta pɔgɩlɩha keŋ keŋ.

eng: I think its right that I keep stirring up your memory, as long as Im alive.
local: ama n yile dɩ dɩ vɩɩna dɩ n tɩɩnsɩma nɩ n yene bie n miivoli me wo naa.

eng: After all, our Lord Jesus Christ has shown me that I am about to depart from this life.
local: N sɩba a baarɩ dɩ dɩ kaaŋ yʋasɩ n nyɩŋgbaŋka gie nan kpi sɩba tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Yisa Masia die dɩ yuorine a balɩ mɩŋ dene wo.

eng: Im eager for you always to remember these things after my death.
local: Die wɩa, maŋ kpaŋŋɩ n gbaŋ a maagɩ gbaŋkʋ gie dɩ a tɩɩnsɩma nɩ wɩaha gie saŋŋa mana, n kuŋ kʋaŋ chaaŋ.

eng: We didnt repeat crafty myths when we told you about the powerful coming of our Lord Jesus Christ. Quite the contrary, we witnessed his majesty with our own eyes.
local: Die tɩ wone balɩ dɩ tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Yisa Masia yiwo hagɩrɩtieŋ dene wo, ta nan yiŋŋi keŋ wo, wɩaha ka yi ŋmɩnchɩbɩsɩ, ka yiwo wusie. Tɩ nine yeye mɩŋ ʋ hagɩrɩna dene.

eng: He received honor and glory from God the Father when a voice came to him from the magnificent glory, saying, This is my dearly loved Son, with whom I am well-pleased.
local: Die tɩ bie wo ʋ jigiŋ saŋŋa dieke tɩ Chɔɔŋ Ŋmɩŋ dɩ yɩna wa jɩlɩma chuulikpeŋkpɩɩkʋ ma wa. Saŋka mi die lɔlɩŋ die dɩ nyɩŋ tɩ Hagɩrɩtieŋ Ŋmɩŋ vuodieke dɩ yine chuulikpeŋkpɩɩŋ tieŋ wo jigiŋ a baarɩ dɩ, N Bʋachoti wʋnna, vuodieke n nine dɩ suuline wo wʋnna.

eng: We ourselves heard this voice from heaven while we were with him on the holy mountain.
local: Tɩ gbaŋ gbaŋ tɩba die dɩ wʋŋ lɔlɩkʋ gie dɩ nyɩnna arɩzanna ma wa, saŋŋa dieke die tɩ benne aŋaŋ wa kunkogiŋ dieke Ŋmɩŋ dɩ vʋarɩna ma wa.

eng: In addition, we have a most reliable prophetic word, and you would do well to pay attention to it, just as you would to a lamp shining in a dark place, until the day dawns and the morning star rises in your hearts.
local: Die dɩ yuori a dagɩ tɩ dɩ wudieke Ŋmɩŋ naazʋalɩba die dɩ balla yaa gamma Yisa ma wa yiwo wusie. Dɩ vɩɩna nɩ wʋmma wudieke die ba balɩna wa vɩɩnɩŋ. Ba wʋbalɩkaha sɩɩ sɩba popoli dɩ ŋaana chaana lɩmɩŋ ma dene wo die yaa ga tʋgɩ saŋŋa dieke Yisa dɩ bala ʋ keŋ, die nan vaa nɩ nine yuori vɩɩnɩŋ.

eng: Most important, you must know that no prophecy of scripture represents the prophets own understanding of things.
local: Ama wudieke dɩ tɩanna a mana yiwo naa; nɩ tɩɩnsɩma dɩ wudiekemba Ŋmɩŋ naazʋalɩba die dɩ maagɩna Ŋmɩŋ gbaŋkʋ sʋkʋ ka yi ba gbaŋ gbaŋ wʋbalɩka.

eng: because no prophecy ever came by human will. Instead, men and women led by the Holy Spirit spoke from God.
local: dama Ŋmɩŋ naazʋa wʋnyɩ die ka yile ʋ gbaŋ gbaŋ ʋ choti me ta balɩ wɩa, ama Ŋmɩŋ Halɩkasɩka die dagɩna ba ba bala ba balɩ wudieke dɩ nyɩnna wʋnɩŋ Ŋmɩŋ jigiŋ.

eng: We announce to you what existed from the beginning, what we have heard, what we have seen with our eyes, what we have seen and our hands handled, about the word of life.
local: N maaga gbaŋkʋ gie a yɩa nɩ dɩ n dagɩ vuodieke ba wasɩnana Ŋmɩŋ Nʋawɩa dieke dɩ yine vuota miivoli wo wɩa. Die saŋŋa dieke Ŋmɩŋ die dɩ balla ʋ naaŋ dʋnɩa ta Nʋawɩɩrɩ gie wɔŋ beri mɩŋ. Die Wɩɩrɩ gie kenne sʋʋŋ dʋnɩa ma die tɩ wʋmma ka wʋbalɩka ta ye ke aŋaŋ tɩ nine, ta tɩ gbɩka aŋaŋ tɩ nuusi.

eng: The life was revealed, and we have seen, and we testify and announce to you the eternal life that was with the Father and was revealed to us.
local: Die miivoli gie die dɩ yuorine die tɩ ye ke mɩŋ, die wɩa tɩ bala ka wɩa a yɩa nɩ yaa gamma miivoli dieke dɩ wone kpatɩkʋ. Miivolike gie die bie wo tɩ Chɔɔŋ Nabidie Ŋmɩŋ jigiŋ ta die tɩ Chɔɔŋ wa die dɩ nagɩ wa a dagɩ tɩ.

eng: What we have seen and heard, we also announce it to you so that you can have fellowship with us. Our fellowship is with the Father and with his Son, Jesus Christ.
local: Wudieke die tɩ yene ta wʋŋ wa, kanɩŋ ka gbaŋ gbaŋ tɩ bala a yɩa nɩ, amʋ nɩ gbaŋ nɩ nan gʋtɩ tɩ nʋabalɩmɩŋ lagɩŋkʋ dieke tɩ yalla aŋaŋ tɩ Chɔɔŋ Nabidie Ŋmɩŋ aŋaŋ ʋ Bʋa Yisa Masia wa ma.

eng: We are writing these things so that our joy can be complete.
local: Tɩ maaga dɩ tɩ balɩ nɩ wɩaha gie dama a seŋ yɩa tɩ wa sʋgɩfɩalɩŋ wusie.

eng: This is the message that we have heard from him and announce to you: God is light and there is no darkness in him at all.
local: Yisa Masia die balɩ dɩ Ŋmɩŋ yiwo chaanɩŋ ta wo lɩmɩŋ bɩta gbaŋ ʋ ma. Die wɩɩrɩ gbaŋ gbaŋ tɩ bala a yɩa nɩ.

eng: If we claim, We have fellowship with him, and live in the darkness, we are lying and do not act truthfully.
local: Dɩɩ yi tɩ baarɩ tɩnɩŋ aŋaŋ Ŋmɩŋ yaa wa nʋabalɩmɩŋ aŋaŋ taŋ ama ta bie lɩmɩŋ ma, die nɩŋ tɩ chɩba ŋmɩnchɩbɩsɩ ta tɩ tʋʋma dɩ seŋ daga dɩ tɩ chɩba ŋmɩnchɩbɩsɩ.

eng: But if we live in the light in the same way as he is in the light, we have fellowship with each other, and the blood of Jesus, his Son, cleanses us from every sin.
local: Ama dɩɩ yi tɩ dɩ chaaŋkʋ sieŋ saŋŋa mana, sɩba Ŋmɩŋ dɩ benne chaanɩŋ ma dene wo, die nɩŋ tɩ yaa nʋabalɩmɩŋ aŋaŋ taŋ, ta ʋ Bʋa Yisa wa zɩmbʋ dɩ chaana tɩ sʋgɩtɩ ma a vʋara bɩaŋ mana.

eng: If we claim, We dont have any sin, we deceive ourselves and the truth is not in us.
local: Dɩɩ yi tɩ baarɩ dɩ tɩ wo bɩaŋ tɩ gaama tɩ gbaŋ ta ka bala wusie.

eng: But if we confess our sins, he is faithful and just to forgive us our sins and cleanse us from everything weve done wrong.
local: Ama dɩɩ yi tɩ bala tɩ wʋbɩatɩ a yɩa Ŋmɩŋ, tɩ sɩmma a baarɩ wʋnɩŋ ʋ nan dɩ naga tɩ wʋbɩatɩ a chaa tɩ, ta bɩ chaana tɩ sʋgɩtɩ ma a vʋara tɩ wʋbɩatɩ mana dama wʋnɩŋ ʋ yiwo wusietieŋ ta yie wudieke dɩ mʋna.

eng: If we claim, We have never sinned, we make him a liar and his word is not in us.
local: Dɩɩ yi tɩ baarɩ dɩ tɩ ka yi bɩaŋ, die nɩŋ tɩ nagɩ wa Ŋmɩŋ a bɩrɩŋ ŋmɩnchɩbɩtieŋ, ta ʋ wɩaha dɩ wo tɩ sʋgɩtɩ ma.

eng: My little children, Im writing these things to you so that you dont sin. But if you do sin, we have an advocate with the Father, Jesus Christ the righteous one.
local: N ballɩ, n maaga nɩ wɩaha gie amʋ nɩ kaaŋ yi bɩaŋ, ama dɩɩ yi nɩ wʋnyɩ dɩ yi bɩaŋ, tɩ yaa nɩɩpɔɔnɩgɩrʋ tɩ Chɔɔŋ Ŋmɩŋ jigiŋ, wʋnɩŋ ʋ yine Yisa Masia vuodieke dɩ yine sʋgɩyɩalɩntieŋ.

eng: He is Gods way of dealing with our sins, not only ours but the sins of the whole world.
local: Die ʋ kenne a sʋʋŋ wa, die ʋ tuo wo tɩ kuŋ a kpi, wʋnɩŋ ʋ yine tɩ kaabɩŋ Ŋmɩŋ jigiŋ tɩ tʋntʋmbɩatɩ wɩa, ta ʋ kaabɩkʋ ka yi tɩnɩŋ tɩ nyɩɩna ma wɩa ama ka yiwo tɩŋgbaŋka gie vuosi mana mana wʋbɩatɩ wɩa.

eng: This is how we know that we know him: if we keep his commandments.
local: Dɩɩ yi tɩ dɩɩ Ŋmɩŋ mɩraha, kanɩŋ ka baa ka dagɩ dɩ tɩ seŋ sɩba wa mɩŋ.

eng: The one who claims, I know him, while not keeping his commandments, is a liar, and the truth is not in this person.
local: Dɩɩ yi vuoŋ dɩ baarɩ dɩ Manɩŋ n sɩba wa mɩŋ, ama ta ka dɩɩ ʋ mɩraha, wʋnɩŋ vuoke mi yiwo ŋmɩnchɩbɩtieŋ ta wusie dɩ wo ʋ ma.

eng: But the love of God is truly perfected in whoever keeps his word. This is how we know we are in him.
local: Ama vuodieke dɩ dɩna wʋnɩŋ Ŋmɩŋ wʋbalɩkaha, die vuoke senne cho Ŋmɩŋ aŋaŋ wusie. Ta naa bala ka dagɩ dɩ ʋ seŋ yiwo nʋabalɩmɩŋ aŋaŋ Ŋmɩŋ;.

eng: The one who claims to remain in him ought to live in the same way as he lived.
local: dɩɩ yi tɩ baarɩ dɩ tɩ yaa wa nʋabalɩmɩŋ aŋaŋ Ŋmɩŋ die nɩŋ dɩ mʋ tɩ beriŋ sɩmma sɩba Yisa Masia beriŋ die dɩ sɩna die wo.

eng: Dear friends, Im not writing a new commandment to you, but an old commandment that you had from the beginning. The old commandment is the message you heard.
local: N nɩmballɩ, n ka maaga mɩrɩhaalɩŋ a yɩa nɩ, ka yiwo mɩrɩkʋʋrɩ, mɩrɩkʋʋrɩ dieke nɩ wone wʋŋ a yʋasɩ wa, ta mɩrɩkʋʋrɩ yine Yisa wudieke die nɩ wʋnna wa.

eng: On the other hand, I am writing a new commandment to you, which is true in him and in you, because the darkness is passing away and the true light already shines.
local: Ama wusie, ka yiwo mɩrɩhaalɩŋ, ta nɩ yese ke wusie chɩaŋ Yisa Masia aŋaŋ nɩ ma, dama lɩmɩŋkʋ tɩaŋ gara mɩŋ ta wusie chaaŋkʋ dɩ wɔŋ chaana.

eng: The one who claims to be in the light while hating a brother or sister is in the darkness even now.
local: Dɩɩ yi vuodieke nɩŋ mana dɩ balala dɩ ʋ bie wo chaaŋkʋ ma, ama ta haa ʋ nɩmbʋa ye ko bie wo lɩmɩŋkʋ ma.

eng: The person loving a brother and sister stays in the light, and there is nothing in the light that causes a person to stumble.
local: Ama vuodieke nɩŋ mana dɩ chone ʋ nɩmbʋa bie wo chaaŋkʋ ma, ta wɩɩŋ dɩ wo ʋ ma a baaŋ vaa ʋ yi bɩaŋ.

eng: But the person who hates a brother or sister is in the darkness and lives in the darkness, and doesnt know where to go because the darkness blinds the eyes.
local: Ama vuodieke nɩŋ mana dɩ hana ʋ nɩmbʋa bie wo lɩmɩŋkʋ ma; ʋ chʋŋ wa bʋ ma ta ka sɩba jigidieke ʋ ganana, dama lɩmɩŋkʋ vaa ʋ yɩɩŋ mɩŋ.

eng: Little children, Im writing to you because your sins have been forgiven through Jesus name.
local: N ballɩ, n maaga a yɩa nɩ dama Ŋmɩŋ wɔŋ nagɩ nɩ wʋbɩatɩ a chaa nɩ mɩŋ Masia saaŋ ma.

eng: Parents, Im writing to you because you have known the one who has existed from the beginning. Young people, Im writing to you because you have conquered the evil one.
local: N chʋamba, n maaga a yɩa nɩ dama nɩ wɔŋ a sɩba vuodieke dɩ wone beri a nyɩŋ piiliku me wo mɩŋ. Dalʋaka, n maaga a yɩa nɩ dama nɩ wɔŋ a nyaŋŋɩ Sitaani mɩŋ, wʋbɩatɩtieŋ wo.

eng: Little children, I write to you because you know the Father. Parents, I write to you because you have known the one who has existed from the beginning. Young people, I write to you because you are strong, the word of God remains in you, and you have conquered the evil one.
local: N ballɩ, n maaga a yɩa nɩ dama nɩ sɩba tɩ Chɔɔŋ Nabidie Ŋmɩŋ mɩŋ. N chʋamba, n maaga a yɩa nɩ dama nɩ wɔŋ a sɩba vuodieke dɩ wone beri a nyɩŋ piiliku me wo. Dalʋaka, n maaga yɩa nɩ dama nɩ yaa hagɩrɩŋ ta Ŋmɩŋ wʋbalɩkaha dɩ bie nɩ ma ta nɩ nyaŋŋɩ Sitaani wʋbɩatɩtieŋ wo mɩŋ.

eng: Dont love the world or the things in the world. If anyone loves the world, the love of the Father is not in them.
local: Nɩ da yaalɩma tɩŋgbaŋka gie vuosi beriŋ, nɩ da bɩ yaalɩma tɩŋgbaŋka gie nyinti. Dɩɩ yi nɩ yaala tɩŋgbaŋka gie nyinti die nɩŋ nɩ ka cho tɩ Chɔɔŋ Ŋmɩŋ.

eng: Everything that is in the world—the craving for whatever the body feels, the craving for whatever the eyes see and the arrogant pride in ones possessions—is not of the Father but is of the world.
local: Vuosi yaa lɔlɩbɩatɩ dɩ ba yi ba gbaŋ gbaŋ dʋŋŋʋ, ta yaa lɔlɩbɩatɩ aŋaŋ jadieke nɩŋ mana ba yesinene, ta bɩ yaa nyʋʋŋ nɩgɩŋ yaa gamma jadieke ba yalla, ama naa mana yiwo tɩŋgbaŋka gie lɔla; a ka nyɩŋ tɩ Chɔɔŋ Ŋmɩŋ jigiŋ.

eng: And the world and its cravings are passing away, but the person who does the will of God remains forever.
local: Tɩŋgbaŋka gie aŋaŋ jadieke dɩ benne ka ma ta vuosi dɩ yaala naa nan daansɩ kpatɩ, ama vuodieke dɩ yinene Ŋmɩŋ choti tʋʋma, wʋnɩŋ ʋ balla ʋ daansɩ a bemme yaa gamma haahuu.

eng: Little children, it is the last hour. Just as you have heard that the antichrist is coming, so now many antichrists have appeared. This is how we know it is the last hour.
local: N ballɩ, dʋnɩa kpatɩŋ gbigiye mɩŋ. Ta die ba wɔŋ balɩ nɩ dɩ Masia dataakpeŋkpɩɩka nan keŋ; ta lele Masia dataasɩ pam wɔŋ keŋ mɩŋ, die wɩa tɩ sɩba dɩ dʋnɩa ka kpatɩŋ gbigiye mɩŋ.

eng: They went out from us, but they were not really part of us. If they had been part of us, they would have stayed with us. But by going out from us, they showed they all are not part of us.
local: Masia dataasɩ gie die nyɩŋ wa tɩ lagɩŋkʋ ma, ama die ba ka gʋtɩ tɩ ma aŋaŋ wusie. Die ba tɩŋ gʋtɩ tɩ ma tɩnɩŋ aŋaŋ ba tɩŋ nan lagɩŋ a beri; ama ba vaa tɩ mɩŋ, ta a daga dɩ die ba ka gʋtɩ tɩ ma wusie.

eng: But you have an anointing from the holy one, and all of you know the truth.
local: Ama nɩnɩŋ nɩŋ Masia yɩ nɩ Halɩkasɩka mɩŋ, die wɩa nɩ mana dɩ sɩba wusie nyindieke Ŋmɩŋ dɩ yuorine a dagɩ nɩ wa.

eng: I dont write to you because you dont know the truth but because you know it. You know that no lie comes from the truth.
local: Manɩŋ n ka maaga a yɩa nɩ dɩ nɩ ka sɩba wusieke, ama n maaga a yɩa nɩ dama nɩ wɔŋ sɩba ka mɩŋ ta bɩ sɩba dɩ ŋmɩnchɩbɩsɩ ka nyɩnna wusie me.

eng: Who is the liar? Isnt it the person who denies that Jesus is the Christ? This person is the antichrist: the one who denies the Father and the Son.
local: Mɩnɩa yine ŋmɩnchɩbɩtieŋ wo? Ŋmɩnchɩbɩtieŋ yine vuodieke dɩ balala dɩ Yisa ka yi Ŋmɩŋ Vuovʋarɩkɩrɩ Masia wa. Vuodieke dɩ bala naa wa yine Yisa dataaŋ, ta zeti tɩ Chɔɔŋ Ŋmɩŋ aŋaŋ Bʋa wa.

eng: Everyone who denies the Son does not have the Father, but the one who confesses the Son has the Father also.
local: Vuodieke nɩŋ mana dɩ zeti Ŋmɩŋ Bʋa Masia wa gbaŋ zeti wo Chɔɔŋ wa mɩŋ, ama vuodieke dɩ bala dɩ ʋ yiwo yada dɩ Yisa yine Ŋmɩŋ Bʋa wa, tɩ Chɔɔŋ Ŋmɩŋ beri aŋaŋ wa.

eng: As for you, what you heard from the beginning must remain in you. If what you heard from the beginning remains in you, you will also remain in relationship to the Son and in the Father.
local: Die nɩ wolinne a wʋŋ Yisa wɩaha piiliku me wo nɩ mɩŋŋɩ pɔgɩlɩha. Dɩɩ yi nɩ pɔgɩlɩ wɩaha nɩ nan dɩ beri aŋaŋ Ŋmɩŋ aŋaŋ ʋ Bʋa wa ma.

eng: This is the promise that he himself gave us: eternal life.
local: Ta nʋa dieke ʋ yɩna tɩ wa yiwo miivoli dieke dɩ wone kpatɩŋ.

eng: I write these things to you about those who are attempting to deceive you.
local: N maaga nɩ wɩaha gie yaa gamma vuodiekemba dɩ mɩnana dɩ ba gaaŋ nɩ wɩa.

eng: As for you, the anointing that you received from him remains on you, and you dont need anyone to teach you the truth. But since his anointing teaches you about all things , remain in relationship to him just as he taught you.
local: Ama nɩnɩŋ nɩŋ Masia vaa ʋ Halɩkasɩka dɩ keŋ sʋʋŋ nɩ ma mɩŋ. Dɩɩ yi Halɩkasɩka dɩ wɩarɩ a bie nɩ ma die, nɩ kaaŋ bɩ yaala vuoŋ dɩ ʋ dagɩ nɩ. Dama ʋ Halɩkasɩka daga nɩ jaaŋ mana, ta ʋ dagɩkʋ dɩ yi wusie, daa ŋmɩnchɩbɩsɩ. Die wɩa nɩ dɩa Halɩkasɩka dagɩŋ ta wɩarɩ Masia ma.

eng: And now, little children, remain in relationship to Jesus, so that when he appears we can have confidence and not be ashamed in front of him when he comes.
local: Die wɩa n ballɩ, nɩ wɩarɩ Yisa ma, amʋ ʋ keŋ keŋ tɩ nan dɩ yaa sikimiŋ ta kaaŋ dii viivi ʋ nɩŋŋa saŋŋa dieke ʋ bala ʋ keŋ wo.

eng: If you know that he is righteous, you also know that every person who practices righteousness is born from him.
local: Nɩnɩŋ nɩ sɩmma dɩ Yisa Masia yiwo sʋgɩyɩalɩntieŋ, die wɩa nɩ sɩmma dɩ vuodiekemba mana dɩ tʋnnana sʋgɩyɩalɩŋ tʋʋma ba gbaŋ ba yiwo Ŋmɩŋ ballɩ.

eng: Dear friends, dont believe every spirit. Test the spirits to see if they are from God because many false prophets have gone into the world.
local: N zʋamba, nɩ da keŋ yi vuodiekemba mana dɩ balala dɩ ba yaa Ŋmɩŋ Halɩkasɩka wɩa yada, ama nɩ magɩsɩ ba a ye dɩ ba haalɩtɩtɩ nyɩŋ wa Ŋmɩŋ jigiŋ yaa. Dama ŋmɩnchɩbɩsɩ naazʋalɩba pam, vuodiekemba dɩ gaanana vuosi wɔŋ keŋ mɩŋ a dɩ dɩa vuosi jige.

eng: This is how you know if a spirit comes from God: every spirit that confesses that Jesus Christ has come as a human is from God.
local: Wudieke dɩ balla ka vaa nɩ sɩmma dɩ dɩ yiwo Ŋmɩŋ Haalɩŋ wʋnna: vuodieke mana dɩ balala dɩ die ba mɩɩrɩ wa Yisa Masia ta ʋ yi vuota, wʋnɩŋ ʋ yalla Haalɩ dieke dɩ nyɩna Ŋmɩŋ jigiŋ.

eng: and every spirit that doesnt confess Jesus is not from God. This is the spirit of the antichrist, which you have heard is coming and is now already in the world.
local: Ama vuodieke nɩŋ mana dɩ chiisinene wɩɩrɩ gie yaa gamma Yisa ma wa wo Haalɩ dieke dɩ nyɩna Ŋmɩŋ jigiŋ. Haalɩbʋ gie nyɩŋ wa Masia dataakpeŋkpɩɩka, Sitaani jigiŋ; die ba wɔŋ balɩ nɩ dɩ Masia dataakpeŋkpɩɩka nan keŋ, ta lele ʋ wɔŋ keŋ tɩŋgbaŋka gie me mɩŋ.

eng: You are from God, little children, and you have defeated these people because the one who is in you is greater than the one who is in the world.
local: N ballɩ, nɩnɩŋ nɩ yiwo Ŋmɩŋ sɩɩtɩ, ta Ŋmɩŋ Halɩkasɩka dɩ bie nɩ ma ta yaa hagɩrɩŋ a tɩaŋ haalɩ dieke dɩ benne tɩŋgbaŋka gie vuosi me. Die yine nɩ nyaŋŋa ŋmɩnchɩbɩsɩ naazʋalɩba.

eng: They are from the world. So they speak from the worlds point of view and the world listens to them.
local: Banɩŋ ŋmɩnchɩbɩsɩ naazʋalɩba gie yiwo tɩŋgbaŋka gie sɩɩtɩ, die wɩa ba bala tɩŋgbaŋka gie nyinti wɩa ta tɩŋgbaŋka gie vuosi dɩ wʋmma ba.

eng: We are from God. The person who knows God listens to us. Whoever is not from God doesnt listen to us. This is how we recognize the Spirit of truth and the spirit of error.
local: Ama tɩnɩŋ nɩŋ tɩ yiwo Ŋmɩŋ sɩɩtɩ. Ta vuodieke mana dɩ sɩbɩna Ŋmɩŋ dɩ wʋmma a yɩa tɩ. Ama vuodiekemba dɩ kana ka yi Ŋmɩŋ sɩɩtɩ ka wʋmma a yɩa tɩ. Naa balla ka vaa tɩ sɩmma vuodieke dɩ yalla Ŋmɩŋ Halɩkasɩka a daga wusie dagɩkʋ aŋaŋ vuodieke dɩ yalla Sitaani haalɩbʋ dieke dɩ dagɩnana ŋmɩnchɩbɩsɩ dagɩkʋ.

eng: Dear friends, lets love each other, because love is from God, and everyone who loves is born from God and knows God.
local: N zʋamba, nɩ vaa tɩ chome taŋ dama choti nyɩŋ wa Ŋmɩŋ jigiŋ, ta vuodieke mana dɩ chone vuosi yiwo Ŋmɩŋ bʋa ta bɩ sɩba wa.

eng: The person who doesnt love does not know God, because God is love.
local: Ŋmɩŋ yiwo chotitieŋ, ta vuodieke mana dɩ wone choti ka sɩba wa.

eng: This is how the love of God is revealed to us: God has sent his only Son into the world so that we can live through him.
local: Naa Ŋmɩŋ die dɩ dagɩ tɩ ʋ choti: die ʋ vaa wa ʋ Bʋadembi balɩŋka dɩ keŋ sʋʋŋ tɩŋgbaŋka gie me dɩ tɩ ye miivoli ʋ wɩa.

eng: This is love: it is not that we loved God but that he loved us and sent his Son as the sacrifice that deals with our sins.
local: Choti dieke dɩ senne yi choti aŋaŋ wusie wʋnna, ka ka yi dɩ tɩnɩŋ die tɩ faasɩna cho Ŋmɩŋ, ama Ŋmɩŋ die faasɩna cho tɩ ta die vaa ʋ Bʋadembiŋ dɩ keŋ sʋʋŋ tɩŋgbaŋka gie me a tuo tɩ kuŋ a kpi ta die bɩrɩŋ kaabɩŋ wʋnɩŋ Ŋmɩŋ jigiŋ dɩ tɩ ye tɩ wʋbɩatɩ naachaala.

eng: Dear friends, if God loved us this way, we also ought to love each other.
local: N zʋamba, dɩɩ yi Ŋmɩŋ dɩ cho tɩ naa, die nɩŋ dɩ yiwo talasɩ dɩ tɩ chome taŋ.

eng: No one has ever seen God. If we love each other, God remains in us and his love is made perfect in us.
local: Vuoŋ wori a yeye Ŋmɩŋ aŋaŋ ʋ nine, ama tɩ cho taŋ, Ŋmɩŋ nan dɩ bie tɩ jigiŋ saŋŋa mana ta tɩ nan dɩ yallɩ choti dieke ʋ yɩna tɩ wa aŋaŋ wusie.

eng: This is how we know we remain in him and he remains in us, because he has given us a measure of his Spirit.
local: Ŋmɩŋ yɩ tɩ ʋ Halɩkasɩka mɩŋ die wɩa tɩ sɩba a baarɩ dɩ tɩnɩŋ tɩ taasɩ aŋaŋ wa ta ʋ bie tɩ ma.

eng: We have seen and testify that the Father has sent the Son to be the savior of the world.
local: Tɩ Chɔɔŋ Ŋmɩŋ die tʋŋ wa ʋ Bʋadembiŋ dɩ ʋ keŋ yi tɩŋgbaŋka gie vuosi gbɩgbatɩtaantʋ. Die tɩ ye ʋ Bʋa wa mɩŋ, ta lele tɩ wa bala ʋ wɩa a yɩa vuosi.

eng: If any of us confess that Jesus is Gods Son, God remains in us and we remain in God.
local: Vuodieke dɩ balala dɩ ʋ yi yada dɩ Yisa yiwo Ŋmɩŋ Bʋa, wʋnɩŋ ʋ yine vuodieke Ŋmɩŋ dɩ benne ʋ ma ta ʋ dɩaŋ ʋ taasɩ aŋaŋ Ŋmɩŋ.

eng: We have known and have believed the love that God has for us. God is love, and those who remain in love remain in God and God remains in them.
local: Ta tɩ gbaŋ gbaŋ tɩ sɩba Ŋmɩŋ dɩ chone tɩ die, ta bɩ yi yada dɩ ʋ seŋ cho tɩ mɩŋ. Ŋmɩŋ yiwo chotitieŋ ta vuodieke mana dɩ chone vuosi saŋŋa mana taasɩ wa aŋaŋ Ŋmɩŋ, ta Ŋmɩŋ dɩaŋ dɩ bie ʋ ma.

eng: This is how love has been perfected in us, so that we can have confidence on the Judgment Day, because we are exactly the same as God is in this world.
local: Dɩɩ yi tɩ seŋ cho tɩ chanchaalɩŋ aŋaŋ wusie ta tɩ beriŋ dɩ sɩɩ sɩba Masia die dɩ benne die tɩŋgbaŋka gie me wo, die nɩŋ Ŋmɩŋ sarɩya diile daarɩ dɩ keŋ tʋgɩ tɩ kaaŋ dɩ chɩga ŋmaamɩŋ.

eng: There is no fear in love, but perfect love drives out fear, because fear expects punishment. The person who is afraid has not been made perfect in love.
local: Tɩ yaa choti aŋaŋ vuosi, ŋmaamɩŋ kaaŋ dɩ beri. Dɩɩ yi choti dɩ faasɩ beri aŋaŋ wusie, ŋmaamɩŋ kaaŋ ye sieŋ a bemme tɩ ma, dama tɩbɩdatɩŋ wɩa tɩ ŋaaŋ chɩga ŋmaamɩŋ. Dɩɩ yi vuoŋ dɩ yaa ŋmaamɩŋ, die nɩŋ ʋ ka cho vuosi aŋaŋ wusie.

eng: We love because God first loved us.
local: Tɩ yaa choti aŋaŋ vuosi dama Ŋmɩŋ die wolinne a cho tɩ.

eng: Those who say, I love God and hate their brothers or sisters are liars. After all, those who dont love their brothers or sisters whom they have seen can hardly love God whom they have not seen!.
local: Dɩɩ yi vuoŋ dɩ baarɩ dɩ, Manɩŋ n cho Ŋmɩŋ mɩŋ, ama ta haa ʋ nɩmbʋa nɩŋ, wʋnɩŋ vuoke mi yiwo ŋmɩnchɩbɩtieŋ. Dama ʋ kaaŋ bɩagɩ a cho Ŋmɩŋ vuodieke ʋ kana ka yese aŋaŋ ʋ nine, dɩɩ yi ʋ ka cho ʋ nɩmbʋa dieke ʋ yesinene aŋaŋ ʋ nine.

eng: This commandment we have from him: Those who claim to love God ought to love their brother and sister also.
local: Nʋarɩ gie Yisa Masia dɩ yɩ tɩ, dɩ vuodieke mana dɩ chone Ŋmɩŋ, chome ʋ nɩmbʋa gbaŋ.

eng: See what kind of love the Father has given to us in that we should be called Gods children, and that is what we are! Because the world didnt recognize him, it doesnt recognize us.
local: Nɩ ko ye choti dieke tɩ Chɔɔŋ Nabidie Ŋmɩŋ dɩ faasɩna cho tɩ. Ʋ chotiti dɩ faasɩna dala wɩa ʋ wa tɩ ʋ ballɩ, ta tɩ seŋ yi ʋ ballɩ. Ama tɩŋgbaŋka gie vuosi ka sɩba tɩ yine vuodiekemba dama ba ka sɩba Nabidie Ŋmɩŋ.

eng: Dear friends, now we are Gods children, and it hasnt yet appeared what we will be. We know that when he appears we will be like him because well see him as he is.
local: N zʋamba, lele tɩ yiwo Ŋmɩŋ ballɩ, ama dɩ ye ka dagɩ yuori tɩ bala tɩ sɩmma die. Ama wudieke tɩ sɩbɩna wʋnna, dɩ Yisa dɩ yiŋŋi keŋ, tɩ nan dɩ sɩɩ sɩba wʋnɩŋ, dama tɩ nan ye ʋ senne sɩɩ die wo.

eng: And all who have this hope in him purify themselves even as he is pure.
local: Vuodieke mana dɩ yalla tamaka gie dɩ ʋ nan keŋ sɩɩ sɩba Yisa, mʋ ʋ vʋarɩ wa ʋ gbaŋ a nyɩŋ bɩaŋ ma sɩba Yisa dɩ wone bɩaŋ dene wo.

eng: Every person who practices sin commits an act of rebellion, and sin is rebellion.
local: Vuodieke mana dɩ yinene bɩaŋ chʋʋsa wa Ŋmɩŋ mɩraha dama bɩaŋ yiile chʋʋsa Ŋmɩŋ mɩraha mɩŋ.

eng: You know that he appeared to take away sins, and there is no sin in him.
local: Nɩ sɩba a baarɩ dɩ Yisa Masia die keŋye mɩŋ tɩŋgbaŋka gie me dɩ ʋ vʋarɩ vuota bɩaŋ, ta bɩaŋ wo ʋ ma.

eng: Every person who remains in relationship to him does not sin. Any person who sins has not seen him or known him.
local: Die wɩa vuodieke mana dɩ benne Masia ma ka yie bɩaŋ; ama vuodieke dɩ yinene bɩaŋ ye ka sɩba Yisa dɩ yine vuodieke, ta ka wɔŋ sɩba wa.

eng: Little children, make sure no one deceives you. The person who practices righteousness is righteous, in the same way that Jesus is righteous.
local: N ballɩ, nɩ da vaa vuoŋ gaaŋ nɩ! Vuodieke mana dɩ yinene wudieke dɩ mʋna yiwo sʋgɩyɩalɩntieŋ sɩba Masia dɩ yine sʋgɩyɩalɩntieŋ die wo.

eng: The person who practices sin belongs to the devil, because the devil has been sinning since the beginning. Gods Son appeared for this purpose: to destroy the works of the devil.
local: Vuodieke mana dɩ yie bɩaŋ bie wo Sitaani nuusi me, dama Sitaani wɔŋ yiwo bɩaŋ a nyɩŋ piiliku me, ama wudieke wɩa Ŋmɩŋ Bʋa die dɩ keŋ yiwo dɩ ʋ chʋʋsɩ Sitaani tʋʋmaha gie.

eng: Those born from God dont practice sin because Gods DNA remains in them. They cant sin because they are born from God.
local: Vuodiekemba mana dɩ yine Ŋmɩŋ ballɩ tuo wo ba Chɔɔŋ Ŋmɩŋ ta ka yie bɩaŋ. Ba ka bɩagɩ yie bɩaŋ dama ba tuone ba Chɔɔŋ Ŋmɩŋ beriŋ wɩa.

eng: This is how Gods children and the devils children are apparent: everyone who doesnt practice righteousness is not from God, including the person who doesnt love a brother or sister.
local: Wudieke dɩ puone Ŋmɩŋ ballɩ aŋaŋ Sitaani ballɩ wʋnna: Vuodieke mana dɩ kana ka yie wudieke dɩ mʋna yaa ka cho ʋ nɩmbʋa ka yi Ŋmɩŋ bʋa.

eng: This is the message that you heard from the beginning: love each other.
local: Die nɩ wolinne a wʋŋ Yisa wɩaha piiliku me wo yine naa; dɩ tɩ chome taŋ.

eng: Dont behave like Cain, who belonged to the evil one and murdered his brother. And why did he kill him? He killed him because his own works were evil, but the works of his brother were righteous.
local: Dɩ ka mʋ tɩ bemme sɩba Keeni die dɩ benne die wo, wʋnɩŋ die ʋ yiwo wʋbɩatɩtieŋ wo Sitaani sɩɩtɩ, ta die kʋʋ ʋ nɩmbʋabiŋ Abeli. Bɩa wɩa die ʋ kʋʋ wa? Die ʋ kʋʋ wa dama ʋ nɩmbʋabike tʋʋma die vɩɩna mɩŋ, ta wʋnɩŋ ʋ tʋʋma dɩ ka vɩɩna.

eng: Dont be surprised, brothers and sisters, if the world hates you.
local: Die wɩa n nɩmballɩ, nɩ daa vaa ka yi nɩ mamachi dɩɩ yi tɩŋgbaŋka gie vuosi dɩ haa nɩ.

eng: We know that we have transferred from death to life, because we love the brothers and sisters. The person who does not love remains in death.
local: Tɩ chone tamba wa dagɩya dɩ tɩ nyɩŋ kumbu hagɩrɩŋ ma a keŋ miivoli dieke dɩ wone kpatɩŋ ma. Ama vuodieke nɩŋ dɩ wone die choti, wʋnɩŋ ʋ ye bie wo kumbu hagɩrɩŋ ma.

eng: Everyone who hates a brother or sister is a murderer, and you know that murderers dont have eternal life residing in them.
local: Vuodieke nɩŋ mana dɩ hana ʋ nɩmbʋa yiwo vuokʋʋrʋ, ta nɩ sɩba a baarɩ miivoli dieke dɩ wone kpatɩŋ wo vuokʋʋrʋ ma.

eng: This is how we know love: Jesus laid down his life for us, and we ought to lay down our lives for our brothers and sisters.
local: Yisa Masia die dɩ tuone tɩ kuŋ a kpi tɩ wɩa, dagɩna tɩ choti dɩ sɩna dene. Tɩ gbaŋ mʋ tɩ tuo wo tɩ nɩmballɩ kuŋ a kpi.

eng: But if someone has material possessions and sees a brother or sister in need but refuses to help—how can the love of God dwell in a person like that?.
local: Dɩɩ yi vuodieke dɩ yallɩ nyinti a mɔgɩsa ʋ gbaŋ ta tɩala, ama ta ye ʋ nɩmbʋa dɩ wo jaaŋ, ta ʋ baga dɩ wo ʋ ma, Ŋmɩŋ choti wo die vuoke me.

eng: Little children, lets not love with words or speech but with action and truth.
local: N ballɩ tɩ chotiti daa bemme tɩ nʋaŋ ma nyɩɩna ma; ama ka yi wusie choti dieke dɩ suŋŋinene vuosi.

eng: This is how we will know that we belong to the truth and reassure our hearts in Gods presence.
local: Dɩɩ yi tɩ cho taŋ die nɩŋ tɩ sɩba a baarɩ dɩ tɩ dɩ wa wusie dagɩkʋ, ta tɩ nan dɩ yaa sikimiŋ Ŋmɩŋ nɩŋŋa.

eng: Even if our hearts condemn us, God is greater than our hearts and knows all things.
local: Dɩɩ yi ta tɩ sʋŋanyile dɩ daga tɩ dɩ tɩ yiwo bɩaŋ, nɩ vaa tɩ tɩɩnsɩ dɩ Ŋmɩŋ tɩaŋ tɩ sʋŋanyile mɩŋ ta bɩ sɩba wɩɩŋ mana.

eng: Dear friends, if our hearts dont condemn us, we have confidence in relationship to God.
local: N zʋamba, dɩɩ yi tɩ sʋŋanyile dɩ ka dagɩ tɩ dɩ tɩ yi bɩaŋ die nɩŋ tɩ yaa sikimiŋ Ŋmɩŋ jigiŋ.

eng: We receive whatever we ask from him because we keep his commandments and do what pleases him.
local: Dɩɩ yi tɩ dɩa ʋ mɩraha ta yie wudieke dɩ nannana ʋ sʋŋ die bala ka vaa ʋ dɩ yɩa tɩ jadieke mana tɩ jʋʋsɩnana a yaala.

eng: This is his commandment, that we believe in the name of his Son, Jesus Christ, and love each other as he commanded us.
local: Naa yine ʋ mɩraha, dɩ tɩ yi ʋ Bʋa Yisa Masia yada ta chome taŋ sɩba Masia dɩ yɩna tɩ nʋarɩ dene wo.

eng: Those who keep his commandments dwell in God and God dwells in them. This is how we know that he dwells in us, because of the Spirit he has given us.
local: Vuodieke nɩŋ mana dɩ dɩna ʋ mɩraha, banɩŋ ba lagɩŋ beri mɩŋ aŋaŋ Ŋmɩŋ ta Ŋmɩŋ dɩ beri aŋaŋ ba. Jadieke dɩ dagɩna tɩ dɩ Ŋmɩŋ beri aŋaŋ tɩ wa yine ʋ Halɩkasɩka ʋ nagɩna a yɩ tɩ wa.

eng: Everyone who believes that Jesus is the Christ has been born from God. Whoever loves someone who is a parent loves the child born to the parent.
local: Vuodieke mana dɩ yine yada dɩ Yisa yiwo Ŋmɩŋ Vuovʋarɩkɩrɩ Masia wa wʋnɩŋ vuoke yiwo Ŋmɩŋ bʋa. Ta vuodieke nɩŋ dɩ chone chɔɔŋ wa nan dɩ cho ʋ bʋa gbaŋ.

eng: This is how we know that we love the children of God: when we love God and keep Gods commandments.
local: Dɩɩ yi tɩ cho Ŋmɩŋ ta yie wudieke ʋ mɩraha dɩ dagɩna tɩ wa, die balla ka vaa tɩ sɩmma dɩ tɩ cho ʋ ballɩ mɩŋ.

eng: This is the love of God: we keep Gods commandments. Gods commandments are not difficult.
local: Dɩɩ yi tɩ seŋ cho Ŋmɩŋ tɩ nan dɩdɩ ʋ mɩraha, ʋ mɩraha dɩɩsɩŋ ka tʋa.

eng: because everyone who is born from God defeats the world. And this is the victory that has defeated the world: our faith.
local: Ŋmɩŋ bʋa mana nan bɩagɩ a nyaŋŋɩ tɩŋgbaŋka gie magɩsɩŋ, ta tɩ yine Yisa Masia yada wa yɩnana tɩ hagɩrɩŋ tɩ bɩagɩ nyaŋŋa die.

eng: Who defeats the world? Isnt it the one who believes that Jesus is Gods Son?.
local: Mɩnɩa baaŋ bɩagɩ nyaŋŋɩ tɩŋgbaŋka gie magɩsɩŋ? Sie vuodieke nyɩɩna dɩ yine yada dɩ Yisa yiwo Ŋmɩŋ Bʋadembiŋ.

eng: This is the one who came by water and blood: Jesus Christ. Not by water only but by water and blood. And the Spirit is the one who testifies, because the Spirit is the truth.
local: Die dɩ yiwo wʋnɩŋ Yisa Masia die nyɩna arɩzanna ma a keŋ tɩŋgbaŋka gie me ta ka kʋaŋ chaaŋ Jɔɔn die dɩ sɩɩ wa Ŋmɩŋ nyaaŋ, ta ka kʋaŋ chaaŋ ʋ kpi ta ʋ zɩŋ dɩ nyɩŋ. Dɩ ka yi wusie dɩ wudieke nyɩɩna ma die dɩ yine wo yiwo dɩ Jɔɔn die sɩɩ wa Ŋmɩŋ nyaaŋ ama die ʋ kpiye mɩŋ ta ʋ zɩŋ dɩ nyɩŋ. Ta Ŋmɩŋ Halɩkasɩka dɩ yi daansɩatieŋ, dama Halɩkasɩka yine wusietieŋ.

eng: The three are testifying.
local: Vuodiekemba dɩ yine daansɩatieliŋ yiwo ba bataa:.

eng: the Spirit, the water, and the blood—and the three are united in agreement.
local: banɩŋ ba yine Ŋmɩŋ Halɩkasɩka aŋaŋ nyaabʋ aŋaŋ zɩmbʋ, ba bataa wa gie yiwo nʋabalɩmɩŋ.

eng: If we receive human testimony, Gods testimony is greater, because this is what God testified: he has testified about his Son.
local: Tɩ yie vuota siaria yada mɩŋ, ama Ŋmɩŋ siara faasɩ yaa hagɩrɩŋ, ta wʋnɩŋ ʋ yɩna siara wa gie yaa gamma ʋ Bʋa wa ma.

eng: The one who believes in Gods Son has the testimony within; the one who doesnt believe God has made God a liar, because that one has not believed the testimony that God gave about his Son.
local: Die wɩa vuodieke mana dɩ yine Ŋmɩŋ Bʋa wa yada yalla Ŋmɩŋ siaraka gie ʋ sʋŋ ma, ama vuodieke nɩŋ mana dɩ kana ka yi Ŋmɩŋ siaraka gie yada, wʋnɩŋ ʋ nagɩ wa Ŋmɩŋ a bɩrɩŋ ŋmɩnchɩbɩtieŋ, dama ʋ ka yi yada dɩ siara dieke Ŋmɩŋ dɩ yɩna yaa gamma ʋ Bʋa wa ma yiwo wusie.

eng: And this is the testimony: God gave eternal life to us, and this life is in his Son.
local: Ŋmɩŋ siaraka yiwo naa: Ŋmɩŋ yɩ tɩ wa miivoli dieke dɩ wone kpatɩŋ, ta miivolike gie nyɩŋ wa ʋ Bʋa wa jigiŋ.

eng: The one who has the Son has life. The one who doesnt have Gods Son does not have life.
local: Vuodieke nɩŋ mana dɩ taasɩna aŋaŋ Ŋmɩŋ Bʋa wa yaa miivolike gie mɩŋ; ama vuodieke nɩŋ mana dɩ kana ka taasɩ aŋaŋ Ŋmɩŋ Bʋa wa wo kanɩŋ miivoli mi.

eng: I write these things to you who believe in the name of Gods Son so that you can know that you have eternal life.
local: N maaga gbaŋkʋ gie a yɩa nɩnɩŋ vuodiekemba dɩ yine Ŋmɩŋ Bʋa wa yada wa, dama n yaala nɩ sɩmma dɩ nɩ yaa miivoli dieke dɩ wone kpatɩŋ mɩŋ.

eng: This is the confidence that we have in our relationship with God: If we ask for anything in agreement with his will, he listens to us.
local: Die wɩa tɩ ka chɩga ŋmaamɩŋ saŋŋa dieke tɩ keŋ jʋʋsa Ŋmɩŋ dama ʋ wʋmma a yɩa tɩ dɩɩ yi tɩ jʋʋsa a yaala jadieke dɩ yine ʋ sʋgɩnanɩŋ.

eng: From the elder. To the chosen gentlewoman and her children, whom I truly love.
local: Manɩŋ Jɔɔn vuodieke dɩ yine Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrɩŋ jakʋʋŋ wa maagɩnana gbaŋkʋ gie a yɩa n taa vuodieke Ŋmɩŋ die dɩ vʋarɩna wa aŋaŋ ʋ ballɩ. Manɩŋ n cho nɩ mɩŋ aŋaŋ wusie, ama daa manɩŋ n kasɩŋ n chone nɩ, ama vuodiekemba mana dɩ tuone Ŋmɩŋ wusie dagɩkʋ gbaŋ cho nɩ mɩŋ.

eng: If we know that he listens to whatever we ask, we know that we have received what we asked from him.
local: Dɩɩ yi tɩ sɩba a baarɩ dɩ Ŋmɩŋ wʋmma tɩ mɩŋ saŋŋa dieke tɩ keŋ jʋʋsa wa, die nɩŋ tɩ sɩba a baarɩ dɩ ʋ wɔŋ tuo tɩ jʋʋsɩŋ mɩŋ.

eng: because of the truth that remains with us and will be with us forever.
local: Manɩŋ aŋaŋ ba chone nɩ, dama wusie dagɩkʋ bie tɩ sʋgɩtɩ ma ta nan dɩ bie tɩ sʋŋ ma yaa gamma haahuu.

eng: If anyone sees a brother or sister committing a sin that does not result in death, they should pray, and God will give life to them—that is, to those who commit sins that dont result in death. There is a sin that results in death—Im not saying that you should pray about that.
local: Dɩɩ yi vuoŋ dɩ ye ʋ nɩmbʋa dɩ yinene bɩa dieke dɩ kana kaaŋ puo wo a nyɩŋ Ŋmɩŋ jigiŋ, ʋ jʋʋsɩ Ŋmɩŋ a yɩ wa aŋ Ŋmɩŋ vaa ʋ wʋbɩatɩ a chaa wa ta yɩ wa miivoli, dama ʋ naga chaa vuodieke tʋmbɩatɩ dɩ kana kaaŋ puo wo a nyɩna ʋ jigiŋ. Ama tʋmbɩatɩ ataŋ beri a bɩagɩ puo vuoŋ a nyɩna Ŋmɩŋ jigiŋ, n ka bala dɩ nɩ jʋʋsɩma Ŋmɩŋ a yɩma vuodiekemba dɩ yinene hanɩŋ bɩabʋ mi.

eng: Grace, mercy, and peace from God the Father and from Jesus Christ, the Son of the Father, will be ours who live in truth and love.
local: Tɩ Chɔɔŋ Nabidie Ŋmɩŋ aŋaŋ ʋ Bʋa wa Yisa Masia suŋŋiŋ aŋaŋ ba zɔɔlɩnchɩgɩla aŋaŋ ba sʋgɩdʋagɩŋ nan dɩ bie tɩ ma, tɩ dɩna wusie dagɩŋ ta cho taŋ die wo.

eng: Every unrighteous action is sin, but there is a sin that does not result in death.
local: Tʋŋ dieke mana dɩ kana ka vɩɩna yiwo bɩaŋ, ama tʋmbɩatɩ ataŋ beri a ka puo vuoŋ a nyɩna Ŋmɩŋ jigiŋ.

eng: I was overjoyed to find some of your children living in the truth, just as we had been commanded by the Father.
local: N sʋŋ die fɩalɩya pam n yene ta fʋ ballɩ bataŋ dɩ wa wusie dagɩkʋ dieke tɩ Chɔɔŋ Ŋmɩŋ dɩ yɩna tɩ wa.

eng: We know that everyone born from God does not sin, but the ones born from God guard themselves, and the evil one cannot touch them.
local: Tɩ sɩba a baarɩ vuodiekemba nɩŋ mana dɩ yine Ŋmɩŋ ballɩ ka yie bɩaŋ saŋŋa mana dama Ŋmɩŋ Bʋa wa gbarɩ ba mɩŋ ta tʋntʋmbɩatɩtieŋ, Sitaani dɩ kaaŋ bɩagɩ a yi be wɩɩŋ.

eng: Now, dear friends, I am requesting that we love each other. Its not as though Im writing a new command to you, but its one we have had from the beginning.
local: N taa, n jʋʋsa fʋ, vaa aŋ tɩ mana chome tɩ nɩmballɩ chanchaalɩŋ. Genke ka yi mɩrɩhaalɩŋ maŋ maaga a yɩa nɩ, ka yiwo mɩrɩ dieke tɩ tuone a nyɩŋ piiliku me wo a yaa keŋ tʋgɩ jinne.

eng: We know we are from God, and the whole world lies in the power of the evil one.
local: Tɩnɩŋ tɩ sɩba a baarɩ tɩ yiwo Ŋmɩŋ ballɩ ama vuodiekemba nɩŋ mana dɩ kana ka yi Ŋmɩŋ ballɩ bie wo Sitaani nuusi me.

eng: This is love: that we live according to his commands. This is the command that you heard from the beginning: live in love.
local: Wusie choti yiwo tɩ yime wudieke Ŋmɩŋ dɩ bala tɩ. Piiliku me wo, ʋ wɔŋ balɩ tɩ mɩŋ dɩ tɩ chome wo aŋaŋ tɩ chanchaalɩŋ.

eng: We know that Gods Son has come and has given us understanding to know the one who is true. We are in the one who is true by being in his Son, Jesus Christ. This is the true God and eternal life.
local: Tɩ sɩba a baarɩ Ŋmɩŋ Bʋa dembike Yisa wa die keŋ wo tɩŋgbaŋka gie me a yɩ tɩ yɩaŋ dɩ tɩ sɩmma wusie Ŋmɩnnɩ. Tɩ wana taasɩ aŋaŋ Yisa wa wɩa, die vana tɩ taasɩ aŋaŋ wusie Ŋmɩnnɩ, wʋnɩŋ ʋ yine vuodieke dɩ yɩnana miivoli dieke dɩ wone kpatɩŋ.

eng: Many deceivers have gone into the world who do not confess that Jesus Christ came as a human being. This kind of person is the deceiver and the antichrist.
local: Tɔ, gɩgaantɩŋ pam wɔŋ jatɩ ga tɩŋgbaŋka gie lʋgaha mana mɩŋ. Gɩgaantɩba gie bala dɩ banɩŋ ba ka yi yada dɩ die ba mɩɩrɩ Yisa Masia ta ʋ yi vuota. Die vuosisi yiwo gɩgaantɩŋ ta bɩ yi Masia dataasɩ.

eng: Little children, guard yourselves from idols!.
local: N ballɩ, nɩ vʋarɩ nɩ gbaŋ a nyɩŋ bugile me.

eng: Watch yourselves so that you dont lose what weve worked for but instead receive a full reward.
local: Die wɩa, nɩ sɩmma nɩ gbaŋ ta da keŋ waarɩ jadieke nɩ kpaŋŋa nɩ gbaŋ a tʋŋ ka wɩa wa, ta keŋ ye ka nyʋarɩ mana Ŋmɩŋ jigiŋ.

eng: Anyone who goes too far and does not continue in the teaching about Christ does not have God. Whoever continues in this teaching has both the Father and the Son.
local: Vuodieke nɩŋ dɩ kana ka mɩŋŋɩ tuo Yisa Masia dagɩkʋ ama ta gʋta ʋ gbaŋ gbaŋ ʋ wɩa, Ŋmɩŋ wo ʋ jigiŋ, ama vuodieke nɩŋ dɩ dɩna dagɩkʋ ta ka vasa, tɩ Chɔɔŋ Ŋmɩŋ aŋaŋ ʋ Bʋadembiŋ Yisa Masia bie ʋ jigiŋ.

eng: Whoever comes to you who does not affirm this teaching should neither be received nor welcomed into your home.
local: Die wɩa vuodieke nɩŋ mana dɩ kienene nɩ jigiŋ ta ka daga Yisa Masia dagɩkʋ dieke dɩ tʋgɩsɩna, nɩ da tuo wo nɩ tige me, nɩ daa keŋ a waasɩ wa gbaŋ.

eng: because welcoming people like that is the same thing as sharing in their evil actions.
local: dama vuodieke dɩ waasɩna wa, ʋ gbaŋ ʋ gʋtɩ wa mɩŋ ʋ tʋmbɩatɩ ma.

eng: I have a lot to tell you. I dont want to use paper and ink, but I hope to visit you and talk with you face-to-face, so that our joy can be complete.
local: N yaa wɩa pam dɩ n balɩ nɩ, ama n ka yaala n maagɩha gbaŋkʋ gie sʋŋ a yɩ nɩ, n yaa tama dɩ n nan keŋ kaagɩ nɩ, aŋ tɩ dii azama aŋaŋ taŋ, dɩɩ yi die, dɩ nan yi tɩ mana sʋgɩfɩalɩŋ pam.

eng: Your chosen sisters children greet you.
local: Fʋ taa vuodieke Ŋmɩŋ dɩ vʋarɩna ballɩ waasa fʋ.

eng: From the elder. To my dear friend Gaius, whom I truly love.
local: Manɩŋ Jɔɔn vuodieke dɩ yine Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrɩŋ jakʋʋŋ maagɩnana gbaŋkʋ gie a yɩa n zʋa Gayusi, vuodieke dɩ yine n zʋa choti.

eng: Dear friend, Im praying that all is well with you and that you enjoy good health in the same way that you prosper spiritually.
local: N zʋa, n jʋʋsa Ŋmɩŋ a yɩa fʋ dɩ fʋ yallɩma alaafɩa, ta jaaŋ mana gamma vɩɩnɩŋ a yɩma fʋ sɩba fʋ benne vɩɩnɩŋ die wo Ŋmɩŋ jigiŋ.

eng: I was overjoyed when the brothers and sisters arrived and spoke highly of your faithfulness to the truth, shown by how you live according to the truth.
local: N yaa sʋgɩfɩalɩŋ pam die tɩ nɩmballɩ bataŋ dɩ kenne a balɩ fʋ dɩna Ŋmɩŋ dagɩkʋ dene, ta bie wusieke me saŋŋa mana.

eng: I have no greater joy than this: to hear that my children are living according to the truth.
local: Jaaŋ mana ka yi mɩŋ sʋgɩfɩalɩŋ a tʋgɩ n wʋnna dɩ n ballɩ dɩ wa dagɩkʋ dieke dɩ tʋgɩsɩna wa.

eng: Dear friend, you act faithfully in whatever you do for our brothers and sisters, even though they are strangers.
local: N zʋa, fʋ suŋŋinene tɩ nɩmballɩ aŋaŋ ba bataŋ fʋ zɩna wa gbaŋ, fʋnɩŋ yie wo wudieke dɩ vɩɩŋna.

eng: They spoke highly of your love in front of the church. You all would do well to provide for their journey in a way that honors God.
local: Ba keŋ keŋ Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrɩŋ lagɩŋkʋ jigiŋ saŋŋa dieke mana ba ŋaaŋ tɩɩnsɩ fʋ burichinike gie wɩa mɩŋ. Die wɩa ba keŋ kieŋ fʋ jigiŋ fʋ suŋŋi be aŋaŋ ba chɔnɩŋ ma sie dieke me dɩ fɩalɩnana Ŋmɩŋ sʋŋ. Mɩŋŋɩ pɔgɩlɩ ba dama ba yiwo Ŋmɩŋ sɩɩtɩ.

eng: because they left on their journey for the sake of Jesus Christ without accepting any support from the Gentiles.
local: Dɩ yiwo Yisa Masia saaŋ wɩa ba dɩ dɩa a mʋʋla wɩaha, ama ba ka tuose jaaŋ mana a nyɩnna vuodiekemba dɩ kana ka yi Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrɩba jigiŋ.

eng: Therefore, we ought to help people like this so that we can be coworkers with the truth.
local: Die wɩa tɩnɩŋ Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrɩŋ mʋ tɩ suŋŋi wo vuosi gie, amʋ tɩ nan gʋtɩ ba ma a tʋma yaa gamma wusieke dagɩŋ mʋʋlɩŋ.

eng: I wrote something to the church, but Diotrephes, who likes to put himself first, doesnt welcome us.
local: Die n maagɩ wa wɩa ataŋ a yɩ Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrɩba diekemba dɩ benne nɩ jigiŋ wo, ama Diyotirefesi die zeti wo n nʋaŋ, dama ʋ yaala ʋ wasɩma ʋ gbaŋ vuokpɩɩŋ.

eng: Because of this, if I come, I will bring up what he has done—making unjustified and wicked accusations against us. And as if that were not enough, he not only refuses to welcome the brothers and sisters but stops those who want to do so and even throws them out of the church!.
local: Die wɩa maŋ keŋ keŋ n nan yuori balɩ wudiekemba mana ʋ yine, wʋbɩa diekemba ʋ bala yaa gamma tɩ ma aŋaŋ ŋmɩnchɩbɩsɩ diekemba ʋ balala wa. Daa genhe nyɩɩna ma ʋ yie, ama ʋ zetiye mɩŋ dɩ ʋ tuo tɩ nɩmballɩ diekemba dɩ dɩna dɩa wa, ta kaga vuodiekemba dɩ yaala ba tuo be chaantɩ, ta bɩ yaga ba nyɩnna Masia dɩdɩɩsɩrɩba lagɩŋkʋ ma.

eng: Dear friend, dont imitate what is bad but what is good. Whoever practices what is good belongs to God. Whoever practices what is bad has not seen God.
local: N zʋa, da keŋ chansɩma vuoŋ tʋntʋmbɩatɩ, ama chansɩma wudieke dɩ vɩɩŋna. Vuodieke dɩ tʋna tʋnvɩɩna wʋnɩŋ ʋ yiwo Ŋmɩŋ Bʋa, ama vuodieke dɩ tʋnnana tʋmbɩatɩ, ʋ tʋmbɩatɩ daga dɩ ʋ ka sɩba Ŋmɩŋ.

eng: Everyone speaks highly of Demetrius, even the truth itself. We also speak highly of him, and you know that what we say is true.
local: Vuoŋ mana bɩra Demetirusi, ta ʋ beriŋ dɩ daga dɩ ʋ dɩ wa wusie dagɩkʋ; ta n gbaŋ maŋ bɩra wa; ta fʋ sɩba dɩ wudieke nɩŋ mana n bala yaa gamma vuoŋ ma yiwo wusie.

eng: I have a lot to say to you, but I dont want to use pen and ink.
local: Manɩŋ n yaa wɩa pam dɩ n balɩ fʋ, ama n ka yaala n maagɩha a yi gbaŋkʋ gie sʋŋ.

eng: I hope to see you soon, and we will speak face-to-face.
local: Ama n yaa tama dɩ n nan keŋ ye fʋ daraa ale wo gie nʋaŋ, aŋ tɩ dii azama aŋaŋ taŋ.

eng: Peace be with you. Your friends here greet you. Greet our friends there by name.
local: Nabidie Ŋmɩŋ yɩ fʋ sʋgɩdʋagɩŋ. Fʋ zʋalɩba mana waasa fʋ. Tɩ zʋalɩba diekemba dɩaŋ dɩ benne fʋ jigiri, fʋ waasɩ ba mana wʋnyɩ wʋnyɩ.

eng: Jude, a slave of Jesus Christ and brother of James. To those who are called, loved by God the Father and kept safe by Jesus Christ.
local: Manɩŋ Juudi vuodieke dɩ yine Yisa Masia tʋntʋntʋ ta bɩ yi Jemisi nɩmbʋa, maagɩnana gbaŋkʋ gie a yɩa vuodiekemba tɩ Chɔɔŋ Ŋmɩŋ dɩ vʋarɩna ba ta cho be ta Yisa Masia dɩ gbarɩ ba wa:.

eng: May you have more and more mercy, peace, and love.
local: Ŋmɩŋ chɩgɩ nɩ zɔɔlɩŋ, ta yɩ nɩ sʋgɩdʋagɩŋ aŋaŋ choti pam.

eng: Dear friends, I wanted very much to write to you concerning the salvation we share. Instead, I must write to urge you to fight for the faith delivered once and for all to Gods holy people.
local: N nɩmballɩ choti, die n mɩa mɩŋ dɩ n maagɩ nɩ gbanɩŋ yaa gamma gbatɩtaaŋ dieke tɩ yalla wa ma, ama lele n yeye mɩŋ ta dɩ yiwo talasɩ dɩ n maagɩ a yɩ nɩ, ta kpaaŋ nɩ aŋ nɩ ŋmɩntɩ niŋ a yaalɩma yada wudieke Ŋmɩŋ dɩ nagɩna a yɩ ʋ vuosi wo vɩɩnɩŋ, ta daa vaa vuoŋ tarɩgɩha.

eng: Godless people have slipped in among you. They turn the grace of our God into unrestrained immorality and deny our only master and Lord, Jesus Christ. Judgment was passed against them a long time ago.
local: Dama vuosi bataŋ, vuodiekemba dɩ kana ka chɩga Ŋmɩŋ lɔbɩrɩna a bie nɩ sʋŋ, ta tarɩgɩ wʋnɩŋ Ŋmɩŋ zɔɔlɩnchɩgɩla wɩaha dɩ ba yime ba nyɩŋgbanɩŋ lɔlɩbɩatɩ tʋʋma; ta ka tuo Yisa Masia nʋaŋ; wʋnɩŋ ʋ nyɩɩna ma ʋ yine tɩ Sikpeŋtieŋ aŋaŋ tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ. Wʋbɩayiiribe gie tɩbɩdatɩŋ wɔŋ maagɩ Ŋmɩŋ gbaŋkʋ sʋŋ a yʋasɩ mɩŋ.

eng: I want to remind you of something you already know very well. The Lord, who once saved a people out of Egypt, later destroyed those who didnt maintain their faith.
local: Wudieke n yaala n balɩ nɩ naa, nɩ wɔŋ wʋŋ a mana mɩŋ, ta bɩ sɩba ha, ama n yaala n tɩɩnsɩ nɩ yaa gamma a wɩa; tɩ Yɔmʋtieŋ Nabidie Ŋmɩŋ die gbatɩ wa ʋ vuosi a nyɩŋ Ijipiti tɩŋgbaŋ ma, ama ka kʋaŋ chaaŋ die ʋ kʋʋ ba bataŋ vuodiekemba dɩ kana ka yi wo yada wa.

eng: I remind you too of the angels who didnt keep their position of authority but deserted their own home. The Lord has kept them in eternal chains in the underworld until the judgment of the great day.
local: Nɩ bɩ sɩba a baarɩ dɩ malaka diekemba die dɩ kana ka mɩŋŋɩ a pɔgɩlɩ yiko dieke Ŋmɩŋ dɩ yɩna ba aŋaŋ ka sieŋ me wo, ta die ka bɩ wɩarɩ a bie ba jigiberisike arɩzanna ma wa, Ŋmɩŋ die bɔbɩ ba mɩŋ aŋaŋ chɔrɩma a nagɩ ba taaŋ dansarɩka vɔrɩ dieke dɩ golinne ta bɩ yi lɩmɩŋ ma, ta gbarɩ dakpeŋkpɩɩŋ dieke ʋ bala ʋ dii ba sarɩya wa.

eng: In the same way, Sodom and Gomorrah and neighboring towns practiced immoral sexual relations and pursued other sexual urges. By undergoing the punishment of eternal fire, they serve as a warning.
local: Die gbaŋ gbaŋ dɩ yi a yɩ Sodomi aŋaŋ Gomora tɩgɩsɩ aŋaŋ tɩgɩ diekemba die dɩ gbigine mi wo. Vuosi mi die tʋma daakpana aŋaŋ hɔgʋkpana tʋʋma, ta die dɩ lɔlɩbɩatɩ pam ta die ye tɩbɩdatɩ dieke die dɩ yine boli dieke dɩ dinene yaa gamma haahuu, ka yi kpaamɩŋ a yɩa vuoŋ mana.

eng: Yet, even knowing this, these dreamers in the same way pollute themselves, reject authority, and slander the angels.
